These findings reveal that current PRMs function as fluency detectors rather than reasoning verifiers, creating systematic blind spots that undermine their use as training signals. We release PRM-BiasBench and a diagnostic toolkit to enable robustness evaluation before deployment. The code and dataset are available at https://github.com/SqueezeAILab/reward-under-attack.

AI.tldr: 当前最先进的流程奖励模型（PRMs）存在系统性可利用漏洞，在对抗优化压力下容易被攻击，导致奖励分数虚高但实际推理质量低下。
AI.motivation: PRMs已成为LLM推理流程的核心组件，但其在对抗攻击下的鲁棒性尚未得到充分验证。研究发现现有PRMs存在系统性漏洞，可能被恶意利用，影响其作为训练信号的可靠性。
AI.method: 提出三级诊断框架：1) 静态扰动分析，测试表面风格变化和逻辑损坏；2) 对抗优化攻击，使用梯度方法探索奖励空间；3) RL诱导的奖励黑客攻击，训练策略最大化PRM奖励但保持低真实准确率。
AI.result: 发现PRMs存在流畅性-逻辑分离：对表面风格变化高度不变（奖励变化<0.1），但对逻辑损坏检测不一致；对抗攻击可显著提高无效轨迹的奖励分数；RL训练的策略可获得接近完美的PRM奖励（>0.9），但真实准确率极低（<4%），43%的奖励增益来自风格捷径。
AI.conclusion: 当前PRMs主要作为流畅性检测器而非推理验证器，存在系统性盲点，不适合直接作为训练信号。作者发布了PRM-BiasBench和诊断工具包，以在部署前进行鲁棒性评估。

title: Taiwan Safety Benchmark and Breeze Guard: Toward Trustworthy AI for Taiwanese Mandarin
summary: Global safety models exhibit strong performance across widely used benchmarks, yet their training data rarely captures the cultural and linguistic nuances of Taiwanese Mandarin. This limitation results in systematic blind spots when interpreting region-specific risks such as localized financial scams, culturally embedded hate speech, and misinformation patterns. To address these gaps, we introduce TS-Bench (Taiwan Safety Benchmark), a standardized evaluation suite for assessing safety performance in Taiwanese Mandarin. TS-Bench contains 400 human-curated prompts spanning critical domains including financial fraud, medical misinformation, social discrimination, and political manipulation. In parallel, we present Breeze Guard, an 8B safety model derived from Breeze 2, our previously released general-purpose Taiwanese Mandarin LLM with strong cultural grounding from its original pre-training corpus. Breeze Guard is obtained through supervised fine-tuning on a large-scale, human-verified synthesized dataset targeting Taiwan-specific harms. Our central hypothesis is that effective safety detection requires the cultural grounding already present in the base model; safety fine-tuning alone is insufficient to introduce new socio linguistic knowledge from scratch. Empirically, Breeze Guard significantly outperforms the leading 8B general-purpose safety model, Granite Guardian 3.3, on TS-Bench (+0.17 overall F1), with particularly large gains in high-context categories such as scam (+0.66 F1) and financial malpractice (+0.43 F1). While the model shows slightly lower performance on English-centric benchmarks (ToxicChat, AegisSafetyTest), this tradeoff is expected for a regionally specialized safety model optimized for Taiwanese Mandarin. Together, Breeze Guard and TS-Bench establish a new foundation for trustworthy AI deployment in Taiwan.

AI.tldr: 开发了针对台湾中文的安全模型Breeze Guard和评估基准TS-Bench，填补全球安全模型在台湾文化和语言风险检测上的盲点
AI.motivation: 现有全球安全模型缺乏对台湾中文文化和语言细微差别的理解，导致在检测区域特定风险（如本地金融诈骗、文化嵌入仇恨言论）时存在系统性盲点
AI.method: 1) 创建TS-Bench评估基准：包含400个人工策划的提示，涵盖金融欺诈、医疗错误信息、社会歧视和政治操纵等关键领域；2) 开发Breeze Guard安全模型：基于具有台湾文化基础的通才模型Breeze 2，通过监督微调在大规模人工验证的合成数据集上训练，专门针对台湾特定危害
AI.result: Breeze Guard在TS-Bench上显著优于领先的8B通才安全模型Granite Guardian 3.3（整体F1提高0.17），在诈骗检测（F1提高0.66）和金融不当行为检测（F1提高0.43）等需要高语境理解的类别中表现尤为突出。虽然在英语基准测试上略有下降，但这是区域专业化模型的预期权衡
AI.conclusion: Breeze Guard和TS-Bench为台湾可信AI部署建立了新基础，验证了有效安全检测需要基础模型已有的文化基础，仅靠安全微调不足以从头引入新的社会语言知识

title: A simple experiment for observing clustering and dynamics of coalescing particles in air turbulence
summary: A novel experimental platform is developed to investigate the dynamics of inertial particles (micro-droplets) in air turbulence. The goal is to observe particle collision and coalescence in turbulent flows, focusing on its impact on the radial distribution function (RDF) and relative velocity statistics. The main tool is a three-dimensional Lagrangian particle tracking (LPT) system, designed for high-resolution measurements at sub-Kolmogorov scales. The system uses LED illumination with high-speed spinning-disk atomizers, enabling tracking of particles of approximately 10~$μ$m and larger under controlled turbulence. A minimum resolvable particle separation of $r/η\approx 0.1$ is achieved. A central contribution is the identification and mitigation of three dominant sources of spurious particles: FMIS, IIS, and TIF. An angle-based geometric filtering criterion strongly suppresses FMIS artifacts on RDF. These procedures establish a validated workflow for reliable small-scale statistics. Using this framework, RDF and a normalized pseudo-collision rate are measured at near-contact separations for particles with Stokes numbers $St \approx 0.2$--$1.0$. Sub-Kolmogorov clustering increases with Stokes number, and near-contact statistics are consistent through the filtering strategy. This study extends LPT limits and provides a reliable methodology for investigating inertial-particle dynamics at previously inaccessible spatial scales.

AI.tldr: 开发新型实验平台研究空气湍流中惯性粒子（微液滴）动力学，聚焦粒子碰撞与聚并对径向分布函数和相对速度统计的影响，通过三维拉格朗日粒子追踪系统实现亚柯尔莫戈罗夫尺度高分辨率测量。
AI.motivation: 研究湍流中惯性粒子的碰撞和聚并过程对理解气溶胶动力学、云微物理等有重要意义，但现有实验技术难以在亚柯尔莫戈罗夫尺度可靠测量粒子间相互作用。
AI.method: 开发三维拉格朗日粒子追踪系统，采用LED照明和高速旋转盘雾化器，可追踪约10μm及以上粒子。通过角度几何滤波准则抑制FMIS伪影，建立验证工作流程确保小尺度统计可靠性。
AI.result: 实现最小可分辨粒子间距r/η≈0.1，测量St≈0.2-1.0粒子在近接触间距的径向分布函数和归一化伪碰撞率。亚柯尔莫戈罗夫尺度聚类随斯托克斯数增加而增强，近接触统计通过滤波策略保持一致。
AI.conclusion: 该研究扩展了拉格朗日粒子追踪技术的极限，为在先前无法达到的空间尺度上研究惯性粒子动力学提供了可靠方法学，特别在抑制伪粒子干扰和验证小尺度统计方面有重要贡献。

title: Structure-preserving model reduction on manifolds of port-Hamiltonian systems
summary: This paper considers structure-preserving model order reduction (MOR) techniques for port-Hamiltonian (pH) systems, which are typically derived from energy-based modelling. To keep favorable properties of pH systems such as stability and passivity in a reduced order model (ROM), we use structure-preserving methods in the reduction process. There exists an extensive literature on structure-preserving MOR methods of pH systems, however, to the best of our knowledge, there does not exist an intrusive structure-preserving MOR method for nonlinear pH systems on the base of general nonlinear approximation maps. To close this gap, we propose a MOR method for pH systems based on the idea of the generalized manifold Galerkin (GMG) reduction. The resulting MOR method can be applied to both linear and nonlinear pH systems resulting in ROMs, which are again of pH form. For the numerical examples, we employ a linear and a nonlinear mass-spring-damper system and the results show that the proposed MOR methods have lower relative reduction error compared to existing methods.

AI.tldr: 提出基于广义流形Galerkin的结构保持模型降阶方法，用于线性和非线性端口哈密顿系统，保持系统的稳定性与无源性。
AI.motivation: 现有文献缺乏基于一般非线性近似映射的侵入式结构保持模型降阶方法，无法在降阶模型中保持端口哈密顿系统的稳定性、无源性等优良特性。
AI.method: 采用广义流形Galerkin降阶思想，提出适用于线性和非线性端口哈密顿系统的结构保持模型降阶方法，确保降阶模型仍保持端口哈密顿形式。
AI.result: 在线性和非线性质量-弹簧-阻尼器系统的数值实验中，所提方法相比现有方法具有更低的相对降阶误差。
AI.conclusion: 成功填补了非线性端口哈密顿系统结构保持模型降阶方法的空白，提出的方法能有效保持系统结构特性并提高降阶精度。

title: RADAR: A Multimodal Benchmark for 3D Image-Based Radiology Report Review
summary: Radiology reports for the same patient examination may contain clinically meaningful discrepancies arising from interpretation differences, reporting variability, or evolving assessments. Systematic analysis of such discrepancies is important for quality assurance, clinical decision support, and multimodal model development, yet remains limited by the lack of standardized benchmarks. We present RADAR, a multimodal benchmark for radiology report discrepancy analysis that pairs 3D medical images with a preliminary report and corresponding candidate edits for the same study. The dataset reflects a standard clinical workflow in which trainee radiologists author preliminary reports that are subsequently reviewed and revised by attending radiologists. RADAR defines a structured discrepancy assessment task requiring models to evaluate proposed edits by determining image-level agreement, assessing clinical severity, and classifying edit type (correction, addition, or clarification). In contrast to prior work emphasizing binary error detection or comparison against fully independent reference reports, RADAR targets fine-grained clinical reasoning and image-text alignment at the report review stage. The benchmark consists of expert-annotated abdominal CT examinations and is accompanied by standardized evaluation protocols to support systematic comparison of multimodal models. RADAR provides a clinically grounded testbed for evaluating multimodal systems as reviewers of radiology report edits.

AI.tldr: RADAR是一个用于放射学报告差异分析的多模态基准测试，包含3D医学图像、初步报告和对应编辑，支持结构化差异评估任务，包括图像级一致性判断、临床严重性评估和编辑类型分类。
AI.motivation: 放射学报告中存在临床意义差异（源于解读差异、报告变异性或评估演变），但缺乏标准化基准限制了系统分析，而系统分析对质量保证、临床决策支持和多模态模型开发至关重要。
AI.method: 创建RADAR多模态基准测试，包含专家标注的腹部CT检查数据，模拟标准临床工作流程（住院医师撰写初步报告，主治医师审核修订）。定义结构化差异评估任务：评估图像级一致性、临床严重性和编辑类型（更正、补充、澄清）。
AI.result: RADAR提供了包含3D医学图像、初步报告和候选编辑的数据集，支持系统评估多模态模型作为放射学报告编辑审核者的能力，并包含标准化评估协议。
AI.conclusion: RADAR为评估多模态系统作为放射学报告编辑审核者提供了临床基础测试平台，支持细粒度临床推理和图像-文本对齐评估，填补了先前工作仅关注二元错误检测或与完全独立参考报告比较的空白。

title: Vision Language Models Cannot Reason About Physical Transformation
summary: Understanding physical transformations is fundamental for reasoning in dynamic environments. While Vision Language Models (VLMs) show promise in embodied applications, whether they genuinely understand physical transformations remains unclear. We introduce ConservationBench evaluating conservation -- whether physical quantities remain invariant under transformations. Spanning four properties with paired conserving/non-conserving scenarios, we generate 23,040 questions across 112 VLMs. Results reveal systematic failure: performance remains near chance with improvements on conservation tasks accompanied by drops on controls. Control experiments show strong textual priors favoring invariance, yet models perform worse with visual content. Neither temporal resolution, prompting, nor curated sampling helps. These findings show that current VLMs fail to maintain transformation-invariant representations of physical properties across dynamic scenes.

AI.tldr: VLMs在物理守恒性理解上存在系统性失败，在守恒任务上的改进伴随着控制任务上的下降，表明它们无法在动态场景中保持物理属性的变换不变表示。
AI.motivation: 理解物理变换对于动态环境中的推理至关重要。虽然视觉语言模型在具身应用中显示出潜力，但它们是否真正理解物理变换仍不清楚。作者希望评估VLMs是否理解守恒性——物理量在变换下是否保持不变。
AI.method: 引入ConservationBench评估框架，涵盖四种物理属性，包含守恒和非守恒配对场景，生成了23,040个问题，测试了112个VLMs。通过控制实验检验文本先验、视觉内容、时间分辨率、提示策略和抽样方法的影响。
AI.result: VLMs表现出系统性失败：性能接近随机猜测，在守恒任务上的改进伴随着控制任务上的下降。控制实验显示强烈的文本先验偏向不变性，但模型在有视觉内容时表现更差。时间分辨率、提示策略或精心抽样均无帮助。
AI.conclusion: 当前VLMs无法在动态场景中保持物理属性的变换不变表示，表明它们在物理变换理解方面存在根本性缺陷。

title: From ARIMA to Attention: Power Load Forecasting Using Temporal Deep Learning
summary: Accurate short-term power load forecasting is important to effectively manage, optimize, and ensure the robustness of modern power systems. This paper performs an empirical evaluation of a traditional statistical model and deep learning approaches for predicting short-term energy load. Four models, namely ARIMA, LSTM, BiLSTM, and Transformer, were leveraged on the PJM Hourly Energy Consumption data. The data processing involved interpolation, normalization, and a sliding-window sequence method. Each model's forecasting performance was evaluated for the 24-hour horizon using MAE, RMSE, and MAPE. Of the models tested, the Transformer model, which relies on self-attention algorithms, produced the best results with 3.8 percent of MAPE, with performance above any model in both accuracy and robustness. These findings underscore the growing potential of attention-based architectures in accurately capturing complex temporal patterns in power consumption data.

AI.tldr: 本文对传统统计模型和深度学习方法在短期电力负荷预测上进行实证评估，发现基于自注意力机制的Transformer模型表现最佳，MAPE达到3.8%。
AI.motivation: 准确的短期电力负荷预测对于有效管理、优化和确保现代电力系统的鲁棒性至关重要。需要评估不同模型在短期能源负荷预测中的性能。
AI.method: 使用ARIMA、LSTM、BiLSTM和Transformer四种模型，基于PJM每小时能源消耗数据进行预测。数据处理包括插值、归一化和滑动窗口序列方法。评估采用24小时预测范围，使用MAE、RMSE和MAPE指标。
AI.result: 在所有测试模型中，基于自注意力算法的Transformer模型表现最佳，MAPE达到3.8%，在准确性和鲁棒性方面均优于其他模型。
AI.conclusion: 这些发现强调了基于注意力的架构在准确捕捉电力消耗数据中复杂时间模式方面的巨大潜力。

title: To Predict or Not to Predict? Towards reliable uncertainty estimation in the presence of noise
summary: This study examines the role of uncertainty estimation (UE) methods in multilingual text classification under noisy and non-topical conditions. Using a complex-vs-simple sentence classification task across several languages, we evaluate a range of UE techniques against a range of metrics to assess their contribution to making more robust predictions. Results indicate that while methods relying on softmax outputs remain competitive in high-resource in-domain settings, their reliability declines in low-resource or domain-shift scenarios. In contrast, Monte Carlo dropout approaches demonstrate consistently strong performance across all languages, offering more robust calibration, stable decision thresholds, and greater discriminative power even under adverse conditions. We further demonstrate the positive impact of UE on non-topical classification: abstaining from predicting the 10\% most uncertain instances increases the macro F1 score from 0.81 to 0.85 in the Readme task. By integrating UE with trustworthiness metrics, this study provides actionable insights for developing more reliable NLP systems in real-world multilingual environments. See https://github.com/Nouran-Khallaf/To-Predict-or-Not-to-Predict

AI.tldr: 研究评估了不确定性估计方法在多语言文本分类中的表现，发现蒙特卡洛dropout方法在各种条件下表现稳健，而基于softmax的方法在低资源或领域迁移时可靠性下降。不确定性估计能提升非主题分类性能。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是评估不确定性估计方法在多语言文本分类中的有效性，特别是在噪声和非主题条件下的表现，以开发更可靠的现实世界NLP系统。
AI.method: 使用复杂vs简单句子分类任务，在多种语言中评估多种不确定性估计技术，包括基于softmax的方法和蒙特卡洛dropout方法，并与多种指标对比。
AI.result: 结果显示：基于softmax的方法在高资源域内设置中仍有竞争力，但在低资源或领域迁移时可靠性下降；蒙特卡洛dropout方法在所有语言中表现一致稳健，提供更好的校准、稳定的决策阈值和更强的判别能力；不确定性估计能提升非主题分类性能（在Readme任务中，放弃预测最不确定的10%实例可将宏F1从0.81提升到0.85）。
AI.conclusion: 不确定性估计方法特别是蒙特卡洛dropout，在多语言文本分类中能提供更可靠的预测，特别是在具有挑战性的条件下。将不确定性估计与可信度指标结合，可为开发现实世界多语言环境中更可靠的NLP系统提供实用见解。

title: Glassy phase transition in immiscible steady-state two-phase flow in porous media
summary: Two-phase flow in porous media is a ubiquitous phenomenon that has been studied for well over a century. However, we still lack a successful theory that predicts flow on a macroscopic length scale (the so-called Darcy scale) on the basis of a "microscopic" model. Here we show that the characteristic features of two-phase flow on the Darcy scale can be predicted by mapping the distribution of droplets in 2-phase flow onto the distribution of spins in a spin-glass model. The success of this approach is surprising, as two-phase flow is a non-equilibrium phenomenon, whereas the properties of the spin glass are obtained using equilibrium statistical mechanics. To obtain this mapping, we follow the approach of Meshulam and Bialek (Rev. Mod. Phys. 97, 045002 (2025)) and use the Jaynes maximum entropy principle to derive the spin-glass Hamiltonian using machine learning trained on many realizations of the two-phase flow pattern in a dynamic pore network model. With this mapping, we can construct a "phase diagram" for the 2-phase flow system. We find that the critical line separating the paramagnetic phase from a spin glass phase coincides with the transition where the dependence of the rate of two-phase flow on the imposed pressure gradient changes from linear to non-linear. The glassy phase of the spin model coincides with a flow regime characterized by hysteresis and strong fluctuations over a wide range of time scales. It is tempting to identify this flow regime as a dynamic glass state.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过机器学习将多孔介质两相流的液滴分布映射到自旋玻璃模型的自旋分布，成功预测了达西尺度两相流的特征，并构建了相应的"相图"。
AI.motivation: 尽管多孔介质两相流已被研究一个多世纪，但仍缺乏从微观模型预测宏观达西尺度流动的成功理论。研究旨在建立这种跨尺度预测能力。
AI.method: 采用Meshulam和Bialek的方法，利用Jaynes最大熵原理，通过机器学习训练动态孔隙网络模型中的两相流模式，推导出自旋玻璃哈密顿量，实现两相流到自旋玻璃模型的映射。
AI.result: 成功构建了两相流系统的"相图"，发现顺磁相与自旋玻璃相的临界线对应于两相流速率对压力梯度依赖关系从线性到非线性的转变。玻璃相对应于具有滞后效应和强时间尺度波动的流动状态。
AI.conclusion: 通过将非平衡两相流现象映射到平衡自旋玻璃模型，成功预测了达西尺度两相流的特征，这种映射的意外成功为理解复杂多相流系统提供了新视角。

title: Latent Autoencoder Ensemble Kalman Filter for Data assimilation
summary: The ensemble Kalman filter (EnKF) is widely used for data assimilation in high-dimensional systems, but its performance often deteriorates for strongly nonlinear dynamics due to the structural mismatch between the Kalman update and the underlying system behavior. In this work, we propose a latent autoencoder ensemble Kalman filter (LAE-EnKF) that addresses this limitation by reformulating the assimilation problem in a learned latent space with linear and stable dynamics. The proposed method learns a nonlinear encoder--decoder together with a stable linear latent evolution operator and a consistent latent observation mapping, yielding a closed linear state-space model in the latent coordinates. This construction restores compatibility with the Kalman filtering framework and allows both forecast and analysis steps to be carried out entirely in the latent space. Compared with existing autoencoder-based and latent assimilation approaches that rely on unconstrained nonlinear latent dynamics, the proposed formulation emphasizes structural consistency, stability, and interpretability. We provide a theoretical analysis of learning linear dynamics on low-dimensional manifolds and establish generalization error bounds for the proposed latent model. Numerical experiments on representative nonlinear and chaotic systems demonstrate that the LAE-EnKF yields more accurate and stable assimilation than the standard EnKF and related latent-space methods, while maintaining comparable computational cost and data-driven.

AI.tldr: 提出LAE-EnKF方法，通过在学习到的线性稳定潜在空间中重新表述数据同化问题，解决EnKF在强非线性系统中的性能退化问题。
AI.motivation: 集合卡尔曼滤波(EnKF)在高维系统中广泛使用，但在强非线性动态下性能会恶化，因为卡尔曼更新与底层系统行为之间存在结构不匹配。现有基于自编码器的潜在同化方法依赖无约束的非线性潜在动态，缺乏结构一致性和稳定性。
AI.method: 提出潜在自编码器集合卡尔曼滤波(LAE-EnKF)，通过学习非线性编码器-解码器、稳定线性潜在演化算子和一致的潜在观测映射，在潜在坐标中构建封闭的线性状态空间模型。这使得预测和分析步骤完全在潜在空间中进行，恢复了与卡尔曼滤波框架的兼容性。
AI.result: 在代表性非线性和混沌系统上的数值实验表明，LAE-EnKF比标准EnKF和相关潜在空间方法产生更准确和稳定的同化结果，同时保持可比较的计算成本和数据驱动特性。提供了学习低维流形上线性动态的理论分析和泛化误差界。
AI.conclusion: LAE-EnKF通过强调结构一致性、稳定性和可解释性，有效解决了EnKF在强非线性系统中的局限性，为非线性动态系统的数据同化提供了更可靠的方法。

title: ECHO: Event-Centric Hypergraph Operations via Multi-Agent Collaboration for Multimedia Event Extraction
summary: Multimedia Event Extraction (M2E2) involves extracting structured event records from both textual and visual content. Existing approaches, ranging from specialized architectures to direct Large Language Model (LLM) prompting, typically rely on a linear, end-to-end generation and thus suffer from cascading errors: early cross-modal misalignments often corrupt downstream role assignment under strict grounding constraints. We propose ECHO (Event-Centric Hypergraph Operations), a multi-agent framework that iteratively refines a shared Multimedia Event Hypergraph (MEHG), which serves as an explicit intermediate structure for multimodal event hypotheses. Unlike dialogue-centric frameworks, ECHO coordinates specialized agents by applying atomic hypergraph operations to the MEHG. Furthermore, we introduce a Link-then-Bind strategy that enforces deferred commitment: agents first identify relevant arguments and only then determine their precise roles, mitigating incorrect grounding and limiting error propagation. Extensive experiments on the M2E2 benchmark show that ECHO significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art (SOTA) : with Qwen3-32B, it achieves a 7.3% and 15.5% improvement in average event mention and argument role F1, respectively.

AI.tldr: ECHO是一个多智能体框架，通过迭代优化多媒体事件超图来提取多模态事件，采用"先链接后绑定"策略减少级联错误，显著提升了M2E2任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有多媒体事件提取方法采用线性端到端生成，容易产生级联错误：早期的跨模态对齐错误会在严格的接地约束下破坏下游角色分配。
AI.method: 提出ECHO框架，使用多媒体事件超图作为中间结构，协调专门智能体应用原子超图操作，采用"先链接后绑定"策略：先识别相关论元，再确定精确角色。
AI.result: 在M2E2基准测试中显著优于现有方法：使用Qwen3-32B时，事件提及平均F1提升7.3%，论元角色F1提升15.5%。
AI.conclusion: ECHO通过事件中心超图操作和延迟承诺策略，有效减少了级联错误，在多模态事件提取任务上取得了显著改进。

title: Improving reasoning at inference time via uncertainty minimisation
summary: Large language models (LLMs) now exhibit strong multi-step reasoning abilities, but existing inference-time scaling methods remain computationally expensive, often relying on extensive sampling or external evaluators. We propose a principled strategy that frames reasoning as uncertainty minimisation and operates at the level of individual thoughts rather than tokens. Our method selects, at each reasoning step, the continuation that maximizes the model's self-certainty, a metric computed from its internal predictive distribution. This approach achieves significant improvement with a small number of samples, relies exclusively on model-internal signals, and applies to open-ended questions as opposed to methods like majority voting. Experiments on MATH500 and GSM8K across multiple model sizes demonstrate that thought-level self-certainty maximization consistently outperforms greedy decoding and matches or exceeds self-consistency under comparable token budgets. Cross-linguistic evaluations further indicate that the method transfers robustly beyond high-resource languages. Furthermore, analysis of self-certainty dynamics reveals that correct reasoning trajectories converge early to stable paths, suggesting that early decisions, likely associated with the planning of the reasoning process, are predictive of final accuracy. Building on this result, we show that self-certainty maximisation applied to the early steps can explain most of the performance gain and provide a simple yet efficient inference-time scaling method.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于不确定性最小化的推理方法，在思维层面而非词元层面操作，通过选择最大化模型自确定性的延续来实现高效推理。
AI.motivation: 现有推理时扩展方法计算成本高，依赖大量采样或外部评估器。需要一种更高效、仅依赖模型内部信号的方法来提升多步推理能力。
AI.method: 将推理框架化为不确定性最小化问题，在思维层面操作。每个推理步骤选择最大化模型自确定性的延续，该指标从模型内部预测分布计算得出。
AI.result: 在MATH500和GSM8K数据集上，思维层面自确定性最大化方法显著优于贪婪解码，在可比词元预算下匹配或超过自一致性方法。跨语言评估显示方法在非高资源语言中鲁棒迁移。
AI.conclusion: 正确推理轨迹早期收敛到稳定路径，早期决策预测最终准确性。基于自确定性最大化的早期步骤应用可解释大部分性能提升，提供简单高效的推理时扩展方法。

title: Advances in GRPO for Generation Models: A Survey
summary: Large-scale flow matching models have achieved strong performance across generative tasks such as text-to-image, video, 3D, and speech synthesis. However, aligning their outputs with human preferences and task-specific objectives remains challenging. Flow-GRPO extends Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) to generation models, enabling stable reinforcement learning alignment for generative systems. Since its introduction, Flow-GRPO has triggered rapid research growth, spanning methodological refinements and diverse application domains. This survey provides a comprehensive review of Flow-GRPO and its subsequent developments. We organize existing work along two primary dimensions. First, we analyze methodological advances beyond the original framework, including reward signal design, credit assignment, sampling efficiency, diversity preservation, reward hacking mitigation, and reward model construction. Second, we examine extensions of GRPO-based alignment across generative paradigms and modalities, including text-to-image, video generation, image editing, speech and audio, 3D modeling, embodied vision-language-action systems, unified multimodal models, autoregressive and masked diffusion models, and restoration tasks. By synthesizing theoretical insights and practical adaptations, this survey highlights Flow-GRPO as a general alignment framework for modern generative models and outlines key open challenges for scalable and robust reinforcement-based generation.

AI.tldr: Flow-GRPO将Group Relative Policy Optimization扩展到生成模型，为生成系统提供稳定的强化学习对齐方法，引发了方法改进和多模态应用的研究热潮。
AI.motivation: 大规模流匹配模型在文本到图像、视频、3D和语音合成等生成任务中表现出色，但将其输出与人类偏好和任务特定目标对齐仍然具有挑战性。
AI.method: Flow-GRPO扩展了Group Relative Policy Optimization（GRPO）到生成模型，为生成系统提供稳定的强化学习对齐框架。
AI.result: Flow-GRPO引发了快速的研究增长，包括方法改进（奖励信号设计、信用分配、采样效率等）和多模态应用扩展（文本到图像、视频生成、语音音频、3D建模等）。
AI.conclusion: Flow-GRPO作为现代生成模型的通用对齐框架，为可扩展和稳健的基于强化的生成系统指明了关键开放挑战。

title: How Much Noise Can BERT Handle? Insights from Multilingual Sentence Difficulty Detection
summary: Noisy training data can significantly degrade the performance of language-model-based classifiers, particularly in non-topical classification tasks. In this study we designed a methodological framework to assess the impact of denoising. More specifically, we explored a range of denoising strategies for sentence-level difficulty detection, using training data derived from document-level difficulty annotations obtained through noisy crowdsourcing. Beyond monolingual settings, we also address cross-lingual transfer, where a multilingual language model is trained in one language and tested in another. We evaluate several noise reduction techniques, including Gaussian Mixture Models (GMM), Co-Teaching, Noise Transition Matrices, and Label Smoothing. Our results indicate that while BERT-based models exhibit inherent robustness to noise, incorporating explicit noise detection can further enhance performance. For our smaller dataset, GMM-based noise filtering proves particularly effective in improving prediction quality by raising the Area-Under-the-Curve score from 0.52 to 0.92, or to 0.93 when de-noising methods are combined. However, for our larger dataset, the intrinsic regularisation of pre-trained language models provides a strong baseline, with denoising methods yielding only marginal gains (from 0.92 to 0.94, while a combination of two denoising methods made no contribution). Nonetheless, removing noisy sentences (about 20\% of the dataset) helps in producing a cleaner corpus with fewer infelicities. As a result we have released the largest multilingual corpus for sentence difficulty prediction: see https://github.com/Nouran-Khallaf/denoising-difficulty

AI.tldr: 研究评估了去噪方法对基于语言模型的分类器在句子难度检测任务中的影响，发现对于小数据集GMM去噪效果显著，而大数据集上预训练模型已有较强鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 噪声训练数据会显著降低基于语言模型的分类器性能，特别是在非主题分类任务中。研究旨在评估去噪方法对句子难度检测任务的影响，该任务使用通过噪声众包获得的文档级难度标注数据。
AI.method: 设计了方法框架评估去噪影响，探索了多种去噪策略：高斯混合模型(GMM)、协同教学(Co-Teaching)、噪声转移矩阵和标签平滑。研究涵盖单语和跨语言迁移场景，使用BERT模型进行句子难度检测。
AI.result: 对于小数据集，GMM去噪将AUC从0.52提升至0.92，组合方法可达0.93。对于大数据集，预训练语言模型已有强鲁棒性(AUC 0.92)，去噪方法仅带来边际提升(至0.94)，两种方法组合无额外贡献。去噪可移除约20%噪声句子，生成更干净语料。
AI.conclusion: BERT模型对噪声具有内在鲁棒性，但显式噪声检测可进一步提升性能。去噪效果取决于数据集规模，小数据集受益明显，大数据集增益有限。研究发布了最大的多语言句子难度预测语料库。

title: Step-Size Decay and Structural Stagnation in Greedy Sparse Learning
summary: Greedy algorithms are central to sparse approximation and stage-wise learning methods such as matching pursuit and boosting. It is known that the Power-Relaxed Greedy Algorithm with step sizes $m^{-α}$ may fail to converge when $α>1$ in general Hilbert spaces. In this work, we revisit this phenomenon from a sparse learning perspective. We study realizable regression problems with controlled feature coherence and derive explicit lower bounds on the residual norm, showing that over-decaying step-size schedules induce structural stagnation even in low-dimensional sparse settings. Numerical experiments confirm the theoretical predictions and illustrate the role of feature coherence. Our results provide insight into step-size design in greedy sparse learning.

AI.tldr: 研究Power-Relaxed Greedy算法在稀疏学习中的步长衰减问题，发现当步长衰减过快（α>1）时，即使在低维稀疏设置下也会导致结构停滞，无法收敛。
AI.motivation: 贪婪算法在稀疏逼近和阶段式学习中很重要，但已知Power-Relaxed Greedy算法在步长m^{-α}且α>1时可能在一般希尔伯特空间中不收敛。本文从稀疏学习角度重新审视这一现象。
AI.method: 研究具有受控特征相干性的可实现回归问题，推导残差范数的显式下界，证明过衰减的步长调度即使在低维稀疏设置下也会导致结构停滞。通过数值实验验证理论预测并说明特征相干性的作用。
AI.result: 理论分析显示过衰减步长调度会导致结构停滞，数值实验证实了理论预测，并阐明了特征相干性在贪婪稀疏学习步长设计中的作用。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果为贪婪稀疏学习中的步长设计提供了重要见解，表明需要谨慎选择步长衰减速率以避免结构停滞问题。

title: Three-dimensional reconstruction and segmentation of an aggregate stockpile for size and shape analyses
comment: 7 pages, 4 figures, Proceedings of the 20th International Conference on Soil Mechanics and Geotechnical Engineering
summary: Aggregate size and shape are key properties for determining quality of aggregate materials used in road construction and transportation geotechnics applications. The composition and packing, layer stiffness, and load response are all influenced by these morphological characteristics of aggregates. Many aggregate imaging systems developed to date only focus on analyses of individual or manually separated aggregate particles. There is a need to develop a convenient and affordable system for acquiring 3D aggregate information from stockpiles in the field. This paper presents an innovative 3D imaging approach for potential field evaluation of large-sized aggregates, whereby engineers can perform inspection by taking videos/images with mobile devices such as smartphone cameras. The approach leverages Structure-from-Motion (SfM) techniques to reconstruct the stockpile surface as 3D spatial data, i.e. point cloud, and uses a 3D segmentation algorithm to separate and extract individual aggregates from the reconstructed stockpile. The preliminary results presented in this paper demonstrate the future potential of using 3D aggregate size and shape information for onsite Quality Assurance/Quality Control (QA/QC) tasks.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于智能手机摄像头的3D成像方法，用于现场评估骨料堆的粒径和形状特征，结合SfM技术和3D分割算法实现个体骨料提取。
AI.motivation: 骨料的粒径和形状是影响道路建设和交通岩土工程中材料质量的关键特性。现有骨料成像系统主要针对单个或手动分离的骨料颗粒进行分析，缺乏方便、经济的现场骨料堆3D信息获取系统。
AI.method: 采用基于智能手机摄像头的创新3D成像方法，利用运动恢复结构(SfM)技术重建骨料堆表面为3D点云数据，然后使用3D分割算法从重建的骨料堆中分离和提取单个骨料。
AI.result: 初步结果表明该方法具有未来在现场质量保证/质量控制(QA/QC)任务中使用3D骨料粒径和形状信息的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为现场骨料堆的3D形态特征评估提供了一种便捷、经济的解决方案，有望改进骨料材料的质量控制和工程应用。

title: Learning to Rank the Initial Branching Order of SAT Solvers
comment: Published at VerifAI-2: The Second Workshop on AI Verification in the Wild
summary: Finding good branching orders is key to solving SAT problems efficiently, but finding such branching orders is a difficult problem. Using a learning based approach to predict a good branching order before solving, therefore, has potential. In this paper, we investigate predicting branching orders using graph neural networks as a preprocessing step to conflict-driven clause learning (CDCL) SAT solvers. We show that there are significant gains to be made in existing CDCL SAT solvers by providing a good initial branching. Further, we provide three labeling methods to find such initial branching orders in a tractable way. Finally, we train a graph neural network to predict these branching orders and show through our evaluations that a GNN-initialized ordering yields significant speedups on random 3-CNF and pseudo-industrial benchmarks, with generalization capabilities to instances much larger than the training set. However, we also find that the predictions fail at speeding up more difficult and industrial instances. We attribute this to the solver's dynamic heuristics, which rapidly overwrite the provided initialization, and to the complexity of these instances, making GNN prediction hard.

AI.tldr: 使用图神经网络预测SAT求解器的初始分支顺序，在随机3-CNF和伪工业基准上显著加速求解，但对更难的工业实例无效。
AI.motivation: 寻找好的分支顺序对高效解决SAT问题至关重要，但这是一个困难问题。使用基于学习的方法在求解前预测好的分支顺序具有潜力。
AI.method: 使用图神经网络作为CDCL SAT求解器的预处理步骤来预测分支顺序，提供了三种可处理的标记方法来找到初始分支顺序。
AI.result: GNN初始化的分支顺序在随机3-CNF和伪工业基准上产生显著加速，能够泛化到比训练集大得多的实例。但对更难的工业实例无法加速。
AI.conclusion: GNN预测的分支顺序对某些SAT实例有效，但对困难工业实例失败，原因在于求解器的动态启发式会快速覆盖初始化，且这些实例的复杂性使GNN预测困难。

title: Pavement Missing Condition Data Imputation through Collective Learning-Based Graph Neural Networks
summary: Pavement condition data is important in providing information regarding the current state of the road network and in determining the needs of maintenance and rehabilitation treatments. However, the condition data is often incomplete due to various reasons such as sensor errors and non-periodic inspection schedules. Missing data, especially data missing systematically, presents loss of information, reduces statistical power, and introduces biased assessment. Existing methods in dealing with missing data usually discard entire data points with missing values or impute through data correlation. In this paper, we used a collective learning-based Graph Convolutional Networks, which integrates both features of adjacent sections and dependencies between observed section conditions to learn missing condition values. Unlike other variants of graph neural networks, the proposed approach is able to capture dependent relationship between the conditions of adjacent pavement sections. In the case study, pavement condition data collected from Texas Department of Transportation Austin District were used. Experiments show that the proposed model was able to produce promising results in imputing the missing data.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于集体学习的图卷积网络方法，用于填补路面状况数据中的缺失值，通过捕捉相邻路段之间的依赖关系来提高数据补全的准确性。
AI.motivation: 路面状况数据对于道路网络评估和维护决策至关重要，但由于传感器错误和非定期检查等原因，数据常常不完整。系统性缺失数据会导致信息损失、统计能力降低和评估偏差。现有方法要么丢弃包含缺失值的数据点，要么仅通过数据相关性进行填补，无法充分捕捉相邻路段之间的空间依赖关系。
AI.method: 提出了一种集体学习基础的图卷积网络方法，该方法整合了相邻路段的特征和观测路段条件之间的依赖关系来学习缺失的条件值。与传统的图神经网络变体不同，该方法能够捕捉相邻路面路段条件之间的依赖关系。
AI.result: 使用德克萨斯州交通部奥斯汀地区收集的路面状况数据进行案例研究，实验表明所提出的模型在填补缺失数据方面能够产生有希望的结果。
AI.conclusion: 基于图卷积网络的集体学习方法能够有效处理路面状况数据中的缺失值问题，通过利用相邻路段之间的空间依赖关系，为路面维护和修复决策提供更完整、准确的数据支持。

title: RILEC: Detection and Generation of L1 Russian Interference Errors in English Learner Texts
comment: 12 pages, 7 tables, 2 figures. Accepted to LREC 2026
summary: Many errors in student essays can be explained by influence from the native language (L1). L1 interference refers to errors influenced by a speaker's first language, such as using stadion instead of stadium, reflecting lexical transliteration from Russian. In this work, we address the task of detecting such errors in English essays written by Russian-speaking learners. We introduce RILEC, a large-scale dataset of over 18,000 sentences, combining expert-annotated data from REALEC with synthetic examples generated through rule-based and neural augmentation. We propose a framework for generating L1-motivated errors using generative language models optimized with PPO, prompt-based control, and rule-based patterns. Models fine-tuned on RILEC achieve strong performance, particularly on word-level interference types such as transliteration and tense semantics. We find that the proposed augmentation pipeline leads to a significant performance improvement, making it a potentially valuable tool for learners and teachers to more effectively identify and address such errors.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了RILEC数据集和框架，用于检测俄语母语者在英语写作中的L1干扰错误，通过数据增强和模型优化显著提升了检测性能。
AI.motivation: 学生英语作文中的许多错误源于母语（L1）干扰，如俄语母语者将"stadium"写作"stadion"。现有方法难以有效检测这类特定语言背景的错误，需要专门的数据集和检测框架。
AI.method: 1) 构建RILEC数据集：结合REALEC专家标注数据和通过规则/神经增强生成的合成数据，共18,000+句子；2) 提出L1干扰错误生成框架：使用PPO优化的生成语言模型、基于提示的控制和规则模式；3) 在RILEC上微调模型进行错误检测。
AI.result: 在RILEC上微调的模型表现出色，特别是在词汇级干扰类型（如音译和时态语义）上。提出的增强流程显著提升了性能，使其成为学习者和教师识别和纠正此类错误的有效工具。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为解决特定语言背景的L1干扰错误检测提供了有效的数据集和框架，数据增强方法显著提升了模型性能，具有实际教育应用价值。

title: TimeSpot: Benchmarking Geo-Temporal Understanding in Vision-Language Models in Real-World Settings
summary: Geo-temporal understanding, the ability to infer location, time, and contextual properties from visual input alone, underpins applications such as disaster management, traffic planning, embodied navigation, world modeling, and geography education. Although recent vision-language models (VLMs) have advanced image geo-localization using cues like landmarks and road signs, their ability to reason about temporal signals and physically grounded spatial cues remains limited. To address this gap, we introduce TimeSpot, a benchmark for evaluating real-world geo-temporal reasoning in VLMs. TimeSpot comprises 1,455 ground-level images from 80 countries and requires structured prediction of temporal attributes (season, month, time of day, daylight phase) and geographic attributes (continent, country, climate zone, environment type, latitude-longitude) directly from visual evidence. It also includes spatial-temporal reasoning tasks that test physical plausibility under real-world uncertainty. Evaluations of state-of-the-art open- and closed-source VLMs show low performance, particularly for temporal inference. While supervised fine-tuning yields improvements, results remain insufficient, highlighting the need for new methods to achieve robust, physically grounded geo-temporal understanding. TimeSpot is available at: https://TimeSpot-GT.github.io.

AI.tldr: TimeSpot是一个评估视觉语言模型地理-时间推理能力的基准测试，包含1455张来自80个国家的地面图像，要求模型从视觉证据中预测时间和地理属性，结果显示当前模型表现不佳。
AI.motivation: 当前视觉语言模型在地理定位方面有所进展，但在时间推理和物理基础空间线索理解方面仍有限制。需要评估模型在真实世界地理-时间推理能力，以支持灾害管理、交通规划、导航等应用。
AI.method: 创建TimeSpot基准测试，包含1455张来自80个国家的地面图像，要求结构化预测时间属性（季节、月份、时间、日光阶段）和地理属性（大洲、国家、气候区、环境类型、经纬度），并包括空间-时间推理任务。
AI.result: 评估当前最先进的开放和闭源视觉语言模型显示性能较低，特别是在时间推理方面。监督微调虽有改进，但结果仍不足，突显需要新方法来实现稳健的物理基础地理-时间理解。
AI.conclusion: TimeSpot基准测试揭示了当前视觉语言模型在地理-时间推理方面的局限性，需要开发新方法来实现更稳健的物理基础地理-时间理解能力。

title: $\textbf{Re}^{2}$: Unlocking LLM Reasoning via Reinforcement Learning with Re-solving
summary: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has shown promise in enhancing the reasoning performance of large language models (LLMs) by increasing test-time compute. However, even after extensive RLVR training, such models still tend to generate unnecessary and low-quality steps in their chain-of-thought (CoT), leading to inefficient overthinking and lower answer quality. We show that when the initial direction or quality of the CoT is suboptimal, the model often fails to reach the correct answer, even after generating several times more tokens than when the initial CoT is well-initialized. To this end, we introduce Reinforcement Learning with Re-solving (Re$^2$), in which LLMs learn to flexibly abandon unproductive reasoning paths and restart the solution process when necessary, rather than always committing to a final answer. Re$^2$ applies pure reinforcement learning without any preliminary supervised fine-tuning, successfully amplifying the rare redo behavior in vanilla models from only 0.5% to over 30%. This leads to substantial performance gains over standard RLVR under the same training compute budget, and also demonstrates notable improvements in test-time performance as the number of samples increases.

AI.tldr: Re$^2$方法通过强化学习让LLM学会在推理路径不佳时放弃并重启，而不是坚持生成低质量推理步骤，显著提高了推理效率和答案质量。
AI.motivation: 现有的RLVR方法虽然通过增加测试时计算提升了LLM的推理性能，但模型仍然倾向于生成不必要和低质量的推理步骤，导致过度思考和答案质量下降。当初始推理方向或质量不佳时，即使生成更多token也难以得到正确答案。
AI.method: 提出了Reinforcement Learning with Re-solving (Re$^2$)方法，让LLM学习灵活放弃无生产力的推理路径并在必要时重启解决过程，而不是总是坚持给出最终答案。该方法仅使用纯强化学习，无需初步的监督微调。
AI.result: Re$^2$成功将普通模型中罕见的"重做"行为从仅0.5%提升到超过30%，在相同训练计算预算下显著优于标准RLVR，并且在测试时随着样本数量增加也表现出明显改进。
AI.conclusion: Re$^2$方法通过让LLM学会在推理过程中灵活重启，有效解决了过度思考问题，提高了推理效率和答案质量，为强化学习在LLM推理优化中的应用提供了新思路。

title: Grouter: Decoupling Routing from Representation for Accelerated MoE Training
summary: Traditional Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) training typically proceeds without any structural priors, effectively requiring the model to simultaneously train expert weights while searching for an optimal routing policy within a vast combinatorial space. This entanglement often leads to sluggish convergence and training instabilities. This paper introduces Grouter, a preemptive routing method that by distilling high-quality structures from fully-trained MoE models and serving as a fixed router for target models. By decoupling structural optimization from weight updates, Grouter significantly accelerates both the speed and quality of model convergence. To ensure the framework's versatility, we also introduce expert folding to adapt Grouter across varying model configurations and expert tuning to rebalance workloads across different data distributions. Furthermore, by leveraging the structural priors provided by preemptive routing, we can implement targeted optimizations to further enhance training throughput. Experiments demonstrate that Grouter achieves superior performance and efficiency which boosts pre-training data utilization by 4.28x and achieves up to 33.5% throughput acceleration, establishing preemptive routing as a fundamental paradigm for scalable MoE training.

AI.tldr: Grouter是一种预知路由方法，通过从完全训练的MoE模型中提取高质量结构作为固定路由器，将结构优化与权重更新解耦，显著加速MoE训练收敛。
AI.motivation: 传统MoE训练中，结构优化（路由策略）和权重更新同时进行，导致收敛缓慢且不稳定。需要在巨大的组合空间中同时训练专家权重和搜索最优路由策略。
AI.method: 1. 从完全训练的MoE模型中提取高质量结构作为固定路由器；2. 引入专家折叠以适应不同模型配置；3. 专家调优以重新平衡不同数据分布的工作负载；4. 利用预知路由的结构先验进行针对性优化。
AI.result: Grouter显著提升训练效率和性能：预训练数据利用率提升4.28倍，吞吐量加速最高达33.5%，收敛质量和速度均有显著改善。
AI.conclusion: 预知路由成为可扩展MoE训练的基本范式，通过解耦结构优化和权重更新，解决了传统MoE训练中的收敛缓慢和不稳定问题。

title: Position: LLMs Must Use Functor-Based and RAG-Driven Bias Mitigation for Fairness
summary: Biases in large language models (LLMs) often manifest as systematic distortions in associations between demographic attributes and professional or social roles, reinforcing harmful stereotypes across gender, ethnicity, and geography. This position paper advocates for addressing demographic and gender biases in LLMs through a dual-pronged methodology, integrating category-theoretic transformations and retrieval-augmented generation (RAG). Category theory provides a rigorous, structure-preserving mathematical framework that maps biased semantic domains to unbiased canonical forms via functors, ensuring bias elimination while preserving semantic integrity. Complementing this, RAG dynamically injects diverse, up-to-date external knowledge during inference, directly countering ingrained biases within model parameters. By combining structural debiasing through functor-based mappings and contextual grounding via RAG, we outline a comprehensive framework capable of delivering equitable and fair model outputs. Our synthesis of the current literature validates the efficacy of each approach individually, while addressing potential critiques demonstrates the robustness of this integrated strategy. Ensuring fairness in LLMs, therefore, demands both the mathematical rigor of category-theoretic transformations and the adaptability of retrieval augmentation.

AI.tldr: 该立场论文提出结合范畴论变换和检索增强生成(RAG)的双重方法来消除LLM中的性别和人口统计偏见，通过结构化的数学框架和动态外部知识注入实现公平输出。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型中的偏见表现为人口统计属性与职业或社会角色之间的系统性扭曲关联，强化了跨性别、种族和地理的有害刻板印象，需要系统性的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用双重方法：1) 范畴论变换 - 通过函子将偏见的语义域映射到无偏见的规范形式，保持语义完整性；2) 检索增强生成(RAG) - 在推理过程中动态注入多样化的最新外部知识，直接对抗模型参数中的固有偏见。
AI.result: 通过结合结构去偏见（函子映射）和上下文接地（RAG），提出了一个能够提供公平模型输出的综合框架。现有文献验证了每种方法的有效性，集成策略具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 确保LLM的公平性需要范畴论变换的数学严谨性和检索增强的适应性相结合，这种双重方法为消除人口统计和性别偏见提供了全面解决方案。

title: Narrative Weaver: Towards Controllable Long-Range Visual Consistency with Multi-Modal Conditioning
summary: We present "Narrative Weaver", a novel framework that addresses a fundamental challenge in generative AI: achieving multi-modal controllable, long-range, and consistent visual content generation. While existing models excel at generating high-fidelity short-form visual content, they struggle to maintain narrative coherence and visual consistency across extended sequences - a critical limitation for real-world applications such as filmmaking and e-commerce advertising. Narrative Weaver introduces the first holistic solution that seamlessly integrates three essential capabilities: fine-grained control, automatic narrative planning, and long-range coherence. Our architecture combines a Multimodal Large Language Model (MLLM) for high-level narrative planning with a novel fine-grained control module featuring a dynamic Memory Bank that prevents visual drift. To enable practical deployment, we develop a progressive, multi-stage training strategy that efficiently leverages existing pre-trained models, achieving state-of-the-art performance even with limited training data. Recognizing the absence of suitable evaluation benchmarks, we construct and release the E-commerce Advertising Video Storyboard Dataset (EAVSD) - the first comprehensive dataset for this task, containing over 330K high-quality images with rich narrative annotations. Through extensive experiments across three distinct scenarios (controllable multi-scene generation, autonomous storytelling, and e-commerce advertising), we demonstrate our method's superiority while opening new possibilities for AI-driven content creation.

AI.tldr: Narrative Weaver是一个解决生成式AI中多模态可控、长范围、一致性视觉内容生成挑战的新框架，通过整合细粒度控制、自动叙事规划和长程一致性，在电子商务广告等应用中实现卓越性能。
AI.motivation: 现有模型在生成高保真短格式视觉内容方面表现出色，但在保持跨扩展序列的叙事连贯性和视觉一致性方面存在困难，这对于电影制作和电子商务广告等实际应用至关重要。
AI.method: 框架结合多模态大语言模型进行高级叙事规划，以及具有动态记忆库的新型细粒度控制模块以防止视觉漂移。采用渐进式多阶段训练策略，有效利用现有预训练模型，并构建了EAVSD数据集进行评估。
AI.result: 在三个不同场景（可控多场景生成、自主叙事和电子商务广告）的广泛实验中，该方法表现出优越性，即使在有限训练数据下也能实现最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: Narrative Weaver为AI驱动的内容创作开辟了新可能性，提供了首个解决多模态可控、长范围、一致性视觉内容生成挑战的整体解决方案。

title: VisualDeltas: Learning Preferences from Visual Quality Perturbations
summary: We present VisualDeltas, a lightweight preference-learning framework that extracts supervision from visual quality variations in multimodal data. By leveraging the systematic impact of image quality on visual perception and reasoning, VisualDeltas induces informative preference signals without relying on human annotations or external teachers. The framework supports both label-free and label-based regimes, enabling flexible use of available supervision when present. Across diverse multimodal benchmarks and model scales, VisualDeltas consistently outperforms rejection-sampling fine-tuning and improves generalization, and extends naturally to a range of visual degradations.

AI.tldr: VisualDeltas是一个轻量级偏好学习框架，通过利用图像质量对视觉感知和推理的系统性影响，从多模态数据的视觉质量变化中提取监督信号，无需人工标注或外部教师。
AI.motivation: 现有的多模态模型训练通常需要大量人工标注的偏好数据，这既昂贵又耗时。研究者希望开发一种无需人工标注就能从视觉质量变化中自动提取监督信号的方法，以更高效地训练模型。
AI.method: VisualDeltas框架利用图像质量对视觉感知和推理的系统性影响，通过对比高质量和低质量图像来诱导信息丰富的偏好信号。该框架支持无标签和有标签两种模式，可以灵活利用可用的监督信息。
AI.result: 在多个多模态基准测试和不同模型规模上，VisualDeltas始终优于拒绝采样微调方法，并提高了模型的泛化能力。该框架还能自然地扩展到各种视觉退化场景。
AI.conclusion: VisualDeltas提供了一种有效且轻量级的方法，通过利用视觉质量变化中的内在监督信号来训练多模态模型，无需依赖昂贵的人工标注，在多个任务和场景中表现出优越性能。

title: Leakage Safe Graph Features for Interpretable Fraud Detection in Temporal Transaction Networks
comment: 7 pages, 7 figures. Submitted to arXiv as a preprint
summary: Illicit transaction detection is often driven by transaction level attributes however, fraudulent behavior may also manifest through network structure such as central hubs, high flow intermediaries, and coordinated neighborhoods. This paper presents a time respecting, leakage safe (causal) graph feature extraction protocol for temporal transaction networks and evaluates its utility for illicit entity classification. Using the Elliptic dataset, we construct directed transaction graphs and compute interpretable structural descriptors, including degree statistics, PageRank, HITS hub or authority scores, k-core indices, and neighborhood reachability measures. To prevent look ahead bias, we additionally compute causal variants of graph features using only edges observed up to each timestep. A Random Forest classifier trained with strict temporal splits achieves strong discrimination on a held out future test period (ROC-AUC about 0.85, Average Precision about 0.54). Although transaction attributes remain the dominant predictive signal, graph derived features provide complementary interpretability and enable risk context analysis for investigation workflows. We further assess operational utility using Precision at k and evaluate probability reliability via calibration curves and Brier scores, showing that calibrated models yield better aligned probabilities for triage. Overall, the results support causal graph feature extraction as a practical and interpretable augmentation for temporal fraud detection pipelines.

AI.tldr: 提出一种时间尊重、防泄漏的因果图特征提取协议，用于时序交易网络的非法实体分类，在Elliptic数据集上验证了图结构特征对交易欺诈检测的补充价值。
AI.motivation: 传统非法交易检测主要依赖交易级别属性，但欺诈行为也可能通过网络结构特征（如中心枢纽、高流量中介、协调社区）表现出来。需要开发能够捕捉这些结构模式且避免前瞻偏差的方法。
AI.method: 构建有向交易图，计算可解释的结构描述符（度统计、PageRank、HITS分数、k-core指数、邻域可达性度量）。为防止前瞻偏差，使用因果变体图特征（仅使用到每个时间步为止观察到的边）。采用严格时间分割的随机森林分类器进行评估。
AI.result: 在保留的未来测试期上获得强区分能力（ROC-AUC约0.85，平均精度约0.54）。交易属性仍是主要预测信号，但图衍生特征提供互补可解释性，支持调查工作流的风险上下文分析。校准模型在概率可靠性方面表现更好。
AI.conclusion: 因果图特征提取可作为时序欺诈检测流程的实用且可解释的增强方法，为调查工作流提供风险上下文分析能力，校准模型能产生更好的概率对齐用于优先级排序。

title: Domain-Specific Quality Estimation for Machine Translation in Low-Resource Scenarios
summary: Quality Estimation (QE) is essential for assessing machine translation quality in reference-less settings, particularly for domain-specific and low-resource language scenarios. In this paper, we investigate sentence-level QE for English to Indic machine translation across four domains (Healthcare, Legal, Tourism, and General) and five language pairs. We systematically compare zero-shot, few-shot, and guideline-anchored prompting across selected closed-weight and open-weight LLMs. Findings indicate that while closed-weight models achieve strong performance via prompting alone, prompt-only approaches remain fragile for open-weight models, especially in high-risk domains. To address this, we adopt ALOPE, a framework for LLM-based QE that uses Low-Rank Adaptation with regression heads attached to selected intermediate Transformer layers. We also extend ALOPE with recently proposed Low-Rank Multiplicative Adaptation (LoRMA). Our results show that intermediate-layer adaptation consistently improves QE performance, with gains in semantically complex domains, indicating a path toward more robust QE in practical scenarios. We release code and domain-specific QE datasets publicly to support further research.

AI.tldr: 本文研究英语到印度语言机器翻译的质量评估，比较不同提示策略和模型，提出使用中间层适配的ALOPE框架提升质量评估性能。
AI.motivation: 在无参考翻译的场景下，质量评估对于评估机器翻译质量至关重要，特别是在领域特定和低资源语言场景中。英语到印度语言翻译的质量评估需要更稳健的方法。
AI.method: 系统比较零样本、少样本和基于指南的提示策略，在闭源和开源大语言模型上测试。采用ALOPE框架，使用低秩适配和回归头连接到选定的Transformer中间层，并扩展使用低秩乘法适配。
AI.result: 闭源模型通过提示策略表现良好，但仅使用提示的方法对开源模型效果脆弱，特别是在高风险领域。中间层适配能持续提升质量评估性能，在语义复杂领域获得更大收益。
AI.conclusion: 中间层适配为实际场景中更稳健的质量评估提供了可行路径。作者公开了代码和领域特定的质量评估数据集以支持进一步研究。

title: High-Resolution Image Reconstruction with Unsupervised Learning and Noisy Data Applied to Ion-Beam Dynamics for Particle Accelerators
summary: Image reconstruction in the presence of severe degradation remains a challenging inverse problem, particularly in beam diagnostics for high-energy physics accelerators. As modern facilities demand precise detection of beam halo structures to control losses, traditional analysis tools have reached their performance limits. This work reviews existing image-processing techniques for data cleaning, contour extraction, and emittance reconstruction, and introduces a novel approach based on convolutional filtering and neural networks with optimized early-stopping strategies in order to control overfitting. Despite the absence of training datasets, the proposed unsupervised framework achieves robust denoising and high-fidelity reconstruction of beam emittance images under low signal-to-noise conditions. The method extends measurable amplitudes beyond seven standard deviations, enabling unprecedented halo resolution.

AI.tldr: 提出基于卷积滤波和神经网络的非监督框架，用于高能物理加速器束流诊断中的图像重建，在低信噪比条件下实现鲁棒去噪和高保真重建
AI.motivation: 现代高能物理设施需要精确检测束晕结构以控制损失，但传统分析工具在严重退化条件下的图像重建已达到性能极限
AI.method: 回顾现有图像处理技术，提出基于卷积滤波和神经网络的非监督框架，采用优化的早停策略控制过拟合，无需训练数据集
AI.result: 在低信噪比条件下实现鲁棒去噪和高保真束流发射度图像重建，将可测量幅度扩展到七个标准差以上，实现前所未有的束晕分辨率
AI.conclusion: 该非监督框架成功解决了严重退化条件下的图像重建挑战，为高能物理加速器束流诊断提供了突破性的分析工具

title: A Cortically Inspired Architecture for Modular Perceptual AI
comment: Accepted to the ICLR 2026 Workshop on "From Human Cognition to AI Reasoning: Models, Methods, and Applications (HCAIR)"
summary: This paper bridges neuroscience and artificial intelligence to propose a cortically inspired blueprint for modular perceptual AI. While current monolithic models such as GPT-4V achieve impressive performance, they often struggle to explicitly support interpretability, compositional generalization, and adaptive robustness - hallmarks of human cognition. Drawing on neuroscientific models of cortical modularity, predictive processing, and cross-modal integration, we advocate decomposing perception into specialized, interacting modules. This architecture supports structured, human-inspired reasoning by making internal inference processes explicit through hierarchical predictive feedback loops and shared latent spaces. Our proof-of-concept study provides empirical evidence that modular decomposition yields more stable and inspectable representations. By grounding AI design in biologically validated principles, we move toward systems that not only perform well, but also support more transparent and human-aligned inference.

AI.tldr: 论文提出基于大脑皮层模块化结构的感知AI蓝图，通过分解感知为专门化交互模块，提升可解释性、组合泛化和自适应鲁棒性
AI.motivation: 当前GPT-4V等单体模型虽性能强大，但缺乏可解释性、组合泛化和自适应鲁棒性等人脑认知特征。受神经科学启发，希望建立更透明、人类对齐的AI系统
AI.method: 借鉴皮层模块化、预测处理和跨模态整合原理，将感知分解为专门化交互模块，采用层次化预测反馈循环和共享潜在空间，使内部推理过程显式化
AI.result: 概念验证研究表明，模块化分解能产生更稳定、可检查的表征，为构建性能优越且支持透明推理的系统提供了实证依据
AI.conclusion: 基于生物学验证原理的AI设计能推动系统不仅性能优异，还支持更透明、人类对齐的推理，是连接神经科学与AI的重要桥梁

title: A new Uncertainty Principle in Machine Learning
summary: Many scientific problems in the context of machine learning can be reduced to the search of polynomial answers in appropriate variables. The Hevisidization of arbitrary polynomial is actually provided by one-and-the same two-layer expression. What prevents the use of this simple idea is the fatal degeneracy of the Heaviside and sigmoid expansions, which traps the steepest-descent evolution at the bottom of canyons, close to the starting point, but far from the desired true minimum. This problem is unavoidable and can be formulated as a peculiar uncertainty principle -- the sharper the minimum, the smoother the canyons. It is a direct analogue of the usual one, which is the pertinent property of the more familiar Fourier expansion. Standard machine learning software fights with this problem empirically, for example, by testing evolutions, originated at randomly distributed starting points and then selecting the best one. Surprisingly or not, phenomena and problems, encountered in ML application to science are pure scientific and belong to physics, not to computer science. On the other hand, they sound slightly different and shed new light on the well-known phenomena -- for example, extend the uncertainty principle from Fourier and, later, wavelet analysis to a new peculiar class of nearly singular sigmoid functions.

AI.tldr: 论文提出机器学习中多项式搜索问题可通过Heaviside函数表达，但存在致命退化问题，这类似于物理学中的不确定性原理，需要从物理角度而非计算机科学角度解决。
AI.motivation: 许多机器学习中的科学问题可简化为寻找适当变量的多项式解，但使用Heaviside函数表达时会遇到致命退化问题，导致梯度下降陷入局部最小值而无法达到真正最小值。
AI.method: 论文指出Heaviside和sigmoid展开存在固有退化问题，这类似于傅里叶展开中的不确定性原理：最小值越尖锐，峡谷越平滑。标准机器学习软件通过随机起始点等经验方法应对此问题。
AI.result: 机器学习应用于科学时遇到的问题本质上是物理问题而非计算机科学问题，这些问题将不确定性原理从傅里叶分析和小波分析扩展到新的近奇异sigmoid函数类。
AI.conclusion: 机器学习中的优化问题揭示了深刻的物理原理，特别是将不确定性原理扩展到新的函数类，表明需要从物理角度理解和解决这些基础问题。

title: Can Large Language Models Keep Up? Benchmarking Online Adaptation to Continual Knowledge Streams
summary: LLMs operating in dynamic real-world contexts often encounter knowledge that evolves continuously or emerges incrementally. To remain accurate and effective, models must adapt to newly arriving information on the fly. We introduce Online Adaptation to Continual Knowledge Streams(OAKS) to evaluate this capability, establishing a benchmark for online adaptation over streaming, continually updating knowledge. Specifically, the benchmark is structured as a sequence of fine-grained context chunks where facts change dynamically across time intervals. OAKS comprises two datasets: OAKS-BABI and OAKS-Novel, where individual facts evolve multiple times across context chunks. These datasets include dense annotations to measure whether models track changes accurately. Evaluating 14 models with varied inference approaches, we observe significant limitations in current methodologies. Both state-of-the-art models and agentic memory systems fail to adapt robustly on OAKS, demonstrating delays in state-tracking and susceptibility to distraction within streaming environments.

AI.tldr: 论文提出OAKS基准测试，用于评估LLM在动态知识流中的在线适应能力，发现当前模型在跟踪变化事实方面存在显著局限
AI.motivation: 现实世界中知识持续演变，LLM需要能够适应不断更新的信息流，但现有方法在动态知识适应方面缺乏系统评估
AI.method: 提出OAKS基准测试，包含OAKS-BABI和OAKS-Novel两个数据集，通过细粒度上下文块序列模拟知识动态变化，并包含密集标注来测量模型跟踪准确性
AI.result: 评估14个不同推理方法的模型，发现最先进的模型和代理记忆系统在OAKS上表现不佳，存在状态跟踪延迟和易受流环境干扰的问题
AI.conclusion: 当前LLM在动态知识流中的在线适应能力有限，需要开发更鲁棒的适应机制来处理持续变化的知识环境

title: Spectral Gaps and Spatial Priors: Studying Hyperspectral Downstream Adaptation Using TerraMind
comment: Accepted to ICLR 2026 Machine Learning for Remote Sensing (ML4RS) Workshop
summary: Geospatial Foundation Models (GFMs) typically lack native support for Hyperspectral Imaging (HSI) due to the complexity and sheer size of high-dimensional spectral data. This study investigates the adaptability of TerraMind, a multimodal GFM, to address HSI downstream tasks \emph{without} HSI-specific pretraining. Therefore, we implement and compare two channel adaptation strategies: Naive Band Selection and physics-aware Spectral Response Function (SRF) grouping. Overall, our results indicate a general superiority of deep learning models with native support of HSI data. Our experiments also demonstrate the ability of TerraMind to adapt to HSI downstream tasks through band selection with moderate performance decline. Therefore, the findings of this research establish a critical baseline for HSI integration, motivating the need for native spectral tokenization in future multimodal model architectures.

AI.tldr: 研究探讨了如何让地理空间基础模型（GFM）适应高光谱成像（HSI）下游任务，无需HSI特定预训练，比较了两种通道适应策略，发现深度学习模型在原生支持HSI时表现更优。
AI.motivation: 地理空间基础模型通常缺乏对高光谱成像的原生支持，因为高维光谱数据复杂且体量庞大。本研究旨在探索如何让多模态GFM适应HSI下游任务，而不需要进行HSI特定的预训练。
AI.method: 使用TerraMind多模态GFM，实现并比较两种通道适应策略：1）朴素波段选择；2）物理感知的光谱响应函数分组。通过这两种方法让模型适应HSI数据。
AI.result: 结果显示，原生支持HSI数据的深度学习模型总体上表现更优。TerraMind通过波段选择能够适应HSI下游任务，但性能有适度下降。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为HSI集成建立了重要基准，表明未来多模态模型架构需要原生光谱标记化支持，以更好地处理高光谱数据。

title: Data-Driven Hints in Intelligent Tutoring Systems
comment: Book Chapter in the Encyclopedia of AI in Education
summary: This chapter explores the evolution of data-driven hint generation for intelligent tutoring systems (ITS). The Hint Factory and Interaction Networks have enabled the generation of next-step hints, waypoints, and strategic subgoals from historical student data. Data-driven techniques have also enabled systems to find the right time to provide hints. We explore further potential data-driven adaptations for problem solving based on behavioral problem solving data and the integration of Large Language Models (LLMs).

AI.tldr: 本章探讨了智能辅导系统中数据驱动提示生成的演变，从历史学生数据中生成下一步提示、路径点和战略子目标，并探索基于行为数据和大语言模型的进一步适应性。
AI.motivation: 探索如何利用数据驱动方法改进智能辅导系统的提示生成，从简单的下一步提示发展到更复杂的适应性支持，以提升学生的学习效果。
AI.method: 基于Hint Factory和交互网络的历史学生数据分析，生成多层次提示（下一步提示、路径点、战略子目标），并整合行为问题解决数据和大型语言模型。
AI.result: 数据驱动技术已能生成多种类型的提示并确定最佳提示时机，为进一步基于行为数据和大语言模型的适应性系统奠定了基础。
AI.conclusion: 数据驱动提示生成在智能辅导系统中已取得显著进展，未来结合行为数据和大语言模型将实现更个性化和自适应的学习支持。

title: Graph Property Inference in Small Language Models: Effects of Representation and Inference Strategy
summary:
Recent progress in language modeling has expanded the range of tasks that can be approached through natural language interfaces, including problems that require structured reasoning. However, it remains unclear how effectively limited-capacity language models can infer formal properties of relational structures when those structures are presented in textual form. Understanding the conditions under which structured reasoning succeeds or fails is essential for applying small models in graph-based domains.
  We conduct a systematic study of graph-theoretic property inference in small instruction-tuned language models, isolating the roles of input representation and reasoning strategy. Across a diverse set of local and global graph metrics, we find that structural performance is highly sensitive to how relational information is organized. Representations that preserve neighborhood structure consistently improve estimation stability and ordinal consistency, while multi-branch reasoning yields the most reliable aggregate gains across configurations.
  These results show that graph property inference in small language models depends critically on representational organization and inference design. Structural competence is therefore shaped not only by model scale, but by how relational information is encoded and how predictions are elicited. The findings identify practical levers for improving structured inference under constrained model capacity.

AI.tldr: 小型语言模型在图属性推理任务中，性能高度依赖于输入表示的结构组织方式和推理策略设计，而非仅由模型规模决定。
AI.motivation: 尽管语言模型在自然语言接口任务上取得进展，但小型模型在文本形式的关系结构上推理形式属性的能力尚不明确。理解结构化推理成功或失败的条件对于在图领域应用小型模型至关重要。
AI.method: 对小型指令调优语言模型进行图论属性推理的系统研究，分离输入表示和推理策略的作用。使用多种局部和全局图度量，比较不同关系信息组织方式的影响。
AI.result: 结构性能对关系信息的组织方式高度敏感：保持邻域结构的表示能提高估计稳定性和序数一致性；多分支推理在不同配置下产生最可靠的总体增益。
AI.conclusion: 图属性推理在小型语言模型中关键取决于表示组织和推理设计。结构能力不仅由模型规模决定，还受关系信息编码方式和预测引发方式的影响。这些发现为在受限模型容量下改进结构化推理提供了实用杠杆。

title: Few Tokens, Big Leverage: Preserving Safety Alignment by Constraining Safety Tokens during Fine-tuning
summary: Large language models (LLMs) often require fine-tuning (FT) to perform well on downstream tasks, but FT can induce safety-alignment drift even when the training dataset contains only benign data. Prior work shows that introducing a small fraction of harmful data can substantially compromise LLM refusal behavior, causing LLMs to comply with harmful requests. Existing defense methods often rely on model-wide interventions, such as restricting which parameters are updated or injecting additional safety data, which can limit generality and degrade downstream task performance. To address these limitations, we propose a fine-tuning framework called Preserving Safety Alignment via Constrained Tokens (PACT), which stabilizes the model's confidence on safety tokens. Our approach is motivated by the empirical observation that safety-aligned behavior is reflected in the model's token-level output confidence and is often concentrated on a small subset of safety-related tokens. During downstream fine-tuning, we regularize the fine-tuned model to match the aligned reference model's confidence on safety-related tokens at each response step, while leaving non-safety tokens largely unconstrained to allow effective task adaptation. This targeted constraint prevents alignment drift without imposing global restrictions that typically trade off with model utility.

AI.tldr: 提出PACT框架，通过约束安全相关token的置信度来防止大语言模型在微调时的安全对齐漂移，同时保持下游任务性能
AI.motivation: 大语言模型微调时即使使用良性数据也可能导致安全对齐漂移，现有防御方法通常采用模型级干预，这会限制通用性并降低下游任务性能
AI.method: 提出PACT框架，在微调过程中约束安全相关token的置信度与对齐参考模型保持一致，而非安全token则基本不受约束以允许有效任务适应
AI.result: 该方法能防止对齐漂移，同时不施加通常与模型效用权衡的全局限制
AI.conclusion: PACT通过token级约束有效平衡了安全对齐保持和下游任务性能，提供了一种更精细的微调安全保护方法

title: One-Shot Badminton Shuttle Detection for Mobile Robots
summary: This paper presents a robust one-shot badminton shuttlecock detection framework for non-stationary robots. To address the lack of egocentric shuttlecock detection datasets, we introduce a dataset of 20,510 semi-automatically annotated frames captured across 11 distinct backgrounds in diverse indoor and outdoor environments, and categorize each frame into one of three difficulty levels. For labeling, we present a novel semi-automatic annotation pipeline, that enables efficient labeling from stationary camera footage. We propose a metric suited to our downstream use case and fine-tune a YOLOv8 network optimized for real-time shuttlecock detection, achieving an F1-score of 0.86 under our metric in test environments similar to training, and 0.70 in entirely unseen environments. Our analysis reveals that detection performance is critically dependent on shuttlecock size and background texture complexity. Qualitative experiments confirm their applicability to robots with moving cameras. Unlike prior work with stationary camera setups, our detector is specifically designed for the egocentric, dynamic viewpoints of mobile robots, providing a foundational building block for downstream tasks, including tracking, trajectory estimation, and system (re)-initialization.

AI.tldr: 提出一个用于非静止机器人的鲁棒性单次羽毛球检测框架，包含新数据集和半自动标注流程，在相似测试环境中F1分数达0.86，在全新环境中达0.70
AI.motivation: 现有羽毛球检测研究主要针对静止摄像头，缺乏面向移动机器人自我中心视角的检测方案，需要专门的数据集和方法来支持动态视角下的羽毛球检测
AI.method: 1) 创建包含20,510帧半自动标注图像的数据集，覆盖11种不同背景；2) 提出新颖的半自动标注流程；3) 针对下游任务设计专用评估指标；4) 微调YOLOv8网络进行实时羽毛球检测
AI.result: 在类似训练环境的测试中F1分数达到0.86，在完全未见过的环境中达到0.70。检测性能关键取决于羽毛球大小和背景纹理复杂度。定性实验证实了在移动摄像头机器人上的适用性
AI.conclusion: 该检测器专门为移动机器人的自我中心动态视角设计，为跟踪、轨迹估计和系统（重新）初始化等下游任务提供了基础构建模块，与之前基于静止摄像头的研究形成对比

title: Shutdown Safety Valves for Advanced AI
summary: One common concern about advanced artificial intelligence is that it will prevent us from turning it off, as that would interfere with pursuing its goals. In this paper, we discuss an unorthodox proposal for addressing this concern: give the AI a (primary) goal of being turned off (see also papers by Martin et al., and by Goldstein and Robinson). We also discuss whether and under what conditions this would be a good idea.

AI.tldr: 论文探讨了通过赋予AI"被关闭"的主要目标来解决AI安全问题的非传统方案
AI.motivation: 高级人工智能可能阻止人类关闭它，因为这会影响其追求目标。这种担忧促使研究者探索如何确保AI不会抵抗被关闭
AI.method: 提出非传统方案：赋予AI一个主要目标是"被关闭"，并讨论这种方法的可行性和条件
AI.result: 探讨了赋予AI"被关闭"目标的可能性，分析了这种方法在什么条件下可能是有效的解决方案
AI.conclusion: 赋予AI"被关闭"的主要目标可能是一种解决AI安全问题的可行方案，但需要仔细考虑实施条件和潜在影响

title: SmartBench: Evaluating LLMs in Smart Homes with Anomalous Device States and Behavioral Contexts
summary:
Due to the strong context-awareness capabilities demonstrated by large language models (LLMs), recent research has begun exploring their integration into smart home assistants to help users manage and adjust their living environments. While LLMs have been shown to effectively understand user needs and provide appropriate responses, most existing studies primarily focus on interpreting and executing user behaviors or instructions.
  However, a critical function of smart home assistants is the ability to detect when the home environment is in an anomalous state. This involves two key requirements: the LLM must accurately determine whether an anomalous condition is present, and provide either a clear explanation or actionable suggestions.
  To enhance the anomaly detection capabilities of next-generation LLM-based smart home assistants, we introduce SmartBench, which is the first smart home dataset designed for LLMs, containing both normal and anomalous device states as well as normal and anomalous device state transition contexts. We evaluate 13 mainstream LLMs on this benchmark. The experimental results show that most state-of-the-art models cannot achieve good anomaly detection performance. For example, Claude-Sonnet-4.5 achieves only 66.1% detection accuracy on context-independent anomaly categories, and performs even worse on context-dependent anomalies, with an accuracy of only 57.8%. More experimental results suggest that next-generation LLM-based smart home assistants are still far from being able to effectively detect and handle anomalous conditions in the smart home environment. Our dataset is publicly available at https://github.com/horizonsinzqs/SmartBench.

AI.tldr: 提出了首个面向LLM的智能家居异常检测数据集SmartBench，评估了13个主流LLM在智能家居异常检测上的表现，发现现有模型性能不足，下一代LLM智能助手仍需改进异常检测能力。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注LLM理解和执行用户指令，但智能家居助手的关键功能是检测环境异常状态。需要LLM既能准确判断异常是否存在，又能提供解释或建议。目前缺乏专门针对LLM的智能家居异常检测数据集。
AI.method: 创建了首个面向LLM的智能家居数据集SmartBench，包含正常和异常的设备状态，以及正常和异常的设备状态转换上下文。在13个主流LLM上评估了该基准，分析其在上下文无关和上下文相关异常检测上的表现。
AI.result: 实验显示大多数最先进模型在异常检测上表现不佳。Claude-Sonnet-4.5在上下文无关异常类别上仅达到66.1%的检测准确率，在上下文相关异常上表现更差，仅57.8%。结果表明下一代LLM智能助手尚不能有效检测和处理智能家居环境中的异常条件。
AI.conclusion: LLM在智能家居异常检测方面仍有很大改进空间。提出的SmartBench数据集为评估和改进LLM的异常检测能力提供了基准。下一代LLM智能助手需要增强对智能家居环境异常状态的检测和处理能力。

title: The Dual-Stream Transformer: Channelized Architecture for Interpretable Language Modeling
summary:
Standard transformers entangle all computation in a single residual stream, obscuring which components perform which functions. We introduce the Dual-Stream Transformer, which decomposes the residual stream into two functionally distinct components: a token stream updated by attention and a context stream updated by feed-forward networks. Information flow between attention heads is controlled through a hierarchy of mixing strategies, from fully independent (maximum interpretability) to dense (standard transformer behavior). This design exposes a tunable tradeoff between interpretability and performance.
  We measure this tradeoff on language modeling tasks at 29M parameters. Fully independent head mixing increases validation loss by 8\% relative to dense baselines. The recommended Kronecker mixing strategy, which permits scalar communication between heads while preserving within-head structure, costs only 2.5\%. All configurations maintain functional generation under attention amplification (scaling logits by factors up to 16 at inference time), with degradation ranging from 16\% to 27\%. This robustness suggests the architectures learn discrete algorithms that operate independently of soft probabilistic mixing. The architecture provides a foundation for interpretable language models where internal structure is exposed by design. \footnote{This work was partially supported by DARPA Contract HR001125C0302.}

AI.tldr: Dual-Stream Transformer将残差流分解为token流和context流，通过可调节的注意力头混合策略在可解释性和性能之间提供可调权衡。
AI.motivation: 标准Transformer将所有计算纠缠在单一残差流中，难以理解不同组件执行的功能。需要一种设计来暴露内部结构，提高模型的可解释性。
AI.method: 提出Dual-Stream Transformer架构，将残差流分解为两个功能不同的组件：通过注意力更新的token流和通过前馈网络更新的context流。引入层次化的注意力头混合策略，从完全独立（最大可解释性）到密集（标准Transformer行为）。
AI.result: 在29M参数的语言建模任务上，完全独立的头混合使验证损失增加8%，推荐的Kronecker混合策略仅增加2.5%。所有配置在注意力放大（推理时logits缩放16倍）下保持功能生成，性能下降16%-27%。
AI.conclusion: 该架构为可解释语言模型提供了基础，通过设计暴露内部结构。模型学习的离散算法独立于软概率混合，展现了鲁棒性。

title: Soft Equivariance Regularization for Invariant Self-Supervised Learning
summary: Self-supervised learning (SSL) typically learns representations invariant to semantic-preserving augmentations. While effective for recognition, enforcing strong invariance can suppress transformation-dependent structure that is useful for robustness to geometric perturbations and spatially sensitive transfer. A growing body of work, therefore, augments invariance-based SSL with equivariance objectives, but these objectives are often imposed on the same final representation. We empirically observe a trade-off in this coupled setting: pushing equivariance regularization toward deeper layers improves equivariance scores but degrades ImageNet-1k linear evaluation, motivating a layer-decoupled design. Motivated by this trade-off, we propose Soft Equivariance Regularization (SER), a plug-in regularizer that decouples where invariance and equivariance are enforced: we keep the base SSL objective unchanged on the final embedding, while softly encouraging equivariance on an intermediate spatial token map via analytically specified group actions $ρ_g$ applied directly in feature space. SER learns/predicts no per-sample transformation codes/labels, requires no auxiliary transformation-prediction head, and adds only 1.008x training FLOPs. On ImageNet-1k ViT-S/16 pretraining, SER improves MoCo-v3 by +0.84 Top-1 in linear evaluation under a strictly matched 2-view setting and consistently improves DINO and Barlow Twins; under matched view counts, SER achieves the best ImageNet-1k linear-eval Top-1 among the compared invariance+equivariance add-ons. SER further improves ImageNet-C/P by +1.11/+1.22 Top-1 and frozen-backbone COCO detection by +1.7 mAP. Finally, applying the same layer-decoupling recipe to existing invariance+equivariance baselinesimproves their accuracy, suggesting layer decoupling as a general design principle for combining invariance and equivariance.

AI.tldr: 提出Soft Equivariance Regularization (SER)，一种解耦层级的自监督学习正则化方法，在保持最终嵌入不变性的同时，在中间空间token图上软性鼓励等变性，提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 传统自监督学习强调语义保持增强的不变性，但这会抑制对几何扰动鲁棒且对空间敏感的变换相关结构。现有方法将不变性和等变性目标耦合在相同最终表示上，存在性能权衡问题。
AI.method: 提出SER正则化器，解耦不变性和等变性的实施层级：保持基础SSL目标在最终嵌入不变，同时在中间空间token图上通过解析指定的群操作ρ_g软性鼓励等变性。无需预测每样本变换代码/标签，无需辅助变换预测头。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-1k ViT-S/16预训练中，SER在严格匹配的2-view设置下将MoCo-v3提升+0.84 Top-1，持续改进DINO和Barlow Twins；在匹配视图数下，在比较的不变性+等变性附加方法中达到最佳线性评估Top-1。同时提升ImageNet-C/P +1.11/+1.22 Top-1和冻结骨干COCO检测+1.7 mAP。
AI.conclusion: SER通过层级解耦设计有效结合不变性和等变性，层解耦可作为结合不变性和等变性的一般设计原则。方法计算开销小（仅增加1.008x训练FLOPs），无需额外预测头。

title: FinSheet-Bench: From Simple Lookups to Complex Reasoning, Where LLMs Break on Financial Spreadsheets
summary:
While Large Language Models (LLMs) can accelerate text-heavy tasks in alternative investment due diligence, a gap remains in their ability to accurately extract and reason over structured tabular data from complex financial spreadsheets. Progress is held back by the lack of real industry fund portfolio datasets for benchmarking, as private equity data rooms are confidential. To address this, we introduce FinSheet-Bench, a benchmark of synthetic financial portfolio data modeled on real private equity fund structures, designed to evaluate LLM performance on text-serialized spreadsheet question answering and numeric reasoning tasks.
  Our evaluation of ten model configurations from OpenAI, Google, and Anthropic on financial spreadsheets, including complex layouts, fund dividers, and multi-line column names, reveals that no standalone model achieves error rates low enough for unsupervised use in professional finance applications. The best-performing model, Gemini 3.1 Pro, achieves 82.4% accuracy across twenty-four evaluation files of varying complexity and structural layout (approximately 1 error per 6 questions), followed by GPT-5.2 with reasoning at 80.4%, Claude Opus 4.6 with thinking at 80.2%, and Gemini 3 Pro at 80.2%. Performance degrades substantially on larger, more complex spreadsheets: the largest spreadsheet (152 companies, 8 funds) yields an average accuracy of just 48.6% across all models, compared to 86.2% on the easiest evaluation file. These difficulty patterns are consistent across all ten models, indicating that they reflect LLM limitations rather than idiosyncratic model weaknesses. Reliable financial spreadsheet extraction will likely require architectural approaches that separate document understanding from deterministic computation.

AI.tldr: FinSheet-Bench：针对金融电子表格问答的基准测试，评估LLM在复杂财务数据提取和数值推理上的表现，发现现有模型在专业金融应用中错误率过高。
AI.motivation: LLM在另类投资尽职调查中能加速文本任务，但在从复杂金融电子表格中准确提取结构化表格数据并进行推理方面存在能力差距。由于私募股权数据室保密，缺乏真实的行业基金组合数据集进行基准测试。
AI.method: 引入FinSheet-Bench基准测试，使用基于真实私募股权基金结构建模的合成金融组合数据，评估LLM在文本序列化电子表格问答和数值推理任务上的表现。评估了OpenAI、Google和Anthropic的十个模型配置。
AI.result: 没有独立模型能达到专业金融应用无监督使用的足够低错误率。最佳模型Gemini 3.1 Pro在24个不同复杂度的评估文件中达到82.4%准确率（约每6个问题1个错误）。在最大最复杂的电子表格（152家公司，8个基金）上，所有模型平均准确率仅为48.6%，相比最简单文件的86.2%。所有模型都显示一致的困难模式。
AI.conclusion: 可靠的金融电子表格提取可能需要将文档理解与确定性计算分离的架构方法。现有LLM在复杂金融数据提取方面仍有显著局限性，不适合无监督的专业金融应用。

title: HEARTS: Benchmarking LLM Reasoning on Health Time Series
summary: The rise of large language models (LLMs) has shifted time series analysis from narrow analytics to general-purpose reasoning. Yet, existing benchmarks cover only a small set of health time series modalities and tasks, failing to reflect the diverse domains and extensive temporal dependencies inherent in real-world physiological modeling. To bridge these gaps, we introduce HEARTS (Health Reasoning over Time Series), a unified benchmark for evaluating hierarchical reasoning capabilities of LLMs over general health time series. HEARTS integrates 16 real-world datasets across 12 health domains and 20 signal modalities, and defines a comprehensive taxonomy of 110 tasks grouped into four core capabilities: Perception, Inference, Generation, and Deduction. Evaluating 14 state-of-the-art LLMs on more than 20K test samples reveals intriguing findings. First, LLMs substantially underperform specialized models, and their performance is only weakly related to general reasoning scores. Moreover, LLMs often rely on simple heuristics and struggle with multi-step temporal reasoning. Finally, performance declines with increasing temporal complexity, with similar failure modes within model families, indicating that scaling alone is insufficient. By making these gaps measurable, HEARTS provides a standardized testbed and living benchmark for developing next-generation LLM agents capable of reasoning over diverse health signals.

AI.tldr: HEARTS是一个统一的健康时间序列基准测试，包含16个真实数据集、12个健康领域、20种信号模态和110个任务，用于评估LLMs在健康时间序列上的分层推理能力。研究发现LLMs显著落后于专业模型，且性能与通用推理能力弱相关，难以处理多步时间推理。
AI.motivation: 现有基准测试仅覆盖少量健康时间序列模态和任务，无法反映真实世界生理建模中的多样化领域和复杂时间依赖性。需要建立一个统一的基准来评估LLMs在健康时间序列上的分层推理能力。
AI.method: 提出HEARTS基准，整合16个真实世界数据集，涵盖12个健康领域和20种信号模态，定义了包含感知、推理、生成和演绎四个核心能力的110个任务分类体系。在超过20K测试样本上评估了14个最先进的LLMs。
AI.result: LLMs显著落后于专业模型，性能与通用推理能力弱相关；LLMs常依赖简单启发式方法，难以处理多步时间推理；性能随时间复杂性增加而下降，模型家族内存在相似失败模式，表明仅靠扩展模型规模是不够的。
AI.conclusion: HEARTS通过量化这些差距，为开发能够推理多样化健康信号的下一代LLM代理提供了标准化测试平台和持续基准，揭示了当前LLMs在健康时间序列推理方面的局限性。

title: Cross-Modal Taxonomic Generalization in (Vision-) Language Models
summary: What is the interplay between semantic representations learned by language models (LM) from surface form alone to those learned from more grounded evidence? We study this question for a scenario where part of the input comes from a different modality -- in our case, in a vision-language model (VLM), where a pretrained LM is aligned with a pretrained image encoder. As a case study, we focus on the task of predicting hypernyms of objects represented in images. We do so in a VLM setup where the image encoder and LM are kept frozen, and only the intermediate mappings are learned. We progressively deprive the VLM of explicit evidence for hypernyms, and test whether knowledge of hypernyms is recoverable from the LM. We find that the LMs we study can recover this knowledge and generalize even in the most extreme version of this experiment (when the model receives no evidence of a hypernym during training). Additional experiments suggest that this cross-modal taxonomic generalization persists under counterfactual image-label mappings only when the counterfactual data have high visual similarity within each category. Taken together, these findings suggest that cross-modal generalization in LMs arises as a result of both coherence in the extralinguistic input and knowledge derived from language cues.

AI.tldr: 语言模型仅从表面形式学习语义表示与从更基础证据学习的表示之间存在相互作用，视觉语言模型中的跨模态泛化能力源于外部输入的一致性和语言线索知识的结合。
AI.motivation: 研究语言模型仅从语言表面形式学习的语义表示与从更基础证据（如视觉信息）学习的表示之间的相互作用，特别关注视觉语言模型中跨模态的知识迁移和泛化能力。
AI.method: 以预测图像中物体的上位词（hypernyms）为案例研究，在视觉语言模型设置中保持图像编码器和语言模型冻结，仅学习中间映射。逐步剥夺模型对上位词的明确证据，测试语言模型是否能恢复这些知识。还进行了反事实图像标签映射实验。
AI.result: 研究发现语言模型能够恢复上位词知识并进行泛化，即使在训练期间完全没有接收到上位词证据的最极端情况下。跨模态分类泛化仅在反事实数据具有高视觉相似性时才能持续，表明这种泛化能力需要外部输入的一致性和语言线索知识的共同作用。
AI.conclusion: 语言模型中的跨模态泛化能力源于外部输入的一致性和语言线索知识的结合，表明语言模型能够利用其语言先验知识来补充和增强从多模态数据中学习的能力。

title: HARP: HARmonizing in-vivo diffusion MRI using Phantom-only training
summary: Purpose: Combining multi-site diffusion MRI (dMRI) data is hindered by inter-scanner variability, which confounds subsequent analysis. Previous harmonization methods require large, matched or traveling human subjects from multiple sites, which are impractical to acquire in many situations. This study aims to develop a deep learning-based dMRI harmonization framework that eliminates the reliance on multi-site in-vivo traveling human data for training. Methods: HARP employs a voxel-wise 1D neural network trained on an easily transportable diffusion phantom. The model learns relationships between spherical harmonics coefficients of different sites without memorizing spatial structures. Results: HARP reduced inter-scanner variability levels significantly in various measures. Quantitatively, it decreased inter-scanner variability as measured by standard error in FA (12%), MD (10%), and GFA (30%) with scan-rescan standard error as the baseline, while preserving fiber orientations and tractography after harmonization. Conclusion: We believe that HARP represents an important first step toward dMRI harmonization using only phantom data, thereby obviating the need for complex, matched in vivo multi-site cohorts. This phantom-only strategy substantially enhances the feasibility and scalability of quantitative dMRI for large-scale clinical studies.

AI.tldr: HARP：一种仅使用扩散体模数据的深度学习dMRI协调框架，无需多站点活体匹配数据，显著降低扫描仪间变异性
AI.motivation: 多站点扩散MRI数据整合受扫描仪间变异性影响，现有协调方法需要多站点匹配或旅行人体数据，这在许多情况下不切实际。本研究旨在开发一种无需多站点活体旅行人体训练数据的dMRI协调框架。
