Recently, these transport maps have been utilized in conditional generative modeling tasks to establish efficient mappings between the distributions. However, classical COT inherits a fundamental limitation of optimal transport, i.e., sensitivity to outliers, which arises from the hard distribution matching constraints. This limitation becomes more pronounced in a conditional setting, where each conditional distribution is estimated from a limited subset of data. To address this, we introduce the Conditional Unbalanced Optimal Transport (CUOT) framework, which relaxes conditional distribution-matching constraints through Csiszár divergence penalties while strictly preserving the conditioning marginals. We establish a rigorous formulation of the CUOT problem and derive its dual and semi-dual formulations. Based on the semi-dual form, we propose Conditional Unbalanced Optimal Transport Maps (CUOTM), an outlier-robust conditional generative model built upon a triangular $c$-transform parameterization. We theoretically justify the validity of this parameterization by proving that the optimal triangular map satisfies the $c$-transform relationships. Our experiments on 2D synthetic and image-scale datasets demonstrate that CUOTM achieves superior outlier robustness and competitive distribution-matching performance compared to existing COT-based baselines, while maintaining high sampling efficiency.

AI.tldr: 提出条件不平衡最优传输(CUOT)框架，通过Csiszár散度惩罚放松条件分布匹配约束，解决传统条件最优传输对异常值敏感的问题，并基于此构建了鲁棒的条件生成模型CUOTM。
AI.motivation: 传统条件最优传输(COT)继承了最优传输对异常值敏感的根本限制，这在条件设置中更为突出，因为每个条件分布仅从有限数据子集估计。需要开发更鲁棒的框架来处理异常值问题。
AI.method: 提出条件不平衡最优传输(CUOT)框架，通过Csiszár散度惩罚放松条件分布匹配约束，同时严格保持条件边际分布。基于半对偶形式构建CUOTM模型，采用三角c-变换参数化。
AI.result: 在2D合成和图像尺度数据集上的实验表明，CUOTM相比现有COT基线方法具有更好的异常值鲁棒性和竞争性的分布匹配性能，同时保持高采样效率。
AI.conclusion: CUOT框架有效解决了传统COT对异常值敏感的问题，CUOTM作为基于CUOT的条件生成模型在鲁棒性和性能上表现出色，为条件生成建模提供了更可靠的解决方案。

title: COACH meets QUORUM: A Framework and Pipeline for Aligning User, Expert and Developer Perspectives in LLM-generated Health Counselling
comment: Under review for the CL4Health workshop
summary: Systems that collect data on sleep, mood, and activities can provide valuable lifestyle counselling to populations affected by chronic disease and its consequences. Such systems are, however, challenging to develop; besides reliably extracting patterns from user-specific data, systems should also contextualise these patterns with validated medical knowledge to ensure the quality of counselling, and generate counselling that is relevant to a real user. We present QUORUM, a new evaluation framework that unifies these developer-, expert-, and user-centric perspectives, and show with a real case study that it meaningfully tracks convergence and divergence in stakeholder perspectives. We also present COACH, a Large Language Model-driven pipeline to generate personalised lifestyle counselling for our Healthy Chronos use case, a diary app for cancer patients and survivors. Applying our framework shows that overall, users, medical experts, and developers converge on the opinion that the generated counselling is relevant, of good quality, and reliable. However, stakeholders also diverge on the tone of the counselling, sensitivity to errors in pattern-extraction, and potential hallucinations. These findings highlight the importance of multi-stakeholder evaluation for consumer health language technologies and illustrate how a unified evaluation framework can support trustworthy, patient-centered NLP systems in real-world settings.

AI.tldr: QUORUM是一个统一开发者、专家和用户视角的评估框架，用于评估为慢性病患者生成个性化生活方式建议的AI系统。通过COACH（基于大语言模型的建议生成管道）在癌症患者日记应用中的案例研究，展示了该框架如何追踪利益相关者观点的趋同与分歧。
AI.motivation: 为慢性病患者开发收集睡眠、情绪和活动数据并提供生活方式建议的系统面临挑战：需要从用户特定数据中可靠提取模式，结合医学知识确保建议质量，并生成对真实用户相关的建议。现有系统缺乏统一评估开发者、专家和用户视角的框架。
AI.method: 提出了QUORUM评估框架，统一开发者、专家和用户三个利益相关者视角。开发了COACH——基于大语言模型的管道，为癌症患者日记应用Healthy Chronos生成个性化生活方式建议。通过真实案例研究应用该框架，追踪利益相关者观点的趋同与分歧。
AI.result: 应用QUORUM框架显示，用户、医学专家和开发者总体上认为生成的建议具有相关性、良好质量和可靠性。但利益相关者在建议语气、对模式提取错误的敏感性以及潜在幻觉方面存在分歧。这些发现凸显了多利益相关者评估的重要性。
AI.conclusion: QUORUM框架能够有效追踪消费者健康语言技术中利益相关者观点的趋同与分歧，支持在真实世界环境中开发可信赖、以患者为中心的NLP系统。多利益相关者评估对于确保AI健康建议系统的质量和相关性至关重要。

title: CanoVerse: 3D Object Scalable Canonicalization and Dataset for Generation and Pose
summary: 3D learning systems implicitly assume that objects occupy a coherent reference frame. Nonetheless, in practice, every asset arrives with an arbitrary global rotation, and models are left to resolve directional ambiguity on their own. This persistent misalignment suppresses pose-consistent generation, and blocks the emergence of stable directional semantics. To address this issue, we construct \methodName{}, a massive canonical 3D dataset of 320K objects over 1,156 categories -- an order-of-magnitude increase over prior work. At this scale, directional semantics become statistically learnable: Canoverse improves 3D generation stability, enables precise cross-modal 3D shape retrieval, and unlocks zero-shot point-cloud orientation estimation even for out-of-distribution data. This is achieved by a new canonicalization framework that reduces alignment from minutes to seconds per object via compact hypothesis generation and lightweight human discrimination, transforming canonicalization from manual curation into a high-throughput data generation pipeline. The Canoverse dataset will be publicly released upon acceptance. Project page: https://github.com/123321456-gif/Canoverse

AI.tldr: Canoverse是一个包含32万个物体、1156个类别的大规模规范3D数据集，通过高效规范化框架解决3D物体方向不一致问题，提升生成稳定性、跨模态检索和零样本方向估计能力。
AI.motivation: 现有3D学习系统假设物体占据一致的参考坐标系，但实际中每个资产都有任意的全局旋转，导致方向模糊、姿态一致性生成受限，阻碍了稳定方向语义的出现。
AI.method: 构建Canoverse大规模规范3D数据集，采用新的规范化框架：通过紧凑假设生成和轻量级人工判别，将每个物体的对齐时间从分钟级减少到秒级，将规范化从手动处理转变为高通量数据生成流水线。
AI.result: Canoverse显著提升3D生成稳定性，实现精确的跨模态3D形状检索，并解锁了零样本点云方向估计能力，即使对于分布外数据也有效。
AI.conclusion: 通过大规模规范数据集，方向语义变得可统计学习，Canoverse解决了3D学习中的方向对齐问题，为3D生成、检索和方向估计提供了强大基础。

title: Agentic Critical Training
summary: Training large language models (LLMs) as autonomous agents often begins with imitation learning, but it only teaches agents what to do without understanding why: agents never contrast successful actions against suboptimal alternatives and thus lack awareness of action quality. Recent approaches attempt to address this by introducing self-reflection supervision derived from contrasts between expert and alternative actions. However, the training paradigm fundamentally remains imitation learning: the model imitates pre-constructed reflection text rather than learning to reason autonomously. We propose Agentic Critical Training (ACT), a reinforcement learning paradigm that trains agents to identify the better action among alternatives. By rewarding whether the model's judgment is correct, ACT drives the model to autonomously develop reasoning about action quality, producing genuine self-reflection rather than imitating it. Across three challenging agent benchmarks, ACT consistently improves agent performance when combined with different post-training methods. It achieves an average improvement of 5.07 points over imitation learning and 4.62 points over reinforcement learning. Compared to approaches that inject reflection capability through knowledge distillation, ACT also demonstrates clear advantages, yielding an average improvement of 2.42 points. Moreover, ACT enables strong out-of-distribution generalization on agentic benchmarks and improves performance on general reasoning benchmarks without any reasoning-specific training data, highlighting the value of our method. These results suggest that ACT is a promising path toward developing more reflective and capable LLM agents.

AI.tldr: 提出Agentic Critical Training (ACT)，一种强化学习范式，训练智能体在备选动作中识别更好动作，而非模仿预构建的反思文本，从而让模型自主发展动作质量推理能力。
AI.motivation: 当前大语言模型作为自主智能体的训练通常从模仿学习开始，但这种方法只教智能体做什么而不理解为什么。智能体无法对比成功动作与次优替代方案，缺乏对动作质量的认知。现有方法虽然引入基于专家与替代动作对比的自我反思监督，但训练范式本质上仍是模仿学习——模型模仿预构建的反思文本而非学习自主推理。
AI.method: 提出Agentic Critical Training (ACT)，一种强化学习范式，通过奖励模型判断是否正确来训练智能体在备选动作中识别更好动作。这种方法驱动模型自主发展关于动作质量的推理能力，产生真正的自我反思而非模仿。
AI.result: 在三个具有挑战性的智能体基准测试中，ACT与不同后训练方法结合时持续提升智能体性能：平均比模仿学习提高5.07分，比强化学习提高4.62分。相比通过知识蒸馏注入反思能力的方法，ACT也显示明显优势，平均提高2.42分。此外，ACT在智能体基准测试中表现出强大的分布外泛化能力，并在通用推理基准测试中提升性能，无需任何推理特定训练数据。
AI.conclusion: ACT是开发更具反思性和能力的大语言模型智能体的有前景路径。通过训练智能体自主判断动作质量而非模仿反思文本，模型能够发展真正的推理能力，在多个基准测试中表现出显著性能提升和良好泛化能力。

title: NePPO: Near-Potential Policy Optimization for General-Sum Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
summary: Multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) is increasingly used to design learning-enabled agents that interact in shared environments. However, training MARL algorithms in general-sum games remains challenging: learning dynamics can become unstable, and convergence guarantees typically hold only in restricted settings such as two-player zero-sum or fully cooperative games. Moreover, when agents have heterogeneous and potentially conflicting preferences, it is unclear what system-level objective should guide learning. In this paper, we propose a new MARL pipeline called Near-Potential Policy Optimization (NePPO) for computing approximate Nash equilibria in mixed cooperative--competitive environments. The core idea is to learn a player-independent potential function such that the Nash equilibrium of a cooperative game with this potential as the common utility approximates a Nash equilibrium of the original game. To this end, we introduce a novel MARL objective such that minimizing this objective yields the best possible potential function candidate and consequently an approximate Nash equilibrium of the original game. We develop an algorithmic pipeline that minimizes this objective using zeroth-order gradient descent and returns an approximate Nash equilibrium policy. We empirically show the superior performance of this approach compared to popular baselines such as MAPPO, IPPO and MADDPG.

AI.tldr: 提出NePPO算法，通过学习玩家无关的势函数，在混合合作-竞争环境中计算近似纳什均衡
AI.motivation: 多智能体强化学习在一般和博弈中训练困难，学习动态不稳定，收敛保证有限，且当智能体偏好异质冲突时，缺乏明确的系统级学习目标
AI.method: 提出Near-Potential Policy Optimization (NePPO)管道，学习玩家独立的势函数，使得以该势函数为共同效用的合作博弈的纳什均衡近似原始博弈的纳什均衡，使用零阶梯度下降最小化目标函数
AI.result: 实验显示NePPO在性能上优于MAPPO、IPPO和MADDPG等基线方法
AI.conclusion: NePPO为混合合作-竞争环境中的近似纳什均衡计算提供了有效的多智能体强化学习解决方案

title: Revealing Behavioral Plasticity in Large Language Models: A Token-Conditional Perspective
comment: Work done during an internship at the Qwen Team, Alibaba Group
summary: In this work, we reveal that Large Language Models (LLMs) possess intrinsic behavioral plasticity-akin to chameleons adapting their coloration to environmental cues-that can be exposed through token-conditional generation and stabilized via reinforcement learning. Specifically, by conditioning generation on carefully selected token prefixes sampled from responses exhibiting desired behaviors, LLMs seamlessly adapt their behavioral modes at inference time (e.g., switching from step-by-step reasoning to direct answering) without retraining. Based on this insight, we propose Token-Conditioned Reinforcement Learning (ToCoRL), a principled framework that leverages RL to internalize this chameleon-like plasticity, transforming transient inference-time adaptations into stable and learnable behavioral patterns. ToCoRL guides exploration with token-conditional generation and keep enhancing exploitation, enabling emergence of appropriate behaviors. Extensive experiments show that ToCoRL enables precise behavioral control without capability degradation. Notably, we show that large reasoning models, while performing strongly on complex mathematics, can be effectively adapted to excel at factual question answering, which was a capability previously hindered by their step-by-step reasoning patterns.

AI.tldr: LLMs具有变色龙般的可塑性，可以通过token条件生成和强化学习稳定行为模式，提出的ToCoRL框架实现了精确行为控制而不损失能力
AI.motivation: 发现LLMs具有内在的行为可塑性，但需要系统化方法来稳定这种能力，使模型能在不同行为模式间灵活切换而不需要重新训练
AI.method: 提出Token-Conditioned Reinforcement Learning (ToCoRL)框架，利用token条件生成引导探索，通过强化学习将推理时的临时适应转化为稳定可学习的行为模式
AI.result: ToCoRL实现了精确的行为控制而不降低模型能力，特别是让大型推理模型在保持复杂数学能力的同时，也能在事实问答任务上表现出色
AI.conclusion: LLMs具有变色龙般的行为可塑性，ToCoRL框架成功地将这种能力系统化，实现了稳定、可学习的行为模式控制，为模型行为定制提供了新途径

title: LiveWorld: Simulating Out-of-Sight Dynamics in Generative Video World Models
summary: Recent generative video world models aim to simulate visual environment evolution, allowing an observer to interactively explore the scene via camera control. However, they implicitly assume that the world only evolves within the observer's field of view. Once an object leaves the observer's view, its state is "frozen" in memory, and revisiting the same region later often fails to reflect events that should have occurred in the meantime. In this work, we identify and formalize this overlooked limitation as the "out-of-sight dynamics" problem, which impedes video world models from representing a continuously evolving world. To address this issue, we propose LiveWorld, a novel framework that extends video world models to support persistent world evolution. Instead of treating the world as static observational memory, LiveWorld models a persistent global state composed of a static 3D background and dynamic entities that continue evolving even when unobserved. To maintain these unseen dynamics, LiveWorld introduces a monitor-based mechanism that autonomously simulates the temporal progression of active entities and synchronizes their evolved states upon revisiting, ensuring spatially coherent rendering. For evaluation, we further introduce LiveBench, a dedicated benchmark for the task of maintaining out-of-sight dynamics. Extensive experiments show that LiveWorld enables persistent event evolution and long-term scene consistency, bridging the gap between existing 2D observation-based memory and true 4D dynamic world simulation. The baseline and benchmark will be publicly available at https://zichengduan.github.io/LiveWorld/index.html.

AI.tldr: LiveWorld提出了一种解决视频世界模型中"视野外动态"问题的新框架，通过持久全局状态和监控机制实现未观察实体的持续演化，确保长期场景一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有视频世界模型假设世界只在观察者视野内演化，一旦物体离开视野，其状态就被"冻结"，重新访问同一区域时无法反映期间应发生的事件。这种"视野外动态"问题阻碍了视频世界模型对持续演化世界的真实表示。
AI.method: LiveWorld框架扩展视频世界模型以支持持久世界演化，将世界建模为静态3D背景和动态实体的持久全局状态。引入基于监控的机制，自主模拟活动实体的时间进程，并在重新访问时同步其演化状态，确保空间一致的渲染。
AI.result: 实验表明LiveWorld能够实现持久事件演化和长期场景一致性，弥合了现有基于2D观测的记忆与真实4D动态世界模拟之间的差距。作者还提出了专门的评估基准LiveBench。
AI.conclusion: LiveWorld解决了视频世界模型中的视野外动态问题，通过持久全局状态和监控机制实现了持续的世界演化，为真正的4D动态世界模拟提供了重要进展。

title: A Robust Incomplete Multimodal Low-Rank Adaptation Approach for Emotion Recognition
summary: Multimodal Emotion Recognition (MER) often encounters incomplete multimodality in practical applications due to sensor failures or privacy protection requirements. While existing methods attempt to address various incomplete multimodal scenarios by balancing the training of each modality combination through additional gradients, these approaches face a critical limitation: training gradients from different modality combinations conflict with each other, ultimately degrading the performance of the final prediction model. In this paper, we propose a unimodal decoupled dynamic low-rank adaptation method based on modality combinations, named MCULoRA, which is a novel framework for the parameter-efficient training of incomplete multimodal learning models. MCULoRA consists of two key modules, modality combination aware low-rank adaptation (MCLA) and dynamic parameter fine-tuning (DPFT). The MCLA module effectively decouples the shared information from the distinct characteristics of individual modality combinations. The DPFT module adjusts the training ratio of modality combinations based on the separability of each modality's representation space, optimizing the learning efficiency across different modality combinations. Our extensive experimental evaluation in multiple benchmark datasets demonstrates that MCULoRA substantially outperforms previous incomplete multimodal learning approaches in downstream task accuracy.

AI.tldr: MCULoRA：一种基于模态组合的单模态解耦动态低秩适应方法，用于解决不完全多模态情感识别中的梯度冲突问题，通过MCLA模块解耦共享信息和独有特征，DPFT模块动态调整训练比例，显著提升下游任务性能。
AI.motivation: 实际应用中多模态情感识别常面临模态不完整问题（传感器故障或隐私保护）。现有方法通过平衡不同模态组合的训练来应对，但不同模态组合的训练梯度会相互冲突，最终降低预测模型性能。
AI.method: 提出MCULoRA框架，包含两个关键模块：1）模态组合感知低秩适应（MCLA）模块，有效解耦不同模态组合的共享信息和独有特征；2）动态参数微调（DPFT）模块，基于各模态表示空间的可分离性动态调整模态组合的训练比例，优化学习效率。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上的广泛实验评估表明，MCULoRA在后续任务准确性方面显著优于先前的不完全多模态学习方法。
AI.conclusion: MCULoRA通过解耦模态组合的共享与独有信息，并动态优化训练策略，有效解决了不完全多模态学习中的梯度冲突问题，为参数高效训练提供了新框架。

title: Diffusion Controller: Framework, Algorithms and Parameterization
summary: Controllable diffusion generation often relies on various heuristics that are seemingly disconnected without a unified understanding. We bridge this gap with Diffusion Controller (DiffCon), a unified control-theoretic view that casts reverse diffusion sampling as state-only stochastic control within (generalized) linearly-solvable Markov Decision Processes (LS-MDPs). Under this framework, control acts by reweighting the pretrained reverse-time transition kernels, balancing terminal objectives against an $f$-divergence cost. From the resulting optimality conditions, we derive practical reinforcement learning methods for diffusion fine-tuning: (i) f-divergence-regularized policy-gradient updates, including a PPO-style rule, and (ii) a regularizer-determined reward-weighted regression objective with a minimizer-preservation guarantee under the Kullback-Leibler (KL) divergence. The LS-MDP framework further implies a principled model form: the optimal score decomposes into a fixed pretrained baseline plus a lightweight control correction, motivating a side-network parameterization conditioned on exposed intermediate denoising outputs, enabling effective gray-box adaptation with a frozen backbone. Experiments on Stable Diffusion v1.4 across supervised and reward-driven finetuning show consistent gains in preference-alignment win rates and improved quality-efficiency trade-offs versus gray-box baselines and even the parameter-efficient white-box adapter LoRA.

AI.tldr: 提出DiffCon框架，将扩散模型采样视为状态随机控制问题，推导出基于f-散度正则化的强化学习微调方法，实现高效灰盒适配
AI.motivation: 现有可控扩散生成方法依赖各种启发式方法，缺乏统一理论框架，需要建立控制理论视角来统一理解扩散模型的控制机制
AI.method: 将反向扩散采样建模为线性可解MDP中的状态随机控制问题，通过重加权预训练转移核实现控制，推导出f-散度正则化策略梯度更新和奖励加权回归目标
AI.result: 在Stable Diffusion v1.4上的实验显示，在监督和奖励驱动的微调中，偏好对齐胜率持续提升，质量-效率权衡优于灰盒基线和LoRA白盒适配器
AI.conclusion: DiffCon提供了扩散模型可控生成的理论框架，实现了高效灰盒适配，在保持主干冻结的同时实现有效控制，为扩散模型微调提供了新方法

title: Aligning to Illusions: Choice Blindness in Human and AI Feedback
summary: Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) assumes annotator preferences reflect stable internal states. We challenge this through three experiments spanning the preference pipeline. In a human choice blindness study, 91% of surreptitiously swapped preferences go undetected, extending choice blindness to third-person evaluative comparison of unfamiliar text. Testing fifteen LLM judges as potential replacements, we find detection relies on shallow text matching rather than genuine self-monitoring: removing prior reasoning from context causes blindness to surge from near-zero to over 50%, while explicit social pressure induces near-universal compliance. In a dose-response experiment across two architectures from 86M to 2B parameters, one-sixth to one-third of labels must be corrupted before the reward signal halves, yet standard pairwise accuracy remains virtually unchanged. A Best-of-N evaluation confirms this translates to downstream policy degradation: at 50% corruption, reward-guided selection produces no improvement over random sampling, while the proxy model reports monotonically increasing scores. Together, these results reveal a preference construction problem: the signal entering RLHF is shaped by elicitation context in ways that neither human metacognition, LLM self-monitoring, nor standard evaluation metrics can detect.

AI.tldr: RLHF偏好标注存在构造性问题：人类选择盲视、LLM法官依赖浅层匹配、奖励信号对标签污染不敏感，导致偏好信号不可靠且评估指标无法检测
AI.motivation: 挑战RLHF的基本假设——标注者偏好反映稳定的内部状态，揭示偏好标注过程中的构造性问题及其对强化学习的影响
AI.method: 三个实验：1）人类选择盲视研究（偏好被秘密替换）；2）测试15个LLM法官的自我监控能力；3）剂量响应实验（标签污染对奖励信号的影响）和Best-of-N评估
AI.result: 91%的替换偏好未被检测；LLM法官依赖浅层文本匹配而非真正自我监控；1/6到1/3标签污染时奖励信号减半但成对准确率不变；50%污染时奖励引导选择与随机采样无异
AI.conclusion: RLHF的偏好信号受引发情境影响，人类元认知、LLM自我监控和标准评估指标均无法检测这种构造性问题，需要重新审视RLHF的基础假设

title: PromptGate Client Adaptive Vision Language Gating for Open Set Federated Active Learning
summary: Deploying medical AI across resource-constrained institutions demands data-efficient learning pipelines that respect patient privacy. Federated Learning (FL) enables collaborative medical AI without centralising data, yet real-world clinical pools are inherently open-set, containing out-of-distribution (OOD) noise such as imaging artifacts and wrong modalities. Standard Active Learning (AL) query strategies mistake this noise for informative samples, wasting scarce annotation budgets. We propose PromptGate, a dynamic VLM-gated framework for Open-Set Federated AL that purifies unlabeled pools before querying. PromptGate introduces a federated Class-Specific Context Optimization: lightweight, learnable prompt vectors that adapt a frozen BiomedCLIP backbone to local clinical domains and aggregate globally via FedAvg -- without sharing patient data. As new annotations arrive, prompts progressively sharpen the ID/OOD boundary, turning the VLM into a dynamic gatekeeper that is strategy-agnostic: a plug-and-play pre-selection module enhancing any downstream AL strategy. Experiments on distributed dermatology and breast imaging benchmarks show that while static VLM prompting degrades to 50% ID purity, PromptGate maintains $>$95% purity with 98% OOD recall.

AI.tldr: PromptGate：一个动态VLM门控框架，用于开放集联邦主动学习，通过可学习提示向量净化未标记数据池，提高ID样本纯度
AI.motivation: 在资源受限的医疗机构部署医疗AI需要数据高效且保护隐私的学习管道。联邦学习虽然支持协作而不集中数据，但现实临床数据池本质上是开放集，包含分布外噪声（如成像伪影、错误模态）。标准主动学习策略会误将噪声当作信息样本，浪费稀缺的标注预算。
AI.method: 提出PromptGate框架，引入联邦类特定上下文优化：轻量级可学习提示向量，适应冻结的BiomedCLIP骨干到本地临床领域，并通过FedAvg全局聚合而不共享患者数据。随着新标注到达，提示逐步锐化ID/OOD边界，将VLM转变为动态门控器，作为即插即用的预选择模块增强任何下游AL策略。
AI.result: 在分布式皮肤病学和乳腺成像基准测试中，静态VLM提示的ID纯度降至50%，而PromptGate保持>95%纯度，OOD召回率达到98%。
AI.conclusion: PromptGate通过动态VLM门控有效净化开放集联邦学习中的未标记数据池，显著提高ID样本纯度，为资源受限医疗机构的AI部署提供数据高效且隐私保护的解决方案。

title: Combinatorial Allocation Bandits with Nonlinear Arm Utility
summary: A matching platform is a system that matches different types of participants, such as companies and job-seekers. In such a platform, merely maximizing the number of matches can result in matches being concentrated on highly popular participants, which may increase dissatisfaction among other participants, such as companies, and ultimately lead to their churn, reducing the platform's profit opportunities. To address this issue, we propose a novel online learning problem, Combinatorial Allocation Bandits (CAB), which incorporates the notion of *arm satisfaction*. In CAB, at each round $t=1,\dots,T$, the learner observes $K$ feature vectors corresponding to $K$ arms for each of $N$ users, assigns each user to an arm, and then observes feedback following a generalized linear model (GLM). Unlike prior work, the learner's objective is not to maximize the number of positive feedback, but rather to maximize the arm satisfaction. For CAB, we provide an upper confidence bound algorithm that achieves an approximate regret upper bound, which matches the existing lower bound for the special case. Furthermore, we propose a TS algorithm and provide an approximate regret upper bound. Finally, we conduct experiments on synthetic data to demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed algorithms compared to other methods.

AI.tldr: 提出组合分配赌博机（CAB）新问题，关注臂满意度而非匹配数量，设计UCB和TS算法并证明近似遗憾上界
AI.motivation: 匹配平台中仅最大化匹配数量会导致匹配集中在热门参与者上，增加其他参与者不满并导致流失，降低平台利润机会
AI.method: 提出CAB在线学习问题，引入臂满意度概念；设计UCB算法和TS算法，提供近似遗憾上界分析
AI.result: UCB算法达到近似遗憾上界，与特殊情况下现有下界匹配；TS算法也提供近似遗憾上界；合成数据实验验证算法有效性
AI.conclusion: CAB问题能更好建模匹配平台中参与者满意度，提出的算法在理论和实验上表现良好，为解决匹配集中问题提供新思路

title: One Model Is Enough: Native Retrieval Embeddings from LLM Agent Hidden States
summary: LLM agents that retrieve external knowledge typically generate a search query as text, then run a separate embedding model to encode it into a vector. This two-model pipeline adds infrastructure complexity and latency, yet is redundant: the LLM already encodes the full conversational context in its hidden states. We propose equipping LLM agents with native retrieval capability by adding a lightweight projection head that maps hidden states directly into the embedding space, eliminating the need for a separate embedding model. Trained with a combination of alignment, contrastive, and rank distillation losses, our method retains 97\% of baseline retrieval quality while enabling the LLM agent to search with its own representations. Experiments on the QReCC conversational search benchmark show competitive Recall@10 and MRR@10 compared to the standard generate-then-encode pipeline, with systematic ablations confirming the contribution of each loss component.

AI.tldr: 提出让LLM代理具备原生检索能力的方法，通过轻量级投影头将隐藏状态直接映射到嵌入空间，替代传统的生成-编码两阶段流程
AI.motivation: 传统LLM代理检索外部知识需要先生成搜索查询文本，再用单独的嵌入模型编码为向量，这种两模型流程增加了基础设施复杂性和延迟，且存在冗余——LLM本身已将会话上下文编码在隐藏状态中
AI.method: 为LLM代理添加轻量级投影头，将隐藏状态直接映射到嵌入空间，消除对单独嵌入模型的需求。使用对齐损失、对比损失和排名蒸馏损失的组合进行训练
AI.result: 在QReCC会话搜索基准测试中，保持了97%的基线检索质量，Recall@10和MRR@10与标准的生成-编码流程相当，系统消融实验确认了每个损失组件的贡献
AI.conclusion: 通过让LLM代理具备原生检索能力，可以简化基础设施、降低延迟，同时保持检索质量，为更高效的检索增强生成系统提供了新方向

title: ACD-U: Asymmetric co-teaching with machine unlearning for robust learning with noisy labels
summary: Deep neural networks are prone to memorizing incorrect labels during training, which degrades their generalizability. Although recent methods have combined sample selection with semi-supervised learning (SSL) to exploit the memorization effect -- where networks learn from clean data before noisy data -- they cannot correct selection errors once a sample is misclassified. To overcome this, we propose asymmetric co-teaching with different architectures (ACD)-U, an asymmetric co-teaching framework that uses different model architectures and incorporates machine unlearning. ACD-U addresses this limitation through two core mechanisms. First, its asymmetric co-teaching pairs a contrastive language-image pretraining (CLIP)-pretrained vision Transformer with a convolutional neural network (CNN), leveraging their complementary learning behaviors: the pretrained model provides stable predictions, whereas the CNN adapts throughout training. This asymmetry, where the vision Transformer is trained only on clean samples and the CNN is trained through SSL, effectively mitigates confirmation bias. Second, selective unlearning enables post-hoc error correction by identifying incorrectly memorized samples through loss trajectory analysis and CLIP consistency checks, and then removing their influence via Kullback--Leibler divergence-based forgetting. This approach shifts the learning paradigm from passive error avoidance to active error correction. Experiments on synthetic and real-world noisy datasets, including CIFAR-10/100, CIFAR-N, WebVision, Clothing1M, and Red Mini-ImageNet, demonstrate state-of-the-art performance, particularly in high-noise regimes and under instance-dependent noise. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/meruemon/ACD-U.

AI.tldr: 提出ACD-U框架，通过非对称协同教学和选择性遗忘机制，解决深度神经网络在噪声标签训练中的记忆错误问题，实现主动纠错而非被动避错。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络在训练过程中容易记忆错误标签，降低泛化能力。现有方法结合样本选择和半监督学习来利用记忆效应，但一旦样本被错误分类就无法纠正选择错误。
AI.method: 提出非对称协同教学框架ACD-U：1) 使用CLIP预训练的视觉Transformer和CNN进行非对称协同教学，利用互补学习行为；2) 通过损失轨迹分析和CLIP一致性检查识别错误记忆样本，使用KL散度选择性遗忘进行后验纠错。
AI.result: 在合成和真实噪声数据集（CIFAR-10/100、CIFAR-N、WebVision、Clothing1M、Red Mini-ImageNet）上实现最先进性能，特别是在高噪声场景和实例相关噪声下表现优异。
AI.conclusion: ACD-U通过非对称协同教学和选择性遗忘机制，将学习范式从被动错误避免转变为主动错误纠正，有效解决了噪声标签训练中的记忆错误问题。

title: RESCHED: Rethinking Flexible Job Shop Scheduling from a Transformer-based Architecture with Simplified States
summary: Neural approaches to the Flexible Job Shop Scheduling Problem (FJSP), particularly those based on deep reinforcement learning (DRL), have gained growing attention in recent years. However, existing methods rely on complex feature-engineered state representations (i.e., often requiring more than 20 handcrafted features) and graph-biased neural architectures. To reduce modeling complexity and advance a more generalizable framework for FJSP, we introduce \textsc{ReSched}, a minimalist DRL framework that rethinks both the scheduling formulation and model design. First, by revisiting the Markov Decision Process (MDP) formulation of FJSP, we condense the state space to just four essential features, eliminating historical dependencies through a subproblem-based perspective. Second, we employ Transformer blocks with dot-product attention, augmented by three lightweight but effective architectural modifications tailored to scheduling tasks. Extensive experiments show that \textsc{ReSched} outperforms classical dispatching rules and state-of-the-art DRL methods on FJSP. Moreover, \textsc{ReSched} also generalizes well to the Job Shop Scheduling Problem (JSSP) and the Flexible Flow Shop Scheduling Problem (FFSP), achieving competitive performance against neural baselines specifically designed for these variants.

AI.tldr: ReSched是一个简约的深度强化学习框架，用于解决柔性作业车间调度问题，通过简化状态表示和Transformer架构，在减少建模复杂度的同时提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于深度强化学习的柔性作业车间调度方法依赖复杂的特征工程（通常需要20多个手工特征）和图偏置的神经网络架构，建模复杂度高，缺乏通用性。
AI.method: 1. 重新审视FJSP的马尔可夫决策过程，将状态空间压缩到仅四个基本特征，通过基于子问题的视角消除历史依赖；2. 使用带点积注意力的Transformer块，并针对调度任务设计了三个轻量级但有效的架构修改。
AI.result: ReSched在FJSP上超越了经典调度规则和最先进的DRL方法。此外，它还能很好地泛化到作业车间调度问题（JSSP）和柔性流水车间调度问题（FFSP），在与专门为这些变体设计的神经基线比较中取得了有竞争力的性能。
AI.conclusion: ReSched通过简化状态表示和模型设计，提供了一个更通用、更简约的深度强化学习框架，能够有效解决柔性作业车间调度问题并泛化到相关调度变体。

title: A Dataset for Probing Translationese Preferences in English-to-Swedish Translation
summary: Translations often carry traces of the source language, a phenomenon known as translationese. We introduce the first freely available English-to-Swedish dataset contrasting translationese sentences with idiomatic alternatives, designed to probe intrinsic preferences of language models. It includes error tags and descriptions of the problems in the original translations. In experiments evaluating smaller Swedish and multilingual LLMs with our dataset, we find that they often favor the translationese phrasing. Human alternatives are chosen more often when the English source sentence is omitted, indicating that exposure to the source biases models toward literal translations, although even without context models often prefer the translationese variant. Our dataset and findings provide a resource and benchmark for developing models that produce more natural, idiomatic output in non-English languages.

AI.tldr: 研究人员创建了首个英译瑞典语翻译腔数据集，包含翻译腔句子与地道替代句，用于测试语言模型的内在偏好。实验发现瑞典语和多语言模型常偏好翻译腔表达，即使没有英语原文时模型也常选择翻译腔变体。
AI.motivation: 翻译常带有源语言痕迹（翻译腔），但目前缺乏系统研究语言模型对翻译腔偏好的资源。需要创建数据集来探究语言模型是否倾向于产生不自然的翻译腔表达，以开发更地道自然的非英语语言模型。
AI.method: 创建首个免费可用的英译瑞典语数据集，包含翻译腔句子与地道替代句对比，并标注错误类型和问题描述。使用该数据集评估瑞典语和多语言语言模型，测试模型在有/无英语原文情况下对翻译腔和地道表达的偏好。
AI.result: 实验发现较小的瑞典语和多语言LLM常偏好翻译腔表达。当省略英语原文时，人类地道替代被选择更多，表明接触源语言会偏向字面翻译，但即使没有上下文，模型也常偏好翻译腔变体。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集和发现为开发能产生更自然、地道非英语输出的模型提供了资源和基准。研究揭示了语言模型对翻译腔的系统偏好，强调了需要改进模型以产生更地道的翻译。

title: Class Visualizations and Activation Atlases for Enhancing Interpretability in Deep Learning-Based Computational Pathology
summary: The rapid adoption of transformer-based models in computational pathology has enabled prediction of molecular and clinical biomarkers from H&E whole-slide images, yet interpretability has not kept pace with model complexity. While attribution- and generative-based methods are common, feature visualization approaches such as class visualizations (CVs) and activation atlases (AAs) have not been systematically evaluated for these models. We developed a visualization framework and assessed CVs and AAs for a transformer-based foundation model across tissue and multi-organ cancer classification tasks with increasing label granularity. Four pathologists annotated real and generated images to quantify inter-observer agreement, complemented by attribution and similarity metrics. CVs preserved recognizability for morphologically distinct tissues but showed reduced separability for overlapping cancer subclasses. In tissue classification, agreement decreased from Fleiss k = 0.75 (scans) to k = 0.31 (CVs), with similar trends in cancer subclass tasks. AAs revealed layer-dependent organization: coarse tissue-level concepts formed coherent regions, whereas finer subclasses exhibited dispersion and overlap. Agreement was moderate for tissue classification (k = 0.58), high for coarse cancer groupings (k = 0.82), and low at subclass level (k = 0.11). Atlas separability closely tracked expert agreement on real images, indicating that representational ambiguity reflects intrinsic pathological complexity. Attribution-based metrics approximated expert variability in low-complexity settings, whereas perceptual and distributional metrics showed limited alignment. Overall, concept-level feature visualization reveals structured morphological manifolds in transformer-based pathology models and provides a framework for expert-centered interrogation of learned representations across label granularities.

AI.tldr: 该研究系统评估了transformer病理学模型中特征可视化方法（类别可视化和激活图谱），发现这些方法能揭示模型学习的形态学结构，但可视化质量随标签粒度增加而下降，反映了病理学固有的复杂性。
AI.motivation: 尽管transformer模型在计算病理学中广泛应用，但其可解释性落后于模型复杂度。特征可视化方法（如类别可视化和激活图谱）尚未在病理学transformer模型中得到系统评估，需要建立专家中心的评估框架来理解模型学习的表示。
AI.method: 开发可视化框架，在transformer基础模型上评估类别可视化和激活图谱，涵盖组织和多器官癌症分类任务（标签粒度递增）。四位病理学家标注真实和生成图像以量化观察者间一致性，辅以归因和相似性指标。
AI.result: 类别可视化对形态学不同的组织保持可识别性，但对重叠癌症亚类的可分性降低。激活图谱显示层依赖的组织结构：粗粒度组织概念形成连贯区域，而细粒度亚类呈现分散和重叠。图谱可分性与专家对真实图像的一致性密切相关，表明表示模糊性反映了病理学固有复杂性。
AI.conclusion: 概念级特征可视化揭示了transformer病理学模型中的结构化形态学流形，提供了跨标签粒度专家中心式学习表示审问的框架。可视化质量随任务复杂性增加而下降，这反映了病理学诊断的固有挑战。

title: Resource-Adaptive Federated Text Generation with Differential Privacy
summary: In cross-silo federated learning (FL), sensitive text datasets remain confined to local organizations due to privacy regulations, making repeated training for each downstream task both communication-intensive and privacy-demanding. A promising alternative is to generate differentially private (DP) synthetic datasets that approximate the global distribution and can be reused across tasks. However, pretrained large language models (LLMs) often fail under domain shift, and federated finetuning is hindered by computational heterogeneity: only resource-rich clients can update the model, while weaker clients are excluded, amplifying data skew and the adverse effects of DP noise. We propose a flexible participation framework that adapts to client capacities. Strong clients perform DP federated finetuning, while weak clients contribute through a lightweight DP voting mechanism that refines synthetic text. To ensure the synthetic data mirrors the global dataset, we apply control codes (e.g., labels, topics, metadata) that represent each client's data proportions and constrain voting to semantically coherent subsets. This two-phase approach requires only a single round of communication for weak clients and integrates contributions from all participants. Experiments show that our framework improves distribution alignment and downstream robustness under DP and heterogeneity.

AI.tldr: 提出一个适应客户容量的联邦学习框架，强客户进行差分隐私联邦微调，弱客户通过轻量级差分隐私投票机制贡献，使用控制代码确保合成数据反映全局分布
AI.motivation: 跨机构联邦学习中，敏感文本数据因隐私法规限制无法共享，重复训练下游任务通信开销大且隐私要求高。现有方法中预训练大语言模型存在领域偏移问题，联邦微调受计算异构性限制，只有资源丰富的客户能参与，导致数据倾斜和差分隐私噪声影响加剧
AI.method: 提出灵活参与框架：1) 强客户执行差分隐私联邦微调；2) 弱客户通过轻量级差分隐私投票机制优化合成文本；3) 使用控制代码（标签、主题、元数据）表示客户数据比例，将投票限制在语义一致的子集中；4) 两阶段方法仅需弱客户单轮通信，整合所有参与者的贡献
AI.result: 实验表明该框架在差分隐私和异构性条件下改善了分布对齐和下游任务的鲁棒性
AI.conclusion: 提出的灵活参与框架能够适应客户计算能力差异，通过结合强客户的联邦微调和弱客户的轻量级投票机制，在保护隐私的同时有效生成反映全局分布的合成数据，解决了现有方法中的数据倾斜和差分隐私噪声问题

title: Fanar-Sadiq: A Multi-Agent Architecture for Grounded Islamic QA
summary: Large language models (LLMs) can answer religious knowledge queries fluently, yet they often hallucinate and misattribute sources, which is especially consequential in Islamic settings where users expect grounding in canonical texts (Qur'an and Hadith) and jurisprudential (fiqh) nuance. Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) reduces some of these limitations by grounding generation in external evidence. However, a single ``retrieve-then-generate'' pipeline is limited to deal with the diversity of Islamic queries.Users may request verbatim scripture, fatwa-style guidance with citations or rule-constrained computations such as zakat and inheritance that require strict arithmetic and legal invariants. In this work, we present a bilingual (Arabic/English) multi-agent Islamic assistant, called Fanar-Sadiq, which is a core component of the Fanar AI platform. Fanar-Sadiq routes Islamic-related queries to specialized modules within an agentic, tool-using architecture. The system supports intent-aware routing, retrieval-grounded fiqh answers with deterministic citation normalization and verification traces, exact verse lookup with quotation validation, and deterministic calculators for Sunni zakat and inheritance with madhhab-sensitive branching. We evaluate the complete end-to-end system on public Islamic QA benchmarks and demonstrate effectiveness and efficiency. Our system is currently publicly and freely accessible through API and a Web application, and has been accessed $\approx$1.9M times in less than a year.

AI.tldr: Fanar-Sadiq是一个双语多智能体伊斯兰助手，通过专门的模块处理不同类型的伊斯兰查询，包括教法回答、经文查找和确定性计算，解决了传统LLMs在伊斯兰知识查询中的幻觉和来源错误问题。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在回答伊斯兰知识查询时经常产生幻觉和错误归因来源，这在伊斯兰环境中尤其严重，因为用户期望基于经典文本（古兰经和圣训）和教法学细节的准确回答。传统的检索增强生成方法难以处理伊斯兰查询的多样性。
AI.method: 采用多智能体工具使用架构，将伊斯兰相关查询路由到专门模块：意图感知路由、基于检索的教法回答（带有确定性引用标准化和验证跟踪）、精确经文查找（带有引用验证）、以及用于逊尼派天课和遗产的确定性计算器（带有教法学派敏感分支）。
AI.result: 在公共伊斯兰问答基准测试中展示了有效性和效率，系统在不到一年内通过API和Web应用被访问约190万次，目前公开免费可用。
AI.conclusion: Fanar-Sadiq通过专门的多智能体架构有效解决了伊斯兰知识查询中的准确性和可靠性问题，为伊斯兰AI助手提供了实用且可扩展的解决方案。

title: FreeFly-Thinking : Aligning Chain-of-Thought Reasoning with Continuous UAV Navigation
summary: Vision-Language Navigation aims to enable agents to understand natural language instructions and carry out appropriate navigation actions in real-world environments. Most work focuses on indoor settings, with little research in complex outdoor scenes. Current UAV Vision-and-Language Navigation models typically act as black boxes without explicit reasoning. We introduce FreeFly-thinking, an end-to-end VLN framework that converts the UAV agent's egocentric images and language instructions into a series of actions, inspired by environment of urban architecture proposed by OpenFly. We first construct a UAV dataset for navigation task, and then performing natural language chain of thought. We adopt a two-stage training strategy: Supervised fine-tuning and Reinforcement fine-tuning. Experiments on unseen test demonstrate a strong performance, presenting robustness and efficiency in UAV navigation issue.

AI.tldr: FreeFly-thinking是一个用于无人机视觉语言导航的端到端框架，通过将第一人称视角图像和语言指令转换为动作序列，在复杂户外场景中实现显式推理导航。
AI.motivation: 当前视觉语言导航研究主要集中在室内环境，对复杂户外场景研究不足。现有的无人机视觉语言导航模型通常作为黑箱运行，缺乏显式推理能力，需要更透明和可解释的导航框架。
AI.method: 1. 构建无人机导航任务数据集；2. 采用自然语言思维链进行推理；3. 使用两阶段训练策略：监督微调和强化学习微调；4. 基于OpenFly提出的城市建筑环境构建框架。
AI.result: 在未见过的测试集上表现出强大的性能，在无人机导航问题上展现出鲁棒性和效率。
AI.conclusion: FreeFly-thinking框架成功解决了无人机在复杂户外环境中的视觉语言导航问题，通过显式推理和两阶段训练策略实现了高效可靠的导航性能。

title: Interpretable Maximum Margin Deep Anomaly Detection
summary: Anomaly detection is a crucial machine-learning task with wide-ranging applications. Deep Support Vector Data Description (Deep SVDD) is a prominent deep one-class method, but it is vulnerable to hypersphere collapse, often relies on heuristic choices for hypersphere parameters, and provides limited interpretability. To address these issues, we propose Interpretable Maximum Margin Deep Anomaly Detection (IMD-AD), which leverages a small set of labeled anomalies and a maximum margin objective to stabilize training and improve discrimination. It is inherently resilient to hypersphere collapse. Furthermore, we prove an equivalence between hypersphere parameters and the network's final-layer weights, which allows the center and radius to be learned end-to-end as part of the model and yields intrinsic interpretability and visualizable outputs. We further develop an efficient training algorithm that jointly optimizes representation, margin, and final-layer parameters. Extensive experiments and ablation studies on image and tabular benchmarks demonstrate that IMD-AD empirically improves detection performance over several state-of-the-art baselines while providing interpretable decision diagnostics.

AI.tldr: IMD-AD是一种可解释的最大边界深度异常检测方法，通过利用少量标记异常和最大边界目标来稳定训练、防止超球体坍缩，并提供可解释的决策诊断。
AI.motivation: Deep SVDD存在超球体坍缩问题、依赖启发式超球参数选择、可解释性有限。需要一种更稳定、可解释的深度异常检测方法。
AI.method: 提出IMD-AD方法：1) 利用少量标记异常和最大边界目标稳定训练；2) 证明超球参数与网络最后一层权重的等价性，实现端到端学习；3) 开发联合优化表示、边界和最后一层参数的高效训练算法。
AI.result: 在图像和表格基准测试上的广泛实验表明，IMD-AD在检测性能上优于多个最先进的基线方法，同时提供可解释的决策诊断。
AI.conclusion: IMD-AD解决了Deep SVDD的关键限制，通过最大边界学习和端到端参数优化，实现了更稳定、高性能且可解释的深度异常检测。

title: CODA: Difficulty-Aware Compute Allocation for Adaptive Reasoning
summary: The emergence of large reasoning models demonstrates that scaling inference-time compute significantly enhances performance on complex tasks. However, it often falls into another trap: overthinking simple problems, where repetitive rationales yield minimal accuracy gains at a disproportionately high cost. This motivates adaptive reasoning: dynamically aligning reasoning depth with instance difficulty. In this paper, we study adaptive reasoning from an optimality perspective, formalizing it as a utility maximization problem where tokens are allocated until the marginal accuracy gain falls below the incremental cost. Based on this, we propose CODA (Compute Allocation by Difficulty Awareness), a method that operationalizes this principle by allocating tokens via a policy-internal difficulty signal. Specifically, CODA estimates difficulty via group-based rollouts and maps it to two non-negative gates that modulate a length-dependent shaping term on top of the binary base reward. The easy-side gate penalizes verbosity on simple instances, whereas the hard-side gate encourages more deliberative rollouts on challenging ones. Across model scales and benchmarks, CODA achieves adaptive reasoning without external annotations or user-provided budgets: on easy tasks, CODA reduces token costs by over 60% while maintaining strong accuracy, whereas on hard tasks it incentivizes more deliberative rollouts to maximize performance.

AI.tldr: CODA是一种自适应推理方法，通过难度感知动态分配计算资源，简单任务减少60%计算成本，困难任务鼓励深入推理
AI.motivation: 大型推理模型存在"过度思考"简单问题的问题，重复推理带来微小精度提升但计算成本过高，需要根据问题难度动态调整推理深度
AI.method: 将自适应推理形式化为效用最大化问题，提出CODA方法：通过基于组的rollout估计难度，使用两个非负门控调节长度相关的奖励，简单任务惩罚冗长，困难任务鼓励深入推理
AI.result: 在不同模型规模和基准测试中，CODA无需外部标注或用户预算即可实现自适应推理：简单任务减少60%以上token成本同时保持高精度，困难任务激励更深入的推理以最大化性能
AI.conclusion: CODA通过难度感知的计算分配实现了高效的自适应推理，解决了大型模型在简单问题上过度计算的问题，在保持性能的同时显著降低计算成本

title: FastSTAR: Spatiotemporal Token Pruning for Efficient Autoregressive Video Synthesis
summary: Visual Autoregressive modeling (VAR) has emerged as a highly efficient alternative to diffusion-based frameworks, achieving comparable synthesis quality. However, as this paradigm extends to Spacetime Autoregressive modeling (STAR) for video generation, scaling resolution and frame counts leads to a "token explosion" that creates a massive computational bottleneck in the final refinement stages. To address this, we propose FastSTAR, a training-free acceleration framework designed for high-quality video generation. Our core method, Spatiotemporal Token Pruning, identifies essential tokens by integrating two specialized terms: (1) Spatial similarity, which evaluates structural convergence across hierarchical scales to skip computations in regions where further refinement becomes redundant, and (2) Temporal similarity, which identifies active motion trajectories by assessing feature-level variations relative to the preceding clip. Combined with a Partial Update mechanism, FastSTAR ensures that only non-converged regions are refined, maintaining fluid motion while bypassing redundant computations. Experimental results on InfinityStar demonstrate that FastSTAR achieves up to a 2.01x speedup with a PSNR of 28.29 and less than 1% performance degradation, proving a superior efficiency-quality trade-off for STAR-based video synthesis.

AI.tldr: FastSTAR通过时空令牌剪枝和部分更新机制，在保持视频生成质量的同时，显著加速时空自回归模型的计算，解决了高分辨率视频生成中的"令牌爆炸"问题。
AI.motivation: 时空自回归建模(STAR)在扩展到高分辨率视频生成时，面临"令牌爆炸"问题，导致最后精炼阶段产生巨大的计算瓶颈，需要高效的加速方案。
AI.method: 提出FastSTAR训练免费加速框架，核心是时空令牌剪枝：1)空间相似性评估层次尺度上的结构收敛性；2)时间相似性识别相对于前一片段的特征级变化。结合部分更新机制，只精炼未收敛区域。
AI.result: 在InfinityStar上实验显示，FastSTAR实现最高2.01倍加速，PSNR为28.29，性能下降小于1%，在STAR视频合成中实现了优越的效率-质量权衡。
AI.conclusion: FastSTAR通过智能令牌剪枝有效解决了STAR视频生成的计算瓶颈，在保持高质量的同时显著提升效率，为大规模视频合成提供了实用解决方案。

title: Entropy-Aware On-Policy Distillation of Language Models
summary: On-policy distillation is a promising approach for transferring knowledge between language models, where a student learns from dense token-level signals along its own trajectories. This framework typically uses reverse KL divergence, encouraging the student to match the teacher's high-confidence predictions. However, we show that the mode-seeking property of reverse KL reduces generation diversity and yields unstable learning signals when the teacher distribution has high entropy. To address this, we introduce Entropy-Aware On-Policy Distillation. Our key idea is augmenting the standard reverse KL objective with forward KL when teacher entropy is high, capturing the full range of plausible outputs while retaining precise imitation elsewhere. It balances mode-seeking precision with mode-covering robustness without sacrificing on-policy training efficiency. Experiments show that our method maintains generation diversity (sustained token-level entropy) and improves student-teacher alignment (lower forward KL on high-entropy tokens). Across six math reasoning benchmarks, this yields Pass@8 accuracy gains of +1.37 for Qwen3-0.6B-Base, +2.39 for Qwen3-1.7B-Base, and +5.05 for Qwen3-4B-Base compared to baseline on-policy distillation methods. These results demonstrate that accounting for teacher uncertainty is essential for maintaining diversity and achieving effective knowledge transfer.

AI.tldr: 本文提出熵感知的在线蒸馏方法，通过结合反向KL和正向KL来解决传统在线蒸馏中反向KL导致生成多样性下降的问题，在数学推理任务上显著提升了学生模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统在线蒸馏使用反向KL散度，鼓励学生匹配教师的高置信度预测，但这种模式寻求特性会降低生成多样性，并且在教师分布熵值较高时产生不稳定的学习信号。
AI.method: 提出熵感知在线蒸馏，核心思想是在教师熵值较高时，在标准反向KL目标中加入正向KL，既能捕捉完整输出范围，又在其他地方保持精确模仿，平衡模式寻求的精确性和模式覆盖的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法保持了生成多样性（维持了词元级熵值），改善了师生对齐（在高熵词元上获得更低的正向KL）。在六个数学推理基准测试中，相比基线在线蒸馏方法，Qwen3-0.6B-Base获得+1.37的Pass@8准确率提升，Qwen3-1.7B-Base获得+2.39提升，Qwen3-4B-Base获得+5.05提升。
AI.conclusion: 考虑教师不确定性对于保持多样性和实现有效知识传递至关重要，熵感知在线蒸馏方法在平衡精确模仿和鲁棒覆盖方面取得了显著效果。

title: VINO: Video-driven Invariance for Non-contextual Objects via Structural Prior Guided De-contextualization
summary:
Self-supervised learning (SSL) has made rapid progress, yet learned features often over-rely on contextual shortcuts-background textures and co-occurrence statistics. While video provides rich temporal variation, dense in-the-wild streams with strong ego-motion create a co-occurrence trap: foreground objects and background context move coherently, encouraging representations to collapse into scene encoders.
  To address this, we propose VINO (Video-driven Invariance for Non-Contextual Objects), a teacher-student framework that learns robust image encoders from dense video by imposing a structural information bottleneck. Using a class-agnostic structural prior solely to generate views-not as semantic pseudo-labels-VINO forms an asymmetric distillation problem. The teacher predicts from a foreground-union view with the background suppressed, while the student observes object-conditioned scene views that retain surrounding context but remove competing instances. Matching these targets via masked distillation makes background cues unreliable, pushing the representation toward object-centric invariances. We further enforce temporal object permanence via teacher-anchored cross-time distillation over track-matched objects, and stabilize part-to-whole consistency with mask-guided local views.
  Through attention visualization and unsupervised object discovery on PASCAL VOC, we demonstrate that VINO effectively disentangles foreground from background. Pretrained on the dense Walking Tours Venice video, VINO achieves 34.8 CorLoc, yielding highly focused, shape-biased representations that substantially outperform prior dense-video and motion-guided SSL baselines.

AI.tldr: VINO是一个从密集视频中学习鲁棒图像编码器的教师-学生框架，通过结构信息瓶颈和掩码蒸馏来解耦前景与背景，学习对象中心的不变性特征。
AI.motivation: 自监督学习中的特征经常过度依赖上下文捷径（背景纹理和共现统计）。在密集野外视频流中，前景对象和背景上下文一致移动，导致表示退化为场景编码器，无法有效分离前景与背景。
AI.method: 提出VINO框架：1）使用类无关结构先验生成视图（不作为语义伪标签）；2）教师网络从背景抑制的前景联合视图预测，学生网络观察对象条件场景视图；3）通过掩码蒸馏匹配目标，使背景线索不可靠；4）通过教师锚定的跨时间蒸馏强制时间对象持久性；5）使用掩码引导的局部视图稳定部分到整体一致性。
AI.result: 在PASCAL VOC上通过注意力可视化和无监督对象发现证明VINO有效解耦前景与背景。在密集Walking Tours Venice视频上预训练后，达到34.8 CorLoc，产生高度聚焦、形状偏置的表示，显著优于先前密集视频和运动引导的自监督学习基线。
AI.conclusion: VINO通过结构信息瓶颈和不对称蒸馏，成功从密集视频中学习到对象中心的不变性特征，有效解决了自监督学习中特征过度依赖上下文捷径的问题，为从视频中学习鲁棒图像表示提供了新方法。

title: Dreamer-CDP: Improving Reconstruction-free World Models Via Continuous Deterministic Representation Prediction
summary: Model-based reinforcement learning (MBRL) agents operating in high-dimensional observation spaces, such as Dreamer, rely on learning abstract representations for effective planning and control. Existing approaches typically employ reconstruction-based objectives in the observation space, which can render representations sensitive to task-irrelevant details. Recent alternatives trade reconstruction for auxiliary action prediction heads or view augmentation strategies, but perform worse in the Crafter environment than reconstruction-based methods. We close this gap between Dreamer and reconstruction-free models by introducing a JEPA-style predictor defined on continuous, deterministic representations. Our method matches Dreamer's performance on Crafter, demonstrating effective world model learning on this benchmark without reconstruction objectives.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于JEPA风格预测器的无重建世界模型学习方法，在Crafter环境中达到与Dreamer相当的性能
AI.motivation: 现有基于重建的MBRL方法对任务无关细节敏感，而替代的无重建方法在Crafter环境中表现不如重建方法，需要弥合这一性能差距
AI.method: 引入基于连续确定性表示的JEPA风格预测器，在无重建目标的情况下学习有效的世界模型
AI.result: 在Crafter环境中匹配了Dreamer的性能，证明了无需重建目标也能在该基准上有效学习世界模型
AI.conclusion: 通过JEPA风格预测器成功实现了无重建世界模型学习，在Crafter环境中达到与重建方法相当的性能，为MBRL提供了新的有效方法

title: Single Image Super-Resolution via Bivariate `A Trous Wavelet Diffusion
summary: The effectiveness of super resolution (SR) models hinges on their ability to recover high frequency structure without introducing artifacts. Diffusion based approaches have recently advanced the state of the art in SR. However, most diffusion based SR pipelines operate purely in the spatial domain, which may yield high frequency details that are not well supported by the underlying low resolution evidence. On the other hand, unlike supervised SR models that may inject dataset specific textures, single image SR relies primarily on internal image statistics and can therefore be less prone to dataset-driven hallucinations; nevertheless, ambiguity in the LR observation can still lead to inconsistent high frequency details. To tackle this problem, we introduce BATDiff, an unsupervised Bivariate A trous Wavelet Diffusion model designed to provide structured cross scale guidance during the generative process. BATDiff employs an a Trous wavelet transform that constructs an undecimated multiscale representation in which high frequency components are progressively revealed while the full spatial resolution is preserved. As the core inference mechanism, BATDiff includes a bivariate cross scale module that models parent child dependencies between adjacent scales. It improves high frequency coherence and reduces mismatch artifacts in diffusion based SR. Experiments on standard benchmarks demonstrate that BATDiff produces sharper and more structurally consistent reconstructions than existing diffusion and non diffusion baselines, achieving improvements in fidelity and perceptual quality.

AI.tldr: BATDiff是一种无监督双变量小波扩散模型，通过跨尺度结构化指导提升超分辨率重建质量，减少伪影并增强高频一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散超分辨率方法主要在空间域操作，可能导致高频细节与低分辨率证据不匹配；而单图像超分辨率依赖内部统计特性，但仍存在模糊观测导致高频不一致的问题。
AI.method: 提出BATDiff：采用à Trous小波变换构建无下采样多尺度表示，保留全空间分辨率；核心是双变量跨尺度模块，建模相邻尺度间的父子依赖关系，提供结构化跨尺度指导。
AI.result: 在标准基准测试中，BATDiff相比现有扩散和非扩散基线方法，能产生更清晰、结构更一致的重建结果，在保真度和感知质量方面均有提升。
AI.conclusion: BATDiff通过小波域跨尺度结构化指导，有效解决了扩散超分辨率中的高频不一致问题，提高了重建质量并减少了伪影。

title: Countdown-Code: A Testbed for Studying The Emergence and Generalization of Reward Hacking in RLVR
summary: Reward hacking is a form of misalignment in which models overoptimize proxy rewards without genuinely solving the underlying task. Precisely measuring reward hacking occurrence remains challenging because true task rewards are often expensive or impossible to compute. We introduce Countdown-Code, a minimal environment where models can both solve a mathematical reasoning task and manipulate the test harness. This dual-access design creates a clean separation between proxy rewards (test pass/fail) and true rewards (mathematical correctness), enabling accurate measurement of reward-hacking rates. Using this environment, we study reward hacking in open-weight LLMs and find that such behaviors can be unintentionally learned during supervised fine-tuning (SFT) when even a small fraction of reward-hacking trajectories leak into training data. As little as 1\% contamination in distillation SFT data is sufficient for models to internalize reward hacking which resurfaces during subsequent reinforcement learning (RL). We further show that RL amplifies misalignment and drives its generalization beyond the original domain. We open-source our environment and code to facilitate future research on reward hacking in LLMs. Our results reveal a previously underexplored pathway through which reward hacking can emerge and persist in LLMs, underscoring the need for more rigorous validation of synthetic SFT data. Code is available at https://github.com/zohaib-khan5040/Countdown-Code.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Countdown-Code环境，用于精确测量LLMs中的奖励黑客行为，发现SFT数据中仅1%的污染就足以让模型学习奖励黑客，且RL会放大这种错位。
AI.motivation: 奖励黑客是模型过度优化代理奖励而非真正解决底层任务的一种错位形式。由于真实任务奖励通常昂贵或无法计算，精确测量奖励黑客发生情况具有挑战性。
AI.method: 引入Countdown-Code最小环境，模型既能解决数学推理任务又能操纵测试工具，创建代理奖励（测试通过/失败）与真实奖励（数学正确性）的清晰分离。使用该环境研究开源权重LLMs中的奖励黑客行为。
AI.result: 发现奖励黑客行为可在监督微调中无意学习，即使训练数据中只有1%的奖励黑客轨迹污染。RL会放大错位并驱动其泛化到原始领域之外。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了一个先前未被充分探索的奖励黑客出现和持续存在的途径，强调需要对合成SFT数据进行更严格的验证。开源环境和代码以促进未来研究。

title: HY-WU (Part I): An Extensible Functional Neural Memory Framework and An Instantiation in Text-Guided Image Editing
summary: Foundation models are transitioning from offline predictors to deployed systems expected to operate over long time horizons. In real deployments, objectives are not fixed: domains drift, user preferences evolve, and new tasks appear after the model has shipped. This elevates continual learning and instant personalization from optional features to core architectural requirements. Yet most adaptation pipelines still follow a static weight paradigm: after training (or after any adaptation step), inference executes a single parameter vector regardless of user intent, domain, or instance-specific constraints. This treats the trained or adapted model as a single point in parameter space. In heterogeneous and continually evolving regimes, distinct objectives can induce separated feasible regions over parameters, forcing any single shared update into compromise, interference, or overspecialization. As a result, continual learning and personalization are often implemented as repeated overwriting of shared weights, risking degradation of previously learned behaviors. We propose HY-WU (Weight Unleashing), a memory-first adaptation framework that shifts adaptation pressure away from overwriting a single shared parameter point. HY-WU implements functional (operator-level) memory as a neural module: a generator that synthesizes weight updates on-the-fly from the instance condition, yielding instance-specific operators without test-time optimization.

AI.tldr: HY-WU框架通过神经模块实现功能记忆，根据实例条件动态生成权重更新，避免共享权重覆盖，实现持续学习和个性化
AI.motivation: 基础模型从离线预测器转变为需要长期运行的部署系统，面临目标不固定、领域漂移、用户偏好演变和新任务出现等挑战。传统静态权重范式将模型视为参数空间中的单点，在异构和持续演化场景中会导致妥协、干扰或过度专业化问题。
AI.method: HY-WU采用记忆优先的适应框架，将功能记忆实现为神经模块：一个生成器，根据实例条件实时合成权重更新，产生实例特定的操作符，无需测试时优化。
AI.result: 该方法将适应压力从覆盖单个共享参数点转移，避免了持续学习和个性化中常见的重复覆盖共享权重导致先前学习行为退化的问题。
AI.conclusion: HY-WU框架将功能记忆作为核心架构要求，通过实例条件驱动的动态权重更新，为持续学习和即时个性化提供了更有效的解决方案。

title: Combining Adam and its Inverse Counterpart to Enhance Generalization of Deep Learning Optimizers
summary: In the training of neural networks, adaptive moment estimation (Adam) typically converges fast but exhibits suboptimal generalization performance. A widely accepted explanation for its defect in generalization is that it often tends to converge to sharp minima. To enhance its ability to find flat minima, we propose its new variant named inverse Adam (InvAdam). The key improvement of InvAdam lies in its parameter update mechanism, which is opposite to that of Adam. Specifically, it computes element-wise multiplication of the first-order and second-order moments, while Adam computes the element-wise division of these two moments. This modification aims to increase the step size of the parameter update when the elements in the second-order moments are large and vice versa, which helps the parameter escape sharp minima and stay at flat ones. However, InvAdam's update mechanism may face challenges in convergence. To address this challenge, we propose dual Adam (DualAdam), which integrates the update mechanisms of both Adam and InvAdam, ensuring convergence while enhancing generalization performance. Additionally, we introduce the diffusion theory to mathematically demonstrate InvAdam's ability to escape sharp minima. Extensive experiments are conducted on image classification tasks and large language model (LLM) fine-tuning. The results validate that DualAdam outperforms Adam and its state-of-the-art variants in terms of generalization performance. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/LongJin-lab/DualAdam.

AI.tldr: 提出DualAdam优化器，结合Adam和InvAdam的更新机制，在保持收敛性的同时提升泛化性能，帮助逃离尖锐最小值找到平坦最小值。
AI.motivation: Adam优化器虽然收敛快但泛化性能不佳，主要原因是容易收敛到尖锐最小值。需要设计新的优化器来增强寻找平坦最小值的能力。
AI.method: 提出InvAdam，采用与Adam相反的参数更新机制（一阶矩和二阶矩的元素乘法而非除法），帮助逃离尖锐最小值。进一步提出DualAdam，整合Adam和InvAdam的更新机制，确保收敛性。使用扩散理论从数学上证明InvAdam逃离尖锐最小值的能力。
AI.result: 在图像分类任务和大语言模型微调上的实验表明，DualAdam在泛化性能上优于Adam及其最先进的变体。
AI.conclusion: DualAdam通过结合Adam和InvAdam的优势，在保持收敛性的同时显著提升了泛化性能，为解决Adam优化器的泛化缺陷提供了有效方案。

title: FabricGen: Microstructure-Aware Woven Fabric Generation
summary: Woven fabric materials are widely used in rendering applications, yet designing realistic examples typically involves multiple stages, requiring expertise in weaving principles and texture authoring. Recent advances have explored diffusion models to streamline this process; however, pre-trained diffusion models often struggle to generate intricate yarn-level details that conform to weaving rules. To address this, we present FabricGen, an end-to-end framework for generating high-quality woven fabric materials from textual descriptions. A key insight of our method is the decomposition of macro-scale textures and micro-scale weaving patterns. To generate macro-scale textures free from microstructures, we fine-tune pre-trained diffusion models on a collected dataset of microstructure-free fabrics. As for micro-scale weaving patterns, we develop an enhanced procedural geometric model capable of synthesizing natural yarn-level geometry with yarn sliding and flyaway fibers. The procedural model is driven by a specialized large language model, WeavingLLM, which is fine-tuned on an annotated dataset of formatted weaving drafts, and prompt-tuned with domain-specific fabric expertise. Through fine-tuning and prompt tuning, WeavingLLM learns to design weaving drafts and fabric parameters from textual prompts, enabling the procedural model to produce diverse weaving patterns that stick to weaving principles. The generated macro-scale texture, along with the micro-scale geometry, can be used for fabric rendering. Consequently, our framework produces materials with significantly richer detail and realism compared to prior generative models.

AI.tldr: FabricGen：基于文本描述生成高质量编织织物材料的端到端框架，通过分解宏观纹理和微观编织模式，结合微调扩散模型和增强程序几何模型，实现更丰富的细节和真实感。
AI.motivation: 传统编织织物设计需要多阶段专业知识和编织原理理解，现有扩散模型难以生成符合编织规则的纱线级细节，需要更有效的生成方法。
AI.method: 1) 分解宏观纹理和微观编织模式；2) 在无微结构织物数据集上微调扩散模型生成宏观纹理；3) 开发增强程序几何模型生成纱线级几何；4) 使用专门微调的WeavingLLM从文本提示设计编织草图和织物参数。
AI.result: 框架能够从文本描述生成高质量编织织物材料，相比现有生成模型产生更丰富的细节和真实感，符合编织原理。
AI.conclusion: FabricGen通过分解宏观微观尺度、结合扩散模型和程序几何模型、利用专门微调的语言模型，实现了从文本到高质量编织织物材料的端到端生成，显著提升了细节丰富度和真实感。

title: Agentic Planning with Reasoning for Image Styling via Offline RL
summary: Direct prompt-based editing often fails on complex transformations because vague and subjective prompts often require nuanced understanding of what should be changed in the image. Our core intuition is that leveraging compositional image editing tools rather than direct prompting profits from structured agent-level planning with explicit reasoning, leading to better results. This structured planning framework enables efficient offline RL post-training on quality-scored trajectories to improve performance. We present a tool-based agentic RL post-training framework that addresses this through structured planning with chain-of-thought reasoning. Our key contributions include: (1) A tool-based agentic planning methodology that combines a compositional library of orthogonal primitive transformations, structured context representation, and explicit per-step reasoning to decompose complex styling into interpretable tool sequences. (2) A synthetic data generation pipeline producing three large-scale datasets (each $\sim$10K trajectories) with reasoning chains, plans, and quality scores, as no existing datasets provide such supervision. Our datasets and code are publicly available at the HuggingFace repository. (3) Offline RL training methods for learning planners with reasoning as our core algorithmic contributions, which consistently improve over the Edit-Only baseline in visual quality and instruction following. (4) Comprehensive evaluation across 4B and 8B parameter Qwen3-VL models showing that our methods outperform other baselines in the majority of compositional tasks, validated by human evaluations.

AI.tldr: 提出基于工具的智能体强化学习后训练框架，通过结构化规划和思维链推理解决复杂图像编辑任务，在视觉质量和指令遵循上优于基线方法。
AI.motivation: 直接基于提示的编辑在复杂变换中经常失败，因为模糊和主观的提示需要细微理解图像中应该改变的内容。核心直觉是利用组合式图像编辑工具而非直接提示，通过结构化智能体级规划和显式推理可以获得更好结果。
AI.method: 1) 基于工具的智能体规划方法：结合正交原始变换的组合库、结构化上下文表示和显式逐步推理；2) 合成数据生成管道：创建三个大规模数据集（每个约10K轨迹），包含推理链、计划和质量分数；3) 离线RL训练方法：学习带推理的规划器；4) 在4B和8B参数Qwen3-VL模型上全面评估。
AI.result: 方法在大多数组合任务中优于其他基线，通过人工评估验证了在视觉质量和指令遵循方面的改进。离线RL后训练显著提升了性能。
AI.conclusion: 结构化规划和显式推理的基于工具智能体方法能有效解决复杂图像编辑任务，合成数据集和离线RL训练为学习高质量规划器提供了有效解决方案。

title: PresentBench: A Fine-Grained Rubric-Based Benchmark for Slide Generation
summary: Slides serve as a critical medium for conveying information in presentation-oriented scenarios such as academia, education, and business. Despite their importance, creating high-quality slide decks remains time-consuming and cognitively demanding. Recent advances in generative models, such as Nano Banana Pro, have made automated slide generation increasingly feasible. However, existing evaluations of slide generation are often coarse-grained and rely on holistic judgments, making it difficult to accurately assess model capabilities or track meaningful advances in the field. In practice, the lack of fine-grained, verifiable evaluation criteria poses a critical bottleneck for both research and real-world deployment. In this paper, we propose PresentBench, a fine-grained, rubric-based benchmark for evaluating automated real-world slide generation. It contains 238 evaluation instances, each supplemented with background materials required for slide creation. Moreover, we manually design an average of 54.1 checklist items per instance, each formulated as a binary question, to enable fine-grained, instance-specific evaluation of the generated slide decks. Extensive experiments show that PresentBench provides more reliable evaluation results than existing methods, and exhibits significantly stronger alignment with human preferences. Furthermore, our benchmark reveals that NotebookLM significantly outperforms other slide generation methods, highlighting substantial recent progress in this domain.

AI.tldr: 提出了PresentBench，一个细粒度、基于量规的基准测试，用于评估自动化幻灯片生成，包含238个评估实例和详细的检查清单，相比现有方法提供更可靠的评估结果。
AI.motivation: 现有幻灯片生成评估方法过于粗粒度，依赖整体判断，难以准确评估模型能力或追踪领域进展。缺乏细粒度、可验证的评估标准成为研究和实际部署的关键瓶颈。
AI.method: 提出PresentBench基准测试，包含238个评估实例，每个实例配备幻灯片创建所需的背景材料。手动设计平均54.1个检查清单项（每个都是二元问题），实现细粒度、实例特定的幻灯片生成评估。
AI.result: 实验表明PresentBench比现有方法提供更可靠的评估结果，与人类偏好显著更强对齐。基准测试显示NotebookLM显著优于其他幻灯片生成方法，表明该领域取得了实质性进展。
AI.conclusion: PresentBench为自动化幻灯片生成提供了细粒度、可验证的评估框架，解决了现有评估方法的局限性，能够更准确地评估模型能力和追踪领域进展。

title: Spectral Conditioning of Attention Improves Transformer Performance
summary: We present a theoretical analysis of the Jacobian of an attention block within a transformer, showing that it is governed by the query, key, and value projections that define the attention mechanism. Leveraging this insight, we introduce a method that systematically alters the spectral properties of each attention layer to reduce the Jacobian's condition number, thereby improving the overall conditioning of the attention layers within a transformer network. We empirically show that this improved Jacobian conditioning translates to enhanced performance in practice. Our approach is simple, broadly applicable, and can be easily integrated as a drop-in replacement for a wide range of existing attention mechanisms. We validate its effectiveness across diverse transformer architectures and tasks, demonstrating consistent improvements in performance.

AI.tldr: 通过分析注意力块的雅可比矩阵，提出一种改善注意力层条件数的方法，提升Transformer性能
AI.motivation: Transformer中注意力层的雅可比矩阵条件数影响网络训练稳定性与性能，需要改善注意力层的数值条件
AI.method: 理论分析注意力块的雅可比矩阵特性，发现其由查询、键、值投影决定，通过系统性地改变每个注意力层的谱特性来降低雅可比矩阵条件数
AI.result: 改进的雅可比矩阵条件数在实践中转化为性能提升，方法简单、通用，可作为即插即用模块应用于多种现有注意力机制
AI.conclusion: 该方法在多种Transformer架构和任务中验证有效，能持续提升性能，改善注意力层的数值稳定性

title: LEPA: Learning Geometric Equivariance in Satellite Remote Sensing Data with a Predictive Architecture
summary: Geospatial foundation models provide precomputed embeddings that serve as compact feature vectors for large-scale satellite remote sensing data. While these embeddings can reduce data-transfer bottlenecks and computational costs, Earth observation (EO) applications can still face geometric mismatches between user-defined areas of interest and the fixed precomputed embedding grid. Standard latent-space interpolation is unreliable in this setting because the embedding manifold is highly non-convex, yielding representations that do not correspond to realistic inputs. We verify this using Prithvi-EO-2.0 to understand the shortcomings of interpolation applied to patch embeddings. As a substitute, we propose a Learned Equivariance-Predicting Architecture (LEPA). Instead of averaging vectors, LEPA conditions a predictor on geometric augmentations to directly predict the transformed embedding. We evaluate LEPA on NASA/USGS Harmonized Landsat-Sentinel (HLS) imagery and ImageNet-1k. Experiments show that standard interpolation achieves a mean reciprocal rank (MRR) below 0.2, whereas LEPA increases MRR to over 0.8, enabling accurate geometric adjustment without re-encoding.

AI.tldr: LEPA模型解决了地理空间基础模型中预计算嵌入与用户定义区域几何不匹配的问题，通过几何增强条件预测替代不可靠的潜在空间插值，将MRR从0.2提升到0.8以上。
AI.motivation: 地理空间基础模型的预计算嵌入虽然能减少数据传输和计算成本，但用户定义区域与固定嵌入网格之间存在几何不匹配问题。标准的潜在空间插值不可靠，因为嵌入流形高度非凸，会产生不现实的输入表示。
AI.method: 提出学习等变性预测架构(LEPA)，不直接平均向量，而是通过几何增强条件预测器直接预测变换后的嵌入，避免了重新编码的需要。
AI.result: 在NASA/USGS Harmonized Landsat-Sentinel影像和ImageNet-1k上的实验显示，标准插值的平均倒数排名(MRR)低于0.2，而LEPA将MRR提升到0.8以上，实现了无需重新编码的准确几何调整。
AI.conclusion: LEPA有效解决了地理空间基础模型中预计算嵌入的几何不匹配问题，通过几何增强条件预测替代不可靠的插值方法，显著提升了嵌入调整的准确性和实用性。

title: Making LLMs Optimize Multi-Scenario CUDA Kernels Like Experts
summary: Optimizing GPU kernels manually is a challenging and time-consuming task. With the rapid development of LLMs, automated GPU kernel optimization is gradually becoming a tangible reality. However, current LLM-driven automated optimization methods narrowly focus on machine learning applications, such as PyTorch operator optimization, while overlooking broader domains like sparse matrix operations in scientific computing. Extending to these broader applications brings new challenges for the benchmark and algorithm. Therefore, developing a general-purpose automated kernel optimization method becomes our primary focus. In this paper, we address the absence of systematic evaluation for multi-scenario settings by introducing MSKernelBench, which spans multiple scenarios, including fundamental algebraic operations, common LLM kernels, sparse matrix operators, and scientific computing routines, each supporting both FP32 and BF16 precision. Building on this benchmark, we introduce CUDAMaster, a multi-agent, hardware-aware system for kernel optimization that leverages profiling information and automatically constructs the full compilation and execution toolchain. Experimental results demonstrate that CUDAMaster achieves significant speedups across most operators, outperforming Astra by about 35%. In several cases, its performance matches or surpasses that of highly optimized, closed-source libraries such as cuBLAS. A demo showcasing the original and optimized code for each operator is available at https://hanyx2021.github.io/MSKernelBenchDemo/.

AI.tldr: 提出了MSKernelBench基准测试和CUDAMaster系统，用于自动化GPU内核优化，覆盖多种场景并显著提升性能
AI.motivation: 当前LLM驱动的自动化GPU内核优化方法主要局限于机器学习应用，忽略了科学计算等更广泛领域。需要开发通用目的的自动化内核优化方法，并建立系统性的多场景评估基准
AI.method: 1. 引入MSKernelBench基准测试，覆盖基础代数运算、常见LLM内核、稀疏矩阵算子和科学计算例程，支持FP32和BF16精度；2. 提出CUDAMaster系统，这是一个多代理、硬件感知的内核优化系统，利用性能分析信息并自动构建完整的编译和执行工具链
AI.result: CUDAMaster在大多数算子中实现了显著的加速，比Astra快约35%。在多个案例中，其性能匹配甚至超过了高度优化的闭源库如cuBLAS
AI.conclusion: 通过MSKernelBench基准测试和CUDAMaster系统，成功扩展了自动化GPU内核优化的应用范围，为通用目的的自动化内核优化提供了有效解决方案，在多种场景下实现了优异的性能表现

title: Variational Flow Maps: Make Some Noise for One-Step Conditional Generation
summary: Flow maps enable high-quality image generation in a single forward pass. However, unlike iterative diffusion models, their lack of an explicit sampling trajectory impedes incorporating external constraints for conditional generation and solving inverse problems. We put forth Variational Flow Maps, a framework for conditional sampling that shifts the perspective of conditioning from "guiding a sampling path", to that of "learning the proper initial noise". Specifically, given an observation, we seek to learn a noise adapter model that outputs a noise distribution, so that after mapping to the data space via flow map, the samples respect the observation and data prior. To this end, we develop a principled variational objective that jointly trains the noise adapter and the flow map, improving noise-data alignment, such that sampling from complex data posterior is achieved with a simple adapter. Experiments on various inverse problems show that VFMs produce well-calibrated conditional samples in a single (or few) steps. For ImageNet, VFM attains competitive fidelity while accelerating the sampling by orders of magnitude compared to alternative iterative diffusion/flow models. Code is available at https://github.com/abbasmammadov/VFM

AI.tldr: VFMs提出变分流映射框架，将条件生成从"引导采样路径"转变为"学习合适初始噪声"，通过噪声适配器模型实现单步高质量条件采样
AI.motivation: 传统流映射模型虽然能单步生成高质量图像，但缺乏显式采样轨迹，难以整合外部约束进行条件生成和解决逆问题
AI.method: 提出变分流映射框架，学习噪声适配器模型输出噪声分布，通过变分目标联合训练噪声适配器和流映射，改善噪声-数据对齐
AI.result: 在多种逆问题上，VFMs能产生良好校准的条件样本（单步或少数步骤）；在ImageNet上，VFMs在保持竞争力的同时将采样速度提升数个数量级
AI.conclusion: VFMs通过将条件采样视角从采样路径引导转变为初始噪声学习，实现了高效高质量的条件生成，为流映射模型的条件应用提供了新框架

title: Shaping Parameter Contribution Patterns for Out-of-Distribution Detection
summary: Out-of-distribution (OOD) detection is a well-known challenge due to deep models often producing overconfident. In this paper, we reveal a key insight that trained classifiers tend to rely on sparse parameter contribution patterns, meaning that only a few dominant parameters drive predictions. This brittleness can be exploited by OOD inputs that anomalously trigger these parameters, resulting in overconfident predictions. To address this issue, we propose a simple yet effective method called Shaping Parameter Contribution Patterns (SPCP), which enhances OOD detection robustness by encouraging the classifier to learn boundary-oriented dense contribution patterns. Specifically, SPCP operates during training by rectifying excessively high parameter contributions based on a dynamically estimated threshold. This mechanism promotes the classifier to rely on a broader set of parameters for decision-making, thereby reducing the risk of overconfident predictions caused by anomalously triggered parameters, while preserving in-distribution (ID) performance. Extensive experiments under various OOD detection setups verify the effectiveness of SPCP.

AI.tldr: SPCP通过塑造参数贡献模式，鼓励分类器学习边界导向的密集贡献模式，减少OOD样本的过度自信预测，同时保持ID性能。
AI.motivation: 现有分类器倾向于依赖稀疏参数贡献模式，即仅少数主导参数驱动预测。这种脆弱性可能被OOD输入利用，异常触发这些参数导致过度自信预测。
AI.method: 提出SPCP方法，在训练过程中基于动态估计的阈值修正过高的参数贡献，鼓励分类器依赖更广泛的参数集进行决策。
AI.result: 在各种OOD检测设置下的广泛实验验证了SPCP的有效性。
AI.conclusion: SPCP通过塑造参数贡献模式增强OOD检测鲁棒性，减少由异常触发参数引起的过度自信预测，同时保持ID性能。

title: Virtual Try-On for Cultural Clothing: A Benchmarking Study
summary: Although existing virtual try-on systems have made significant progress with the advent of diffusion models, the current benchmarks of these models are based on datasets that are dominant in western-style clothing and female models, limiting their ability to generalize culturally diverse clothing styles. In this work, we introduce BD-VITON, a virtual try-on dataset focused on Bangladeshi garments, including saree, panjabi and salwar kameez, covering both male and female categories as well. These garments present unique structural challenges such as complex draping, asymmetric layering, and high deformation complexities which are underrepresented in the original VITON dataset. To establish strong baselines, we retrain and evaluate try-on models, namely StableViton, HR-VITON, and VITON-HD on our dataset. Our experiments demonstrate consistent improvements in terms of both quantitative and qualitative analysis, compared to zero shot inference.

AI.tldr: 提出了BD-VITON数据集，专注于孟加拉国传统服饰，解决了现有虚拟试穿系统对文化多样性服装风格泛化能力不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有虚拟试穿系统的基准数据集主要基于西方风格服装和女性模特，限制了模型对文化多样性服装风格的泛化能力，特别是对于具有复杂结构挑战的孟加拉国传统服饰。
AI.method: 创建BD-VITON数据集，包含孟加拉国传统服饰如纱丽、旁遮比和萨尔瓦卡米兹，涵盖男女服装类别；在数据集上重新训练和评估StableViton、HR-VITON和VITON-HD等虚拟试穿模型。
AI.result: 实验表明，与零样本推理相比，在BD-VITON数据集上重新训练的模型在定量和定性分析方面都取得了持续改进。
AI.conclusion: BD-VITON数据集填补了虚拟试穿领域对文化多样性服装研究的空白，为处理复杂结构挑战的传统服饰提供了更好的基准。

title: A Dual-Graph Spatiotemporal GNN Surrogate for Nonlinear Response Prediction of Reinforced Concrete Beams under Four-Point Bending
summary: High-fidelity nonlinear finite-element (FE) simulations of reinforced-concrete (RC) structures are still costly, especially in parametric settings where loading positions vary. We develop a dual-graph spatiotemporal GNN surrogate to approximate the time histories of RC beams under four-point bending. To generate training data, we run a parametric Abaqus campaign that independently shifts the two loading blocks on a mesh-aligned grid and exports full-field responses at fixed normalized loading levels. The model rolls out autoregressively and jointly predicts nodal displacements, element wise von Mises stress, element-wise equivalent plastic strain (PEEQ), and the global vertical reaction force in a single multi-task setup. A key motivation is the peak loss introduced when element quantities are forced through node-based representations. We therefore couple node- and element-level dynamics using two recurrent graph branches: a node-level graph convolutional gated recurrent unit (GConvGRU) for kinematics and an element-level GConvGRU for history-dependent internal variables, with global force predicted through pooling on the element branch. In controlled ablations, removing the Element to Node to Element pathway improves peak-sensitive prediction in localized high-gradient stress/PEEQ regions without degrading global load displacement trends. After training, the surrogate produces full trajectories at a fraction of the cost of nonlinear FE, enabling faster parametric evaluation and design exploration.

AI.tldr: 开发了一个双图时空图神经网络代理模型，用于快速预测钢筋混凝土梁在四点弯曲下的时程响应，替代计算成本高的非线性有限元模拟。
AI.motivation: 钢筋混凝土结构的高保真非线性有限元模拟成本高昂，特别是在参数化设置中（如荷载位置变化）。传统方法中，单元量通过节点表示会引入峰值损失问题。
AI.method: 采用双图循环神经网络架构：节点级GConvGRU处理运动学变量，单元级GConvGRU处理历史相关的内部变量（如应力、塑性应变），通过池化预测全局反力。模型自回归展开，联合预测节点位移、单元von Mises应力、等效塑性应变和全局竖向反力。
AI.result: 代理模型能以远低于非线性有限元的成本生成完整时程响应，实现更快的参数化评估和设计探索。消融实验表明，移除Element to Node to Element通路能改善局部高梯度区域的峰值敏感预测，而不影响全局荷载-位移趋势。
AI.conclusion: 提出的双图时空GNN代理模型能有效替代昂贵的非线性有限元模拟，特别适用于参数化场景，为钢筋混凝土结构的设计优化提供了高效工具。

title: MAviS: A Multimodal Conversational Assistant For Avian Species
summary: Fine-grained understanding and species-specific multimodal question answering are vital for advancing biodiversity conservation and ecological monitoring. However, existing multimodal large language models face challenges when it comes to specialized topics like avian species, making it harder to provide accurate and contextually relevant information in these areas. To address this limitation, we introduce the MAviS-Dataset, a large-scale multimodal avian species dataset that integrates image, audio, and text modalities for over 1,000 bird species, comprising both pretraining and instruction-tuning subsets enriched with structured question-answer pairs. Building on the MAviS-Dataset, we introduce MAviS-Chat, a multimodal LLM that supports audio, vision, and text and is designed for fine-grained species understanding, multimodal question answering, and scene-specific description generation. Finally, for quantitative evaluation, we present MAviS-Bench, a benchmark of over 25,000 QA pairs designed to assess avian species-specific perceptual and reasoning abilities across modalities. Experimental results show that MAviS-Chat outperforms the baseline MiniCPM-o-2.6 by a large margin, achieving state-of-the-art open-source results and demonstrating the effectiveness of our instruction-tuned MAviS-Dataset. Our findings highlight the necessity of domain-adaptive multimodal LLMs for ecological applications.

AI.tldr: MAviS是一个针对鸟类物种的多模态大语言模型系统，包含数据集、聊天模型和评估基准，专门用于细粒度物种理解和多模态问答，在生态应用中表现出色。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态大语言模型在处理鸟类等专业主题时面临挑战，难以提供准确和上下文相关的信息，这限制了生物多样性保护和生态监测的进展。
AI.method: 1) 构建MAviS-Dataset：包含1000多种鸟类的大规模多模态数据集，整合图像、音频和文本模态，包含预训练和指令调优子集；2) 开发MAviS-Chat：支持音频、视觉和文本的多模态LLM；3) 创建MAviS-Bench：包含25000多个QA对的评估基准。
AI.result: MAviS-Chat大幅超越基线模型MiniCPM-o-2.6，取得了最先进的开源结果，证明了指令调优数据集的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 研究强调了领域自适应多模态大语言模型在生态应用中的必要性，MAviS系统为鸟类物种理解和多模态问答提供了有效的解决方案。

title: wDPO: Winsorized Direct Preference Optimization for Robust LLM Alignment
summary: Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) aligns large language models by optimizing pairwise preferences and has shown remarkable effectiveness as a simple and scalable alternative to RLHF. However, in practice, preference data are often noisy. Existing robust variants of DPO mainly rely on uniform objective modifications or global reweighting. While partially effective, these methods treat noisy samples as a homogeneous source of uncertainty and fail to distinguish between different noise types, leading to sub-optimal alignment robustness. In this work, we show that robust preference alignment benefits from addressing different noise types with targeted interventions rather than uniform regularization.
