We propose winsorized Direct Preference Optimization~(wDPO), a robust LLM alignment approach with hierarchical winsorization. Specifically, wDPO adopts a reward-free hierarchical intervention strategy that leverages only signals already available during DPO training. It first uses the implicit margin from DPO log-ratio to identify heterogeneous noise patterns without relying on external reward models. For hard noise, wDPO performs a data-level intervention by sparsely correcting strongly inconsistent preference pairs. For ambiguous comparisons, it applies a gradient-level intervention through soft winsorization, capping extreme losses in the high-loss tail to prevent weakly informative samples from dominating gradient updates. Extensive experiments on PKU-SafeRLHF and multiple external safety benchmarks demonstrate that wDPO consistently improves preference alignment quality and robustness over vanilla DPO and strong DPO-family baselines, with particularly pronounced gains under controlled label-flip noise.

AI.tldr: wDPO提出分层缩尾方法增强DPO的鲁棒性，通过数据级和梯度级干预分别处理硬噪声和模糊比较，无需外部奖励模型
AI.motivation: 现有DPO的鲁棒变体主要依赖统一的客观修改或全局重加权，将噪声样本视为同质不确定性源，无法区分不同噪声类型，导致对齐鲁棒性次优
AI.method: wDPO采用无奖励分层干预策略：1) 利用DPO对数比隐含边界识别异质噪声模式；2) 对硬噪声进行数据级干预，稀疏修正强不一致偏好对；3) 对模糊比较进行梯度级干预，通过软缩尾限制高损失尾部的极端损失
AI.result: 在PKU-SafeRLHF和多个外部安全基准测试中，wDPO相比原始DPO和强DPO基线一致提升偏好对齐质量和鲁棒性，在受控标签翻转噪声下增益尤其显著
AI.conclusion: 鲁棒偏好对齐需要针对不同噪声类型进行针对性干预而非统一正则化，wDPO通过分层缩尾策略有效区分和处理异质噪声模式，提升大语言模型对齐的鲁棒性

title: Training for Trustworthy Saliency Maps: Adversarial Training Meets Feature-Map Smoothing
summary: Gradient-based saliency methods such as Vanilla Gradient (VG) and Integrated Gradients (IG) are widely used to explain image classifiers, yet the resulting maps are often noisy and unstable, limiting their usefulness in high-stakes settings. Most prior work improves explanations by modifying the attribution algorithm, leaving open how the training procedure shapes explanation quality. We take a training-centered view and first provide a curvature-based analysis linking attribution stability to how smoothly the input-gradient field varies locally. Guided by this connection, we study adversarial training and identify a consistent trade-off: it yields sparser and more input-stable saliency maps, but can degrade output-side stability, causing explanations to change even when predictions remain unchanged and logits vary only slightly. To mitigate this, we propose augmenting adversarial training with a lightweight feature-map smoothing block that applies a differentiable Gaussian filter in an intermediate layer. Across FMNIST, CIFAR-10, and ImageNette, our method preserves the sparsity benefits of adversarial training while improving both input-side stability and output-side stability. A human study with 65 participants further shows that smoothed adversarial saliency maps are perceived as more sufficient and trustworthy. Overall, our results demonstrate that explanation quality is critically shaped by training, and that simple smoothing with robust training provides a practical path toward saliency maps that are both sparse and stable.

AI.tldr: 论文提出通过对抗训练结合特征图平滑来改善梯度显著性图的稀疏性和稳定性，提升解释质量。
AI.motivation: 现有梯度显著性方法（如VG和IG）生成的解释图存在噪声和不稳定问题，限制了在高风险场景中的应用。大多数先前工作通过修改归因算法来改进解释，但忽略了训练过程对解释质量的影响。
AI.method: 1. 基于曲率分析连接归因稳定性与输入梯度场的局部平滑性；2. 研究对抗训练对解释质量的影响；3. 提出在对抗训练基础上增加轻量级特征图平滑模块，在中间层应用可微分高斯滤波。
AI.result: 在FMNIST、CIFAR-10和ImageNette数据集上，该方法在保持对抗训练稀疏性优势的同时，改善了输入侧和输出侧的稳定性。65名参与者的人类研究显示，平滑的对抗显著性图被认为更充分和可信。
AI.conclusion: 解释质量关键受训练过程影响，简单的平滑结合鲁棒训练为实现稀疏且稳定的显著性图提供了实用路径。

title: Margin in Abstract Spaces
summary:
Margin-based learning, exemplified by linear and kernel methods, is one of the few classical settings where generalization guarantees are independent of the number of parameters. This makes it a central case study in modern highly over-parameterized learning. We ask what minimal mathematical structure underlies this phenomenon.
  We begin with a simple margin-based problem in arbitrary metric spaces: concepts are defined by a center point and classify points according to whether their distance lies below $r$ or above $R$. We show that whenever $R>3r$, this class is learnable in \emph{any} metric space. Thus, sufficiently large margins make learnability depend only on the triangle inequality, without any linear or analytic structure. Our first main result extends this phenomenon to concepts defined by bounded linear combinations of distance functions, and reveals a sharp threshold: there exists a universal constant $γ>0$ such that above this margin the class is learnable in every metric space, while below it there exist metric spaces where it is not learnable at all.
  We then ask whether margin-based learnability can always be explained via an embedding into a linear space -- that is, reduced to linear classification in some Banach space through a kernel-type construction. We answer this negatively by developing a structural taxonomy of Banach spaces: if a Banach space is learnable for some margin parameter $γ\geq 0$, then it is learnable for all such $γ$, and in infinite-dimensional spaces the sample complexity must scale polynomially in $1/γ$. Specifically, it must grow as $(1/γ)^p$ for some $p\ge 2$, and every such rate is attainable.

AI.tldr: 论文研究了基于间隔的学习在任意度量空间中的可学习性，揭示了间隔阈值现象，并证明了并非所有基于间隔的可学习性都能通过嵌入线性空间来解释。
AI.motivation: 基于间隔的学习（如线性方法和核方法）是少数几个泛化保证与参数数量无关的经典设置之一，这使其成为现代高度过参数化学习的重要案例。作者旨在探究支撑这一现象的最小数学结构。
AI.method: 首先研究任意度量空间中基于间隔的简单问题：概念由中心点定义，根据距离是否在r以下或R以上进行分类。然后扩展到由距离函数的有界线性组合定义的概念。最后通过发展Banach空间的结构分类来研究基于间隔的可学习性能否通过嵌入线性空间来解释。
AI.result: 1) 当R>3r时，该类别在任何度量空间中都是可学习的；2) 存在一个通用常数γ>0，当间隔大于该阈值时，类别在每个度量空间中都是可学习的，而低于该阈值时存在不可学习的度量空间；3) 并非所有基于间隔的可学习性都能通过嵌入线性空间来解释，Banach空间的可学习性具有结构性特征。
AI.conclusion: 足够大的间隔使可学习性仅依赖于三角不等式，而不需要任何线性或解析结构。基于间隔的可学习性不能总是通过核类型构造简化为线性分类，这揭示了度量空间学习理论中的基本结构限制。

title: StructSAM: Structure- and Spectrum-Preserving Token Merging for Segment Anything Models
summary: Recent token merging techniques for Vision Transformers (ViTs) provide substantial speedups by reducing the number of tokens processed by self-attention, often without retraining. However, their direct application to the Segment Anything Model (SAM) family is nontrivial: SAM's image encoder mixes windowed and global attention, and its mask decoder relies on dense, prompt-conditioned features for precise boundary prediction. We systematically evaluate representative token-merging methods on SAM and Medical SAM in a strict off-the-shelf setting, and find that existing destination-selection heuristics can erode boundaries and leak prompt information as merge rates increase. We propose \textbf{StructSAM}, a resolution-preserving merge-unmerge framework tailored to SAM. StructSAM computes a lightweight token-energy score from first-order feature gradients, uses grid-based flatness screening to protect boundary and prompt regions, and merges tokens within flat areas toward low-energy destinations with explicit token recovery. We further provide a spectral graph coarsening view showing that score-guided merging yields bounded Laplacian spectral distortion compared to random or window-restricted baselines. Across eight natural and medical benchmarks, StructSAM reduces encoder FLOPs by 25-30\% (up to 40\%+ with prompt-aware merging) with minor drops in mIoU/Dice, consistently outperforming ToMe, PiToMe, ToMeSD, VidToMe, and ALGM at the same compute.

AI.tldr: StructSAM：针对SAM模型的专用token合并框架，通过能量评分、网格筛选和显式恢复机制，在保持分辨率的同时显著减少计算量，在自然和医学图像分割任务中优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有token合并技术直接应用于SAM模型存在挑战：SAM的图像编码器混合了窗口和全局注意力，其掩码解码器依赖密集的提示条件特征进行精确边界预测。现有方法在高合并率下会侵蚀边界并泄露提示信息。
AI.method: 提出StructSAM框架：1）使用一阶特征梯度计算轻量级token能量评分；2）基于网格的平坦度筛选保护边界和提示区域；3）在平坦区域内将token合并到低能量目标；4）提供显式的token恢复机制。从谱图粗化角度证明评分引导的合并相比随机或窗口限制基线具有有界的拉普拉斯谱失真。
AI.result: 在8个自然和医学基准测试中，StructSAM减少编码器FLOPs 25-30%（在提示感知合并下可达40%以上），仅带来微小的mIoU/Dice下降，在相同计算量下一致优于ToMe、PiToMe、ToMeSD、VidToMe和ALGM等方法。
AI.conclusion: StructSAM是针对SAM模型的专用token合并解决方案，通过结构感知的合并策略在显著减少计算成本的同时保持分割质量，为高效SAM部署提供了有效途径。

title: Unlocking Data Value in Finance: A Study on Distillation and Difficulty-Aware Training
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated strong general capabilities, yet their deployment in finance remains challenging due to dense domain-specific terminology, stringent numerical reasoning requirements, and low tolerance for factual errors. We conduct a controlled empirical study showing that in specialized vertical domains, performance is largely determined by the quality and difficulty/verifiability profile of post-training data. We introduce \textbf{ODA-Fin-SFT-318k}, constructed via multi-stage distillation and verification to produce high-quality Chain-of-Thought supervision, and \textbf{ODA-Fin-RL-12k}, curated for hard-but-verifiable tasks that balance reward precision and task diversity. Using standard SFT and RL pipelines, we show that high-quality CoT distillation establishes a robust foundation during SFT, while difficulty- and verifiability-aware sampling improves RL generalization. Evaluated on nine benchmarks spanning general financial tasks, sentiment analysis, and numerical reasoning, our ODA-Fin-RL-8B consistently surpasses open-source state-of-the-art (SOTA) financial LLMs of comparable size. We release our ODA-Fin-SFT-318k and ODA-Fin-RL-12k datasets, along with trained models to advance data-centric financial AI research.

AI.tldr: 该论文通过构建高质量金融领域数据集ODA-Fin-SFT-318k和ODA-Fin-RL-12k，采用多阶段蒸馏验证方法生成高质量的思维链监督数据，结合标准SFT和RL训练流程，显著提升了金融领域LLM的性能，在多个金融基准测试中超越了同类开源SOTA模型。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在通用领域表现出色，但在金融领域部署面临挑战：专业术语密集、数值推理要求严格、事实错误容忍度低。现有金融LLM在专业垂直领域性能不足，需要高质量领域特定数据来提升性能。
AI.method: 1. 构建ODA-Fin-SFT-318k数据集：通过多阶段蒸馏和验证生成高质量思维链监督数据；2. 构建ODA-Fin-RL-12k数据集：针对困难但可验证任务进行筛选，平衡奖励精度和任务多样性；3. 采用标准SFT和RL训练流程：高质量CoT蒸馏在SFT阶段建立坚实基础，难度和可验证性感知采样提升RL泛化能力。
AI.result: 在9个基准测试（涵盖通用金融任务、情感分析和数值推理）中，ODA-Fin-RL-8B模型在可比规模的开源金融LLM中持续超越SOTA。研究团队发布了数据集和训练模型以推动数据中心的金融AI研究。
AI.conclusion: 在专业垂直领域，LLM性能主要取决于后训练数据的质量和难度/可验证性特征。高质量思维链蒸馏为SFT建立坚实基础，难度和可验证性感知采样提升RL泛化。数据质量对金融领域LLM性能至关重要。

title: Faster-HEAL: An Efficient and Privacy-Preserving Collaborative Perception Framework for Heterogeneous Autonomous Vehicles
comment: Accepted to appear in the 2026 IEEE Intelligent Vehicles Symposium (IV 2026), Detroit, MI, USA, June 22-25, 2026. 6 pages, 1 figure, 4 tables
summary: Collaborative perception (CP) is a promising paradigm for improving situational awareness in autonomous vehicles by overcoming the limitations of single-agent perception. However, most existing approaches assume homogeneous agents, which restricts their applicability in real-world scenarios where vehicles use diverse sensors and perception models. This heterogeneity introduces a feature domain gap that degrades detection performance. Prior works address this issue by retraining entire models/major components, or using feature interpreters for each new agent type, which is computationally expensive, compromises privacy, and may reduce single-agent accuracy. We propose Faster-HEAL, a lightweight and privacy-preserving CP framework that fine-tunes a low-rank visual prompt to align heterogeneous features with a unified feature space while leveraging pyramid fusion for robust feature aggregation. This approach reduces the trainable parameters by 94%, enabling efficient adaptation to new agents without retraining large models. Experiments on the OPV2V-H dataset show that Faster-HEAL improves detection performance by 2% over state-of-the-art methods with significantly lower computational overhead, offering a practical solution for scalable heterogeneous CP.

AI.tldr: Faster-HEAL：轻量级隐私保护异构协同感知框架，通过低秩视觉提示对齐异构特征，减少94%可训练参数，在OPV2V-H数据集上提升检测性能2%
AI.motivation: 现有协同感知方法假设同质智能体，但现实场景中车辆使用多样化传感器和感知模型，这种异构性导致特征域差距，降低检测性能。现有解决方案需要重新训练整个模型或主要组件，计算成本高、隐私风险大，且可能降低单智能体准确性。
AI.method: 提出Faster-HEAL框架：1）微调低秩视觉提示，将异构特征对齐到统一特征空间；2）利用金字塔融合进行鲁棒特征聚合；3）仅需训练少量参数（减少94%），无需重新训练大型模型。
AI.result: 在OPV2V-H数据集上的实验表明：1）检测性能比最先进方法提升2%；2）计算开销显著降低；3）可训练参数减少94%，实现对新智能体的高效适应。
AI.conclusion: Faster-HEAL为可扩展的异构协同感知提供了实用解决方案，具有轻量级、隐私保护、高效适应等优势，克服了现有方法的计算成本高和隐私风险问题。

title: LightMedSeg: Lightweight 3D Medical Image Segmentation with Learned Spatial Anchors
comment: 8 pages, X figures. Submitted to CVPRW ECV 2026
summary: Accurate and efficient 3D medical image segmentation is essential for clinical AI, where models must remain reliable under stringent memory, latency, and data availability constraints. Transformer-based methods achieve strong accuracy but suffer from excessive parameters, high FLOPs, and limited generalization. We propose LightMedSeg, a modular UNet-style segmentation architecture that integrates anatomical priors with adaptive context modeling. Anchor-conditioned FiLM modulation enables anatomy-aware feature calibration, while a local structural prior module and texture-aware routing dynamically allocate representational capacity to boundary-rich regions. Computational redundancy is minimized through ghost and depthwise convolutions, and multi-scale features are adaptively fused via a learned skip router with anchor-relative spatial position bias. Despite requiring only 0.48M parameters and 14.64~GFLOPs, LightMedSeg achieves segmentation accuracy within a few Dice points of heavy transformer baselines. Therefore, LightMedSeg is a deployable and data-efficient solution for 3D medical image segmentation. Code will be released publicly upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: LightMedSeg是一个轻量级3D医学图像分割架构，仅需0.48M参数和14.64GFLOPs，通过整合解剖先验和自适应上下文建模，在保持接近Transformer模型精度的同时大幅降低计算复杂度。
AI.motivation: 临床AI应用需要准确高效的3D医学图像分割模型，但现有Transformer方法参数过多、计算量大、泛化能力有限，难以满足内存、延迟和数据可用性的严格约束。
AI.method: 提出模块化UNet风格架构，整合解剖先验与自适应上下文建模：1）锚点条件FiLM调制实现解剖感知特征校准；2）局部结构先验模块和纹理感知路由动态分配表示能力到边界丰富区域；3）使用幽灵卷积和深度可分离卷积最小化计算冗余；4）通过带锚点相对空间位置偏置的学习跳跃路由器自适应融合多尺度特征。
AI.result: 仅需0.48M参数和14.64GFLOPs，分割精度与重型Transformer基线仅相差几个Dice点，实现了部署友好且数据高效的3D医学图像分割。
AI.conclusion: LightMedSeg是一个可部署且数据高效的3D医学图像分割解决方案，在保持接近Transformer模型精度的同时大幅降低了计算复杂度，适合临床AI应用。

title: A Lightweight Digital-Twin-Based Framework for Edge-Assisted Vehicle Tracking and Collision Prediction
comment: 6 pages, 2 figures, IEEE ICC 2026 Workshops (under submission)
summary: Vehicle tracking, motion estimation, and collision prediction are fundamental components of traffic safety and management in Intelligent Transportation Systems (ITS). Many recent approaches rely on computationally intensive prediction models, which limits their practical deployment on resource-constrained edge devices. This paper presents a lightweight digital-twin-based framework for vehicle tracking and spatiotemporal collision prediction that relies solely on object detection, without requiring complex trajectory prediction networks. The framework is implemented and evaluated in Quanser Interactive Labs (QLabs), a high-fidelity digital twin of an urban traffic environment that enables controlled and repeatable scenario generation. A YOLO-based detector is deployed on simulated edge cameras to localize vehicles and extract frame-level centroid trajectories. Offline path maps are constructed from multiple traversals and indexed using K-D trees to support efficient online association between detected vehicles and road segments. During runtime, consistent vehicle identifiers are maintained, vehicle speed and direction are estimated from the temporal evolution of path indices, and future positions are predicted accordingly. Potential collisions are identified by analyzing both spatial proximity and temporal overlap of predicted future trajectories. Our experimental results across diverse simulated urban scenarios show that the proposed framework predicts approximately 88% of collision events prior to occurrence while maintaining low computational overhead suitable for edge deployment. Rather than introducing a computationally intensive prediction model, this work introduces a lightweight digital-twin-based solution for vehicle tracking and collision prediction, tailored for real-time edge deployment in ITS.

AI.tldr: 提出一个轻量级数字孪生框架，仅使用目标检测实现车辆跟踪和时空碰撞预测，无需复杂轨迹预测网络，适合边缘设备部署。
AI.motivation: 现有车辆跟踪和碰撞预测方法依赖计算密集的预测模型，难以在资源受限的边缘设备上部署。需要开发轻量级解决方案以适应智能交通系统的实时边缘部署需求。
AI.method: 基于YOLO检测器定位车辆并提取质心轨迹；离线构建路径地图并使用K-D树索引；在线关联检测车辆与路段；通过路径索引的时间演化估计速度和方向；分析预测轨迹的空间邻近性和时间重叠性识别潜在碰撞。
AI.result: 在多样化模拟城市场景中，该框架能预测约88%的碰撞事件，同时保持较低计算开销，适合边缘部署。
AI.conclusion: 该工作提出了一种轻量级数字孪生解决方案，无需复杂预测模型即可实现车辆跟踪和碰撞预测，特别适合智能交通系统的实时边缘部署。

title: Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Predicting Cellular Responses to Gene Perturbation
comment: Accepted at ICLR 2026 Workshop: Generative AI in Genomics. 25 pages, 9 figures
summary: Predicting how cells respond to genetic perturbations is fundamental to understanding gene function, disease mechanisms, and therapeutic development. While recent deep learning approaches have shown promise in modeling single-cell perturbation responses, they struggle to generalize across cell types and perturbation contexts due to limited contextual information during generation. We introduce PT-RAG (Perturbation-aware Two-stage Retrieval-Augmented Generation), a novel framework that extends Retrieval-Augmented Generation beyond traditional language-model applications to cellular biology. Unlike standard RAG systems designed for text retrieval with pre-trained LLMs, perturbation retrieval lacks established similarity metrics and requires learning what constitutes relevant context, making differentiable retrieval essential. PT-RAG addresses this through a two-stage pipeline: first, retrieving candidate perturbations $K$ using GenePT embeddings, then adaptively refining the selection through Gumbel-Softmax discrete sampling conditioned on both the cell state and the input perturbation. This cell-type-aware differentiable retrieval enables end-to-end optimization of the retrieval objective jointly with generation. On the Replogle-Nadig single-gene perturbation dataset, we demonstrate that PT-RAG outperforms both STATE and vanilla RAG under identical experimental conditions, with the strongest gains in distributional similarity metrics ($W_1$, $W_2$). Notably, vanilla RAG's dramatic failure is itself a key finding: it demonstrates that differentiable, cell-type-aware retrieval is essential in this domain, and that naive retrieval can actively harm performance. Our results establish retrieval-augmented generation as a promising paradigm for modelling cellular responses to gene perturbation. The code to reproduce our experiments is available at https://github.com/difra100/PT-RAG_ICLR.

AI.tldr: PT-RAG是一个用于预测细胞对基因扰动响应的两阶段检索增强生成框架，通过可微分检索和细胞类型感知机制，显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习模型在预测细胞对基因扰动响应时，由于缺乏上下文信息，难以泛化到不同细胞类型和扰动场景。需要开发能够有效整合相关背景知识的框架。
AI.method: 提出PT-RAG两阶段框架：1) 使用GenePT嵌入检索候选扰动K；2) 通过Gumbel-Softmax离散采样，根据细胞状态和输入扰动自适应精炼选择，实现细胞类型感知的可微分检索，与生成任务端到端联合优化。
AI.result: 在Replogle-Nadig单基因扰动数据集上，PT-RAG在相同实验条件下优于STATE和vanilla RAG，在分布相似性指标(W1, W2)上提升最显著。vanilla RAG的严重失败表明可微分、细胞类型感知检索在该领域至关重要。
AI.conclusion: 检索增强生成是建模细胞对基因扰动响应的有前景范式，PT-RAG通过可微分检索机制解决了传统RAG在扰动检索中的局限性，为生物医学研究提供了新工具。

title: AgrI Challenge: A Data-Centric AI Competition for Cross-Team Validation in Agricultural Vision
comment: 17 pages, 8 figures, 6 tables. Introduces the AgrI Challenge dataset containing 50,673 field images of six tree species collected by twelve independent teams
summary:
Machine learning models in agricultural vision often achieve high accuracy on curated datasets but fail to generalize under real field conditions due to distribution shifts between training and deployment environments. Moreover, most machine learning competitions focus primarily on model design while treating datasets as fixed resources, leaving the role of data collection practices in model generalization largely unexplored.
  We introduce the AgrI Challenge, a data-centric competition framework in which multiple teams independently collect field datasets, producing a heterogeneous multi-source benchmark that reflects realistic variability in acquisition conditions. To systematically evaluate cross-domain generalization across independently collected datasets, we propose Cross-Team Validation (CTV), an evaluation paradigm that treats each team's dataset as a distinct domain. CTV includes two complementary protocols: Train-on-One-Team-Only (TOTO), which measures single-source generalization, and Leave-One-Team-Out (LOTO), which evaluates collaborative multi-source training.
  Experiments reveal substantial generalization gaps under single-source training: models achieve near-perfect validation accuracy yet exhibit validation-test gaps of up to 16.20% (DenseNet121) and 11.37% (Swin Transformer) when evaluated on datasets collected by other teams. In contrast, collaborative multi-source training dramatically improves robustness, reducing the gap to 2.82% and 1.78%, respectively.
  The challenge also produced a publicly available dataset of 50,673 field images of six tree species collected by twelve independent teams, providing a diverse benchmark for studying domain shift and data-centric learning in agricultural vision.

AI.tldr: AgrI Challenge是一个数据中心的竞赛框架，让多个团队独立收集农田数据集，创建异构多源基准，并通过跨团队验证评估模型在真实田间条件下的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 农业视觉中的机器学习模型通常在精心策划的数据集上达到高准确率，但在真实田间条件下由于训练和部署环境之间的分布偏移而泛化失败。现有竞赛大多关注模型设计而将数据集视为固定资源，忽略了数据收集实践对模型泛化的影响。
AI.method: 引入AgrI Challenge数据中心竞赛框架，让多个团队独立收集农田数据集，形成异构多源基准。提出跨团队验证(CTV)评估范式，将每个团队的数据集视为独立域，包括两个协议：Train-on-One-Team-Only(TOTO)评估单源泛化，Leave-One-Team-Out(LOTO)评估协作多源训练。
AI.result: 单源训练下存在显著泛化差距：模型验证准确率接近完美，但在其他团队收集的数据集上测试时，DenseNet121和Swin Transformer的验证-测试差距分别高达16.20%和11.37%。协作多源训练显著提高鲁棒性，将差距分别降至2.82%和1.78%。
AI.conclusion: AgrI Challenge创建了一个包含12个独立团队收集的50,673张六种树木田间图像的公开数据集，为研究农业视觉中的域偏移和以数据为中心的学习提供了多样化基准。数据中心方法对于提高农业视觉模型在真实条件下的泛化能力至关重要。

title: Rethinking Deep Research from the Perspective of Web Content Distribution Matching
summary: Despite the integration of search tools, Deep Search Agents often suffer from a misalignment between reasoning-driven queries and the underlying web indexing structures. Existing frameworks treat the search engine as a static utility, leading to queries that are either too coarse or too granular to retrieve precise evidence. We propose WeDas, a Web Content Distribution Aware framework that incorporates search-space structural characteristics into the agent's observation space. Central to our method is the Query-Result Alignment Score, a metric quantifying the compatibility between agent intent and retrieval outcomes. To overcome the intractability of indexing the dynamic web, we introduce a few-shot probing mechanism that iteratively estimates this score via limited query accesses, allowing the agent to dynamically recalibrate sub-goals based on the local content landscape. As a plug-and-play module, WeDas consistently improves sub-goal completion and accuracy across four benchmarks, effectively bridging the gap between high-level reasoning and low-level retrieval.

AI.tldr: WeDas是一个Web内容分布感知框架，通过Query-Result Alignment Score量化代理意图与检索结果的兼容性，使用few-shot探测机制动态校准子目标，改善深度搜索代理的查询-检索对齐问题。
AI.motivation: 现有深度搜索代理存在推理驱动查询与底层网页索引结构不匹配的问题，现有框架将搜索引擎视为静态工具，导致查询要么过于粗糙要么过于精细，无法获取精确证据。
AI.method: 提出WeDas框架，将搜索空间结构特征纳入代理观察空间。核心是Query-Result Alignment Score，通过few-shot探测机制迭代估计该分数，允许代理基于本地内容分布动态重新校准子目标。
AI.result: WeDas作为即插即用模块，在四个基准测试中持续改善了子目标完成度和准确性，有效弥合了高层推理与低层检索之间的差距。
AI.conclusion: WeDas通过将搜索空间结构特征整合到代理观察中，解决了深度搜索代理中查询与检索的对齐问题，提高了搜索代理的性能和准确性。

title: AQuA: Toward Strategic Response Generation for Ambiguous Visual Questions
summary: Visual Question Answering (VQA) is a core task for evaluating the capabilities of Vision-Language Models (VLMs). Existing VQA benchmarks primarily feature clear and unambiguous image-question pairs, whereas real-world scenarios often involve varying degrees of ambiguity that require nuanced reasoning and context-appropriate response strategies. Although recent studies have begun to address ambiguity in VQA, they lack (1) a systematic categorization of ambiguity levels and (2) datasets and models that support strategy-aware responses. In this paper, we introduce Ambiguous Visual Question Answering (AQuA), a fine-grained dataset that classifies ambiguous VQA instances into four levels according to the nature and degree of ambiguity, along with the optimal response strategy for each case. Our evaluation of diverse open-source and proprietary VLMs shows that most models fail to adapt their strategy to the ambiguity type, frequently producing overconfident answers rather than seeking clarification or acknowledging uncertainty. To address this challenge, we fine-tune VLMs on AQuA, enabling them to adaptively choose among multiple response strategies, such as directly answering, inferring intent from contextual cues, listing plausible alternatives, or requesting clarification. VLMs trained on AQuA achieve strategic response generation for ambiguous VQA, demonstrating the ability to recognize ambiguity, manage uncertainty, and respond with context-appropriate strategies, while outperforming both open-source and closed-source baselines.

AI.tldr: AQuA数据集系统化分类视觉问答中的歧义级别，并训练VLM根据歧义类型自适应选择回答策略（直接回答、推断意图、列出备选、请求澄清），提升模型在真实模糊场景下的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有VQA基准主要关注清晰无歧义的图像-问题对，而真实场景常包含不同程度的歧义，需要模型具备细粒度推理和上下文适应的回答策略。当前研究缺乏对歧义级别的系统分类，以及支持策略感知回答的数据集和模型。
AI.method: 提出AQuA数据集，将歧义VQA实例细分为四个级别，并为每种情况标注最优回答策略。在此基础上微调视觉语言模型，使其能够自适应选择多种回答策略：直接回答、从上下文推断意图、列出合理备选方案或请求澄清。
AI.result: 评估显示大多数现有VLM无法根据歧义类型调整策略，常产生过度自信的回答而非寻求澄清或承认不确定性。在AQuA上微调的VLM能够实现策略性回答生成，在识别歧义、管理不确定性和使用上下文适当策略方面表现优异，超越开源和闭源基线模型。
AI.conclusion: AQuA数据集和相应训练方法使VLM能够更好地处理现实世界中的歧义VQA任务，通过自适应策略选择提升模型在模糊场景下的鲁棒性和实用性，为构建更智能的视觉语言系统提供了重要基础。

title: LF2L: Loss Fusion Horizontal Federated Learning Across Heterogeneous Feature Spaces Using External Datasets Effectively: A Case Study in Second Primary Cancer Prediction
summary: Second primary cancer (SPC), a new cancer in patients different from previously diagnosed, is a growing concern due to improved cancer survival rates. Early prediction of SPC is essential to enable timely clinical interventions. This study focuses on lung cancer survivors treated in Taiwanese hospitals, where the limited size and geographic scope of local datasets restrict the effectiveness and generalizability of traditional machine learning approaches. To address this, we incorporate external data from the publicly available US-based Surveillance, Epidemiology, and End Results (SEER) program, significantly increasing data diversity and scale. However, the integration of multi-source datasets presents challenges such as feature inconsistency and privacy constraints. Rather than naively merging data, we proposed a loss fusion horizontal federated learning (LF2L) framework that can enable effective cross-institutional collaboration while preserving institutional privacy by avoiding data sharing. Using both common and unique features and balancing their contributions through a shared loss mechanism, our method demonstrates substantial improvements in the prediction performance of SPC. Experiment results show statistically significant improvements in AUROC and AUPRC when compared to localized, horizontal federated, and centralized learning baselines. This highlights the importance of not only acquiring external data but also leveraging it effectively to enhance model performance in real-world clinical model development.

AI.tldr: 提出LF2L框架，通过水平联邦学习整合台湾本地和美国SEER数据，解决第二原发癌预测中数据量小、特征不一致和隐私保护问题，显著提升预测性能。
AI.motivation: 癌症生存率提高导致第二原发癌（SPC）问题日益突出，早期预测对临床干预至关重要。台湾本地数据集规模有限且地域局限，传统机器学习方法效果和泛化能力受限。
AI.method: 提出损失融合水平联邦学习（LF2L）框架，整合台湾医院数据和美国SEER数据，不共享原始数据，通过共享损失机制平衡共同特征和独特特征的贡献，解决多源数据特征不一致和隐私约束问题。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，与本地化、水平联邦学习和集中式学习基线相比，LF2L在AUROC和AUPRC指标上取得统计显著的改进，证明有效利用外部数据能显著提升临床模型性能。
AI.conclusion: 不仅需要获取外部数据，更需要有效利用外部数据来提升模型性能。LF2L框架通过隐私保护的方式整合多源数据，为临床模型开发提供了有效解决方案。

title: Generalization in Online Reinforcement Learning for Mobile Agents
summary: Graphical user interface (GUI)-based mobile agents automate digital tasks on mobile devices by interpreting natural-language instructions and interacting with the screen. While recent methods apply reinforcement learning (RL) to train vision-language-model(VLM) agents in interactive environments with a primary focus on performance, generalization remains underexplored due to the lack of standardized benchmarks and open-source RL systems. In this work, we formalize the problem as a Contextual Markov Decision Process (CMDP) and introduce \textbf{AndroidWorld-Generalization}, a benchmark with three increasingly challenging regimes for evaluating zero-shot generalization to unseen task instances, templates, and applications. We further propose an RL training system that integrates Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) with a scalable rollout collection system, consisting of containerized infrastructure and asynchronous execution % , and error recovery to support reliable and efficient training. Experiments on AndroidWorld-Generalization show that RL enables a 7B-parameter VLM agent to surpass supervised fine-tuning baselines, yielding a 26.1\% improvement on unseen instances but only limited gains on unseen templates (15.7\%) and apps (8.3\%), underscoring the challenges of generalization. As a preliminary step, we demonstrate that few-shot adaptation at test-time improves performance on unseen apps, motivating future research in this direction. To support reproducibility and fair comparison, we open-source the full RL training system, including the environment, task suite, models, prompt configurations, and the underlying infrastructure \footnote{https://github.com/zihuanjiang/AndroidWorld-Generalization}.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了AndroidWorld-Generalization基准测试，用于评估移动GUI代理的零样本泛化能力，并开发了结合GRPO的RL训练系统，在未见任务实例上取得显著改进，但在模板和应用泛化上仍有挑战。
AI.motivation: 移动GUI代理虽然能通过自然语言指令自动化移动设备任务，但现有方法主要关注性能而忽视了泛化能力，缺乏标准化基准和开源RL系统来评估和提升泛化性能。
AI.method: 将问题形式化为上下文马尔可夫决策过程(CMDP)，提出AndroidWorld-Generalization基准测试，包含三个难度递增的泛化场景；开发了结合Group Relative Policy Optimization(GRPO)的RL训练系统，包含容器化基础设施和异步执行。
AI.result: RL训练使7B参数VLM代理在未见任务实例上比监督微调基线提升26.1%，但在未见模板上仅提升15.7%，在未见应用上仅提升8.3%；初步测试显示few-shot适应能提升在未见应用上的性能。
AI.conclusion: RL能有效提升移动GUI代理的泛化能力，但在更复杂的泛化场景（模板和应用）上仍有挑战；few-shot适应是未来有前景的研究方向；开源了完整的RL训练系统以促进可复现性和公平比较。

title: Interpretable Aneurysm Classification via 3D Concept Bottleneck Models: Integrating Morphological and Hemodynamic Clinical Features
summary:
We are concerned with the challenge of reliably classifying and assessing intracranial aneurysms using deep learning without compromising clinical transparency. While traditional black-box models achieve high predictive accuracy, their lack of inherent interpretability remains a significant barrier to clinical adoption and regulatory approval. Explainability is paramount in medical modeling to ensure that AI-driven diagnoses align with established neurosurgical principles. Unlike traditional eXplainable AI (XAI) methods -- such as saliency maps, which often provide post-hoc, non-causal visual correlations -- Concept Bottleneck Models (CBMs) offer a robust alternative by constraining the model's internal logic to human-understandable clinical indices.
  In this article, we propose an end-to-end 3D Concept Bottleneck framework that maps high-dimensional neuroimaging features to a discrete set of morphological and hemodynamic concepts for aneurysm identification. We implemented this pipeline using a pre-trained 3D ResNet-34 backbone and a 3D DenseNet-121 to extract features from CTA volumes, which were subsequently processed through a soft bottleneck layer representing human-interpretable clinical concepts. The model was optimized using a joint-loss function to balance diagnostic focal loss and concept mean squared error (MSE), validated via stratified five-fold cross-validation.
  Our results demonstrate a peak task classification accuracy of 93.33% +/- 4.5% for the ResNet-34 architecture and 91.43% +/- 5.8% for the DenseNet-121 model. Furthermore, the implementation of 8-pass Test-Time Augmentation (TTA) yielded a robust mean accuracy of 88.31%, ensuring diagnostic stability during inference. By maintaining an accuracy-generalization gap of less than 0.04, this framework proves that high predictive performance can be achieved without sacrificing interpretability.

AI.tldr: 提出基于3D概念瓶颈模型的可解释颅内动脉瘤分类框架，在保持高准确率的同时提供临床可理解的决策依据。
AI.motivation: 传统黑盒深度学习模型在医学诊断中缺乏可解释性，阻碍临床采用和监管审批。需要一种既能保持高预测准确性又能提供透明决策依据的方法。
AI.method: 采用端到端3D概念瓶颈框架，使用预训练的3D ResNet-34和DenseNet-121从CTA影像提取特征，通过软瓶颈层映射到形态学和血流动力学概念，使用联合损失函数平衡诊断焦点损失和概念均方误差。
AI.result: ResNet-34架构达到93.33%±4.5%的分类准确率，DenseNet-121达到91.43%±5.8%。8次测试时增强实现88.31%的稳健平均准确率，准确率-泛化差距小于0.04。
AI.conclusion: 该框架证明可以在不牺牲可解释性的情况下实现高预测性能，为医学AI诊断提供了透明且可靠的解决方案。

title: Turning Time Series into Algebraic Equations: Symbolic Machine Learning for Interpretable Modeling of Chaotic Time Series
summary: Chaotic time series are notoriously difficult to forecast. Small uncertainties in initial conditions amplify rapidly, while strong nonlinearities and regime dependent variability constrain predictability. Although modern deep learning often delivers strong short horizon accuracy, its black box nature limits scientific insight and practical trust in settings where understanding the underlying dynamics matters. To address this gap, we propose two complementary symbolic forecasters that learn explicit, interpretable algebraic equations from chaotic time series data. Symbolic Neural Forecaster (SyNF) adapts a neural network based equation learning architecture to the forecasting setting, enabling fully differentiable discovery of compact and interpretable algebraic relations. The Symbolic Tree Forecaster (SyTF) builds on evolutionary symbolic regression to search directly over equation structures under a principled accuracy complexity trade off. We evaluate both approaches in a rolling window nowcasting setting with one step ahead forecasting using several accuracy metrics and compare against a broad suite of baselines spanning classical statistical models, tree ensembles, and modern deep learning architectures. Numerical experiments cover a benchmark of 132 low dimensional chaotic attractors and two real world chaotic time series, namely weekly dengue incidence in San Juan and the Nino 3.4 sea surface temperature index. Across datasets, symbolic forecasters achieve competitive one step ahead accuracy while providing transparent equations that reveal salient aspects of the underlying dynamics.

AI.tldr: 提出两种符号预测器（SyNF和SyTF），从混沌时间序列中学习可解释的代数方程，在保持竞争力的单步预测精度的同时提供透明方程
AI.motivation: 混沌时间序列预测困难，传统深度学习虽然短期精度好但缺乏可解释性，限制了科学洞察和实际信任。需要开发既能预测又能揭示底层动力学的可解释方法。
AI.method: 提出两种符号预测器：1) SyNF基于神经网络方程学习架构，实现完全可微的紧凑可解释代数关系发现；2) SyTF基于进化符号回归，在精度-复杂度权衡下直接搜索方程结构。
AI.result: 在132个低维混沌吸引子基准和两个真实世界混沌时间序列（圣胡安登革热周发病率和Nino 3.4海表温度指数）上评估，符号预测器实现了竞争力的单步预测精度，同时提供揭示底层动力学关键方面的透明方程。
AI.conclusion: 符号预测器填补了深度学习黑盒方法的空白，在保持预测精度的同时提供可解释的代数方程，增强了科学洞察和实际应用中的信任。

title: Image Generation Models: A Technical History
summary: Image generation has advanced rapidly over the past decade, yet the literature seems fragmented across different models and application domains. This paper aims to offer a comprehensive survey of breakthrough image generation models, including variational autoencoders (VAEs), generative adversarial networks (GANs), normalizing flows, autoregressive and transformer-based generators, and diffusion-based methods. We provide a detailed technical walkthrough of each model type, including their underlying objectives, architectural building blocks, and algorithmic training steps. For each model type, we present the optimization techniques as well as common failure modes and limitations. We also go over recent developments in video generation and present the research works that made it possible to go from still frames to high quality videos. Lastly, we cover the growing importance of robustness and responsible deployment of these models, including deepfake risks, detection, artifacts, and watermarking.

AI.tldr: 本文对图像生成模型进行了全面综述，涵盖VAE、GAN、归一化流、自回归/Transformer和扩散模型等主要方法，包括技术细节、优化技巧、局限性和最新视频生成进展，并讨论了模型鲁棒性和负责任部署问题。
AI.motivation: 图像生成在过去十年快速发展，但相关文献在不同模型和应用领域显得碎片化。本文旨在提供一个全面的图像生成模型综述，帮助研究人员和从业者理解这一领域的发展脉络和技术演进。
AI.method: 采用系统性文献综述方法，对主要图像生成模型类型（VAE、GAN、归一化流、自回归/Transformer、扩散模型）进行详细技术分析，包括目标函数、架构组件、训练算法、优化技术和常见失败模式。同时涵盖视频生成的最新进展和模型鲁棒性、负责任部署等议题。
AI.result: 提供了图像生成领域的全面技术概览，系统梳理了各类模型的原理、优缺点和发展脉络，总结了从静态图像到高质量视频生成的技术演进路径，并识别了当前面临的挑战和未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 图像生成技术已取得显著进展，但领域仍面临碎片化问题。未来需要更系统化的研究框架，同时必须重视模型的鲁棒性和负责任部署，以应对深度伪造等伦理挑战。视频生成是当前重要发展方向，需要进一步的技术突破。

title: VIVECaption: A Split Approach to Caption Quality Improvement
summary: Caption quality has emerged as a critical bottleneck in training high-quality text-to-image (T2I) and text-to-video (T2V) generative models. While visual language models (VLMs) are commonly deployed to generate captions from visual data, they suffer from hallucinations, poor compositional reasoning, and limited fine-grained understanding, resulting in misaligned image-caption pairs that degrade downstream model performance. This technical report introduces VIVECaption, a systematic two-sided approach to caption quality improvement. We first establish a comprehensive taxonomy of caption evaluation metrics, distinguishing between "universal" and "instance-grounded" metrics, with the ultimate goal of showcasing the use-cases and tradeoffs between different caption quality metrics. We then use this language to describe our two-sided approach to caption quality improvement: (1) a gold-standard dataset creation methodology using stratified sampling and (2) a model alignment strategy encompassing context alignment and parameter-level finetuning using SFT. We demonstrate our methodology on open-source models, focusing on structured caption formats that enable better parsing and downstream utilization. We ultimately show that using a finetuned character detection model in an image captioning pipeline significantly improves holistic image-caption alignment quality. Our work addresses the growing need for high-quality "vegan" training data in enterprise AI development, providing practical solutions for teams seeking to improve caption-image alignment without relying on potentially copyright-protected web-scraped content.

AI.tldr: VIVECaption提出一个系统性双管齐下的方法改进图像/视频描述质量，通过建立描述评估指标分类体系，结合黄金标准数据集创建和模型对齐策略，显著提升图像-描述对齐质量。
AI.motivation: 当前视觉语言模型生成的描述存在幻觉、组合推理能力差和细粒度理解有限等问题，导致图像-描述对不匹配，从而降低下游文本到图像/视频生成模型的性能。企业AI开发需要高质量"素食"训练数据，而不依赖可能受版权保护的网络抓取内容。
AI.method: 1. 建立全面的描述评估指标分类学，区分"通用"和"实例基础"指标；2. 双管齐下改进策略：a) 使用分层采样的黄金标准数据集创建方法；b) 包含上下文对齐和基于SFT的参数级微调的模型对齐策略；3. 在开源模型上演示方法，专注于结构化描述格式以支持更好的解析和下游利用。
AI.result: 在图像描述流程中使用微调后的字符检测模型显著提高了整体图像-描述对齐质量。该方法为团队提供了实用的解决方案，可在不依赖可能受版权保护的网络抓取内容的情况下改进描述-图像对齐。
AI.conclusion: VIVECaption通过系统性的双管齐下方法解决了描述质量瓶颈问题，为企业AI开发提供了高质量"素食"训练数据的实用解决方案，显著提升了图像-描述对齐质量，支持更好的下游模型性能。

title: Adaptive Double-Booking Strategy for Outpatient Scheduling Using Multi-Objective Reinforcement Learning
summary: Patient no-shows disrupt outpatient clinic operations, reduce productivity, and may delay necessary care. Clinics often adopt overbooking or double-booking to mitigate these effects. However, poorly calibrated policies can increase congestion and waiting times. Most existing methods rely on fixed heuristics and fail to adapt to real-time scheduling conditions or patient-specific no-show risk. To address these limitations, we propose an adaptive outpatient double-booking framework that integrates individualized no-show prediction with multi-objective reinforcement learning. The scheduling problem is formulated as a Markov decision process, and patient-level no-show probabilities estimated by a Multi-Head Attention Soft Random Forest model are incorporated in the reinforcement learning state. We develop a Multi-Policy Proximal Policy Optimization method equipped with a Multi-Policy Co-Evolution Mechanism. Under this mechanism, we propose a novel τ rule based on Kullback-Leibler divergence that enables selective knowledge transfer among behaviorally similar policies, improving convergence and expanding the diversity of trade-offs. In addition, SHapley Additive exPlanations is used to interpret both the predicted no-show risk and the agent's scheduling decisions. The proposed framework determines when to single-book, double-book, or reject appointment requests, providing a dynamic and data-driven alternative to conventional outpatient scheduling policies.

AI.tldr: 提出自适应门诊双预约框架，结合个体化爽约预测与多目标强化学习，动态决定单预约、双预约或拒绝预约请求，优化门诊调度。
AI.motivation: 患者爽约破坏门诊运营、降低效率并延误必要治疗。现有方法依赖固定启发式策略，无法适应实时调度条件或患者个体爽约风险，导致拥堵和等待时间增加。
AI.method: 1) 将调度问题建模为马尔可夫决策过程；2) 使用多头注意力软随机森林模型预测患者级爽约概率；3) 开发带多策略协同进化机制的多策略近端策略优化方法；4) 提出基于KL散度的τ规则实现行为相似策略间的选择性知识迁移；5) 使用SHAP解释爽约风险和调度决策。
AI.result: 框架能够动态决定单预约、双预约或拒绝预约请求，提供比传统门诊调度策略更优的数据驱动替代方案，改善收敛性和权衡多样性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的自适应门诊双预约框架整合了个体化爽约预测和多目标强化学习，通过选择性知识迁移机制和可解释性分析，为门诊调度提供了动态、数据驱动的优化方案。

title: Prompt-Based Caption Generation for Single-Tooth Dental Images Using Vision-Language Models
comment: Accepted to IEEE International Conference on Semantic Computing (IEEE ICSC 2026)
summary: Digital dentistry has made significant advances with the advent of deep learning. However, the majority of these deep learning-based dental image analysis models focus on very specific tasks such as tooth segmentation, tooth detection, cavity detection, and gingivitis classification. There is a lack of a specialized model that has holistic knowledge of teeth and can perform dental image analysis tasks based on that knowledge. Datasets of dental images with captions can help build such a model. To the best of our knowledge, existing dental image datasets with captions are few in number and limited in scope. In many of these datasets, the captions describe the entire mouth, while the images are limited to the anterior view. As a result, posterior teeth such as molars are not clearly visible, limiting the usefulness of the captions for training vision-language models. Additionally, the captions focus only on a specific disease (gingivitis) and do not provide a holistic assessment of each tooth. Moreover, tooth disease scores are typically assigned to individual teeth, and each tooth is treated as a separate entity in orthodontic procedures. Therefore, it is important to have captions for single-tooth images. As far as we know, no such dataset of single-tooth images with dental captions exists. In this work, we aim to bridge that gap by assessing the possibility of generating captions for dental images using Vision-Language Models (VLMs) and evaluating the extent and quality of those captions. Our findings suggest that guided prompts help VLMs generate meaningful captions. We show that the prompts generated by our framework are better anchored in describing the visual aspects of dental images. We selected RGB images as they have greater potential in consumer scenarios.

AI.tldr: 该研究旨在解决牙科图像分析中缺乏具有全面牙齿知识的专业模型的问题，通过探索使用视觉语言模型为单颗牙齿图像生成描述性标注，以填补现有数据集的空白。
AI.motivation: 当前基于深度学习的牙科图像分析模型大多专注于特定任务（如牙齿分割、检测等），缺乏具有全面牙齿知识的专业模型。现有牙科图像标注数据集数量少、范围有限，标注通常描述整个口腔而非单颗牙齿，且只关注特定疾病，无法提供对每颗牙齿的全面评估。
AI.method: 研究使用视觉语言模型（VLMs）为牙科图像生成标注，特别关注单颗牙齿图像。采用引导提示来帮助VLMs生成有意义的标注，并开发了一个框架来生成更好地锚定牙科图像视觉特征的提示。选择RGB图像以适应消费者应用场景。
AI.result: 研究发现引导提示有助于VLMs生成有意义的牙科图像标注。研究框架生成的提示能更好地描述牙科图像的视觉特征。RGB图像在消费者场景中具有更大潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该研究填补了单颗牙齿图像标注数据集的空白，证明了使用视觉语言模型生成牙科图像标注的可行性，为构建具有全面牙齿知识的专业牙科图像分析模型奠定了基础。

title: Spectral Discovery of Continuous Symmetries via Generalized Fourier Transforms
summary:
Continuous symmetries are fundamental to many scientific and learning problems, yet they are often unknown a priori. Existing symmetry discovery approaches typically search directly in the space of transformation generators or rely on learned augmentation schemes. We propose a fundamentally different perspective based on spectral structure.
  We introduce a framework for discovering continuous one-parameter subgroups using the Generalized Fourier Transform (GFT). Our central observation is that invariance to a subgroup induces structured sparsity in the spectral decomposition of a function across irreducible representations. Instead of optimizing over generators, we detect symmetries by identifying this induced sparsity pattern in the spectral domain.
  We develop symmetry detection procedures on maximal tori, where the GFT reduces to multi-dimensional Fourier analysis through their irreducible representations. Across structured tasks, including the double pendulum and top quark tagging, we demonstrate that spectral sparsity reliably reveals one-parameter symmetries. These results position spectral analysis as a principled and interpretable alternative to generator-based symmetry discovery.

AI.tldr: 提出基于谱结构的连续对称性发现框架，利用广义傅里叶变换检测诱导的稀疏模式，替代传统的生成器优化方法
AI.motivation: 连续对称性在科学和学习问题中很基础，但通常先验未知。现有方法要么在变换生成器空间中搜索，要么依赖学习的增强方案，存在局限性
AI.method: 使用广义傅里叶变换框架，通过谱分解检测诱导的稀疏模式来发现连续单参数子群。在极大环面上，GFT简化为通过不可约表示的多维傅里叶分析
AI.result: 在包括双摆和顶夸克标记等结构化任务中，谱稀疏性可靠地揭示了一参数对称性
AI.conclusion: 谱分析为基于生成器的对称性发现提供了原则性和可解释的替代方案

title: 3ViewSense: Spatial and Mental Perspective Reasoning from Orthographic Views in Vision-Language Models
summary: Current Large Language Models have achieved Olympiad-level logic, yet Vision-Language Models paradoxically falter on elementary spatial tasks like block counting. This capability mismatch reveals a critical ``spatial intelligence gap,'' where models fail to construct coherent 3D mental representations from 2D observations. We uncover this gap via diagnostic analyses showing the bottleneck is a missing view-consistent spatial interface rather than insufficient visual features or weak reasoning. To bridge this, we introduce \textbf{3ViewSense}, a framework that grounds spatial reasoning in Orthographic Views. Drawing on engineering cognition, we propose a ``Simulate-and-Reason'' mechanism that decomposes complex scenes into canonical orthographic projections to resolve geometric ambiguities. By aligning egocentric perceptions with these allocentric references, our method facilitates explicit mental rotation and reconstruction. Empirical results on spatial reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms existing baselines, with consistent gains on occlusion-heavy counting and view-consistent spatial reasoning. The framework also improves the stability and consistency of spatial descriptions, offering a scalable path toward stronger spatial intelligence in multimodal systems.

AI.tldr: 论文提出3ViewSense框架，通过正交投影视图解决视觉语言模型在空间推理任务中的"空间智能差距"问题
AI.motivation: 当前视觉语言模型在基础空间任务（如积木计数）上表现不佳，与大型语言模型在逻辑推理上的优异表现形成鲜明对比，揭示了"空间智能差距"问题
AI.method: 提出3ViewSense框架，基于工程认知原理，采用"模拟-推理"机制，将复杂场景分解为规范的正交投影视图，以解决几何模糊性问题
AI.result: 在空间推理基准测试中显著优于现有基线，在遮挡密集计数和视图一致性空间推理任务上取得一致提升，同时提高了空间描述的稳定性和一致性
AI.conclusion: 通过将自我中心感知与异中心参考对齐，该方法为多模态系统提供了可扩展的路径，有望增强空间智能能力

title: UnSCAR: Universal, Scalable, Controllable, and Adaptable Image Restoration
summary: Universal image restoration aims to recover clean images from arbitrary real-world degradations using a single inference model. Despite significant progress, existing all-in-one restoration networks do not scale to multiple degradations. As the number of degradations increases, training becomes unstable, models grow excessively large, and performance drops across both seen and unseen domains. In this work, we show that scaling universal restoration is fundamentally limited by interference across degradations during joint learning, leading to catastrophic task forgetting. To address this challenge, we introduce a unified inference pipeline with a multi-branch mixture-of-experts architecture that decomposes restoration knowledge across specialized task-adaptable experts. Our approach enables scalable learning (over sixteen degradations), adapts and generalizes robustly to unseen domains, and supports user-controllable restoration across degradations. Beyond achieving superior performance across benchmarks, this work establishes a new design paradigm for scalable and controllable universal image restoration.

AI.tldr: 提出一种多分支专家混合架构，解决通用图像修复中多退化联合学习时的任务干扰问题，实现可扩展的通用修复
AI.motivation: 现有通用图像修复方法在处理多种退化时存在扩展性问题：随着退化类型增加，训练不稳定、模型过大、性能下降，根本原因是联合学习中的任务干扰导致灾难性遗忘
AI.method: 采用多分支专家混合架构，将修复知识分解到专门的任务自适应专家中，形成统一的推理管道，支持用户可控的跨退化修复
AI.result: 实现了可扩展学习（超过16种退化），对未见域具有鲁棒适应性和泛化能力，在多个基准测试中取得优越性能
AI.conclusion: 建立了可扩展和可控的通用图像修复新设计范式，解决了多退化联合学习中的扩展性限制问题

title: AutoResearch-RL: Perpetual Self-Evaluating Reinforcement Learning Agents for Autonomous Neural Architecture Discovery
summary:
We present AutoResearch-RL, a framework in which a reinforcement learning agent conducts open-ended neural architecture and hyperparameter research without human supervision, running perpetually until a termination oracle signals convergence or resource exhaustion. At each step the agent proposes a code modification to a target training script, executes it under a fixed wall clock time budget, observes a scalar reward derived from validation bits-per-byte (val-bpb), and updates its policy via Proximal Policy Optimisation (PPO).
  The key design insight is the separation of three concerns: (i) a frozen environment (data pipeline, evaluation protocol, and constants) that guarantees fair cross-experiment comparison; (ii) a mutable target file (train.py) that represents the agent's editable state; and (iii) a meta-learner (the RL agent itself) that accumulates a growing trajectory of experiment outcomes and uses them to inform subsequent proposals.
  We formalise this as a Markov Decision Process, derive convergence guarantees under mild assumptions, and demonstrate empirically on a single GPU nanochat pretraining benchmark that AutoResearch-RL discovers configurations that match or exceed hand-tuned baselines after approximately 300 overnight iterations, with no human in the loop.

AI.tldr: AutoResearch-RL是一个强化学习框架，让AI代理自主进行神经网络架构和超参数研究，无需人工监督，通过修改训练代码、执行实验、观察奖励来持续优化模型配置。
AI.motivation: 传统神经架构搜索和超参数调优需要大量人工干预和专业知识。本文旨在开发一个完全自主的研究框架，让强化学习代理能够持续进行开放式研究，无需人类监督，实现自动化模型优化。
AI.method: 框架采用三层设计：1) 冻结环境（数据管道、评估协议）确保实验公平比较；2) 可修改的目标文件（train.py）作为代理的可编辑状态；3) 元学习器（RL代理）积累实验轨迹并指导后续提案。代理使用PPO算法，通过修改代码、执行实验、观察验证bits-per-byte奖励来学习。
AI.result: 在单GPU的nanochat预训练基准测试中，AutoResearch-RL经过约300次夜间迭代后，发现的配置能够匹配或超过人工调优的基线模型，完全无需人工干预。
AI.conclusion: AutoResearch-RL证明了强化学习代理能够自主进行神经架构和超参数研究，通过分离环境、目标文件和元学习器的设计，实现了完全自动化的模型优化流程，为自动化机器学习研究提供了新方向。

title: Breaking Training Bottlenecks: Effective and Stable Reinforcement Learning for Coding Models
summary: Modern code generation models exhibit longer outputs, accelerated capability growth, and changed training dynamics, rendering traditional training methodologies, algorithms, and datasets ineffective for improving their performance. To address these training bottlenecks, we propose MicroCoder-GRPO, an improved Group Relative Policy Optimization approach with three innovations: conditional truncation masking to improve long output potential while maintaining training stability, diversity-determined temperature selection to maintain and encourage output diversity, and removal of KL loss with high clipping ratios to facilitate solution diversity. MicroCoder-GRPO achieves up to 17.6% relative improvement over strong baselines on LiveCodeBench v6, with more pronounced gains under extended context evaluation. Additionally, we release MicroCoder-Dataset, a more challenging training corpus that achieves 3x larger performance gains than mainstream datasets on LiveCodeBench v6 within 300 training steps, and MicroCoder-Evaluator, a robust framework with approximately 25% improved evaluation accuracy and around 40% faster execution. Through comprehensive analysis across more than thirty controlled experiments, we reveal 34 training insights across seven main aspects, demonstrating that properly trained models can achieve competitive performance with larger counterparts.

AI.tldr: MicroCoder-GRPO提出改进的Group Relative Policy Optimization方法，通过条件截断掩码、多样性温度选择和移除KL损失等创新，在代码生成任务上取得显著性能提升，并发布更挑战的训练数据集和评估框架。
AI.motivation: 现代代码生成模型具有更长的输出、加速的能力增长和变化的训练动态，使得传统训练方法、算法和数据集在提升性能方面变得无效。需要解决这些训练瓶颈。
AI.method: 提出MicroCoder-GRPO改进方法：1) 条件截断掩码以改善长输出潜力同时保持训练稳定性；2) 多样性决定温度选择以维持和鼓励输出多样性；3) 移除KL损失并使用高裁剪比率以促进解决方案多样性。
AI.result: 在LiveCodeBench v6上相对强基线提升达17.6%，在扩展上下文评估下增益更明显。发布MicroCoder-Dataset（在300训练步内获得主流数据集3倍性能增益）和MicroCoder-Evaluator（评估准确率提升约25%，执行速度加快约40%）。
AI.conclusion: 通过30多个控制实验的全面分析，揭示了七个主要方面的34个训练洞见，证明经过适当训练的模型可以与更大模型实现竞争性性能。

title: QdaVPR: A novel query-based domain-agnostic model for visual place recognition
summary: Visual place recognition (VPR) aiming at predicting the location of an image based solely on its visual features is a fundamental task in robotics and autonomous systems. Domain variation remains one of the main challenges in VPR and is relatively unexplored. Existing VPR models attempt to achieve domain agnosticism either by training on large-scale datasets that inherently contain some domain variations, or by being specifically adapted to particular target domains. In practice, the former lacks explicit domain supervision, while the latter generalizes poorly to unseen domain shifts. This paper proposes a novel query-based domain-agnostic VPR model called QdaVPR. First, a dual-level adversarial learning framework is designed to encourage domain invariance for both the query features forming the global descriptor and the image features from which these query features are derived. Then, a triplet supervision based on query combinations is designed to enhance the discriminative power of the global descriptors. To support the learning process, we augment a large-scale VPR dataset using style transfer methods, generating various synthetic domains with corresponding domain labels as auxiliary supervision. Extensive experiments show that QdaVPR achieves state-of-the-art performance on multiple VPR benchmarks with significant domain variations. Specifically, it attains the best Recall@1 and Recall@10 on nearly all test scenarios: 93.5%/98.6% on Nordland (seasonal changes), 97.5%/99.0% on Tokyo24/7 (day-night transitions), and the highest Recall@1 across almost all weather conditions on the SVOX dataset. Our code will be released at https://github.com/shuimushan/QdaVPR.

AI.tldr: 提出QdaVPR模型，通过双重对抗学习和查询组合三元组监督实现跨域视觉地点识别，在季节、昼夜、天气变化等场景下达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有VPR模型要么依赖大规模数据集但缺乏显式域监督，要么针对特定域但泛化能力差。需要一种能有效处理域变化且泛化性强的VPR方法。
AI.method: 1) 设计双重对抗学习框架，使查询特征和图像特征都具有域不变性；2) 基于查询组合的三元组监督增强全局描述符的判别力；3) 使用风格迁移方法增强数据集，生成带域标签的合成数据作为辅助监督。
AI.result: 在多个VPR基准测试中取得SOTA：Nordland（季节变化）Recall@1/10达93.5%/98.6%；Tokyo24/7（昼夜变化）达97.5%/99.0%；SVOX数据集上几乎所有天气条件下Recall@1最高。
AI.conclusion: QdaVPR通过双重对抗学习和查询组合监督有效解决了VPR中的域变化问题，在多种域变化场景下表现出优异的泛化能力和识别性能。

title: Retrieval-Augmented Multi-scale Framework for County-Level Crop Yield Prediction Across Large Regions
summary: This paper proposes a new method for crop yield prediction, which is essential for developing management strategies, informing insurance assessments, and ensuring long-term food security. Although existing data-driven approaches have shown promise in this domain, their performance often degrades when applied across large geographic regions and long time periods. This limitation arises from two key challenges: (1) difficulty in jointly capturing short-term and long-term temporal patterns, and (2) inability to effectively accommodate spatial data variability in agricultural systems. Ignoring these issues often leads to unreliable predictions for specific regions or years, which ultimately affects policy decisions and resource allocation. In this paper, we propose a new predictive framework to address these challenges. First, we introduce a new backbone model architecture that captures both short-term daily-scale crop growth dynamics and long-term dependencies across years. To further improve generalization across diverse spatial regions, we augment this model with a retrieval-based adaptation strategy. Recognizing the substantial yield variation across years, we design a novel retrieval-and-refinement pipeline that adjusts retrieved samples by removing cross-year bias not explained by input features. Our experiments on real-world county-level corn yield data over 630 counties in the US demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms different types of baselines. The results also verify the effectiveness of the retrieval-based augmentation method in improving model robustness under spatial heterogeneity.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新的作物产量预测方法，通过结合短期和长期时间模式捕捉以及检索式适应策略，解决跨大区域和长时间序列预测的泛化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有数据驱动方法在大地理区域和长时间跨度应用时性能下降，主要因为难以同时捕捉短期和长期时间模式，以及无法有效处理农业系统的空间数据变异性，导致特定区域或年份的预测不可靠，影响政策决策和资源分配。
AI.method: 提出新的预测框架：1）设计新的骨干模型架构，同时捕捉短期日尺度作物生长动态和跨年长期依赖关系；2）采用检索式适应策略增强模型在不同空间区域的泛化能力；3）设计新颖的检索-精炼流程，通过移除输入特征无法解释的跨年偏差来调整检索样本。
AI.result: 在美国630个县的县级玉米产量真实数据实验中，该方法持续优于不同类型的基线模型。结果验证了检索式增强方法在空间异质性下提高模型鲁棒性的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的新预测框架成功解决了作物产量预测中的时空泛化挑战，通过结合时间模式捕捉和检索式适应策略，为大规模农业预测提供了更可靠的解决方案。

title: Disentangled Textual Priors for Diffusion-based Image Super-Resolution
summary: Image Super-Resolution (SR) aims to reconstruct high-resolution images from degraded low-resolution inputs. While diffusion-based SR methods offer powerful generative capabilities, their performance heavily depends on how semantic priors are structured and integrated into the generation process. Existing approaches often rely on entangled or coarse-grained priors that mix global layout with local details, or conflate structural and textural cues, thereby limiting semantic controllability and interpretability. In this work, we propose DTPSR, a novel diffusion-based SR framework that introduces disentangled textual priors along two complementary dimensions: spatial hierarchy (global vs. local) and frequency semantics (low- vs. high-frequency). By explicitly separating these priors, DTPSR enables the model to simultaneously capture scene-level structure and object-specific details with frequency-aware semantic guidance. The corresponding embeddings are injected via specialized cross-attention modules, forming a progressive generation pipeline that reflects the semantic granularity of visual content, from global layout to fine-grained textures. To support this paradigm, we construct DisText-SR, a large-scale dataset containing approximately 95,000 image-text pairs with carefully disentangled global, low-frequency, and high-frequency descriptions. To further enhance controllability and consistency, we adopt a multi-branch classifier-free guidance strategy with frequency-aware negative prompts to suppress hallucinations and semantic drift. Extensive experiments on synthetic and real-world benchmarks show that DTPSR achieves high perceptual quality, competitive fidelity, and strong generalization across diverse degradation scenarios.

AI.tldr: DTPSR是一种基于扩散模型的图像超分辨率框架，通过解耦文本先验（空间层次和频率语义）实现更精细的语义控制，在合成和真实世界基准测试中表现出色。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散超分辨率方法通常使用纠缠或粗粒度的语义先验，混合了全局布局与局部细节、结构与纹理线索，限制了语义可控性和可解释性。
AI.method: 提出DTPSR框架，沿两个互补维度解耦文本先验：空间层次（全局vs局部）和频率语义（低频vs高频）。通过专门的交叉注意力模块注入相应嵌入，形成渐进生成管道。构建DisText-SR数据集（约95,000图像-文本对），并采用多分支无分类器引导策略。
AI.result: 在合成和真实世界基准测试中，DTPSR实现了高感知质量、有竞争力的保真度，并在各种退化场景下表现出强大的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过解耦文本先验，DTPSR能够同时捕捉场景级结构和对象特定细节，提供频率感知的语义指导，显著提升了扩散超分辨率方法的语义可控性和生成质量。

title: Adversarial Latent-State Training for Robust Policies in Partially Observable Domains
summary: Robustness under latent distribution shift remains challenging in partially observable reinforcement learning. We formalize a focused setting where an adversary selects a hidden initial latent distribution before the episode, termed an adversarial latent-initial-state POMDP. Theoretically, we prove a latent minimax principle, characterize worst-case defender distributions, and derive approximate best-response certificates with finite-sample guarantees, providing formal meaning to empirical training diagnostics. Empirically, using a Battleship benchmark, we demonstrate that targeted exposure to shifted latent distributions reduces average robustness gaps between Spread and Uniform distributions from 10.3 to 3.1 shots at equal budget. Furthermore, iterative best-response training exhibits budget-sensitive behavior entirely consistent with our approximate certificate theory. Ultimately, we show that for latent-initial-state problems, our framework yields precise diagnostic principles and confirms that structured adversarial exposure effectively mitigates worst-case vulnerabilities.

AI.tldr: 论文提出对抗性潜在初始状态POMDP框架，证明潜在极小极大原理，通过针对性暴露于偏移分布提升鲁棒性，在Battleship基准上验证效果。
AI.motivation: 部分可观测强化学习中，潜在分布偏移下的鲁棒性仍然具有挑战性。需要形式化对抗性潜在初始状态POMDP框架来系统研究这一问题。
AI.method: 提出对抗性潜在初始状态POMDP形式化框架，证明潜在极小极大原理，推导有限样本保证的近似最优响应证书，采用迭代最优响应训练方法。
AI.result: 在Battleship基准上，针对性暴露于偏移潜在分布将Spread和Uniform分布间的平均鲁棒性差距从10.3降低到3.1次射击。迭代训练表现出与理论证书一致的预算敏感行为。
AI.conclusion: 对于潜在初始状态问题，该框架提供了精确的诊断原则，证实结构化对抗性暴露能有效缓解最坏情况脆弱性。

title: Reject, Resample, Repeat: Understanding Parallel Reasoning in Language Model Inference
summary: Inference-time methods that aggregate and prune multiple samples have emerged as a powerful paradigm for steering large language models, yet we lack any principled understanding of their accuracy-cost tradeoffs. In this paper, we introduce a route to rigorously study such approaches using the lens of *particle filtering* algorithms such as Sequential Monte Carlo (SMC). Given a base language model and a *process reward model* estimating expected terminal rewards, we ask: *how accurately can we sample from a target distribution given some number of process reward evaluations?* Theoretically, we identify (1) simple criteria enabling non-asymptotic guarantees for SMC; (2) algorithmic improvements to SMC; and (3) a fundamental limit faced by all particle filtering methods. Empirically, we demonstrate that our theoretical criteria effectively govern the *sampling error* of SMC, though not necessarily its final *accuracy*, suggesting that theoretical perspectives beyond sampling may be necessary.

AI.tldr: 该论文使用粒子滤波（Sequential Monte Carlo）框架来理论分析推理时聚合和剪枝多个样本的方法，建立了采样准确性与计算成本之间的理论关系，并提出了算法改进和基本限制。
AI.motivation: 虽然推理时聚合和剪枝多个样本已成为引导大语言模型的有力范式，但缺乏对其准确性与成本权衡的理论理解。论文旨在通过粒子滤波框架为这类方法提供理论基础。
AI.method: 使用序列蒙特卡洛（SMC）等粒子滤波算法作为理论框架，分析给定基础语言模型和过程奖励模型时，如何在一定数量的过程奖励评估下从目标分布中采样。提出了SMC的理论标准、算法改进，并识别了粒子滤波方法的基本限制。
AI.result: 理论上识别了：(1) 使SMC具有非渐近保证的简单标准；(2) 对SMC的算法改进；(3) 所有粒子滤波方法面临的基本限制。实证表明理论标准能有效控制SMC的采样误差，但不一定能保证最终准确性。
AI.conclusion: 粒子滤波框架为分析推理时聚合和剪枝方法提供了理论基础，但采样误差与最终准确性之间的差距表明需要超越采样的理论视角来完全理解这些方法的性能。

title: ShakyPrepend: A Multi-Group Learner with Improved Sample Complexity
summary: Multi-group learning is a learning task that focuses on controlling predictors' conditional losses over specified subgroups. We propose ShakyPrepend, a method that leverages tools inspired by differential privacy to obtain improved theoretical guarantees over existing approaches. Through numerical experiments, we demonstrate that ShakyPrepend adapts to both group structure and spatial heterogeneity. We provide practical guidance for deploying multi-group learning algorithms in real-world settings.

AI.tldr: 提出ShakyPrepend方法，利用差分隐私工具改进多组学习理论保证，适应组结构和空间异质性
AI.motivation: 多组学习关注在指定子组上控制预测器的条件损失，需要改进现有方法的理论保证
AI.method: ShakyPrepend方法，借鉴差分隐私工具，提供更好的理论保证
AI.result: 数值实验显示ShakyPrepend能适应组结构和空间异质性，为实际部署提供指导
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法在多组学习中具有理论优势和实践价值

title: \$OneMillion-Bench: How Far are Language Agents from Human Experts?
summary: As language models (LMs) evolve from chat assistants to long-horizon agents capable of multi-step reasoning and tool use, existing benchmarks remain largely confined to structured or exam-style tasks that fall short of real-world professional demands. To this end, we introduce \$OneMillion-Bench \$OneMillion-Bench, a benchmark of 400 expert-curated tasks spanning Law, Finance, Industry, Healthcare, and Natural Science, built to evaluate agents across economically consequential scenarios. Unlike prior work, the benchmark requires retrieving authoritative sources, resolving conflicting evidence, applying domain-specific rules, and making constraint decisions, where correctness depends as much on the reasoning process as the final answer. We adopt a rubric-based evaluation protocol scoring factual accuracy, logical coherence, practical feasibility, and professional compliance, focused on expert-level problems to ensure meaningful differentiation across agents. Together, \$OneMillion-Bench provides a unified testbed for assessing agentic reliability, professional depth, and practical readiness in domain-intensive scenarios.

AI.tldr: OneMillion-Bench是一个包含400个专家策划任务的基准测试，涵盖法律、金融、工业、医疗和自然科学领域，旨在评估语言模型在真实世界专业场景中的表现，强调权威来源检索、冲突证据解决、领域规则应用和约束决策能力。
AI.motivation: 现有基准测试主要局限于结构化或考试式任务，无法满足真实世界专业需求。随着语言模型从聊天助手发展为能够进行多步推理和工具使用的长期智能体，需要新的评估框架来测试其在经济重要场景中的实际表现。
AI.method: 构建了包含400个专家策划任务的基准测试，涵盖五个专业领域。采用基于量规的评估协议，从事实准确性、逻辑连贯性、实践可行性和专业合规性四个维度进行评分，重点关注专家级问题以确保对不同智能体的有意义的区分。
AI.result: OneMillion-Bench提供了一个统一的测试平台，用于评估智能体在领域密集型场景中的可靠性、专业深度和实践准备度。该基准测试要求智能体检索权威来源、解决冲突证据、应用领域特定规则并做出约束决策。
AI.conclusion: OneMillion-Bench填补了现有基准测试的空白，为评估语言模型在真实世界专业场景中的表现提供了全面框架，强调推理过程与最终答案同等重要，能够有效测试智能体的专业能力和实践准备度。

title: RPG-SAM: Reliability-Weighted Prototypes and Geometric Adaptive Threshold Selection for Training-Free One-Shot Polyp Segmentation
comment: Under review at MICCAI 2026. 8 pages, 3 figures
summary: Training-free one-shot segmentation offers a scalable alternative to expert annotations where knowledge is often transferred from support images and foundation models. But existing methods often treat all pixels in support images and query response intensities models in a homogeneous way. They ignore the regional heterogeity in support images and response heterogeity in query.To resolve this, we propose RPG-SAM, a framework that systematically tackles these heterogeneity gaps. Specifically, to address regional heterogeneity, we introduce Reliability-Weighted Prototype Mining (RWPM) to prioritize high-fidelity support features while utilizing background anchors as contrastive references for noise suppression. To address response heterogeneity, we develop Geometric Adaptive Selection (GAS) to dynamically recalibrate binarization thresholds by evaluating the morphological consensus of candidates. Finally, an iterative refinement loop method is designed to polishes anatomical boundaries. By accounting for multi-layered information heterogeneity, RPG-SAM achieves a 5.56\% mIoU improvement on the Kvasir dataset. Code will be released.

AI.tldr: RPG-SAM：一种解决医学图像分割中区域异质性和响应异质性的训练免费单次分割框架，通过可靠性加权原型挖掘和几何自适应选择提升分割性能。
AI.motivation: 现有训练免费单次分割方法将支持图像中的所有像素和查询响应强度模型同质化处理，忽略了支持图像的区域异质性和查询响应的异质性，导致分割性能受限。
AI.method: 提出RPG-SAM框架：1）可靠性加权原型挖掘（RWPM）优先选择高保真支持特征，使用背景锚点作为对比参考抑制噪声；2）几何自适应选择（GAS）通过评估候选形态一致性动态重新校准二值化阈值；3）迭代细化循环方法优化解剖边界。
AI.result: 在Kvasir数据集上实现了5.56%的mIoU提升，显著改善了医学图像分割性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过系统解决多层级信息异质性，RPG-SAM为医学图像分割提供了更有效的训练免费单次分割解决方案，代码将开源。

title: Norm-Hierarchy Transitions in Representation Learning: When and Why Neural Networks Abandon Shortcuts
summary:
Neural networks often rely on spurious shortcuts for many epochs before discovering structured representations. However, the mechanism governing when this transition occurs and whether its timing can be predicted remains unclear. Prior work shows that gradient descent converges to low norm solutions and that neural networks exhibit simplicity bias, but neither explains the timescale of the transition from shortcut features to structured representations.
  We introduce the Norm-Hierarchy Transition (NHT) framework, which explains delayed representation learning as the slow traversal of a hierarchy of parameter norms during regularized optimization. When multiple interpolating solutions exist with different norms, weight decay gradually moves the model from high norm shortcut solutions toward lower norm structured representations. We derive a tight bound showing that the transition delay grows logarithmically with the ratio between shortcut and structured norms.
  Experiments on modular arithmetic, CIFAR-10 with spurious features, CelebA, and Waterbirds support the predictions of the framework. The results suggest that grokking, shortcut learning, and delayed feature discovery arise from a common mechanism based on norm hierarchy traversal during training.

AI.tldr: 论文提出Norm-Hierarchy Transition框架，解释神经网络为何在训练多轮后才从虚假特征转向结构化表示，认为这是正则化优化中参数范数层级缓慢遍历的结果。
AI.motivation: 神经网络经常依赖虚假捷径特征多轮训练后才发现结构化表示，但这一转变发生的机制和时间预测仍不清楚。现有理论如梯度下降收敛到低范数解和神经网络的简单性偏置都无法解释这种转变的时间尺度。
AI.method: 提出Norm-Hierarchy Transition框架，认为延迟表示学习是正则化优化过程中参数范数层级缓慢遍历的结果。当存在多个具有不同范数的插值解时，权重衰减会逐渐将模型从高范数的捷径解移向低范数的结构化表示。
AI.result: 推导出转变延迟与捷径范数和结构化范数之比的对数增长紧密相关。在模块化算术、带虚假特征的CIFAR-10、CelebA和Waterbirds等实验中都验证了该框架的预测。
AI.conclusion: grokking、捷径学习和延迟特征发现都源于训练过程中范数层级遍历的共同机制。该框架为理解神经网络表示学习的时间动态提供了新视角。

title: Deterministic Differentiable Structured Pruning for Large Language Models
summary: Structured pruning reduces LLM inference cost by removing low-importance architectural components. This can be viewed as learning a multiplicative gate for each component under an l0 sparsity constraint. Due to the discreteness of the l0 norm, prior work typically adopts stochastic hard-concrete relaxations to enable differentiable optimization; however, this stochasticity can introduce a train--test mismatch when sampled masks are discretized for deployment and restricts masks to a bounded, near-binary range. To address this, we propose Deterministic Differentiable Pruning (DDP), a mask-only optimization method that eliminates stochasticity by directly optimizing a deterministic soft surrogate of the discrete l0 objective. Compared with prior approaches, DDP offers greater expressiveness, reduced train--test mismatch, and faster convergence. We apply our method to several dense and MoE models, including Qwen3-32B and Qwen3-30B-A3B, achieving a performance loss as small as 1% on downstream tasks while outperforming previous methods at 20% sparsity. We further demonstrate end-to-end inference speedups in realistic deployment settings with vLLM.

AI.tldr: DDP是一种确定性可微分剪枝方法，通过直接优化离散l0目标的确定性软代理，消除随机性，减少训练-测试不匹配，实现更快的收敛和更好的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有结构化剪枝方法通常采用随机硬混凝土松弛来实现可微分优化，但这种随机性会导致训练-测试不匹配（当采样掩码在部署时被离散化），并将掩码限制在有界的近二元范围内。
AI.method: 提出确定性可微分剪枝(DDP)，这是一种仅掩码优化的方法，通过直接优化离散l0目标的确定性软代理来消除随机性，提供更大的表达能力。
AI.result: 在多个密集和MoE模型（包括Qwen3-32B和Qwen3-30B-A3B）上应用DDP，在下游任务上性能损失最小仅为1%，在20%稀疏度下优于先前方法，并在vLLM中展示了端到端推理加速。
AI.conclusion: DDP通过消除随机性，减少了训练-测试不匹配，提供了更大的表达能力，实现了更快的收敛，并在实际部署中展示了显著的推理加速效果。

title: DogWeave: High-Fidelity 3D Canine Reconstruction from a Single Image via Normal Fusion and Conditional Inpainting
summary: Monocular 3D animal reconstruction is challenging due to complex articulation, self-occlusion, and fine-scale details such as fur. Existing methods often produce distorted geometry and inconsistent textures due to the lack of articulated 3D supervision and limited availability of back-view images in 2D datasets, which makes reconstructing unobserved regions particularly difficult. To address these limitations, we propose DogWeave, a model-based framework for reconstructing high-fidelity 3D canine models from a single RGB image. DogWeave improves geometry by refining a coarsely-initiated parametric mesh into a detailed SDF representation through multi-view normal field optimization using diffusion-enhanced normals. It then generates view-consistent textures through conditional partial inpainting guided by structure and style cues, enabling realistic reconstruction of unobserved regions. Using only about 7,000 dog images processed via our 2D pipeline for training, DogWeave produces complete, realistic 3D models and outperforms state-of-the-art single image to 3d reconstruction methods in both shape accuracy and texture realism for canines.

AI.tldr: DogWeave：从单张RGB图像重建高保真3D犬类模型的框架，通过扩散增强法线优化几何，条件部分修复生成一致纹理，仅用约7000张图像训练即超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 单目3D动物重建面临复杂关节、自遮挡和毛发等细节挑战，现有方法因缺乏关节3D监督和2D数据集背面图像有限，导致几何扭曲和纹理不一致，难以重建未观测区域。
AI.method: DogWeave采用模型化框架：1) 将粗初始化参数网格通过扩散增强法线的多视角法线场优化，精炼为详细SDF表示；2) 通过结构和风格线索引导的条件部分修复，生成视角一致的纹理。
AI.result: 仅用约7000张经2D流程处理的犬类图像训练，DogWeave能生成完整逼真的3D模型，在犬类形状精度和纹理真实感方面均优于最先进的单图像到3D重建方法。
AI.conclusion: DogWeave通过结合几何优化和纹理生成技术，有效解决了单图像犬类3D重建中的几何扭曲和纹理不一致问题，实现了高质量、完整的3D模型重建。

title: Learning Concept Bottleneck Models from Mechanistic Explanations
summary: Concept Bottleneck Models (CBMs) aim for ante-hoc interpretability by learning a bottleneck layer that predicts interpretable concepts before the decision. State-of-the-art approaches typically select which concepts to learn via human specification, open knowledge graphs, prompting an LLM, or using general CLIP concepts. However, concepts defined a-priori may not have sufficient predictive power for the task or even be learnable from the available data. As a result, these CBMs often significantly trail their black-box counterpart when controlling for information leakage. To address this, we introduce a novel CBM pipeline named Mechanistic CBM (M-CBM), which builds the bottleneck directly from a black-box model's own learned concepts. These concepts are extracted via Sparse Autoencoders (SAEs) and subsequently named and annotated on a selected subset of images using a Multimodal LLM. For fair comparison and leakage control, we also introduce the Number of Contributing Concepts (NCC), a decision-level sparsity metric that extends the recently proposed NEC metric. Across diverse datasets, we show that M-CBMs consistently surpass prior CBMs at matched sparsity, while improving concept predictions and providing concise explanations. Our code is available at https://github.com/Antonio-Dee/M-CBM.

AI.tldr: M-CBM：通过从黑盒模型中提取概念构建瓶颈层，提升概念瓶颈模型性能，在保持稀疏性同时超越现有CBM方法
AI.motivation: 现有概念瓶颈模型（CBMs）通常通过人工指定、知识图谱或LLM提示等方式预先定义概念，但这些预定义概念可能缺乏足够的预测能力或难以从可用数据中学习，导致性能显著落后于黑盒模型
AI.method: 提出机制概念瓶颈模型（M-CBM），直接从黑盒模型自身学习的概念构建瓶颈层：1）使用稀疏自编码器（SAEs）提取概念；2）使用多模态LLM在选定图像子集上为概念命名和注释；3）引入NCC（贡献概念数量）作为决策级稀疏性度量指标
AI.result: 在多个数据集上，M-CBM在相同稀疏性条件下始终优于现有CBM方法，同时改善了概念预测能力并提供简洁的解释
AI.conclusion: M-CBM通过从黑盒模型中提取概念构建瓶颈层，解决了传统CBM中预定义概念预测能力不足的问题，在保持可解释性的同时显著提升了模型性能

title: Fibration Policy Optimization
summary: Large language models are increasingly trained as heterogeneous systems spanning multiple domains, expert partitions, and agentic pipelines, yet prevalent proximal objectives operate at a single scale and lack a principled mechanism for coupling token-level, trajectory-level, and higher-level hierarchical stability control. To bridge this gap, we derive the Aggregational Policy Censoring Objective (APC-Obj), the first exact unconstrained reformulation of sample-based TV-TRPO, establishing that clipping-based surrogate design and trust-region optimization are dual formulations of the same problem. Building on this foundation, we develop Fiber Bundle Gating (FBG), an algebraic framework that organizes sampled RL data as a fiber bundle and decomposes ratio gating into a base-level gate on trajectory aggregates and a fiber-level gate on per-token residuals, with provable first-order agreement with the true RL objective near on-policy. From APC-Obj and FBG we derive Fibration Policy Optimization (or simply, FiberPO), a concrete objective whose Jacobian is block-diagonal over trajectories, reduces to identity at on-policy, and provides better update direction thus improving token efficiency. The compositional nature of the framework extends beyond the trajectory-token case: fibrations compose algebraically into a Fibration Gating Hierarchy (FGH) that scales the same gating mechanism to arbitrary hierarchical depth without new primitives, as demonstrated by FiberPO-Domain, a four-level instantiation with independent trust-region budgets at the domain, prompt group, trajectory, and token levels. Together, these results connect the trust-region theory, a compositional algebraic structure, and practical multi-scale stability control into a unified framework for LLM policy optimization.

AI.tldr: 提出了FiberPO框架，通过代数纤维束结构实现多尺度信任域优化，解决LLM训练中跨层级稳定性控制问题
AI.motivation: 当前大语言模型训练采用异构系统（多领域、专家分区、智能体流程），但现有优化目标仅作用于单一尺度，缺乏耦合token级、轨迹级和更高层级稳定性控制的机制
AI.method: 1. 推导APC-Obj（聚合策略审查目标），将基于样本的TV-TRPO精确重构为无约束形式；2. 提出FBG（纤维束门控）代数框架，将RL数据组织为纤维束，将比率门控分解为轨迹聚合的基础级门控和token残差的纤维级门控；3. 基于此开发FiberPO（纤维策略优化），其雅可比矩阵在轨迹上块对角，在策略上简化为恒等矩阵；4. 通过FGH（纤维门控层次结构）将相同门控机制扩展到任意层次深度
AI.result: FiberPO提供更好的更新方向，提高token效率；FiberPO-Domain实现了四层级实例化（领域、提示组、轨迹、token级），具有独立的信任域预算；框架将信任域理论、代数结构和实际多尺度稳定性控制统一起来
AI.conclusion: 该工作建立了连接信任域理论、组合代数结构和实际多尺度稳定性控制的统一框架，为大语言模型策略优化提供了理论基础和实用工具

title: Med-Evo: Test-time Self-evolution for Medical Multimodal Large Language Models
summary: Medical Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities across diverse healthcare tasks. However, current post-training strategies, such as supervised fine-tuning and reinforcement learning, heavily depend on substantial annotated data while overlooking the potential of unlabeled test data for model enhancement. This limitation becomes particularly pronounced in medical domains, where acquiring extensive labeled medical data is difficult due to the strict data sensitivity and annotation complexity. Moreover, leveraging test data poses challenges in generating reliable supervision signals from unlabeled samples and maintaining stable self-evolution. To address these limitations, we propose Med-Evo, the first self-evolution framework for medical MLLMs that utilizes label-free reinforcement learning to promote model performance without requiring additional labeled data. Our framework introduces two key innovations: $1)$ Feature-driven Pseudo Labeling (FPL) that identifies semantic centroids from all heterogeneous candidate responses to select pseudo labels in each rollout, and $2)$ Hard-Soft Reward (HSR) that combines exact match with token-level assessment and semantic similarity to provide hierarchical reward. Experiments on three medical VQA benchmarks and two base MLLMs show clear advantages of our approach over SOTA methods, with significant improvements of 10.43\% accuracy and 4.68\% recall on the SLAKE dataset using Qwen2.5-VL, showing the effectiveness of our method.

AI.tldr: Med-Evo：首个医学多模态大语言模型自进化框架，通过无标签强化学习利用测试数据提升模型性能，无需额外标注数据。
AI.motivation: 当前医学MLLMs的后训练策略（如监督微调和强化学习）严重依赖大量标注数据，忽略了未标注测试数据的潜力。医学领域获取标注数据困难，且利用测试数据面临生成可靠监督信号和保持稳定自进化的挑战。
AI.method: 提出Med-Evo自进化框架，包含两个关键创新：1) 特征驱动伪标签(FPL)：从所有异构候选响应中识别语义中心点，在每个rollout中选择伪标签；2) 硬软奖励(HSR)：结合精确匹配、token级评估和语义相似度，提供分层奖励。
AI.result: 在三个医学VQA基准测试和两个基础MLLMs上，该方法相比SOTA方法有明显优势，使用Qwen2.5-VL在SLAKE数据集上准确率提升10.43%，召回率提升4.68%。
AI.conclusion: Med-Evo是首个医学MLLMs自进化框架，通过无标签强化学习有效利用测试数据提升模型性能，解决了医学领域标注数据稀缺的问题，在多个基准测试中表现出显著优势。

title: Learning Clinical Representations Under Systematic Distribution Shift
summary: Clinical machine learning models are increasingly trained using large scale, multimodal foundation paradigms, yet deployment environments often differ systematically from the data generating settings used during training. Such shifts arise from heterogeneous measurement policies, documentation practices, and institutional workflows, leading to representation entanglement between physiologic signal and practice specific artifacts. In this work, we propose a practice invariant representation learning framework for multimodal clinical prediction. We model clinical observations as arising from latent physiologic factors and environment dependent processes, and introduce an objective that jointly optimizes predictive performance while suppressing environment predictive information in the learned embedding. Concretely, we combine supervised risk minimization with adversarial environment regularization and invariant risk penalties across hospitals. Across multiple longitudinal EHR prediction tasks and cross institution evaluations, our method improves out of distribution AUROC by up to 2 to 3 points relative to masked pretraining and standard supervised baselines, while maintaining in distribution performance and improving calibration. These results demonstrate that explicitly accounting for systematic distribution shift during representation learning yields more robust and transferable clinical models, highlighting the importance of structural invariance alongside architectural scale in healthcare AI.

AI.tldr: 提出一种实践不变表示学习框架，用于多模态临床预测，通过抑制环境信息在嵌入中的预测能力，提高模型在不同医疗机构间的分布外泛化性能。
AI.motivation: 临床机器学习模型在训练和部署环境之间存在系统性分布偏移，这种偏移源于医疗机构间的测量策略、文档实践和工作流程的异质性，导致生理信号与机构特定伪影的表示纠缠。
