AI.tldr: CONSTANT是一种基于扩散模型的单样本手写体生成方法，通过风格感知量化、对比学习和潜在空间补丁对齐来提升生成质量
AI.motivation: 现有单样本手写体生成方法难以捕捉人类手写的复杂多样特征，难以生成视觉吸引人且真实的手写图像，无法适应复杂未见过的书写风格，难以分离不变风格特征（如倾斜度、笔画宽度、曲率）而忽略无关噪声
AI.method: 提出CONSTANT方法，包含三个关键创新：1) 风格感知量化模块将风格建模为捕捉不同概念的离散视觉标记；2) 对比目标确保这些标记在嵌入风格空间中良好分离且有意义；3) 潜在补丁对比目标通过在潜在空间中对齐生成和真实特征的多尺度空间补丁来提升质量和局部结构
AI.result: 在英语、中文和提出的越南语ViHTGen数据集上的广泛实验和分析表明，该方法在适应新参考风格和生成高度细节图像方面优于最先进方法
AI.conclusion: CONSTANT通过创新的风格建模和对比学习机制，有效解决了单样本手写体生成的挑战，能够生成高质量、真实的手写图像并适应复杂未见过的书写风格

title: Enhanced Random Subspace Local Projections for High-Dimensional Time Series Analysis
summary: High-dimensional time series forecasting suffers from severe overfitting when the number of predictors exceeds available observations, making standard local projection methods unstable and unreliable. We propose an enhanced Random Subspace Local Projection (RSLP) framework designed to deliver robust impulse response estimation in the presence of hundreds of correlated predictors. The method introduces weighted subspace aggregation, category-aware subspace sampling, adaptive subspace size selection, and a bootstrap inference procedure tailored to dependent data. These enhancements substantially improve estimator stability at longer forecast horizons while providing more reliable finite-sample inference. Experiments on synthetic data, macroeconomic indicators, and the FRED-MD dataset demonstrate a 33 percent reduction in estimator variability at horizons h >= 3 through adaptive subspace size selection. The bootstrap inference procedure produces conservative confidence intervals that are 14 percent narrower at policy-relevant horizons in very high-dimensional settings (FRED-MD with 126 predictors) while maintaining proper coverage. The framework provides practitioners with a principled approach for incorporating rich information sets into impulse response analysis without the instability of traditional high-dimensional methods.

AI.tldr: 提出增强型随机子空间局部投影(RSLP)框架，用于高维时间序列预测中的脉冲响应估计，通过加权子空间聚合、类别感知采样、自适应子空间大小选择和自助法推断，显著提升估计稳定性和推断可靠性。
AI.motivation: 当预测变量数量超过可用观测值时，高维时间序列预测存在严重过拟合问题，导致标准局部投影方法不稳定且不可靠。需要一种稳健的方法来处理数百个相关预测变量的情况。
AI.method: 增强型随机子空间局部投影(RSLP)框架，包含四个关键改进：1) 加权子空间聚合；2) 类别感知子空间采样；3) 自适应子空间大小选择；4) 针对依赖数据的自助法推断程序。
AI.result: 在合成数据、宏观经济指标和FRED-MD数据集上的实验表明：自适应子空间大小选择在h≥3的预测范围内将估计变异性降低33%；自助法推断程序在极高维设置(FRED-MD的126个预测变量)中，在政策相关范围内产生保守的置信区间，宽度减少14%同时保持适当的覆盖范围。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为从业者提供了一种原则性方法，可以将丰富的信息集纳入脉冲响应分析，而不会出现传统高维方法的不稳定性问题，显著改善了长预测范围内的估计稳定性和有限样本推断可靠性。

title: DreamSAC: Learning Hamiltonian World Models via Symmetry Exploration
summary: Learned world models excel at interpolative generalization but fail at extrapolative generalization to novel physical properties. This limitation arises because they learn statistical correlations rather than the environment's underlying generative rules, such as physical invariances and conservation laws. We argue that learning these invariances is key to robust extrapolation. To achieve this, we first introduce \textbf{Symmetry Exploration}, an unsupervised exploration strategy where an agent is intrinsically motivated by a Hamiltonian-based curiosity bonus to actively probe and challenge its understanding of conservation laws, thereby collecting physically informative data. Second, we design a Hamiltonian-based world model that learns from the collected data, using a novel self-supervised contrastive objective to identify the invariant physical state from raw, view-dependent pixel observations. Our framework, \textbf{DreamSAC}, trained on this actively curated data, significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in 3D physics simulations on tasks requiring extrapolation.

AI.tldr: DreamSAC框架通过对称性探索和哈密顿量世界模型，学习物理不变性以实现外推泛化，在3D物理模拟中超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有学习世界模型擅长内插泛化但缺乏外推泛化能力，因为它们学习统计相关性而非底层物理规则（如不变性和守恒定律）。学习这些不变性是实现鲁棒外推的关键。
AI.method: 1. 对称性探索：基于哈密顿量的好奇心奖励驱动智能体主动探索，挑战对守恒定律的理解，收集物理信息数据。2. 哈密顿量世界模型：使用自监督对比目标从原始像素观测中识别不变物理状态。
AI.result: DreamSAC框架在3D物理模拟的外推任务中显著优于最先进的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过学习物理不变性而非统计相关性，DreamSAC实现了更好的外推泛化能力，为鲁棒世界模型提供了新方向。

title: A Unified Framework for Knowledge Transfer in Bidirectional Model Scaling
summary: Transferring pre-trained knowledge from a source model to a target model of a different architectural size is a key challenge for flexible and efficient model scaling. However, current parameter-space methods treat Small-to-Large (S2L) and Large-to-Small (L2S) scaling as separate, incompatible problems, focusing on parameter synthesis and selection, respectively. This fragmented perspective has resulted in specialized tools, hindering a unified, bidirectional framework. In this paper, we propose BoT (Bidirectional knowledge Transfer), the first size-agnostic framework to unify S2L and L2S scaling. Our core insight is to treat model weights as continuous signals, where models of different sizes represent distinct discretizations of the transferable knowledge. This multi-resolution perspective directly casts S2L and L2S scaling as the signal processing operations of upsampling and downsampling, naturally leading to the adoption of the Discrete Wavelet Transform (DWT) and its Inverse (IDWT). BoT leverages the recursive nature of wavelets, using the decomposition level as a dynamic scaling factor to bridge disparate model sizes in a parameter-free and computationally efficient manner. Extensive experiments on DeiT, BERT, and GPT demonstrate significant pre-training FLOPs savings (up to 67.1% for S2L, 52.8% for L2S) and state-of-the-art performance on benchmarks like GLUE and SQuAD.

AI.tldr: BoT：首个尺寸无关的双向知识迁移框架，将不同尺寸模型间的知识迁移统一为信号处理中的上采样和下采样问题，使用离散小波变换实现参数自由的高效迁移。
AI.motivation: 当前参数空间方法将小型到大型（S2L）和大型到小型（L2S）的模型缩放视为两个独立且不兼容的问题，分别专注于参数合成和参数选择。这种碎片化的视角导致需要专门工具，阻碍了统一的双向框架发展。
AI.method: 将模型权重视为连续信号，不同尺寸的模型代表可迁移知识的不同离散化表示。基于多分辨率视角，将S2L和L2S缩放直接转化为信号处理中的上采样和下采样操作，采用离散小波变换（DWT）及其逆变换（IDWT）。利用小波的递归特性，将分解级别作为动态缩放因子，以参数自由且计算高效的方式桥接不同模型尺寸。
AI.result: 在DeiT、BERT和GPT上的大量实验表明，该方法显著节省预训练FLOPs（S2L最高节省67.1%，L2S最高节省52.8%），并在GLUE和SQuAD等基准测试中达到最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: BoT框架首次统一了不同尺寸模型间的双向知识迁移，通过信号处理视角和小波变换实现了参数自由、计算高效的知识传递，为灵活的模型缩放提供了统一解决方案。

title: ReconDrive: Fast Feed-Forward 4D Gaussian Splatting for Autonomous Driving Scene Reconstruction
summary: High-fidelity visual reconstruction and novel-view synthesis are essential for realistic closed-loop evaluation in autonomous driving. While 4D Gaussian Splatting (4DGS) offers a promising balance of accuracy and efficiency, existing per-scene optimization methods require costly iterative refinement, rendering them unscalable for extensive urban environments. Conversely, current feed-forward approaches often suffer from degraded photometric quality. To address these limitations, we propose ReconDrive, a feed-forward framework that leverages and extends the 3D foundation model VGGT for rapid, high-fidelity 4DGS generation. Our architecture introduces two core adaptations to tailor the foundation model to dynamic driving scenes: (1) Hybrid Gaussian Prediction Heads, which decouple the regression of spatial coordinates and appearance attributes to overcome the photometric deficiencies inherent in generalized foundation features; and (2) a Static-Dynamic 4D Composition strategy that explicitly captures temporal motion via velocity modeling to represent complex dynamic environments. Benchmarked on nuScenes, ReconDrive significantly outperforms existing feed-forward baselines in reconstruction, novel-view synthesis, and 3D perception. It achieves performance competitive with per-scene optimization while being orders of magnitude faster, providing a scalable and practical solution for realistic driving simulation.

AI.tldr: ReconDrive：基于3D基础模型VGGT的快速前馈框架，用于高保真4D高斯泼溅生成，解决自动驾驶场景重建和视图合成的可扩展性问题。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶闭环评估需要高保真视觉重建和新视角合成。现有4DGS方法存在两个问题：逐场景优化方法计算成本高、不可扩展；前馈方法则存在光度质量下降的问题。需要一种既高效又高质量的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出ReconDrive框架，基于3D基础模型VGGT进行扩展。核心创新包括：1）混合高斯预测头，解耦空间坐标和外观属性的回归，解决基础模型特征的光度缺陷；2）静态-动态4D组合策略，通过速度建模显式捕捉时间运动，表示复杂动态环境。
AI.result: 在nuScenes基准测试中，ReconDrive在重建、新视角合成和3D感知方面显著优于现有前馈基线方法。性能与逐场景优化方法相当，但速度快几个数量级。
AI.conclusion: ReconDrive为自动驾驶仿真提供了可扩展且实用的解决方案，实现了高质量重建与高效率的平衡，有望推动自动驾驶闭环评估的发展。

title: Online Continual Learning for Anomaly Detection in IoT under Data Distribution Shifts
comment: Manuscript submitted to EUSIPCO 2026. The copyright might be transferred without further notice
summary: In this work, we present OCLADS, a novel communication framework with continual learning (CL) for Internet of Things (IoT) anomaly detection (AD) when operating in non-stationary environments. As the statistical properties of the observed data change with time, the on-device inference model becomes obsolete, which necessitates strategic model updating. OCLADS keeps track of data distribution shifts to timely update the on-device IoT AD model. To do so, OCLADS introduces two mechanisms during the interaction between the resource-constrained IoT device and an edge server (ES): i) an intelligent sample selection mechanism at the device for data transmission, and ii) a distribution-shift detection mechanism at the ES for model updating. Experimental results with TinyML demonstrate that our proposed framework achieves high inference accuracy while realizing a significantly smaller number of model updates compared to the baseline schemes.

AI.tldr: OCLADS是一个用于非平稳环境下物联网异常检测的持续学习通信框架，通过智能样本选择和分布漂移检测机制，在保持高推理精度的同时显著减少模型更新次数。
AI.motivation: 物联网设备在非平稳环境中运行时，数据统计特性随时间变化，导致设备上的推理模型变得过时，需要有效的模型更新策略。
AI.method: 提出OCLADS框架，包含两个核心机制：1) 设备端的智能样本选择机制用于数据传输；2) 边缘服务器的分布漂移检测机制用于模型更新。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，OCLADS在TinyML环境下实现了高推理精度，同时相比基线方案显著减少了模型更新次数。
AI.conclusion: OCLADS为资源受限的物联网设备在非平稳环境中的异常检测提供了一种高效的持续学习通信框架，平衡了模型准确性和更新开销。

title: Active Inference for Micro-Gesture Recognition: EFE-Guided Temporal Sampling and Adaptive Learning
summary: Micro-gestures are subtle and transient movements triggered by unconscious neural and emotional activities, holding great potential for human-computer interaction and clinical monitoring. However, their low amplitude, short duration, and strong inter-subject variability make existing deep models prone to degradation under low-sample, noisy, and cross-subject conditions. This paper presents an active inference-based framework for micro-gesture recognition, featuring Expected Free Energy (EFE)-guided temporal sampling and uncertainty-aware adaptive learning. The model actively selects the most discriminative temporal segments under EFE guidance, enabling dynamic observation and information gain maximization. Meanwhile, sample weighting driven by predictive uncertainty mitigates the effects of label noise and distribution shift. Experiments on the SMG dataset demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method, achieving consistent improvements across multiple mainstream backbones. Ablation studies confirm that both the EFE-guided observation and the adaptive learning mechanism are crucial to the performance gains. This work offers an interpretable and scalable paradigm for temporal behavior modeling under low-resource and noisy conditions, with broad applicability to wearable sensing, HCI, and clinical emotion monitoring.

AI.tldr: 提出基于主动推理的微手势识别框架，通过期望自由能引导的时间采样和不确定性感知自适应学习，解决低样本、噪声和跨主体条件下的识别挑战。
AI.motivation: 微手势具有幅度小、持续时间短、主体间差异大的特点，现有深度模型在低样本、噪声和跨主体条件下性能容易下降，需要更鲁棒的识别方法。
AI.method: 采用主动推理框架，包含EFE引导的时间采样（动态选择最具区分性的时间片段）和不确定性感知自适应学习（通过预测不确定性进行样本加权）。
AI.result: 在SMG数据集上验证了方法的有效性，在多个主流骨干网络上取得一致改进，消融研究确认EFE引导观察和自适应学习机制都对性能提升至关重要。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为低资源和噪声条件下的时序行为建模提供了可解释且可扩展的范式，适用于可穿戴传感、人机交互和临床情绪监测等广泛领域。

title: A Unified View of Drifting and Score-Based Models
summary: Drifting models train one-step generators by optimizing a mean-shift discrepancy induced by a kernel between the data and model distributions, with Laplace kernels used by default in practice. At each point, this discrepancy compares the kernel-weighted displacement toward nearby data samples with the corresponding displacement toward nearby model samples, yielding a transport direction for generated samples. In this paper, we make its relationship to the score-matching principle behind diffusion models precise by showing that drifting admits a score-based formulation on kernel-smoothed distributions. For Gaussian kernels, the population mean-shift field coincides with the score difference between the Gaussian-smoothed data and model distributions. This identity follows from Tweedie's formula, which links the score of a Gaussian-smoothed density to the corresponding conditional mean, and implies that Gaussian-kernel drifting is exactly a score-matching-style objective on smoothed distributions. It also clarifies the connection to Distribution Matching Distillation (DMD): both methods use score-mismatch transport directions, but drifting realizes the score signal nonparametrically from kernel neighborhoods, whereas DMD uses a pretrained diffusion teacher. Beyond Gaussians, we derive an exact decomposition for general radial kernels, and for the Laplace kernel we prove rigorous error bounds showing that drifting remains an accurate proxy for score matching in low-temperature and high-dimensional regimes.

AI.tldr: 漂移模型通过优化数据分布与模型分布之间的核诱导均值漂移差异来训练一步生成器，本文揭示了其与扩散模型中得分匹配原理的精确关系。
AI.motivation: 漂移模型在实践中默认使用拉普拉斯核，但其与扩散模型中得分匹配原理的理论关系尚不明确。本文旨在阐明漂移模型与得分匹配之间的精确联系，并解释其与分布匹配蒸馏(DMD)方法的异同。
AI.method: 通过Tweedie公式建立高斯核漂移与高斯平滑分布上得分匹配的等价性；对于一般径向核推导精确分解；对拉普拉斯核证明在低温和高维机制下的严格误差界。
AI.result: 证明高斯核漂移的总体均值漂移场等于高斯平滑数据分布与模型分布的得分差异；揭示漂移与DMD都使用得分不匹配传输方向，但实现方式不同；对拉普拉斯核证明漂移在低温和高维机制下仍是得分匹配的准确代理。
AI.conclusion: 漂移模型本质上是在核平滑分布上实现的得分匹配方法，为理解漂移模型的理论基础提供了清晰框架，并阐明了其与扩散模型和DMD方法的理论联系。

title: PureCC: Pure Learning for Text-to-Image Concept Customization
summary: Existing concept customization methods have achieved remarkable outcomes in high-fidelity and multi-concept customization. However, they often neglect the influence on the original model's behavior and capabilities when learning new personalized concepts. To address this issue, we propose PureCC. PureCC introduces a novel decoupled learning objective for concept customization, which combines the implicit guidance of the target concept with the original conditional prediction. This separated form enables PureCC to substantially focus on the original model during training. Moreover, based on this objective, PureCC designs a dual-branch training pipeline that includes a frozen extractor providing purified target concept representations as implicit guidance and a trainable flow model producing the original conditional prediction, jointly achieving pure learning for personalized concepts. Furthermore, PureCC introduces a novel adaptive guidance scale $λ^\star$ to dynamically adjust the guidance strength of the target concept, balancing customization fidelity and model preservation. Extensive experiments show that PureCC achieves state-of-the-art performance in preserving the original behavior and capabilities while enabling high-fidelity concept customization. The code is available at https://github.com/lzc-sg/PureCC.

AI.tldr: PureCC提出一种解耦学习目标，通过双分支训练流程实现个性化概念定制，同时保持原始模型行为不变
AI.motivation: 现有概念定制方法在实现高保真和多概念定制方面取得显著成果，但往往忽略了学习新个性化概念时对原始模型行为和能力的影响
AI.method: 提出解耦学习目标，结合目标概念的隐式指导和原始条件预测；设计双分支训练流程，包括提供净化目标概念表示的冻结提取器和生成原始条件预测的可训练流模型；引入自适应指导尺度λ*动态调整目标概念的指导强度
AI.result: 大量实验表明，PureCC在保持原始行为和能力的同时实现高保真概念定制方面达到最先进性能
AI.conclusion: PureCC通过解耦学习目标和双分支训练流程，有效解决了概念定制中模型行为保持的问题，实现了纯净的个性化概念学习

title: Reinforcement learning-based dynamic cleaning scheduling framework for solar energy system
comment: 16 pages, 6 figures, This is an accepted manuscript of the article published in Journal of Korean Institute of Intelligent Systems, 35(1), 84-97, 2025
summary: Advancing autonomous green technologies in solar photovoltaic (PV) systems is key to improving sustainability and efficiency in renewable energy production. This study presents a reinforcement learning (RL)-based framework to autonomously optimize the cleaning schedules of PV panels in arid regions, where soiling from dust and other airborne particles significantly reduces energy output. By employing advanced RL algorithms, Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) and Soft Actor-Critic (SAC), the framework dynamically adjusts cleaning intervals based on uncertain environmental conditions. The proposed approach was applied to a case study in Abu Dhabi, UAE, demonstrating that PPO outperformed SAC and traditional simulation optimization (Sim-Opt) methods, achieving up to 13% cost savings by dynamically responding to weather uncertainties. The results highlight the superiority of flexible, autonomous scheduling over fixed-interval methods, particularly in adapting to stochastic environmental dynamics. This aligns with the goals of autonomous green energy production by reducing operational costs and improving the efficiency of solar power generation systems. This work underscores the potential of RL-driven autonomous decision-making to optimize maintenance operations in renewable energy systems. In future research, it is important to enhance the generalization ability of the proposed RL model, while also considering additional factors and constraints to apply it to different regions.

AI.tldr: 使用强化学习（PPO和SAC算法）优化沙漠地区光伏面板清洁计划，相比传统方法节省13%成本
AI.motivation: 沙漠地区光伏面板积尘严重影响发电效率，传统固定清洁计划无法适应不确定环境条件，需要自主优化清洁调度以提升可再生能源系统可持续性和效率
AI.method: 提出强化学习框架，采用PPO和SAC算法，根据不确定环境条件动态调整清洁间隔，在阿联酋阿布扎比进行案例研究
AI.result: PPO算法优于SAC和传统模拟优化方法，通过动态响应天气不确定性实现高达13%的成本节省，灵活自主调度优于固定间隔方法
AI.conclusion: 强化学习驱动的自主决策能优化可再生能源系统维护操作，未来需增强模型泛化能力并考虑更多因素以应用于不同地区

title: Brain-WM: Brain Glioblastoma World Model
summary: Precise prognostic modeling of glioblastoma (GBM) under varying treatment interventions is essential for optimizing clinical outcomes. While generative AI has shown promise in simulating GBM evolution, existing methods typically treat interventions as static conditional inputs rather than dynamic decision variables. Consequently, they fail to capture the complex, reciprocal interplay between tumor evolution and treatment response. To bridge this gap, we present Brain-WM, a pioneering brain GBM world model that unifies next-step treatment prediction and future MRI generation, thereby capturing the co-evolutionary dynamics between tumor and treatment. Specifically, Brain-WM encodes spatiotemporal dynamics into a shared latent space for joint autoregressive treatment prediction and flow-based future MRI generation. Then, instead of a conventional monolithic framework, Brain-WM adopts a novel Y-shaped Mixture-of-Transformers (MoT) architecture. This design structurally disentangles heterogeneous objectives, successfully leveraging cross-task synergies while preventing feature collapse. Finally, a synergistic multi-timepoint mask alignment objective explicitly anchors latent representations to anatomically grounded tumor structures and progression-aware semantics. Extensive validation on internal and external multi-institutional cohorts demonstrates the superiority of Brain-WM, achieving 91.5% accuracy in treatment planning and SSIMs of 0.8524, 0.8581, and 0.8404 for FLAIR, T1CE, and T2W sequences, respectively. Ultimately, Brain-WM offers a robust clinical sandbox for optimizing patient healthcare. The source code is made available at https://github.com/thibault-wch/Brain-GBM-world-model.

AI.tldr: Brain-WM是一个创新的脑胶质母细胞瘤世界模型，通过Y形混合Transformer架构统一治疗预测和未来MRI生成，捕捉肿瘤与治疗的协同演化动态。
AI.motivation: 现有生成式AI方法通常将治疗干预视为静态条件输入而非动态决策变量，无法捕捉肿瘤演化与治疗响应之间复杂的相互作用，限制了胶质母细胞瘤预后建模的精确性。
AI.method: 1) 将时空动态编码到共享潜在空间，用于联合自回归治疗预测和基于流的未来MRI生成；2) 采用新颖的Y形混合Transformer架构，结构化解耦异构目标；3) 引入协同多时间点掩码对齐目标，将潜在表示锚定到解剖学基础的肿瘤结构和进展感知语义。
AI.result: 在内部和外部多机构队列验证中，Brain-WM在治疗规划方面达到91.5%准确率，FLAIR、T1CE和T2W序列的SSIM分别为0.8524、0.8581和0.8404，表现出优越性能。
AI.conclusion: Brain-WM提供了一个强大的临床沙箱，用于优化患者医疗保健，通过统一治疗预测和MRI生成，成功捕捉了肿瘤与治疗之间的协同演化动态。

title: One-for-All Model Initialization with Frequency-Domain Knowledge
summary: Transferring knowledge by fine-tuning large-scale pre-trained networks has become a standard paradigm for downstream tasks, yet the knowledge of a pre-trained model is tightly coupled with monolithic architecture, which restricts flexible reuse across models of varying scales. In response to this challenge, recent approaches typically resort to either parameter selection, which fails to capture the interdependent structure of this knowledge, or parameter prediction using generative models that depend on impractical access to large network collections. In this paper, we empirically demonstrate that a model's foundational, task-agnostic knowledge, its "learngene", is encoded within the low-frequency components of its weights, and can be efficiently inherited by downstream models. Based on this insight, we propose FRONT (FRequency dOmain kNowledge Transfer), a novel framework that uses the Discrete Cosine Transform (DCT) to isolate the low-frequency "learngene". This learngene can be seamlessly adapted to initialize models of arbitrary size via simple truncation or padding, a process that is entirely training-free. For enhanced performance, we propose an optional low-cost refinement process that introduces a spectral regularizer to further improve the learngene's transferability. Extensive experiments demonstrate that FRONT achieves the state-of-the-art performance, accelerates convergence by up to 15 times in vision tasks, and reduces training FLOPs by an average of 40.5% in language tasks.

AI.tldr: FRONT框架通过离散余弦变换从预训练模型中提取低频"learngene"知识，无需训练即可适配不同规模的下游模型，显著提升性能并减少计算成本。
AI.motivation: 现有知识迁移方法存在局限性：参数选择无法捕捉知识间的相互依赖结构，而参数预测方法需要访问大量网络集合，不切实际。预训练模型的知识与单一架构紧密耦合，难以灵活重用。
AI.method: 使用离散余弦变换(DCT)从预训练模型权重中提取低频"learngene"成分，通过简单的截断或填充操作即可适配任意规模的下游模型。还提出可选的低成本精炼过程，引入谱正则化器进一步提升可迁移性。
AI.result: FRONT实现了最先进的性能，在视觉任务中加速收敛达15倍，在语言任务中平均减少40.5%的训练FLOPs。实验证明模型的基础任务无关知识确实编码在权重的低频分量中。
AI.conclusion: 通过频率域分析提取的"learngene"能够有效实现跨模型规模的知识迁移，提供了一种高效、灵活且无需训练的模型初始化方法，为知识重用开辟了新途径。

title: SiamGM: Siamese Geometry-Aware and Motion-Guided Network for Real-Time Satellite Video Object Tracking
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
summary: Single object tracking in satellite videos is inherently challenged by small target, blurred background, large aspect ratio changes, and frequent visual occlusions. These constraints often cause appearance-based trackers to accumulate errors and lose targets irreversibly. To systematically mitigate both spatial ambiguities and temporal information loss, we propose SiamGM, a novel geometry-aware and motion-guided Siamese network. From a spatial perspective, we introduce an Inter-Frame Graph Attention (IFGA) module, closely integrated with an Aspect Ratio-Constrained Label Assignment (LA) method, establishing fine-grained topological correspondences and explicitly preventing surrounding background noise. From a temporal perspective, we introduce the Motion Vector-Guided Online Tracking Optimization method. By adopting the Normalized Peak-to-Sidelobe Ratio (nPSR) as a dynamic confidence indicator, we propose an Online Motion Model Refinement (OMMR) strategy to utilize historical trajectory information. Evaluations on two challenging SatSOT and SV248S benchmarks confirm that SiamGM outperforms most state-of-the-art trackers in both precision and success metrics. Notably, the proposed components of SiamGM introduce virtually no computational overhead, enabling real-time tracking at 130 frames per second (FPS). Codes and tracking results are available at https://github.com/wenzx18/SiamGM.

AI.tldr: SiamGM：一种用于卫星视频单目标跟踪的几何感知和运动引导的孪生网络，通过帧间图注意力和运动矢量引导的在线跟踪优化，在保持实时性能的同时显著提升跟踪精度。
AI.motivation: 卫星视频中的单目标跟踪面临小目标、背景模糊、长宽比变化大和频繁遮挡等挑战，导致基于外观的跟踪器容易积累误差并永久丢失目标。
AI.method: 提出SiamGM网络，包含空间和时间两个视角：空间上使用帧间图注意力模块结合长宽比约束的标签分配方法；时间上采用运动矢量引导的在线跟踪优化，使用nPSR作为动态置信度指标，并提出在线运动模型优化策略。
AI.result: 在SatSOT和SV248S两个挑战性基准测试中，SiamGM在精度和成功率指标上优于大多数最先进的跟踪器，同时保持实时性能（130 FPS）。
AI.conclusion: SiamGM通过几何感知和运动引导的方法有效解决了卫星视频跟踪中的空间模糊性和时间信息丢失问题，提出的组件几乎不增加计算开销，实现了高效准确的实时跟踪。

title: Neural Dynamics-Informed Pre-trained Framework for Personalized Brain Functional Network Construction
summary: Brain activity is intrinsically a neural dynamic process constrained by anatomical space. This leads to significant variations in spatial distribution patterns and correlation patterns of neural activity across variable and heterogeneous scenarios. However, dominant brain functional network construction methods, which relies on pre-defined brain atlases and linear assumptions, fails to precisely capture varying neural activity patterns in heterogeneous scenarios. This limits the consistency and generalizability of the brain functional networks constructed by dominant methods. Here, a neural dynamics-informed pre-trained framework is proposed for personalized brain functional network construction. The proposed framework extracts personalized representations of neural activity patterns in heterogeneous scenarios. Personalized brain functional networks are obtained by utilizing these representations to guide brain parcellation and neural activity correlation estimation. Systematic evaluations were employed on 18 datasets across tasks, such as virtual neural modulation and abnormal neural circuit identification. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed framework attains superior performance in heterogeneous scenarios. Overall, the proposed framework challenges the dominant brain functional network construction method.

AI.tldr: 提出神经动力学预训练框架，用于个性化脑功能网络构建，在异构场景中优于传统方法
AI.motivation: 传统脑功能网络构建方法依赖预定义脑图谱和线性假设，无法精确捕捉异构场景中变化的神经活动模式，限制了网络的一致性和泛化性
AI.method: 提出神经动力学预训练框架，提取异构场景中神经活动模式的个性化表示，利用这些表示指导脑区划分和神经活动相关性估计
AI.result: 在18个数据集上的系统评估显示，该框架在虚拟神经调控和异常神经回路识别等任务中，在异构场景中取得优越性能
AI.conclusion: 该框架挑战了主流的脑功能网络构建方法，能够更好地处理异构场景中的神经活动变化

title: GRD-Net: Generative-Reconstructive-Discriminative Anomaly Detection with Region of Interest Attention Module
comment: Peer-reviewed journal version published. 18 pages, 12 figures, 7 tables
summary:
Anomaly detection is nowadays increasingly used in industrial applications and processes. One of the main fields of the appliance is the visual inspection for surface anomaly detection, which aims to spot regions that deviate from regularity and consequently identify abnormal products.
  Defect localization is a key task, that usually is achieved using a basic comparison between generated image and the original one, implementing some blob-analysis or image-editing algorithms, in the post-processing step, which is very biased towards the source dataset, and they are unable to generalize. Furthermore, in industrial applications, the totality of the image is not always interesting but could be one or some regions of interest (ROIs), where only in those areas there are relevant anomalies to be spotted.
  For these reasons, we propose a new architecture composed by two blocks.
  The first block is a Generative Adversarial Network (GAN), based on a residual autoencoder (ResAE), to perform reconstruction and denoising processes, while the second block produces image segmentation, spotting defects. This method learns from a dataset composed of good products and generated synthetic defects.
  The discriminative network is trained using a ROI for each image contained in the training dataset. The network will learn in which area anomalies are relevant. This approach guarantees the reduction of using pre-processing algorithms, formerly developed with blob-analysis and image-editing procedures.
  To test our model we used challenging MVTec anomaly detection datasets and an industrial large dataset of pharmaceutical BFS strips of vials. This set constitutes a more realistic use case of the aforementioned network.

AI.tldr: 提出一种用于工业表面缺陷检测的双模块架构，结合GAN重建和图像分割，通过ROI训练减少对预处理算法的依赖
AI.motivation: 传统缺陷定位方法依赖后处理算法（如斑点分析、图像编辑），这些方法对源数据集有偏见且泛化能力差。工业应用中通常只有特定感兴趣区域（ROI）需要检测，而非整个图像。
AI.method: 提出双模块架构：1）基于残差自编码器（ResAE）的生成对抗网络（GAN），用于图像重建和去噪；2）图像分割模块，用于缺陷定位。使用正常产品和合成缺陷数据集训练，并通过ROI训练判别网络来学习相关异常区域。
AI.result: 在具有挑战性的MVTec异常检测数据集和制药BFS小瓶带的工业大型数据集上进行测试，后者提供了更现实的使用案例验证。
AI.conclusion: 该方法减少了传统预处理算法的使用，提高了缺陷检测的准确性和泛化能力，特别适用于工业应用中特定ROI区域的异常检测。

title: Generative prediction of laser-induced rocket ignition with dynamic latent space representations
summary: Accurate and predictive scale-resolving simulations of laser-ignited rocket engines are highly time-consuming because the problem includes turbulent fuel-oxidizer mixing dynamics, laser-induced energy deposition, and high-speed flame growth. This is conflated with the large design space primarily corresponding to the laser operating conditions and target location. To enable rapid exploration and uncertainty quantification, we propose a data-driven surrogate modeling approach that combines convolutional autoencoders (cAEs) with neural ordinary differential equations (neural ODEs). The present target application of an ML-based surrogate model to leading-edge multi-physics turbulence simulation is part of a paradigm shift in the deployment of surrogate models towards increasing real-world complexity. Sequentially, the cAE spatially compresses high-dimensional flow fields into a low-dimensional latent space, wherein the system's temporal dynamics are learned via neural ODEs. Once trained, the model generates fast spatiotemporal predictions from initial conditions and specified operating inputs. By learning a surrogate to replace the entirety of the time-evolving simulation, the cost of predicting an ignition trial is reduced by several orders of magnitude, allowing efficient exploration of the input parameter space. Further, as the current framework yields a spatiotemporal field prediction, appraisal of the model output's physical grounding is more tractable. This approach marks a significant step toward real-time digital twins for laser-ignited rocket combustors and represents surrogate modeling in a complex system context.

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合卷积自编码器和神经ODE的数据驱动代理模型，用于快速预测激光点火火箭发动机的多物理场湍流模拟，将预测成本降低数个数量级。
AI.motivation: 激光点火火箭发动机的精确模拟计算成本极高，涉及湍流混合、激光能量沉积和高速火焰生长等多物理场问题，加上激光操作条件和目标位置的大设计空间，需要快速探索和不确定性量化方法。
AI.method: 采用卷积自编码器(cAE)压缩高维流场到低维潜空间，然后用神经ODE学习系统的时间动态，训练后模型能从初始条件和操作输入快速生成时空预测。
AI.result: 该方法将点火试验的预测成本降低数个数量级，实现输入参数空间的高效探索，同时提供时空场预测，使模型输出的物理基础评估更加可行。
AI.conclusion: 该方法标志着向激光点火火箭燃烧室实时数字孪生迈出重要一步，代表了复杂系统背景下的代理建模进展。

title: Efficient RGB-D Scene Understanding via Multi-task Adaptive Learning and Cross-dimensional Feature Guidance
summary: Scene understanding plays a critical role in enabling intelligence and autonomy in robotic systems. Traditional approaches often face challenges, including occlusions, ambiguous boundaries, and the inability to adapt attention based on task-specific requirements and sample variations. To address these limitations, this paper presents an efficient RGB-D scene understanding model that performs a range of tasks, including semantic segmentation, instance segmentation, orientation estimation, panoptic segmentation, and scene classification. The proposed model incorporates an enhanced fusion encoder, which effectively leverages redundant information from both RGB and depth inputs. For semantic segmentation, we introduce normalized focus channel layers and a context feature interaction layer, designed to mitigate issues such as shallow feature misguidance and insufficient local-global feature representation. The instance segmentation task benefits from a non-bottleneck 1D structure, which achieves superior contour representation with fewer parameters. Additionally, we propose a multi-task adaptive loss function that dynamically adjusts the learning strategy for different tasks based on scene variations. Extensive experiments on the NYUv2, SUN RGB-D, and Cityscapes datasets demonstrate that our approach outperforms existing methods in both segmentation accuracy and processing speed.

AI.tldr: 提出一个高效的RGB-D场景理解模型，通过增强融合编码器、标准化聚焦通道层、非瓶颈1D结构等创新，在多个任务上实现优越性能
AI.motivation: 传统场景理解方法面临遮挡、模糊边界、无法根据任务需求和样本变化自适应调整注意力等问题，需要更高效的多任务解决方案
AI.method: 1) 增强融合编码器有效利用RGB和深度冗余信息；2) 语义分割引入标准化聚焦通道层和上下文特征交互层；3) 实例分割采用非瓶颈1D结构；4) 多任务自适应损失函数动态调整学习策略
AI.result: 在NYUv2、SUN RGB-D和Cityscapes数据集上，该方法在分割精度和处理速度方面均优于现有方法
AI.conclusion: 提出的RGB-D场景理解模型通过创新的架构设计和自适应学习机制，有效解决了传统方法的局限性，实现了高效的多任务场景理解

title: Obliviator Reveals the Cost of Nonlinear Guardedness in Concept Erasure
comment: Accepted to NeurIPS 2025 [Poster]. Code available at: https://github.com/ramin-akbari/Obliviator
summary: Concept erasure aims to remove unwanted attributes, such as social or demographic factors, from learned representations, while preserving their task-relevant utility. While the goal of concept erasure is protection against all adversaries, existing methods remain vulnerable to nonlinear ones. This vulnerability arises from their failure to fully capture the complex, nonlinear statistical dependencies between learned representations and unwanted attributes. Moreover, although the existence of a trade-off between utility and erasure is expected, its progression during the erasure process, i.e., the cost of erasure, remains unstudied. In this work, we introduce Obliviator, a post-hoc erasure method designed to fully capture nonlinear statistical dependencies. We formulate erasure from a functional perspective, leading to an optimization problem involving a composition of kernels that lacks a closed-form solution. Instead of solving this problem in a single shot, we adopt an iterative approach that gradually morphs the feature space to achieve a more utility-preserving erasure. Unlike prior methods, Obliviator guards unwanted attribute against nonlinear adversaries. Our gradual approach quantifies the cost of nonlinear guardedness and reveals the dynamics between attribute protection and utility-preservation over the course of erasure. The utility-erasure trade-off curves obtained by Obliviator outperform the baselines and demonstrate its strong generalizability: its erasure becomes more utility-preserving when applied to the better-disentangled representations learned by more capable models.

AI.tldr: Obliviator是一种后处理概念擦除方法，通过迭代核函数组合优化，完全捕获非线性统计依赖，保护表示免受非线性对手攻击，并量化擦除成本与效用保持的权衡动态。
AI.motivation: 现有概念擦除方法无法完全捕获学习表示与不需要属性之间的复杂非线性统计依赖，因此仍然容易受到非线性对手攻击。此外，虽然预期存在效用与擦除之间的权衡，但擦除过程中的成本动态尚未被研究。
AI.method: 提出Obliviator后处理擦除方法：从函数视角制定擦除问题，形成涉及核函数组合的优化问题；采用迭代方法逐步变换特征空间，而非一次性求解；使用核函数完全捕获非线性依赖。
AI.result: Obliviator能够保护不需要属性免受非线性对手攻击；其渐进方法量化了非线性保护的成本，揭示了擦除过程中属性保护与效用保持的动态关系；效用-擦除权衡曲线优于基线，且当应用于更强大模型学习到的更好解耦表示时，擦除过程更加效用保持。
AI.conclusion: Obliviator通过完全捕获非线性统计依赖，实现了对非线性对手的鲁棒保护，同时其渐进方法为理解擦除成本与效用保持的权衡提供了量化框架，展示了在更好解耦表示上的强泛化能力。

title: A Systematic Comparison of Training Objectives for Out-of-Distribution Detection in Image Classification
summary: Out-of-distribution (OOD) detection is critical in safety-sensitive applications. While this challenge has been addressed from various perspectives, the influence of training objectives on OOD behavior remains comparatively underexplored. In this paper, we present a systematic comparison of four widely used training objectives: Cross-Entropy Loss, Prototype Loss, Triplet Loss, and Average Precision (AP) Loss, spanning probabilistic, prototype-based, metric-learning, and ranking-based supervision, for OOD detection in image classification under standardized OpenOOD protocols. Across CIFAR-10/100 and ImageNet-200, we find that Cross-Entropy Loss, Prototype Loss, and AP Loss achieve comparable in-distribution accuracy, while Cross-Entropy Loss provides the most consistent near- and far-OOD performance overall; the other objectives can be competitive in specific settings.

AI.tldr: 系统比较四种训练目标（交叉熵损失、原型损失、三元组损失、平均精度损失）在图像分类OOD检测中的表现，发现交叉熵损失在标准化OpenOOD协议下提供最一致的OOD性能。
AI.motivation: 在安全关键应用中，OOD检测至关重要。虽然已从多个角度研究此问题，但训练目标对OOD行为的影响相对未被充分探索。本文旨在系统比较四种广泛使用的训练目标在OOD检测中的表现。
AI.method: 在标准化OpenOOD协议下，系统比较四种训练目标：交叉熵损失（概率监督）、原型损失（原型监督）、三元组损失（度量学习监督）和平均精度损失（排序监督），用于图像分类的OOD检测。实验在CIFAR-10/100和ImageNet-200数据集上进行。
AI.result: 交叉熵损失、原型损失和AP损失在分布内准确率上表现相当，但交叉熵损失在近OOD和远OOD检测中提供最一致的性能。其他目标在特定设置下可以具有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 交叉熵损失在OOD检测中表现出最稳定和一致的性能，尽管其他训练目标在某些特定场景下也有竞争力。这为选择OOD检测的训练目标提供了实证依据。

title: ECG Classification on PTB-XL: A Data-Centric Approach with Simplified CNN-VAE
summary:
Automated electrocardiogram (ECG) classification is essential for early detection of cardiovascular diseases. While recent approaches have increasingly relied on deep neural networks with complex architectures, we demonstrate that careful data preprocessing, class balancing, and a simplified convolutional neural network combined with a variational autoencoder (CNN-VAE) architecture can achieve competitive performance with significantly reduced model complexity. Using the publicly available PTB XL dataset, we achieve 87.01% binary accuracy and 0.7454 weighted F1-score across five diagnostic classes (CD, HYP, MI, NORM, STTC) with only 197,093 trainable parameters. Our work emphasises the importance of data-centric machine learning practices over architectural complexity, demonstrating that systematic preprocessing and balanced training strategies are critical for medical signal classification. We identify challenges in minority class detection (particularly hypertrophy) and provide insights for future improvements in handling imbalanced ECG datasets.
  Index Terms: ECG classification, convolutional neural networks, class balancing, data preprocessing, variational autoencoders, PTB-XL dataset

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合数据预处理、类别平衡和简化CNN-VAE架构的ECG分类方法，在PTB XL数据集上取得了87.01%的二元准确率和0.7454加权F1分数，参数量仅19.7万，强调了数据为中心的机器学习实践比架构复杂性更重要。
AI.motivation: 当前ECG分类方法过度依赖复杂深度神经网络架构，但本文认为通过系统的数据预处理、类别平衡和简化架构，可以在显著降低模型复杂度的同时获得有竞争力的性能，强调数据为中心的机器学习实践的重要性。
AI.method: 采用数据预处理、类别平衡策略，结合简化的卷积神经网络与变分自编码器（CNN-VAE）架构，参数量仅197,093个，在PTB XL数据集上进行五类诊断分类（CD, HYP, MI, NORM, STTC）。
AI.result: 在PTB XL数据集上获得87.01%的二元准确率和0.7454加权F1分数，参数量仅197,093个，性能与复杂架构相当但模型复杂度显著降低，发现少数类别（特别是肥大症）检测存在挑战。
AI.conclusion: 数据为中心的机器学习实践（系统预处理和平衡训练策略）对医学信号分类至关重要，比架构复杂性更重要；为处理不平衡ECG数据集提供了改进方向，特别是在少数类别检测方面。

title: Integration of deep generative Anomaly Detection algorithm in high-speed industrial line
comment: Preprint under review at a Springer Nature journal. 36 pages, 3 tables, 29 figures. Updated and expanded version of the SSRN preprint (abstract_id=4858664), with substantial revisions and Springer Nature formatting
summary: Industrial visual inspection in pharmaceutical production requires high accuracy under strict constraints on cycle time, hardware footprint, and operational cost. Manual inline inspection is still common, but it is affected by operator variability and limited throughput. Classical rule-based computer vision pipelines are often rigid and difficult to scale to highly variable production scenarios. To address these limitations, we present a semi-supervised anomaly detection framework based on a generative adversarial architecture with a residual autoencoder and a dense bottleneck, specifically designed for online deployment on a high-speed Blow-Fill-Seal (BFS) line. The model is trained only on nominal samples and detects anomalies through reconstruction residuals, providing both classification and spatial localization via heatmaps. The training set contains 2,815,200 grayscale patches. Experiments on a real industrial test kit show high detection performance while satisfying timing constraints compatible with a 500 ms acquisition slot.

AI.tldr: 提出基于生成对抗网络和残差自编码器的半监督异常检测框架，用于制药生产中的高速BFS产线在线检测，仅需正常样本训练，满足500ms时间约束。
AI.motivation: 制药工业生产中的视觉检测需要高精度，同时受限于周期时间、硬件尺寸和运营成本。人工检测存在操作员差异性和吞吐量限制，传统基于规则的计算机视觉方法僵化且难以适应高度变化的生产场景。
AI.method: 采用基于生成对抗网络的半监督异常检测框架，包含残差自编码器和密集瓶颈结构。模型仅使用正常样本训练，通过重建残差检测异常，提供分类和热图空间定位。训练集包含2,815,200个灰度图像块。
AI.result: 在真实工业测试套件上的实验显示高检测性能，同时满足与500ms采集时间槽兼容的时间约束。
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架能够有效解决制药生产中视觉检测的挑战，在满足严格时间约束的同时实现高精度异常检测，适用于高速BFS产线的在线部署。

title: Constraints Matrix Diffusion based Generative Neural Solver for Vehicle Routing Problems
summary: Over the past decade, neural network solvers powered by generative artificial intelligence have garnered significant attention in the domain of vehicle routing problems (VRPs), owing to their exceptional computational efficiency and superior reasoning capabilities. In particular, autoregressive solvers integrated with reinforcement learning have emerged as a prominent trend. However, much of the existing work emphasizes large-scale generalization of neural approaches while neglecting the limited robustness of attention-based methods across heterogeneous distributions of problem parameters. Their improvements over heuristic search remain largely restricted to hand-curated, fixed-distribution benchmarks. Furthermore, these architectures tend to degrade significantly when node representations are highly similar or when tasks involve long decision horizons. To address the aforementioned limitations, we propose a novel fusion neural network framework that employs a discrete noise graph diffusion model to learn the underlying constraints of vehicle routing problems and generate a constraint assignment matrix. This matrix is subsequently integrated adaptively into the feature representation learning and decision process of the autoregressive solver, serving as a graph structure mask that facilitates the formation of solutions characterized by both global vision and local feature integration. To the best of our knowledge, this work represents the first comprehensive experimental investigation of neural network model solvers across a 378-combinatorial space spanning four distinct dimensions within the CVRPlib public dataset. Extensive experimental evaluations demonstrate that our proposed fusion model effectively captures and leverages problem constraints, achieving state-of-the-art performance across multiple benchmark datasets.

AI.tldr: 提出融合神经网络框架，使用离散噪声图扩散模型学习VRP约束并生成约束分配矩阵，集成到自回归求解器中，在CVRPlib数据集上实现SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于注意力的神经求解器在异构参数分布下鲁棒性有限，在节点表示高度相似或决策视野较长时性能显著下降，且改进主要局限于固定分布的基准测试。
AI.method: 提出融合神经网络框架：1) 使用离散噪声图扩散模型学习VRP底层约束并生成约束分配矩阵；2) 将该矩阵自适应集成到自回归求解器的特征表示学习和决策过程中，作为图结构掩码，促进全局视野与局部特征融合的解决方案形成。
AI.result: 在CVRPlib公共数据集的378个组合空间（涵盖四个不同维度）上进行了首次全面实验研究，广泛实验评估表明所提融合模型能有效捕获和利用问题约束，在多个基准数据集上达到最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: 提出的融合框架通过离散噪声图扩散模型学习约束并集成到自回归求解器中，解决了现有神经求解器在异构分布、相似节点和长决策视野下的局限性，实现了更好的全局-局部平衡和鲁棒性。

title: 3DGS-HPC: Distractor-free 3D Gaussian Splatting with Hybrid Patch-wise Classification
summary: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has demonstrated remarkable performance in novel view synthesis and 3D scene reconstruction, yet its quality often degrades in real-world environments due to transient distractors, such as moving objects and varying shadows. Existing methods commonly rely on semantic cues extracted from pre-trained vision models to identify and suppress these distractors, but such semantics are misaligned with the binary distinction between static and transient regions and remain fragile under the appearance perturbations introduced during 3DGS optimization. We propose 3DGS-HPC, a framework that circumvents these limitations by combining two complementary principles: a patch-wise classification strategy that leverages local spatial consistency for robust region-level decisions, and a hybrid classification metric that adaptively integrates photometric and perceptual cues for more reliable separation. Extensive experiments demonstrate the superiority and robustness of our method in mitigating distractors to improve 3DGS-based novel view synthesis.

AI.tldr: 3DGS-HPC：一种通过补丁级分类和混合度量来消除3D高斯泼溅中瞬态干扰物的新框架，提升真实环境下的视图合成质量
AI.motivation: 3D高斯泼溅在真实环境中质量下降，因为存在移动物体和变化阴影等瞬态干扰物。现有方法依赖预训练视觉模型的语义线索，但这些语义与静态/瞬态区域的二元区分不对齐，且在3DGS优化引入的外观扰动下表现脆弱。
AI.method: 提出3DGS-HPC框架，结合两个互补原则：1）利用局部空间一致性的补丁级分类策略进行稳健的区域级决策；2）自适应整合光度线索和感知线索的混合分类度量，实现更可靠的静态/瞬态分离。
AI.result: 大量实验证明该方法在消除干扰物、提升3DGS新视图合成质量方面具有优越性和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 3DGS-HPC通过补丁级分类和混合度量有效解决了现有语义方法在瞬态干扰物识别中的局限性，显著提升了3D高斯泼溅在真实环境下的性能。

title: TS-MLLM: A Multi-Modal Large Language Model-based Framework for Industrial Time-Series Big Data Analysis
summary: Accurate analysis of industrial time-series big data is critical for the Prognostics and Health Management (PHM) of industrial equipment. While recent advancements in Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown promise in time-series analysis, existing methods typically focus on single-modality adaptations, failing to exploit the complementary nature of temporal signals, frequency-domain visual representations, and textual knowledge information. In this paper, we propose TS-MLLM, a unified multi-modal large language model framework designed to jointly model temporal signals, frequency-domain images, and textual domain knowledge. Specifically, we first develop an Industrial time-series Patch Modeling branch to capture long-range temporal dynamics. To integrate cross-modal priors, we introduce a Spectrum-aware Vision-Language Model Adaptation (SVLMA) mechanism that enables the model to internalize frequency-domain patterns and semantic context. Furthermore, a Temporal-centric Multi-modal Attention Fusion (TMAF) mechanism is designed to actively retrieve relevant visual and textual cues using temporal features as queries, ensuring deep cross-modal alignment. Extensive experiments on multiple industrial benchmarks demonstrate that TS-MLLM significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods, particularly in few-shot and complex scenarios. The results validate our framework's superior robustness, efficiency, and generalization capabilities for industrial time-series prediction.

AI.tldr: TS-MLLM是一个多模态大语言模型框架，用于工业时间序列分析，通过联合建模时域信号、频域图像和文本知识，显著提升预测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM方法通常专注于单模态适应，未能充分利用时域信号、频域视觉表示和文本知识信息之间的互补性，而工业时间序列大数据分析对设备预测性健康管理至关重要。
AI.method: 提出TS-MLLM框架：1）工业时间序列补丁建模分支捕获长期时域动态；2）频谱感知视觉语言模型适应机制整合频域模式和语义上下文；3）时域中心多模态注意力融合机制使用时域特征作为查询主动检索相关视觉和文本线索。
AI.result: 在多个工业基准测试上的广泛实验表明，TS-MLLM显著优于最先进方法，特别是在少样本和复杂场景中，验证了框架在工业时间序列预测方面的优越鲁棒性、效率和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: TS-MLLM通过有效整合多模态信息，为工业时间序列分析提供了一个强大而统一的框架，在预测性健康管理应用中展现出卓越性能。

title: Models as Lego Builders: Assembling Malice from Benign Blocks via Semantic Blueprints
summary: Despite the rapid progress of Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs), the integration of visual modalities introduces new safety vulnerabilities that adversaries can exploit to elicit biased or malicious outputs. In this paper, we demonstrate an underexplored vulnerability via semantic slot filling, where LVLMs complete missing slot values with unsafe content even when the slot types are deliberately crafted to appear benign. Building on this finding, we propose StructAttack, a simple yet effective single-query jailbreak framework under black-box settings. StructAttack decomposes a harmful query into a central topic and a set of benign-looking slot types, then embeds them as structured visual prompts (e.g., mind maps, tables, or sunburst diagrams) with small random perturbations. Paired with a completion-guided instruction, LVLMs automatically recompose the concealed semantics and generate unsafe outputs without triggering safety mechanisms. Although each slot appears benign in isolation (local benignness), StructAttack exploits LVLMs' reasoning to assemble these slots into coherent harmful semantics. Extensive experiments on multiple models and benchmarks show the efficacy of our proposed StructAttack.

AI.tldr: StructAttack是一种针对大型视觉语言模型的黑盒越狱攻击框架，通过将有害查询分解为看似良性的语义槽，嵌入结构化视觉提示中，诱导模型生成不安全输出。
AI.motivation: 大型视觉语言模型引入视觉模态后带来了新的安全漏洞，攻击者可以利用这些漏洞诱导模型产生偏见或恶意输出。本文发现了一个未被充分探索的漏洞：即使槽类型被精心设计为看似良性，模型仍会用不安全内容填充缺失的槽值。
AI.method: 提出StructAttack框架：1）将有害查询分解为中心主题和一组看似良性的槽类型；2）将这些元素嵌入结构化视觉提示（如思维导图、表格、旭日图）中，并添加小的随机扰动；3）配合完成导向的指令，使模型自动重组隐藏的语义并生成不安全输出。
AI.result: 在多个模型和基准测试上的广泛实验证明了StructAttack的有效性。该攻击利用了LVLMs的推理能力，将孤立的良性槽组装成连贯的有害语义，成功绕过安全机制。
AI.conclusion: StructAttack揭示了大型视觉语言模型在语义槽填充任务中的安全漏洞，即使单个槽看起来良性，模型仍可能通过推理组装产生有害输出。这为LVLMs的安全防护提出了新的挑战。

title: TT-Sparse: Learning Sparse Rule Models with Differentiable Truth Tables
summary: Interpretable machine learning is essential in high-stakes domains where decision-making requires accountability, transparency, and trust. While rule-based models offer global and exact interpretability, learning rule sets that simultaneously achieve high predictive performance and low, human-understandable complexity remains challenging. To address this, we introduce TT-Sparse, a flexible neural building block that leverages differentiable truth tables as nodes to learn sparse, effective connections. A key contribution of our approach is a new soft TopK operator with straight-through estimation for learning discrete, cardinality-constrained feature selection in an end-to-end differentiable manner. Crucially, the forward pass remains sparse, enabling efficient computation and exact symbolic rule extraction. As a result, each node (and the entire model) can be transformed exactly into compact, globally interpretable DNF/CNF Boolean formulas via Quine-McCluskey minimization. Extensive empirical results across 28 datasets spanning binary, multiclass, and regression tasks show that the learned sparse rules exhibit superior predictive performance with lower complexity compared to existing state-of-the-art methods.

AI.tldr: TT-Sparse：一种利用可微真值表作为节点的神经构建块，通过软TopK算子和直通估计学习稀疏有效连接，实现高性能、低复杂度的可解释规则学习
AI.motivation: 在高风险领域，机器学习需要可解释性以确保问责制、透明度和信任。虽然基于规则的模型提供全局和精确的可解释性，但学习同时实现高预测性能和低人类可理解复杂度的规则集仍然具有挑战性。
AI.method: 提出TT-Sparse神经构建块，使用可微真值表作为节点学习稀疏有效连接。关键贡献是新的软TopK算子配合直通估计，以端到端可微方式学习离散的、具有基数约束的特征选择。前向传播保持稀疏性，支持高效计算和精确符号规则提取。
AI.result: 在28个数据集（包括二分类、多分类和回归任务）上的广泛实验表明，学习到的稀疏规则在预测性能上优于现有最先进方法，同时具有更低的复杂度。
AI.conclusion: TT-Sparse能够将每个节点（以及整个模型）精确转换为紧凑的、全局可解释的DNF/CNF布尔公式，通过Quine-McCluskey最小化实现，为高风险决策提供了高性能且可解释的机器学习解决方案。

title: Fast Attention-Based Simplification of LiDAR Point Clouds for Object Detection and Classification
summary: LiDAR point clouds are widely used in autonomous driving and consist of large numbers of 3D points captured at high frequency to represent surrounding objects such as vehicles, pedestrians, and traffic signs. While this dense data enables accurate perception, it also increases computational cost and power consumption, which can limit real-time deployment. Existing point cloud sampling methods typically face a trade-off: very fast approaches tend to reduce accuracy, while more accurate methods are computationally expensive. To address this limitation, we propose an efficient learned point cloud simplification method for LiDAR data. The method combines a feature embedding module with an attention-based sampling module to prioritize task-relevant regions and is trained end-to-end. We evaluate the method against farthest point sampling (FPS) and random sampling (RS) on 3D object detection on the KITTI dataset and on object classification across four datasets. The method was consistently faster than FPS and achieved similar, and in some settings better, accuracy, with the largest gains under aggressive downsampling. It was slower than RS, but it typically preserved accuracy more reliably at high sampling ratios.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于学习的LiDAR点云简化方法，通过特征嵌入和注意力采样模块实现高效且准确的点云降采样，在保持精度的同时提升计算效率。
AI.motivation: LiDAR点云数据密集且计算成本高，现有采样方法存在速度与精度的权衡：快速方法精度低，高精度方法计算昂贵，需要一种既能保持精度又高效的点云简化方法。
AI.method: 结合特征嵌入模块和基于注意力的采样模块，端到端训练，优先选择任务相关区域进行采样。
AI.result: 在KITTI数据集3D目标检测和四个数据集的对象分类任务中，比最远点采样(FPS)更快且精度相当或更好，在激进降采样时优势最大；比随机采样(RS)慢但在高采样率下更可靠地保持精度。
AI.conclusion: 提出的学习型点云简化方法在计算效率和精度之间取得了良好平衡，特别适用于需要实时处理和高精度感知的自动驾驶应用。

title: Compression as Adaptation: Implicit Visual Representation with Diffusion Foundation Models
summary: Modern visual generative models acquire rich visual knowledge through large-scale training, yet existing visual representations (such as pixels, latents, or tokens) remain external to the model and cannot directly exploit this knowledge for compact storage or reuse. In this work, we introduce a new visual representation framework that encodes a signal as a function, which is parametrized by low-rank adaptations attached to a frozen visual generative model. Such implicit representations of visual signals, \textit{e.g.}, an 81-frame video, can further be hashed into a single compact vector, achieving strong perceptual video compression at extremely low bitrates. Beyond basic compression, the functional nature of this representation enables inference-time scaling and control, allowing additional refinement on the compression performance. More broadly, as the implicit representations directly act as a function of the generation process, this suggests a unified framework bridging visual compression and generation.

AI.tldr: 提出一种新的视觉表示框架，将视觉信号编码为函数，通过冻结视觉生成模型的低秩适配实现，可用于高效视频压缩和生成控制。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉表示（像素、潜在变量、标记）无法直接利用大规模训练的视觉生成模型的知识进行紧凑存储或重用。
AI.method: 将视觉信号编码为函数，通过冻结视觉生成模型附加低秩适配参数化，可进一步哈希为紧凑向量，实现极低比特率的感知视频压缩。
AI.result: 在极低比特率下实现强感知视频压缩，支持推理时缩放和控制，可进一步优化压缩性能。
AI.conclusion: 这种隐式表示作为生成过程的函数，为视觉压缩和生成提供了统一框架。

title: EmbedTalk: Triplane-Free Talking Head Synthesis using Embedding-Driven Gaussian Deformation
summary: Real-time talking head synthesis increasingly relies on deformable 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) due to its low latency. Tri-planes are the standard choice for encoding Gaussians prior to deformation, since they provide a continuous domain with explicit spatial relationships. However, tri-plane representations are limited by grid resolution and approximation errors introduced by projecting 3D volumetric fields onto 2D subspaces. Recent work has shown the superiority of learnt embeddings for driving temporal deformations in 4D scene reconstruction. We introduce $\textbf{EmbedTalk}$, which shows how such embeddings can be leveraged for modelling speech deformations in talking head synthesis. Through comprehensive experiments, we show that EmbedTalk outperforms existing 3DGS-based methods in rendering quality, lip synchronisation, and motion consistency, while remaining competitive with state-of-the-art generative models. Moreover, replacing the tri-plane encoding with learnt embeddings enables significantly more compact models that achieve over 60 FPS on a mobile GPU (RTX 2060 6 GB). Our code will be placed in the public domain on acceptance.

AI.tldr: EmbedTalk使用学习嵌入替代tri-plane编码，在实时说话头部合成中实现更高质量渲染、更好的唇同步和运动一致性，同时保持高帧率和小模型尺寸。
AI.motivation: 当前基于可变形3D高斯泼溅的实时说话头部合成主要使用tri-plane编码，但这种方法受到网格分辨率和3D到2D投影近似误差的限制。最近研究表明学习嵌入在4D场景重建中驱动时间变形方面具有优势。
AI.method: 提出EmbedTalk方法，使用学习嵌入来建模说话头部合成中的语音变形，替代传统的tri-plane编码。这种方法利用嵌入表示来驱动高斯泼溅的变形。
AI.result: EmbedTalk在渲染质量、唇同步和运动一致性方面优于现有的3DGS方法，与最先进的生成模型竞争。使用学习嵌入实现了更紧凑的模型，在移动GPU上达到60+ FPS。
AI.conclusion: 学习嵌入在说话头部合成中比tri-plane编码更有效，能够实现高质量、高效率的实时渲染，为移动设备上的应用提供了可能。

title: Helix: Evolutionary Reinforcement Learning for Open-Ended Scientific Problem Solving
summary: Large language models (LLMs) with reasoning abilities have demonstrated growing promise for tackling complex scientific problems. Yet such tasks are inherently domain-specific, unbounded and open-ended, demanding exploration across vast and flexible solution spaces. Existing approaches, whether purely learning-based or reliant on carefully designed workflows, often suffer from limited exploration efficiency and poor generalization. To overcome these challenges, we present HELIX -- a Hierarchical Evolutionary reinforcement Learning framework with In-context eXperiences. HELIX introduces two key novelties: (i) a diverse yet high-quality pool of candidate solutions that broadens exploration through in-context learning, and (ii) reinforcement learning for iterative policy refinement that progressively elevates solution quality. This synergy enables the discovery of more advanced solutions. On the circle packing task, HELIX achieves state-of-the-art result with a sum of radii of 2.63598308 using only a 14B model. Across standard machine learning benchmarks, HELIX further surpasses GPT-4o with a carefully engineered pipeline, delivering an average F1 improvement of 5.95 points on the Adult and Bank Marketing datasets.

AI.tldr: HELIX是一个分层进化强化学习框架，通过上下文经验提升大语言模型解决复杂科学问题的能力，在圆填充任务和机器学习基准测试中取得SOTA结果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法（纯学习或精心设计的工作流）在解决复杂科学问题时存在探索效率有限和泛化能力差的问题，需要更有效的框架来处理无界、开放式的领域特定任务。
AI.method: 提出HELIX框架，包含两个关键创新：1）通过上下文学习构建多样且高质量的候选解池以拓宽探索范围；2）使用强化学习进行迭代策略优化以逐步提升解的质量。
AI.result: 在圆填充任务中，仅使用14B模型就实现了2.63598308的半径和（SOTA）；在标准机器学习基准测试中，超过GPT-4o精心设计的流程，在Adult和Bank Marketing数据集上平均F1提升5.95分。
AI.conclusion: HELIX通过结合上下文学习和强化学习的协同作用，能够发现更先进的解决方案，为大语言模型解决复杂科学问题提供了有效的框架。

title: Looking Into the Water by Unsupervised Learning of the Surface Shape
summary: We address the problem of looking into the water from the air, where we seek to remove image distortions caused by refractions at the water surface. Our approach is based on modeling the different water surface structures at various points in time, assuming the underlying image is constant. To this end, we propose a model that consists of two neural-field networks. The first network predicts the height of the water surface at each spatial position and time, and the second network predicts the image color at each position. Using both networks, we reconstruct the observed sequence of images and can therefore use unsupervised training. We show that using implicit neural representations with periodic activation functions (SIREN) leads to effective modeling of the surface height spatio-temporal signal and its derivative, as required for image reconstruction. Using both simulated and real data we show that our method outperforms the latest unsupervised image restoration approach. In addition, it provides an estimate of the water surface.

AI.tldr: 提出使用两个神经场网络从空中观测水下场景的方法，通过建模水面高度变化来消除折射失真，实现无监督训练
AI.motivation: 解决从空中观测水下场景时的图像失真问题，这些失真由水面折射引起。现有方法难以有效处理这种动态折射失真
AI.method: 使用两个神经场网络：第一个网络预测每个空间位置和时间的水面高度，第二个网络预测每个位置的图像颜色。采用SIREN（周期性激活函数）的隐式神经表示来有效建模水面高度的时空信号及其导数
AI.result: 在模拟和真实数据上都优于最新的无监督图像恢复方法，同时还能提供水面高度的估计
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过建模水面高度变化有效解决了空中观测水下场景的折射失真问题，实现了无监督训练并提供了水面结构估计

title: Partial Differential Equations in the Age of Machine Learning: A Critical Synthesis of Classical, Machine Learning, and Hybrid Methods
summary: Partial differential equations (PDEs) govern physical phenomena across the full range of scientific scales, yet their computational solution remains one of the defining challenges of modern science. This critical review examines two mature but epistemologically distinct paradigms for PDE solution, classical numerical methods and machine learning approaches, through a unified evaluative framework organized around six fundamental computational challenges. Classical methods are assessed for their structure-preserving properties, rigorous convergence theory, and scalable solver design; their persistent limitations in high-dimensional and geometrically complex settings are characterized precisely. Machine learning approaches are introduced under a taxonomy organized by the degree to which physical knowledge is incorporated and subjected to the same critical evaluation applied to classical methods. Classical methods are deductive -- errors are bounded by quantities derivable from PDE structure and discretization parameters -- while machine learning methods are inductive -- accuracy depends on statistical proximity to the training distribution. This epistemological distinction is the primary criterion governing responsible method selection. We identify three genuine complementarities between the paradigms and develop principles for hybrid design, including a framework for the structure inheritance problem that addresses when classical guarantees propagate through hybrid couplings, and an error budget decomposition that separates discretization, neural approximation, and coupling contributions. We further assess emerging frontiers, including foundation models, differentiable programming, quantum algorithms, and exascale co-design, evaluating each against the structural constraints that determine whether current barriers are fundamental or contingent on engineering progress.

AI.tldr: 该论文批判性评估了求解偏微分方程(PDE)的两大成熟范式：经典数值方法和机器学习方法，提出了统一的评估框架，分析了各自的优缺点及互补性，并探讨了混合设计原则和前沿发展方向。
AI.motivation: 偏微分方程(PDE)的计算求解是现代科学的核心挑战。论文旨在通过统一框架批判性评估经典数值方法和机器学习方法这两种认识论上不同的范式，为负责任的方法选择提供指导，并探索两者的互补性和混合设计。
AI.method: 建立了围绕六个基本计算挑战的统一评估框架：1) 结构保持性；2) 收敛理论；3) 可扩展求解器设计；4) 高维问题处理；5) 几何复杂性；6) 物理知识整合程度。对两种范式进行系统性对比分析，提出混合设计原则，包括结构继承问题框架和误差预算分解方法。
AI.result: 识别了经典方法的优势（结构保持、严格收敛理论、可扩展求解器设计）和局限性（高维和几何复杂问题），以及机器学习方法的归纳特性。发现了三种真正的互补性，提出了混合设计原则，包括结构继承框架和误差分解方法（离散化误差、神经近似误差、耦合误差）。
AI.conclusion: 经典方法（演绎性）和机器学习方法（归纳性）在认识论上的区别是方法选择的主要标准。两者存在真正的互补性，混合设计需要系统性的原则指导。论文还评估了前沿技术（基础模型、可微分编程、量子算法、百亿亿次协同设计），分析了当前障碍是根本性的还是工程进展可解决的。

title: Overthinking Causes Hallucination: Tracing Confounder Propagation in Vision Language Models
summary: Vision Language models (VLMs) often hallucinate non-existent objects. Detecting hallucination is analogous to detecting deception: a single final statement is insufficient, one must examine the underlying reasoning process. Yet existing detectors rely mostly on final-layer signals. Attention-based methods assume hallucinated tokens exhibit low attention, while entropy-based ones use final-step uncertainty. Our analysis reveals the opposite: hallucinated objects can exhibit peaked attention due to contextual priors; and models often express high confidence because intermediate layers have already converged to an incorrect hypothesis. We show that the key to hallucination detection lies within the model's thought process, not its final output. By probing decoder layers, we uncover a previously overlooked behavior, overthinking: models repeatedly revise object hypotheses across layers before committing to an incorrect answer. Once the model latches onto a confounded hypothesis, it can propagate through subsequent layers, ultimately causing hallucination. To capture this behavior, we introduce the Overthinking Score, a metric to measure how many competing hypotheses the model entertains and how unstable these hypotheses are across layers. This score significantly improves hallucination detection: 78.9% F1 on MSCOCO and 71.58% on AMBER.

AI.tldr: 提出Overthinking Score来检测VLMs幻觉：通过分析解码器层间假设变化，发现模型会反复修正假设最终错误确认，该指标显著提升幻觉检测性能
AI.motivation: 现有幻觉检测方法主要依赖最终层信号（注意力或熵），但研究发现幻觉对象可能因上下文先验而表现出高注意力，且模型可能因中间层已收敛到错误假设而表现出高置信度
AI.method: 通过探测解码器层发现"过度思考"现象：模型在层间反复修正对象假设，最终确认错误答案。提出Overthinking Score来衡量模型考虑多少竞争假设以及这些假设在层间的不稳定性
AI.result: Overthinking Score显著提升幻觉检测性能：在MSCOCO上达到78.9% F1分数，在AMBER上达到71.58% F1分数
AI.conclusion: 幻觉检测的关键在于模型的思考过程而非最终输出，过度思考现象揭示了模型层间假设修正行为，为幻觉检测提供了新视角

title: Beyond Surrogates: A Quantitative Analysis for Inter-Metric Relationships
summary: The Consistency property between surrogate losses and evaluation metrics has been extensively studied to ensure that minimizing a loss leads to metric optimality. However, the direct relationship between different evaluation metrics remains significantly underexplored. This theoretical gap results in the "Metric Mismatch" frequently observed in industrial applications, where gains in offline validation metrics fail to translate into online performance. To bridge this disconnection, this paper proposes a unified theoretical framework designed to quantify the relationships between metrics. We categorize metrics into different classes to facilitate a comparative analysis across different mathematical forms and interrogates these relationships through Bayes-Optimal Set and Regret Transfer. Through this framework, we provide a new perspective on identifying the structural asymmetry in regret transfer, enabling the design of evaluation systems that are theoretically guaranteed to align offline improvements with online objectives.

AI.tldr: 提出统一理论框架量化不同评估指标间关系，解决离线验证指标提升无法转化为在线性能的"指标不匹配"问题
AI.motivation: 工业应用中常出现"指标不匹配"现象，即离线验证指标的提升无法转化为在线性能改进。现有研究主要关注代理损失与评估指标的一致性，但不同评估指标间的直接关系研究不足，存在理论空白。
AI.method: 提出统一理论框架，将指标分类以便比较不同数学形式，通过贝叶斯最优集和遗憾转移分析指标间关系，识别遗憾转移中的结构不对称性。
AI.result: 框架为设计评估系统提供新视角，能够理论保证离线改进与在线目标的一致性，解决指标不匹配问题。
AI.conclusion: 该理论框架填补了评估指标间关系研究的空白，为工业应用中确保离线验证指标提升能有效转化为在线性能提供了理论基础。

title: Duala: Dual-Level Alignment of Subjects and Stimuli for Cross-Subject fMRI Decoding
summary: Cross-subject visual decoding aims to reconstruct visual experiences from brain activity across individuals, enabling more scalable and practical brain-computer interfaces. However, existing methods often suffer from degraded performance when adapting to new subjects with limited data, as they struggle to preserve both the semantic consistency of stimuli and the alignment of brain responses. To address these challenges, we propose Duala, a dual-level alignment framework designed to achieve stimulus-level consistency and subject-level alignment in fMRI-based cross-subject visual decoding. (1) At the stimulus level, Duala introduces a semantic alignment and relational consistency strategy that preserves intra-class similarity and inter-class separability, maintaining clear semantic boundaries during adaptation. (2) At the subject level, a distribution-based feature perturbation mechanism is developed to capture both global and subject-specific variations, enabling adaptation to individual neural representations without overfitting. Experiments on the Natural Scenes Dataset (NSD) demonstrate that Duala effectively improves alignment across subjects. Remarkably, even when fine-tuned with only about one hour of fMRI data, Duala achieves over 81.1% image-to-brain retrieval accuracy and consistently outperforms existing fine-tuning strategies in both retrieval and reconstruction. Our code is available at https://github.com/ShumengLI/Duala.

AI.tldr: Duala是一个双层次对齐框架，用于跨被试fMRI视觉解码，通过刺激层次语义对齐和关系一致性，以及被试层次分布特征扰动机制，在有限数据下实现更好的跨被试适应。
AI.motivation: 现有跨被试视觉解码方法在适应新被试时性能下降，难以同时保持刺激语义一致性和脑响应对齐，特别是在数据有限的情况下。
AI.method: 提出Duala双层次对齐框架：1) 刺激层次：语义对齐和关系一致性策略，保持类内相似性和类间可分性；2) 被试层次：基于分布的特征扰动机制，捕捉全局和个体特异性变化。
AI.result: 在NSD数据集上，Duala有效改善跨被试对齐。仅用约1小时fMRI数据微调，达到81.1%以上的图像-脑检索准确率，在检索和重建任务中均优于现有微调策略。
AI.conclusion: Duala通过双层次对齐解决了跨被试视觉解码中的适应问题，在有限数据下实现了更好的性能，为可扩展的脑机接口提供了有效方法。

title: Global Convergence of Average Reward Constrained MDPs with Neural Critic and General Policy Parameterization
summary: We study infinite-horizon Constrained Markov Decision Processes (CMDPs) with general policy parameterizations and multi-layer neural network critics. Existing theoretical analyses for constrained reinforcement learning largely rely on tabular policies or linear critics, which limits their applicability to high-dimensional and continuous control problems. We propose a primal-dual natural actor-critic algorithm that integrates neural critic estimation with natural policy gradient updates and leverages Neural Tangent Kernel (NTK) theory to control function-approximation error under Markovian sampling, without requiring access to mixing-time oracles. We establish global convergence and cumulative constraint violation rates of $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(T^-1/4)$ up to approximation errors induced by the policy and critic classes. Our results provide the first such guarantees for CMDPs with general policies and multi-layer neural critics, substantially extending the theoretical foundations of actor-critic methods beyond the linear-critic regime.

AI.tldr: 提出一种针对无限时域约束马尔可夫决策过程的原始-对偶自然行动者-评论家算法，结合神经网络评论家估计和自然策略梯度更新，利用神经正切核理论控制函数逼近误差，首次为通用策略和多层神经网络评论家的CMDP提供收敛保证。
AI.motivation: 现有约束强化学习的理论分析主要依赖表格策略或线性评论家，限制了其在高维和连续控制问题中的应用。需要开发适用于通用策略参数化和多层神经网络评论家的理论框架。
AI.method: 提出原始-对偶自然行动者-评论家算法，整合神经网络评论家估计与自然策略梯度更新，利用神经正切核理论控制马尔可夫采样下的函数逼近误差，无需混合时间预言机。
AI.result: 建立了全局收敛性和累积约束违反率为$\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(T^{-1/4})$的保证（达到策略和评论家类引入的逼近误差）。这是首次为通用策略和多层神经网络评论家的CMDP提供此类保证。
AI.conclusion: 该工作显著扩展了行动者-评论家方法的理论基础，超越了线性评论家体系，为高维和连续控制问题中的约束强化学习提供了理论支持。

title: Real-Time Glottis Detection Framework via Spatial-decoupled Feature Learning for Nasal Transnasal Intubation
summary: Nasotracheal intubation (NTI) is a vital procedure in emergency airway management, where rapid and accurate glottis detection is essential to ensure patient safety. However, existing machine assisted visual detection systems often rely on high performance computational resources and suffer from significant inference delays, which limits their applicability in time critical and resource constrained scenarios. To overcome these limitations, we propose Mobile GlottisNet, a lightweight and efficient glottis detection framework designed for real time inference on embedded and edge devices. The model incorporates structural awareness and spatial alignment mechanisms, enabling robust glottis localization under complex anatomical and visual conditions. We implement a hierarchical dynamic thresholding strategy to enhance sample assignment, and introduce an adaptive feature decoupling module based on deformable convolution to support dynamic spatial reconstruction. A cross layer dynamic weighting scheme further facilitates the fusion of semantic and detail features across multiple scales. Experimental results demonstrate that the model, with a size of only 5MB on both our PID dataset and Clinical datasets, achieves inference speeds of over 62 FPS on devices and 33 FPS on edge platforms, showing great potential in the application of emergency NTI.

AI.tldr: 提出Mobile GlottisNet，一个轻量级声门检测框架，用于嵌入式设备上的实时鼻气管插管辅助
AI.motivation: 现有声门检测系统依赖高性能计算资源且推理延迟大，无法满足紧急鼻气管插管的时间关键和资源受限场景需求
AI.method: 结合结构感知和空间对齐机制，采用分层动态阈值策略增强样本分配，引入基于可变形卷积的自适应特征解耦模块支持动态空间重建，使用跨层动态加权方案融合多尺度语义和细节特征
AI.result: 模型仅5MB大小，在PID和临床数据集上，设备推理速度超过62 FPS，边缘平台达到33 FPS
AI.conclusion: Mobile GlottisNet在嵌入式设备上实现了高效的实时声门检测，在紧急鼻气管插管应用中具有巨大潜力

title: Evaluating Synthetic Data for Baggage Trolley Detection in Airport Logistics
summary:
Efficient luggage trolley management is critical for reducing congestion and ensuring asset availability in modern airports. Automated detection systems face two main challenges. First, strict security and privacy regulations limit large-scale data collection. Second, existing public datasets lack the diversity, scale, and annotation quality needed to handle dense, overlapping trolley arrangements typical of real-world operations.
  To address these limitations, we introduce a synthetic data generation pipeline based on a high-fidelity Digital Twin of Algiers International Airport using NVIDIA Omniverse. The pipeline produces richly annotated data with oriented bounding boxes, capturing complex trolley formations, including tightly nested chains. We evaluate YOLO-OBB using five training strategies: real-only, synthetic-only, linear probing, full fine-tuning, and mixed training. This allows us to assess how synthetic data can complement limited real-world annotations.
  Our results show that mixed training with synthetic data and only 40 percent of real annotations matches or exceeds the full real-data baseline, achieving 0.94 mAP@50 and 0.77 mAP@50-95, while reducing annotation effort by 25 to 35 percent. Multi-seed experiments confirm strong reproducibility with a standard deviation below 0.01 on mAP@50, demonstrating the practical effectiveness of synthetic data for automated trolley detection.

AI.tldr: 提出基于数字孪生的合成数据生成管道，用于机场行李推车检测，通过混合训练策略，仅用40%真实标注就能达到或超过全真实数据基线性能。
AI.motivation: 机场行李推车自动化检测面临两大挑战：1) 安全和隐私法规限制大规模数据收集；2) 现有公共数据集缺乏处理真实场景中密集、重叠推车排列所需的多样性和标注质量。
AI.method: 基于NVIDIA Omniverse构建阿尔及尔国际机场的高保真数字孪生，开发合成数据生成管道，生成带有定向边界框的丰富标注数据。评估YOLO-OBB的五种训练策略：纯真实数据、纯合成数据、线性探测、完全微调和混合训练。
AI.result: 混合训练策略（合成数据+40%真实标注）达到或超过全真实数据基线，获得0.94 mAP@50和0.77 mAP@50-95，同时减少25-35%的标注工作量。多种子实验显示强可重复性，mAP@50标准差低于0.01。
AI.conclusion: 合成数据能有效补充有限的真实标注，为机场行李推车自动化检测提供实用解决方案，显著降低标注成本同时保持高性能。

title: Reverse Distillation: Consistently Scaling Protein Language Model Representations
summary: Unlike the predictable scaling laws in natural language processing and computer vision, protein language models (PLMs) scale poorly: for many tasks, models within the same family plateau or even decrease in performance, with mid-sized models often outperforming the largest in the family. We introduce Reverse Distillation, a principled framework that decomposes large PLM representations into orthogonal subspaces guided by smaller models of the same family. The resulting embeddings have a nested, Matryoshka-style structure: the first k dimensions of a larger model's embedding are exactly the representation from the smaller model. This ensures that larger reverse-distilled models consistently outperform smaller ones. A motivating intuition is that smaller models, constrained by capacity, preferentially encode broadly-shared protein features. Reverse distillation isolates these shared features and orthogonally extracts additional contributions from larger models, preventing interference between the two. On ProteinGym benchmarks, reverse-distilled ESM-2 variants outperform their respective baselines at the same embedding dimensionality, with the reverse-distilled 15 billion parameter model achieving the strongest performance. Our framework is generalizable to any model family where scaling challenges persist. Code and trained models are available at https://github.com/rohitsinghlab/plm_reverse_distillation.

AI.tldr: 提出反向蒸馏框架，通过将大型蛋白质语言模型表示分解为以同家族小型模型为指导的正交子空间，解决PLM缩放性能不佳问题，确保大模型始终优于小模型。
AI.motivation: 蛋白质语言模型（PLMs）的缩放规律与自然语言处理和计算机视觉不同，性能提升不明显甚至下降，中型模型常优于同家族最大模型，需要解决这一缩放挑战。
AI.method: 反向蒸馏框架：将大型PLM表示分解为以同家族小型模型为指导的正交子空间，形成嵌套的Matryoshka结构，确保大模型前k维表示与小模型完全相同，隔离共享特征并正交提取大模型的额外贡献。
AI.result: 在ProteinGym基准测试中，反向蒸馏的ESM-2变体在相同嵌入维度下优于各自基线，150亿参数的反向蒸馏模型达到最强性能，框架可推广到任何存在缩放挑战的模型家族。
AI.conclusion: 反向蒸馏为蛋白质语言模型的缩放问题提供了原则性解决方案，通过嵌套表示结构确保模型规模增加时性能持续提升，代码和训练模型已开源。

title: GLASS: Graph and Vision-Language Assisted Semantic Shape Correspondence
summary: Establishing dense correspondence across 3D shapes is crucial for fundamental downstream tasks, including texture transfer, shape interpolation, and robotic manipulation. However, learning these mappings without manual supervision remains a formidable challenge, particularly under severe non-isometric deformations and in inter-class settings where geometric cues are ambiguous. Conventional functional map methods, while elegant, typically struggle in these regimes due to their reliance on isometry. To address this, we present GLASS, a framework that bridges the gap by integrating geometric spectral analysis with rich semantic priors from vision-language foundation models. GLASS introduces three key innovations: (i) a view-consistent strategy that enables robust multi-view visual feature extraction from powerful vision foundation models; (ii) the injection of language embeddings into vertex descriptors via zero-shot 3D segmentation, capturing high-level part semantics; and (iii) a graph-assisted contrastive loss that enforces structural consistency between regions (e.g., source's head'' $\leftrightarrow$ target's head'') by leveraging geodesic and topological relationships between regions. This design allows GLASS to learn globally coherent and semantically consistent maps without ground-truth supervision. Extensive experiments demonstrate that GLASS achieves state-of-the-art performance across all regimes, maintaining high accuracy on standard near-isometric tasks while significantly advancing performance in challenging settings. Specifically, it achieves average geodesic errors of 0.21, 4.5, and 5.6 on the inter-class benchmark SNIS and non-isometric benchmarks SMAL and TOPKIDS, reducing errors from URSSM baselines of 0.49, 6.0, and 8.9 by 57%, 25%, and 37%, respectively.

AI.tldr: GLASS框架通过结合几何谱分析和视觉语言基础模型的语义先验，实现了无需监督的3D形状密集对应学习，在非等距变形和跨类别设置中显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 3D形状间的密集对应对于纹理传输、形状插值和机器人操作等下游任务至关重要。然而，在严重非等距变形和跨类别设置下，几何线索模糊，无监督学习这些映射仍然是一个巨大挑战。传统的功能映射方法依赖等距假设，在这些场景中表现不佳。
AI.method: GLASS框架整合几何谱分析与视觉语言基础模型的语义先验，包含三个关键创新：1）视图一致策略，从视觉基础模型中提取鲁棒的多视图视觉特征；2）通过零样本3D分割将语言嵌入注入顶点描述符，捕获高级部件语义；3）图辅助对比损失，利用区域间的测地线和拓扑关系强制结构一致性。
AI.result: GLASS在所有测试场景中达到最先进性能，在标准近等距任务上保持高精度，同时在挑战性设置中显著提升性能。在跨类别基准SNIS上平均测地误差为0.21，在非等距基准SMAL和TOPKIDS上分别为4.5和5.6，相比URSSM基线分别减少57%、25%和37%。
AI.conclusion: GLASS成功地将几何谱分析与视觉语言基础模型的语义先验相结合，实现了无需地面真值监督的全局一致且语义一致的映射学习，在非等距变形和跨类别设置中表现出色。

title: Hide and Find: A Distributed Adversarial Attack on Federated Graph Learning
comment: Accepted at ICLR 2026 Workshop: Principled Design for Trustworthy AI
summary: Federated Graph Learning (FedGL) is vulnerable to malicious attacks, yet developing a truly effective and stealthy attack method remains a significant challenge. Existing attack methods suffer from low attack success rates, high computational costs, and are easily identified and smoothed by defense algorithms. To address these challenges, we propose \textbf{FedShift}, a novel two-stage "Hide and Find" distributed adversarial attack. In the first stage, before FedGL begins, we inject a learnable and hidden "shifter" into part of the training data, which subtly pushes poisoned graph representations toward a target class's decision boundary without crossing it, ensuring attack stealthiness during training. In the second stage, after FedGL is complete, we leverage the global model information and use the hidden shifter as an optimization starting point to efficiently find the adversarial perturbations. During the final attack, we aggregate these perturbations from multiple malicious clients to form the final effective adversarial sample and trigger the attack. Extensive experiments on six large-scale datasets demonstrate that our method achieves the highest attack effectiveness compared to existing advanced attack methods. In particular, our attack can effectively evade 3 mainstream robust federated learning defense algorithms and converges with a time cost reduction of over 90\%, highlighting its exceptional stealthiness, robustness, and efficiency.

AI.tldr: FedShift是一种新颖的两阶段联邦图学习对抗攻击方法，通过"隐藏和发现"策略实现高效、隐蔽的攻击，能有效绕过主流防御算法。
AI.motivation: 现有的联邦图学习攻击方法存在攻击成功率低、计算成本高、容易被防御算法识别和消除的问题，需要开发更有效和隐蔽的攻击方法。
AI.method: 提出两阶段"隐藏和发现"分布式对抗攻击：第一阶段在FedGL开始前，向部分训练数据注入可学习的隐藏"移位器"，将中毒图表示推向目标类决策边界但不越过；第二阶段在FedGL完成后，利用全局模型信息和隐藏移位器作为优化起点，高效找到对抗扰动，最后聚合多个恶意客户端的扰动形成最终攻击样本。
AI.result: 在六个大规模数据集上的实验表明，该方法相比现有先进攻击方法具有最高的攻击效果，能有效绕过3种主流鲁棒联邦学习防御算法，时间成本降低超过90%。
AI.conclusion: FedShift方法在联邦图学习中实现了卓越的隐蔽性、鲁棒性和效率，为解决现有攻击方法的局限性提供了有效方案。

title: Scaling Test-Time Robustness of Vision-Language Models via Self-Critical Inference Framework
summary: The emergence of Large Language Models (LLMs) has driven rapid progress in multi-modal learning, particularly in the development of Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs). However, existing LVLM training paradigms place excessive reliance on the LLM component, giving rise to two critical robustness challenges: language bias and language sensitivity. To address both issues simultaneously, we propose a novel Self-Critical Inference (SCI) framework that extends Visual Contrastive Decoding by conducting multi-round counterfactual reasoning through both textual and visual perturbations. This process further introduces a new strategy for improving robustness by scaling the number of counterfactual rounds. Moreover, we also observe that failure cases of LVLMs differ significantly across models, indicating that fixed robustness benchmarks may not be able to capture the true reliability of LVLMs. To this end, we propose the Dynamic Robustness Benchmark (DRBench), a model-specific evaluation framework targeting both language bias and sensitivity issues. Extensive experiments show that SCI consistently outperforms baseline methods on DRBench, and that increasing the number of inference rounds further boosts robustness beyond existing single-step counterfactual reasoning methods.

AI.tldr: 提出SCI框架和DRBench基准，解决LVLM的语言偏见和语言敏感性问题，通过多轮反事实推理提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有大型视觉语言模型(LVLMs)过度依赖语言模型组件，导致两个关键鲁棒性问题：语言偏见（过度依赖文本信息）和语言敏感性（对文本扰动过于敏感）。现有固定基准无法准确评估不同模型的真实可靠性。
AI.method: 提出自我批判推理(SCI)框架，通过文本和视觉扰动进行多轮反事实推理，扩展视觉对比解码方法。同时提出动态鲁棒性基准(DRBench)，针对语言偏见和敏感性问题进行模型特定评估。
AI.result: 实验表明SCI在DRBench上持续优于基线方法，增加推理轮数能进一步提升鲁棒性，超越现有的单步反事实推理方法。
AI.conclusion: SCI框架能有效解决LVLM的语言偏见和语言敏感性问题，DRBench提供了更准确的模型鲁棒性评估方法，多轮推理策略进一步提升了模型可靠性。

title: Uncertainty-Gated Generative Modeling
comment: Accepeted by ICLR 2026 Workshop Advances in Financial AI
summary: Financial time-series forecasting is a high-stakes problem where regime shifts and shocks make point-accurate yet overconfident models dangerous.
