summary: Existing 4D human datasets fall short for fashion-specific research, lacking either realistic garment dynamics or task-specific annotations. Synthetic datasets suffer from a realism gap, whereas real-world captures lack the detailed annotations and paired data required for virtual try-on (VTON) and size estimation tasks. To bridge this gap, we introduce MV-Fashion, a large-scale, multi-view video dataset engineered for domain-specific fashion analysis. MV-Fashion features 3,273 sequences (72.5 million frames) from 80 diverse subjects wearing 3-10 outfits each. It is designed to capture complex, real-world garment dynamics, including multiple layers and varied styling (e.g. rolled sleeves, tucked shirt). A core contribution is a rich data representation that includes pixel-level semantic annotations, ground-truth material properties like elasticity, and 3D point clouds. Crucially for VTON applications, MV-Fashion provides paired data: multi-view synchronized captures of worn garments alongside their corresponding flat, catalogue images. We leverage this dataset to establish baselines for fashion-centric tasks, including virtual try-on, clothing size estimation, and novel view synthesis. The dataset is available at https://hunorlaczko.github.io/MV-Fashion .

AI.tldr: MV-Fashion是一个大规模多视角视频数据集，专门针对时尚分析，包含3,273个序列（7,250万帧），提供像素级语义标注、真实材料属性和3D点云，特别为虚拟试穿提供配对数据。
AI.motivation: 现有4D人体数据集在时尚研究方面存在不足：合成数据集缺乏真实感，真实世界捕获缺乏虚拟试穿和尺寸估计所需的详细标注和配对数据。
AI.method: 创建MV-Fashion数据集，包含80名不同受试者穿着3-10套服装的3,273个序列，捕获复杂真实世界服装动态，提供像素级语义标注、真实材料属性、3D点云，以及关键的配对数据：穿着服装的多视角同步捕获与对应的平面目录图像。
AI.result: 建立了时尚中心任务的基准，包括虚拟试穿、服装尺寸估计和新视角合成。数据集包含72.5百万帧，涵盖多层服装和多样化造型。
AI.conclusion: MV-Fashion填补了时尚特定研究的空白，为虚拟试穿、尺寸估计等任务提供了高质量、标注丰富的配对数据，推动了时尚分析领域的发展。

title: Echo2ECG: Enhancing ECG Representations with Cardiac Morphology from Multi-View Echos
summary: Electrocardiography (ECG) is a low-cost, widely used modality for diagnosing electrical abnormalities like atrial fibrillation by capturing the heart's electrical activity. However, it cannot directly measure cardiac morphological phenotypes, such as left ventricular ejection fraction (LVEF), which typically require echocardiography (Echo). Predicting these phenotypes from ECG would enable early, accessible health screening. Existing self-supervised methods suffer from a representational mismatch by aligning ECGs to single-view Echos, which only capture local, spatially restricted anatomical snapshots. To address this, we propose Echo2ECG, a multimodal self-supervised learning framework that enriches ECG representations with the heart's morphological structure captured in multi-view Echos. We evaluate Echo2ECG as an ECG feature extractor on two clinically relevant tasks that fundamentally require morphological information: (1) classification of structural cardiac phenotypes across three datasets, and (2) retrieval of Echo studies with similar morphological characteristics using ECG queries. Our extracted ECG representations consistently outperform those of state-of-the-art unimodal and multimodal baselines across both tasks, despite being 18x smaller than the largest baseline. These results demonstrate that Echo2ECG is a robust, powerful ECG feature extractor. Our code is accessible at https://github.com/michelleespranita/Echo2ECG.

AI.tldr: Echo2ECG：通过多视角超声心动图增强心电图表征的多模态自监督学习框架，用于从心电图预测心脏形态表型
AI.motivation: 心电图（ECG）无法直接测量心脏形态表型（如左心室射血分数LVEF），这些通常需要超声心动图（Echo）。从ECG预测这些表型可实现早期、可及的健康筛查。现有自监督方法存在表征不匹配问题，将ECG与单视角Echo对齐，后者仅捕获局部、空间受限的解剖快照。
AI.method: 提出Echo2ECG多模态自监督学习框架，通过多视角Echo捕获的心脏形态结构来丰富ECG表征。将ECG作为特征提取器，在两个需要形态信息的临床相关任务上评估：1）跨三个数据集的结​​构性心脏表型分类；2）使用ECG查询检索具有相似形态特征的Echo研究。
AI.result: 提取的ECG表征在两个任务上始终优于最先进的单模态和多模态基线方法，尽管比最大基线小18倍。结果表明Echo2ECG是一个稳健、强大的ECG特征提取器。
AI.conclusion: Echo2ECG通过多视角超声心动图增强心电图表征，成功解决了现有方法的表征不匹配问题，为从心电图预测心脏形态表型提供了有效的多模态自监督学习框架。

title: Edged USLAM: Edge-Aware Event-Based SLAM with Learning-Based Depth Priors
comment: 8 pages, 7 figures, 3 tables. Accepted to ICRA 2026. Project code and datasets available at https://github.com/sebnem-byte/Edged-USLAM
summary: Conventional visual simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) algorithms often fail under rapid motion, low illumination, or abrupt lighting transitions due to motion blur and limited dynamic range. Event cameras mitigate these issues with high temporal resolution and high dynamic range (HDR), but their sparse, asynchronous outputs complicate feature extraction and integration with other sensors; e.g. inertial measurement units (IMUs) and standard cameras. We present Edged USLAM, a hybrid visual-inertial system that extends Ultimate SLAM (USLAM) with an edge-aware front-end and a lightweight depth module. The frontend enhances event frames for robust feature tracking and nonlinear motion compensation, while the depth module provides coarse, region-of-interest (ROI)-based scene depth to improve motion compensation and scale consistency. Evaluations across public benchmarks and real-world unmanned air vehicle (UAV) flights demonstrate that performance varies significantly by scenario. For instance, event-only methods like point-line event-based visual-inertial odometry (PL-EVIO) or learning-based pipelines such as deep event-based visual odometry (DEVO) excel in highly aggressive or extreme HDR conditions. In contrast, Edged USLAM provides superior stability and minimal drift in slow or structured trajectories, ensuring consistently accurate localization on real flights under challenging illumination. These findings highlight the complementary strengths of event-only, learning-based, and hybrid approaches, while positioning Edged USLAM as a robust solution for diverse aerial navigation tasks.

AI.tldr: Edged USLAM是一种混合视觉-惯性SLAM系统，通过边缘感知前端和轻量级深度模块增强事件相机性能，在结构化场景中提供稳定定位，但在极端条件下不如纯事件或学习方法。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉SLAM在快速运动、低光照或光照突变时容易失效，事件相机虽然具有高时间分辨率和高动态范围，但其稀疏异步输出难以与其他传感器融合，需要更好的特征提取和运动补偿方法。
AI.method: 扩展Ultimate SLAM系统，加入边缘感知前端增强事件帧特征跟踪和非线性运动补偿，以及轻量级深度模块提供粗略的ROI场景深度，改善运动补偿和尺度一致性。
AI.result: 在公开基准测试和真实无人机飞行中，性能因场景而异：在激进或极端HDR条件下，纯事件方法（PL-EVIO）或学习方法（DEVO）表现更好；在缓慢或结构化轨迹中，Edged USLAM提供更优的稳定性和最小漂移。
AI.conclusion: 事件相机、学习方法和混合方法各有优势，Edged USLAM作为混合系统在多样化空中导航任务中提供了稳健解决方案，特别适合结构化场景下的稳定定位。

title: Oracle-Guided Soft Shielding for Safe Move Prediction in Chess
comment: Accepted for publication at the 24th International Conference on Machine Learning and Applications (ICMLA), 2025. Preprint version in Arxiv
summary: In high stakes environments, agents relying purely on imitation learning or reinforcement learning often struggle to avoid safety-critical errors during exploration. Existing reinforcement learning approaches for environments such as chess require hundreds of thousands of episodes and substantial computational resources to converge. Imitation learning, on the other hand, is more sample efficient but is brittle under distributional shift and lacks mechanisms for proactive risk avoidance. In this work, we propose Oracle-Guided Soft Shielding (OGSS), a simple yet effective framework for safer decision-making, enabling safe exploration by learning a probabilistic safety model from oracle feedback in an imitation learning setting. Focusing on the domain of chess, we train a model to predict strong moves based on past games, and separately learn a blunder prediction model from Stockfish evaluations to estimate the tactical risk of each move. During inference, the agent first generates a set of candidate moves and then uses the blunder model to determine high-risk options, and uses a utility function combining the predicted move likelihood from the policy model and the blunder probability to select actions that strike a balance between performance and safety. This enables the agent to explore and play competitively while significantly reducing the chance of tactical mistakes. Across hundreds of games against a strong chess engine, we compare our approach with other methods in the literature, such as action pruning, SafeDAgger, and uncertainty-based sampling. Our results demonstrate that OGSS variants maintain a lower blunder rate even as the agent's exploration ratio is increased by several folds, highlighting its ability to support broader exploration without compromising tactical soundness.

AI.tldr: OGSS框架结合模仿学习和安全模型，在象棋中通过预测走子概率和失误风险来平衡性能与安全，显著降低失误率同时支持更广泛探索。
AI.motivation: 在高风险环境中，纯模仿学习或强化学习难以避免安全关键错误。模仿学习样本效率高但脆弱，缺乏主动风险规避机制；强化学习收敛慢且需要大量计算资源。
AI.method: 提出Oracle-Guided Soft Shielding (OGSS)框架：1) 训练基于历史棋局的走子策略模型；2) 从Stockfish评估学习失误预测模型；3) 推理时生成候选走子，结合策略模型的走子概率和失误模型的失误概率，通过效用函数平衡性能与安全选择行动。
AI.result: 在数百局与强象棋引擎的对弈中，OGSS变体在探索率提高数倍的情况下仍保持较低的失误率，相比动作剪枝、SafeDAgger和基于不确定性的采样等方法表现更优。
AI.conclusion: OGSS框架能够在象棋等高风险环境中实现更安全的探索，在保持竞争力的同时显著减少战术失误，为平衡性能与安全提供了一种简单有效的解决方案。

title: MERLIN: Building Low-SNR Robust Multimodal LLMs for Electromagnetic Signals
summary:
The paradigm of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) offers a promising blueprint for advancing the electromagnetic (EM) domain. However, prevailing approaches often deviate from the native MLLM paradigm, instead using task-specific or pipelined architectures that lead to fundamental limitations in model performance and generalization. Fully realizing the MLLM potential in EM domain requires overcoming three main challenges: (1) Data. The scarcity of high-quality datasets with paired EM signals and descriptive text annotations used for MLLMs pre-training; (2) Benchmark. The absence of comprehensive benchmarks to systematically evaluate and compare the performance of models on EM signal-to-text tasks; (3) Model. A critical fragility in low Signal-to-Noise Ratio (SNR) environments, where critical signal features can be obscured, leading to significant performance degradation.
  To address these challenges, we introduce a tripartite contribution to establish a foundation for MLLMs in the EM domain. First, to overcome data scarcity, we construct and release EM-100k, a large-scale dataset comprising over 100,000 EM signal-text pairs. Second, to enable rigorous and standardized evaluation, we propose EM-Bench, the most comprehensive benchmark featuring diverse downstream tasks spanning from perception to reasoning. Finally, to tackle the core modeling challenge, we present MERLIN, a novel training framework designed not only to align low-level signal representations with high-level semantic text, but also to explicitly enhance model robustness and performance in challenging low-SNR environments. Comprehensive experiments validate our method, showing that MERLIN is state-of-the-art in the EM-Bench and exhibits remarkable robustness in low-SNR settings.

AI.tldr: 该论文针对电磁领域多模态大语言模型面临的三大挑战（数据稀缺、缺乏基准、低信噪比环境脆弱），提出了三部分解决方案：发布EM-100k数据集、建立EM-Bench基准、开发MERLIN训练框架，显著提升了电磁信号到文本任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 当前电磁领域的多模态大语言模型方法偏离了原生MLLM范式，采用任务特定或流水线架构，导致模型性能和泛化能力受限。需要解决三个核心挑战：高质量配对数据稀缺、缺乏系统评估基准、低信噪比环境下的模型脆弱性。
AI.method: 1. 构建EM-100k数据集：包含超过10万个电磁信号-文本配对数据；2. 提出EM-Bench基准：涵盖从感知到推理的多样化下游任务；3. 开发MERLIN训练框架：不仅对齐低层信号表示与高层语义文本，还显式增强模型在低信噪比环境下的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 综合实验验证了方法的有效性：MERLIN在EM-Bench基准上达到最先进性能，在低信噪比设置下表现出显著的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究通过数据、基准和模型三方面的贡献，为电磁领域的多模态大语言模型建立了基础，解决了该领域的关键挑战，推动了电磁信号到文本任务的发展。

title: Breaking the Bias Barrier in Concave Multi-Objective Reinforcement Learning
summary:
While standard reinforcement learning optimizes a single reward signal, many applications require optimizing a nonlinear utility $f(J_1^π,\dots,J_M^π)$ over multiple objectives, where each $J_m^π$ denotes the expected discounted return of a distinct reward function. A common approach is concave scalarization, which captures important trade-offs such as fairness and risk sensitivity. However, nonlinear scalarization introduces a fundamental challenge for policy gradient methods: the gradient depends on $\partial f(J^π)$, while in practice only empirical return estimates $\hat J$ are available. Because $f$ is nonlinear, the plug-in estimator is biased ($\mathbb{E}[\partial f(\hat J)] \neq \partial f(\mathbb{E}[\hat J])$), leading to persistent gradient bias that degrades sample complexity.
  In this work we identify and overcome this bias barrier in concave-scalarized multi-objective reinforcement learning. We show that existing policy-gradient methods suffer an intrinsic $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(ε^{-4})$ sample complexity due to this bias. To address this issue, we develop a Natural Policy Gradient (NPG) algorithm equipped with a multi-level Monte Carlo (MLMC) estimator that controls the bias of the scalarization gradient while maintaining low sampling cost. We prove that this approach achieves the optimal $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(ε^{-2})$ sample complexity for computing an $ε$-optimal policy. Furthermore, we show that when the scalarization function is second-order smooth, the first-order bias cancels automatically, allowing vanilla NPG to achieve the same $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(ε^{-2})$ rate without MLMC. Our results provide the first optimal sample complexity guarantees for concave multi-objective reinforcement learning under policy-gradient methods.

AI.tldr: 本文解决了多目标强化学习中非线性标量化带来的梯度偏差问题，提出了基于多级蒙特卡洛估计器的自然策略梯度算法，将样本复杂度从O(ε⁻⁴)优化到最优的O(ε⁻²)。
AI.motivation: 在多目标强化学习中，非线性标量化（如公平性、风险敏感性）是常见需求，但非线性函数f的梯度估计存在偏差问题：实际只能获得经验回报估计Ĵ，而E[∂f(Ĵ)] ≠ ∂f(E[Ĵ])，这导致策略梯度方法存在持续的梯度偏差，严重影响样本效率。
AI.method: 提出了两种方法：1) 结合多级蒙特卡洛估计器的自然策略梯度算法，控制标量化梯度偏差同时保持低采样成本；2) 当标量化函数二阶光滑时，一阶偏差自动抵消，普通NPG即可达到最优样本复杂度。
AI.result: 证明了所提方法实现了计算ε最优策略的最优O(ε⁻²)样本复杂度，而现有方法由于偏差问题只能达到O(ε⁻⁴)。当标量化函数二阶光滑时，普通NPG也能达到相同最优复杂度。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次为凹多目标强化学习的策略梯度方法提供了最优样本复杂度保证，通过识别并克服梯度偏差问题，显著提升了多目标RL的样本效率。

title: ALOOD: Exploiting Language Representations for LiDAR-based Out-of-Distribution Object Detection
comment: Accepted for publication at the 2025 IEEE Intelligent Transportation Systems Conference (ITSC)
summary: LiDAR-based 3D object detection plays a critical role for reliable and safe autonomous driving systems. However, existing detectors often produce overly confident predictions for objects not belonging to known categories, posing significant safety risks. This is caused by so-called out-of-distribution (OOD) objects, which were not part of the training data, resulting in incorrect predictions. To address this challenge, we propose ALOOD (Aligned LiDAR representations for Out-Of-Distribution Detection), a novel approach that incorporates language representations from a vision-language model (VLM). By aligning the object features from the object detector to the feature space of the VLM, we can treat the detection of OOD objects as a zero-shot classification task. We demonstrate competitive performance on the nuScenes OOD benchmark, establishing a novel approach to OOD object detection in LiDAR using language representations. The source code is available at https://github.com/uulm-mrm/mmood3d.

AI.tldr: ALOOD是一种新颖的LiDAR OOD检测方法，通过将目标检测器特征与视觉语言模型特征对齐，将OOD检测转化为零样本分类任务
AI.motivation: 现有LiDAR 3D目标检测器对训练数据中未见过类别的物体（OOD物体）会产生过度自信的预测，这在自动驾驶系统中存在重大安全风险
AI.method: 提出ALOOD方法，利用视觉语言模型的语言表示，将目标检测器的物体特征与VLM的特征空间对齐，将OOD检测转化为零样本分类任务
AI.result: 在nuScenes OOD基准测试中表现出竞争力，为LiDAR OOD检测建立了基于语言表示的新方法
AI.conclusion: ALOOD通过结合视觉语言模型的语言表示，有效解决了LiDAR 3D检测中的OOD问题，提高了自动驾驶系统的安全性

title: Towards Effective and Efficient Graph Alignment without Supervision
summary: Unsupervised graph alignment aims to find the node correspondence across different graphs without any anchor node pairs. Despite the recent efforts utilizing deep learning-based techniques, such as the embedding and optimal transport (OT)-based approaches, we observe their limitations in terms of model accuracy-efficiency tradeoff. By focusing on the exploitation of local and global graph information, we formalize them as the ``local representation, global alignment'' paradigm, and present a new ``global representation and alignment'' paradigm to resolve the mismatch between the two phases in the alignment process. We then propose \underline{Gl}obal representation and \underline{o}ptimal transport-\underline{b}ased \underline{Align}ment (\texttt{GlobAlign}), and its variant, \texttt{GlobAlign-E}, for better \underline{E}fficiency. Our methods are equipped with the global attention mechanism and a hierarchical cross-graph transport cost, able to capture long-range and implicit node dependencies beyond the local graph structure. Furthermore, \texttt{GlobAlign-E} successfully closes the time complexity gap between representative embedding and OT-based methods, reducing OT's cubic complexity to quadratic terms. Through extensive experiments, our methods demonstrate superior performance, with up to a 20\% accuracy improvement over the best competitor. Meanwhile, \texttt{GlobAlign-E} achieves the best efficiency, with an order of magnitude speedup against existing OT-based methods.

AI.tldr: 提出GlobAlign和GlobAlign-E方法，通过全局表示和最优传输进行无监督图对齐，解决了现有方法在精度和效率之间的权衡问题，实现了更好的准确性和效率。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督图对齐方法（如嵌入方法和最优传输方法）在模型精度和效率之间存在权衡限制。作者观察到这些方法在利用局部和全局图信息方面的局限性，特别是"局部表示、全局对齐"范式导致的对齐过程不匹配问题。
AI.method: 提出"全局表示和对齐"新范式，开发了GlobAlign及其高效变体GlobAlign-E。方法采用全局注意力机制捕获长距离和隐式节点依赖关系，使用分层跨图传输成本，并将最优传输的立方复杂度降低到二次项。
AI.result: 实验显示方法性能优越，相比最佳竞争对手准确率提升高达20%。GlobAlign-E实现了最佳效率，比现有最优传输方法快一个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 提出的全局表示和对齐范式有效解决了无监督图对齐中的精度-效率权衡问题，GlobAlign和GlobAlign-E在准确性和效率方面均优于现有方法。

title: Fusion-Poly: A Polyhedral Framework Based on Spatial-Temporal Fusion for 3D Multi-Object Tracking
summary:
LiDAR-camera 3D multi-object tracking (MOT) combines rich visual semantics with accurate depth cues to improve trajectory consistency and tracking reliability. In practice, however, LiDAR and cameras operate at different sampling rates. To maintain temporal alignment, existing data pipelines usually synchronize heterogeneous sensor streams and annotate them at a reduced shared frequency, forcing most prior methods to perform spatial fusion only at synchronized timestamps through projection-based or learnable cross-sensor association. As a result, abundant asynchronous observations remain underexploited, despite their potential to support more frequent association and more robust trajectory estimation over short temporal intervals.
  To address this limitation, we propose Fusion-Poly, a spatial-temporal fusion framework for 3D MOT that integrates asynchronous LiDAR and camera data. Fusion-Poly associates trajectories with multi-modal observations at synchronized timestamps and with single-modal observations at asynchronous timestamps, enabling higher-frequency updates of motion and existence states. The framework contains three key components: a frequency-aware cascade matching module that adapts to synchronized and asynchronous frames according to available detection modalities; a frequency-aware trajectory estimation module that maintains trajectories through high-frequency motion prediction, differential updates, and confidence-calibrated lifecycle management; and a full-state observation alignment module that improves cross-modal consistency at synchronized timestamps by optimizing image-projection errors.
  On the nuScenes test set, Fusion-Poly achieves 76.5% AMOTA, establishing a new state of the art among tracking-by-detection 3D MOT methods. Extensive ablation studies further validate the effectiveness of each component. Code will be released.

AI.tldr: Fusion-Poly：首个异步LiDAR-相机3D多目标跟踪框架，通过时空融合利用异步传感器数据，实现更高频率的轨迹更新，在nuScenes上达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有LiDAR-相机3D MOT方法通常只在同步时间戳进行空间融合，忽略了大量异步观测数据。这些异步数据虽然时间不同步，但能提供更频繁的关联机会和更鲁棒的轨迹估计，特别是在短时间间隔内。
AI.method: 提出Fusion-Poly框架，包含三个核心模块：1）频率感知级联匹配模块，根据可用检测模态适应同步和异步帧；2）频率感知轨迹估计模块，通过高频运动预测、差分更新和置信度校准的生命周期管理维护轨迹；3）全状态观测对齐模块，通过优化图像投影误差提高同步时间戳的跨模态一致性。
AI.result: 在nuScenes测试集上达到76.5% AMOTA，在基于检测的3D MOT方法中创造了新的SOTA。消融实验验证了各模块的有效性。
AI.conclusion: Fusion-Poly通过有效利用异步LiDAR和相机数据，实现了更高频率的时空融合，显著提升了3D多目标跟踪性能，为异构传感器融合提供了新思路。

title: Impact of Connectivity on Laplacian Representations in Reinforcement Learning
summary: Learning compact state representations in Markov Decision Processes (MDPs) has proven crucial for addressing the curse of dimensionality in large-scale reinforcement learning (RL) problems. Existing principled approaches leverage structural priors on the MDP by constructing state representations as linear combinations of the state-graph Laplacian eigenvectors. When the transition graph is unknown or the state space is prohibitively large, the graph spectral features can be estimated directly via sample trajectories. In this work, we prove an upper bound on the approximation error of linear value function approximation under the learned spectral features. We show how this error scales with the algebraic connectivity of the state-graph, grounding the approximation quality in the topological structure of the MDP. We further bound the error introduced by the eigenvector estimation itself, leading to an end-to-end error decomposition across the representation learning pipeline. Additionally, our expression of the Laplacian operator for the RL setting, although equivalent to existing ones, prevents some common misunderstandings, of which we show some examples from the literature. Our results hold for general (non-uniform) policies without any assumptions on the symmetry of the induced transition kernel. We validate our theoretical findings with numerical simulations on gridworld environments.

AI.tldr: 该论文分析了在马尔可夫决策过程中使用图拉普拉斯特征向量进行状态表示学习时的误差界限，建立了表示学习质量与状态图代数连通性之间的关系。
AI.motivation: 在大规模强化学习中，学习紧凑的状态表示对于解决维度灾难至关重要。现有方法利用MDP的结构先验，通过状态图拉普拉斯特征向量的线性组合构建状态表示。当转移图未知或状态空间过大时，需要从样本轨迹中估计图谱特征，但缺乏对学习表示近似误差的理论分析。
AI.method: 提出基于图拉普拉斯特征向量的线性值函数近似误差上界分析。首先证明在已知谱特征下的近似误差界限，然后将特征向量估计误差纳入分析，形成端到端的误差分解。重新表述了RL设置中的拉普拉斯算子，澄清了文献中的常见误解。方法适用于一般（非均匀）策略，无需假设诱导转移核的对称性。
AI.result: 证明了线性值函数近似误差的上界，表明误差与状态图的代数连通性相关，将近似质量建立在MDP的拓扑结构上。同时界定了特征向量估计引入的误差，提供了表示学习流程的端到端误差分解。通过网格世界环境的数值模拟验证了理论结果。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为基于图谱特征的状态表示学习提供了理论保证，建立了表示质量与MDP拓扑结构之间的明确关系。重新表述的拉普拉斯算子有助于澄清文献中的误解，为大规模RL中的表示学习方法提供了理论基础。

title: MM-TS: Multi-Modal Temperature and Margin Schedules for Contrastive Learning with Long-Tail Data
summary: Contrastive learning has become a fundamental approach in both uni-modal and multi-modal frameworks. This learning paradigm pulls positive pairs of samples closer while pushing negatives apart. In the uni-modal setting (e.g., image-based learning), previous research has shown that the strength of these forces can be controlled through the temperature parameter. In this work, we propose Multi-Modal Temperature and Margin Schedules (MM-TS), extending the concept of uni-modal temperature scheduling to multi-modal contrastive learning. Our method dynamically adjusts the temperature in the contrastive loss during training, modulating the attraction and repulsion forces in the multi-modal setting. Additionally, recognizing that standard multi-modal datasets often follow imbalanced, long-tail distributions, we adapt the temperature based on the local distribution of each training sample. Specifically, samples from dense clusters are assigned a higher temperature to better preserve their semantic structure. Furthermore, we demonstrate that temperature scheduling can be effectively integrated within a max-margin framework, thereby unifying the two predominant approaches in multi-modal contrastive learning: InfoNCE loss and max-margin objective. We evaluate our approach on four widely used image- and video-language datasets, Flickr30K, MSCOCO, EPIC-KITCHENS-100, and YouCook2, and show that our dynamic temperature and margin schedules improve performance and lead to new state-of-the-art results in the field.

AI.tldr: 提出MM-TS方法，将单模态温度调度扩展到多模态对比学习，动态调整温度并整合最大间隔框架，在四个数据集上取得SOTA结果
AI.motivation: 现有研究已证明单模态对比学习中温度参数可控制正负样本的吸引力与排斥力，但多模态对比学习缺乏类似的动态温度调度机制。此外，多模态数据集通常存在不平衡的长尾分布，需要根据样本局部分布自适应调整温度。
AI.method: 提出MM-TS方法：1) 动态调整对比损失中的温度参数，调节多模态设置下的吸引力与排斥力；2) 根据每个训练样本的局部分布自适应调整温度，对密集聚类样本分配更高温度以更好保持语义结构；3) 将温度调度与最大间隔框架有效整合，统一InfoNCE损失和最大间隔目标两种主流多模态对比学习方法。
AI.result: 在Flickr30K、MSCOCO、EPIC-KITCHENS-100和YouCook2四个图像-视频-语言数据集上评估，动态温度和间隔调度提升了性能，取得了该领域新的最先进结果。
AI.conclusion: 将单模态温度调度扩展到多模态对比学习是有效的，动态调整温度并整合最大间隔框架能显著提升多模态表示学习性能，特别是在处理不平衡长尾分布数据集时表现出优势。

title: Alignment-Aware and Reliability-Gated Multimodal Fusion for Unmanned Aerial Vehicle Detection Across Heterogeneous Thermal-Visual Sensors
summary: Reliable unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) detection is critical for autonomous airspace monitoring but remains challenging when integrating sensor streams that differ substantially in resolution, perspective, and field of view. Conventional fusion methods-such as wavelet-, Laplacian-, and decision-level approaches-often fail to preserve spatial correspondence across modalities and suffer from annotation of inconsistencies, limiting their robustness in real-world settings. This study introduces two fusion strategies, Registration-aware Guided Image Fusion (RGIF) and Reliability-Gated Modality-Attention Fusion (RGMAF), designed to overcome these limitations. RGIF employs Enhanced Correlation Coefficient (ECC)-based affine registration combined with guided filtering to maintain thermal saliency while enhancing structural detail. RGMAF integrates affine and optical-flow registration with a reliability-weighted attention mechanism that adaptively balances thermal contrast and visual sharpness. Experiments were conducted on the Multi-Sensor and Multi-View Fixed-Wing (MMFW)-UAV dataset comprising 147,417 annotated air-to-air frames collected from infrared, wide-angle, and zoom sensors. Among single-modality detectors, YOLOv10x demonstrated the most stable cross-domain performance and was selected as the detection backbone for evaluating fused imagery. RGIF improved the visual baseline by 2.13% mAP@50 (achieving 97.65%), while RGMAF attained the highest recall of 98.64%. These findings show that registration-aware and reliability-adaptive fusion provides a robust framework for integrating heterogeneous modalities, substantially enhancing UAV detection performance in multimodal environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种融合策略RGIF和RGMAF，用于解决多模态无人机检测中传感器数据融合的挑战，在MMFW-UAV数据集上显著提升了检测性能。
AI.motivation: 无人机可靠检测对自主空域监控至关重要，但现有融合方法在处理分辨率、视角和视野差异大的传感器数据时存在局限性，无法保持跨模态空间对应关系且受标注不一致影响。
AI.method: 提出两种融合策略：1) RGIF使用基于增强相关系数的仿射配准结合引导滤波，保持热显著性同时增强结构细节；2) RGMAF集成仿射和光流配准，采用可靠性加权注意力机制自适应平衡热对比度和视觉清晰度。
AI.result: 在MMFW-UAV数据集（147,417帧）上测试，YOLOv10x作为检测骨干网络。RGIF将mAP@50提升2.13%至97.65%，RGMAF达到最高召回率98.64%。
AI.conclusion: 配准感知和可靠性自适应融合为异构模态集成提供了稳健框架，在多模态环境中显著提升了无人机检测性能。

title: DualFlexKAN: Dual-stage Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks with Independent Function Control
summary: Multi-Layer Perceptrons (MLPs) rely on pre-defined, fixed activation functions, imposing a static inductive bias that forces the network to approximate complex topologies solely through increased depth and width. Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks (KANs) address this limitation through edge-centric learnable functions, yet their formulation suffers from quadratic parameter scaling and architectural rigidity that hinders the effective integration of standard regularization techniques. This paper introduces the DualFlexKAN (DFKAN), a flexible architecture featuring a dual-stage mechanism that independently controls pre-linear input transformations and post-linear output activations. This decoupling enables hybrid networks that optimize the trade-off between expressiveness and computational cost. Unlike standard formulations, DFKAN supports diverse basis function families, including orthogonal polynomials, B-splines, and radial basis functions, integrated with configurable regularization strategies that stabilize training dynamics. Comprehensive evaluations across regression benchmarks, physics-informed tasks, and function approximation demonstrate that DFKAN outperforms both MLPs and conventional KANs in accuracy, convergence speed, and gradient fidelity. The proposed hybrid configurations achieve superior performance with one to two orders of magnitude fewer parameters than standard KANs, effectively mitigating the parameter explosion problem while preserving KAN-style expressiveness. DFKAN provides a principled, scalable framework for incorporating adaptive non-linearities, proving particularly advantageous for data-efficient learning and interpretable function discovery in scientific applications.

AI.tldr: DFKAN是一种新型神经网络架构，通过解耦预线性输入变换和后线性输出激活的双阶段机制，解决了传统MLP固定激活函数和KAN参数爆炸的问题，在保持表达力的同时大幅减少参数数量。
AI.motivation: 传统MLP使用固定的激活函数，这引入了静态归纳偏置，迫使网络只能通过增加深度和宽度来逼近复杂拓扑。而KAN虽然通过边缘可学习函数解决了这个问题，但其存在二次参数缩放和架构刚性问题，难以有效集成标准正则化技术。
AI.method: 提出DualFlexKAN（DFKAN）架构，采用双阶段机制独立控制预线性输入变换和后线性输出激活。这种解耦允许构建混合网络，在表达力和计算成本之间优化权衡。支持多种基函数族（正交多项式、B样条、径向基函数），并与可配置的正则化策略集成以稳定训练动态。
AI.result: 在回归基准测试、物理信息任务和函数逼近方面的综合评估表明，DFKAN在准确性、收敛速度和梯度保真度方面均优于MLP和传统KAN。提出的混合配置使用比标准KAN少1-2个数量级的参数实现了更优性能，有效缓解了参数爆炸问题，同时保持了KAN风格的表达力。
AI.conclusion: DFKAN提供了一个原则性、可扩展的框架来融入自适应非线性，特别有利于科学应用中的数据高效学习和可解释函数发现，在保持表达力的同时解决了传统方法的参数效率问题。

title: Video2LoRA: Unified Semantic-Controlled Video Generation via Per-Reference-Video LoRA
summary: Achieving semantic alignment across diverse video generation conditions remains a significant challenge. Methods that rely on explicit structural guidance often enforce rigid spatial constraints that limit semantic flexibility, whereas models tailored for individual control types lack interoperability and adaptability. These design bottlenecks hinder progress toward flexible and efficient semantic video generation. To address this, we propose Video2LoRA, a scalable and generalizable framework for semantic-controlled video generation that conditions on a reference video. Video2LoRA employs a lightweight hypernetwork to predict personalized LoRA weights for each semantic input, which are combined with auxiliary matrices to form adaptive LoRA modules integrated into a frozen diffusion backbone. This design enables the model to generate videos consistent with the reference semantics while preserving key style and content variations, eliminating the need for any per-condition training. Notably, the final model weights less than 150MB, making it highly efficient for storage and deployment. Video2LoRA achieves coherent, semantically aligned generation across diverse conditions and exhibits strong zero-shot generalization to unseen semantics.

AI.tldr: Video2LoRA：一个基于参考视频的语义控制视频生成框架，通过轻量级超网络预测个性化LoRA权重，实现跨多种条件的语义对齐视频生成，无需逐条件训练。
AI.motivation: 当前视频生成方法面临语义对齐挑战：依赖显式结构指导的方法施加刚性空间约束限制语义灵活性，而为单个控制类型定制的模型缺乏互操作性和适应性，这些设计瓶颈阻碍了灵活高效的语义视频生成进展。
AI.method: 提出Video2LoRA框架，使用轻量级超网络为每个语义输入预测个性化LoRA权重，与辅助矩阵结合形成自适应LoRA模块，集成到冻结的扩散主干网络中，实现基于参考视频的语义控制生成。
AI.result: 模型权重小于150MB，存储和部署高效；能够生成与参考语义一致且保持关键风格和内容变化的视频；在多种条件下实现连贯的语义对齐生成，并对未见语义表现出强大的零样本泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: Video2LoRA提供了一个可扩展、可泛化的语义控制视频生成解决方案，解决了现有方法的局限性，实现了高效、灵活且无需逐条件训练的跨条件语义对齐视频生成。

title: Towards Batch-to-Streaming Deep Reinforcement Learning for Continuous Control
summary: State-of-the-art deep reinforcement learning (RL) methods have achieved remarkable performance in continuous control tasks, yet their computational complexity is often incompatible with the constraints of resource-limited hardware, due to their reliance on replay buffers, batch updates, and target networks. The emerging paradigm of streaming deep RL addresses this limitation through purely online updates, achieving strong empirical performance on standard benchmarks. In this work, we propose two novel streaming deep RL algorithms, Streaming Soft Actor-Critic (S2AC) and Streaming Deterministic Actor-Critic (SDAC), explicitly designed to be compatible with state-of-the-art batch RL methods, making them particularly suitable for on-device finetuning applications such as Sim2Real transfer. Both algorithms achieve performance comparable to state-of-the-art streaming baselines on standard benchmarks without requiring tedious hyperparameter tuning. Finally, we further investigate the practical challenges of transitioning from batch to streaming learning during finetuning and propose concrete strategies to tackle them.

AI.tldr: 提出两种流式深度强化学习算法S2AC和SDAC，用于资源受限硬件上的在线学习，特别适合Sim2Real迁移等设备端微调应用。
AI.motivation: 现有深度强化学习方法在连续控制任务中表现优异，但计算复杂度高，依赖回放缓冲区、批量更新和目标网络，不适用于资源受限硬件。流式深度RL通过纯在线更新解决了这一限制。
AI.method: 提出了两种新颖的流式深度RL算法：流式软演员-评论家(S2AC)和流式确定性演员-评论家(SDAC)。这些算法专门设计为与最先进的批量RL方法兼容，适用于设备端微调。还研究了从批量学习到流式学习的实际挑战并提出了具体应对策略。
AI.result: 两种算法在标准基准测试中达到了与最先进流式基线相当的性能，且不需要繁琐的超参数调优。成功解决了从批量到流式学习的过渡挑战。
AI.conclusion: 提出的S2AC和SDAC算法为资源受限硬件上的流式深度强化学习提供了有效的解决方案，特别适用于Sim2Real迁移等设备端微调应用，实现了与批量方法兼容的高效在线学习。

title: SAVE: Speech-Aware Video Representation Learning for Video-Text Retrieval
summary: For video-text retrieval, the use of CLIP has been a de facto choice. Since CLIP provides only image and text encoders, this consensus has led to a biased paradigm that entirely ignores the sound track of videos. While several attempts have been made to reintroduce audio -- typically by incorporating an audio encoder and fusing its output with visual features -- these methods face two challenges: ineffective representation of speech content and suboptimal vision-audio fusion. To address these issues jointly, we propose SAVE, a Speech Aware Video rEpresentation learning method. SAVE improves upon AVIGATE, a SOTA audiovisual method, with a dedicated speech branch for more effective speech embedding. Furthermore, we introduce soft-ALBEF for early vision-audio alignment that facilitates fusion. Extensive experiments on five benchmarks show that SAVE compares favorably against the SOTA, outperforming AVIGATE by +4.1% on MSRVTT-9k, +1.9% on MSRVTT-7k, +2.5% on VATEX, +9.8% on Charades, and +2.1% on LSMDC, in light of the SumR metric.

AI.tldr: SAVE方法通过专门的语言分支和早期视觉-音频对齐，提升了视频-文本检索中音频信息的利用效果
AI.motivation: 当前视频-文本检索主要依赖CLIP，但CLIP只有图像和文本编码器，完全忽略了视频中的音频信息。虽然已有一些尝试重新引入音频的方法，但面临两个挑战：语音内容表示效果不佳，以及视觉-音频融合不理想。
AI.method: 提出了SAVE（Speech Aware Video rEpresentation learning）方法：1）在AVIGATE（当前最先进的视听方法）基础上增加专门的语言分支，以更有效地嵌入语音内容；2）引入soft-ALBEF实现早期视觉-音频对齐，促进融合。
AI.result: 在五个基准测试上进行了广泛实验，SAVE相比最先进方法表现优异：在MSRVTT-9k上提升+4.1%，MSRVTT-7k上+1.9%，VATEX上+2.5%，Charades上+9.8%，LSMDC上+2.1%（基于SumR指标）。
AI.conclusion: SAVE方法通过专门的语言分支和早期视觉-音频对齐，有效解决了视频-文本检索中音频信息利用不足的问题，显著提升了检索性能。

title: Don't Look Back in Anger: MAGIC Net for Streaming Continual Learning with Temporal Dependence
summary: Concept drift, temporal dependence, and catastrophic forgetting represent major challenges when learning from data streams. While Streaming Machine Learning and Continual Learning (CL) address these issues separately, recent efforts in Streaming Continual Learning (SCL) aim to unify them. In this work, we introduce MAGIC Net, a novel SCL approach that integrates CL-inspired architectural strategies with recurrent neural networks to tame temporal dependence. MAGIC Net continuously learns, looks back at past knowledge by applying learnable masks over frozen weights, and expands its architecture when necessary. It performs all operations online, ensuring inference availability at all times. Experiments on synthetic and real-world streams show that it improves adaptation to new concepts, limits memory usage, and mitigates forgetting.

AI.tldr: MAGIC Net是一个新颖的流式持续学习方法，通过集成持续学习架构策略和循环神经网络来处理时间依赖性，实现在线学习、知识回顾和架构扩展。
AI.motivation: 概念漂移、时间依赖性和灾难性遗忘是数据流学习中的主要挑战。虽然流式机器学习和持续学习分别处理这些问题，但流式持续学习试图统一它们。
AI.method: MAGIC Net集成了持续学习启发的架构策略和循环神经网络来处理时间依赖性。它持续学习，通过对冻结权重应用可学习掩码来回顾过去知识，并在必要时扩展架构。所有操作都在线进行，确保始终可进行推理。
AI.result: 在合成和真实世界数据流上的实验表明，MAGIC Net能够改善对新概念的适应，限制内存使用，并减轻遗忘问题。
AI.conclusion: MAGIC Net是一个有效的流式持续学习方法，能够处理数据流学习中的核心挑战，包括概念漂移、时间依赖性和灾难性遗忘。

title: SRNeRV: A Scale-wise Recursive Framework for Neural Video Representation
summary: Implicit Neural Representations (INRs) have emerged as a promising paradigm for video representation and compression. However, existing multi-scale INR generators often suffer from significant parameter redundancy by stacking independent processing blocks for each scale. Inspired by the principle of scale self-similarity in the generation process, we propose SRNeRV, a novel scale-wise recursive framework that replaces this stacked design with a parameter-efficient shared architecture. The core of our approach is a hybrid sharing scheme derived from decoupling the processing block into a scale-specific spatial mixing module and a scale-invariant channel mixing module. We recursively apply the same shared channel mixing module, which contains the majority of the parameters, across all scales, significantly reducing the model size while preserving the crucial capacity to learn scale-specific spatial patterns. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SRNeRV achieves a significant rate-distortion performance boost, especially in INR-friendly scenarios, validating that our sharing scheme successfully amplifies the core strengths of the INR paradigm.

AI.tldr: SRNeRV提出了一种尺度递归的隐式神经表示框架，通过共享跨尺度的通道混合模块来减少参数冗余，提升视频压缩性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的多尺度INR生成器通常为每个尺度堆叠独立的处理块，导致显著的参数冗余。受生成过程中尺度自相似性原理的启发，需要设计更参数高效的共享架构。
AI.method: 提出SRNeRV框架，采用混合共享方案：将处理块解耦为尺度特定的空间混合模块和尺度不变的通道混合模块。递归应用相同的共享通道混合模块（包含大部分参数）到所有尺度，显著减小模型大小，同时保留学习尺度特定空间模式的能力。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，SRNeRV在率失真性能上取得显著提升，特别是在INR友好的场景中，验证了共享方案成功放大了INR范式的核心优势。
AI.conclusion: SRNeRV通过尺度递归共享架构有效减少了多尺度INR生成器的参数冗余，在保持性能的同时提高了参数效率，为视频表示和压缩提供了更优的解决方案。

title: Integral Formulas for Vector Spherical Tensor Products
summary: We derive integral formulas that simplify the Vector Spherical Tensor Product recently introduced by Xie et al., which generalizes the Gaunt tensor product to antisymmetric couplings. In particular, we obtain explicit closed-form expressions for the antisymmetric analogues of the Gaunt coefficients. This enables us to simulate the Clebsch-Gordan tensor product using a single Vector Spherical Tensor Product, yielding a $9\times$ reduction in the required tensor product evaluations. Our results enable efficient and practical implementations of the Vector Spherical Tensor Product, paving the way for applications of this generalization of Gaunt tensor products in $\mathrm{SO}(3)$-equivariant neural networks. Moreover, we discuss how the Gaunt and the Vector Spherical Tensor Products allow to control the expressivity-runtime tradeoff associated with the usual Clebsch-Gordan Tensor Products. Finally, we investigate low rank decompositions of the normalizations of the considered tensor products in view of their use in equivariant neural networks.

AI.tldr: 该论文推导了简化向量球张量积的积分公式，获得了反对称Gaunt系数的闭式表达式，使Clebsch-Gordan张量积的评估需求减少9倍，为SO(3)-等变神经网络提供了高效实现。
AI.motivation: Xie等人最近引入了向量球张量积，将Gaunt张量积推广到反对称耦合。然而，该方法的实现需要简化以提高计算效率，特别是在SO(3)-等变神经网络中的应用。
AI.method: 推导简化向量球张量积的积分公式，获得反对称Gaunt系数的显式闭式表达式。通过单一向量球张量积模拟Clebsch-Gordan张量积，并研究相关张量积归一化的低秩分解。
AI.result: 实现了Clebsch-Gordan张量积评估的9倍减少，使向量球张量积的高效实用实现成为可能。同时探讨了Gaunt和向量球张量积在表达力-运行时间权衡中的控制作用。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为向量球张量积的高效实现提供了数学基础，推动了这一Gaunt张量积推广在SO(3)-等变神经网络中的应用，并揭示了不同张量积方法在表达力-效率权衡中的调控机制。

title: GarmentPainter: Efficient 3D Garment Texture Synthesis with Character-Guided Diffusion Model
summary: Generating high-fidelity, 3D-consistent garment textures remains a challenging problem due to the inherent complexities of garment structures and the stringent requirement for detailed, globally consistent texture synthesis. Existing approaches either rely on 2D-based diffusion models, which inherently struggle with 3D consistency, require expensive multi-step optimization or depend on strict spatial alignment between 2D reference images and 3D meshes, which limits their flexibility and scalability. In this work, we introduce GarmentPainter, a simple yet efficient framework for synthesizing high-quality, 3D-aware garment textures in UV space. Our method leverages a UV position map as the 3D structural guidance, ensuring texture consistency across the garment surface during texture generation. To enhance control and adaptability, we introduce a type selection module, enabling fine-grained texture generation for specific garment components based on a character reference image, without requiring alignment between the reference image and the 3D mesh. GarmentPainter efficiently integrates all guidance signals into the input of a diffusion model in a spatially aligned manner, without modifying the underlying UNet architecture. Extensive experiments demonstrate that GarmentPainter achieves state-of-the-art performance in terms of visual fidelity, 3D consistency, and computational efficiency, outperforming existing methods in both qualitative and quantitative evaluations.

AI.tldr: GarmentPainter：一个简单高效的框架，通过在UV空间中使用UV位置图作为3D结构引导，生成高质量、3D感知的服装纹理，无需2D参考图像与3D网格的严格对齐。
AI.motivation: 现有方法存在局限性：基于2D的扩散模型难以保证3D一致性；需要昂贵的多步优化；或依赖2D参考图像与3D网格的严格空间对齐，限制了灵活性和可扩展性。
AI.method: 使用UV位置图作为3D结构引导，确保纹理在服装表面的一致性；引入类型选择模块，基于角色参考图像对特定服装组件进行细粒度纹理生成；将所有引导信号以空间对齐方式集成到扩散模型输入中，不修改底层UNet架构。
AI.result: 在视觉保真度、3D一致性和计算效率方面达到最先进水平，在定性和定量评估中均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: GarmentPainter提供了一个简单高效的解决方案，能够生成高质量、3D一致的服装纹理，解决了现有方法的局限性，具有更好的灵活性和可扩展性。

title: Grow, Don't Overwrite: Fine-tuning Without Forgetting
summary: Adapting pre-trained models to specialized tasks often leads to catastrophic forgetting, where new knowledge overwrites foundational capabilities. Existing methods either compromise performance on the new task or struggle to balance training stability with efficient reuse of pre-trained knowledge. We introduce a novel function-preserving expansion method that resolves this dilemma. Our technique expands model capacity by replicating pre-trained parameters within transformer submodules and applying a scaling correction that guarantees the expanded model is mathematically identical to the original at initialization, enabling stable training while exploiting existing knowledge. Empirically, our method eliminates the trade-off between plasticity and stability, matching the performance of full fine-tuning on downstream tasks without any degradation of the model's original capabilities. Furthermore, we demonstrate the modularity of our approach, showing that by selectively expanding a small subset of layers we can achieve the same performance as full fine-tuning at a fraction of the computational cost.

AI.tldr: 提出一种函数保持扩展方法，通过复制预训练参数并应用缩放校正，在扩展模型容量的同时保持初始化时的数学等价性，从而解决灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.motivation: 预训练模型适应特定任务时通常会导致灾难性遗忘，现有方法要么在新任务上性能不足，要么难以平衡训练稳定性与预训练知识的有效重用。
AI.method: 在Transformer子模块中复制预训练参数，应用缩放校正保证扩展模型在初始化时与原始模型数学等价，实现稳定训练并充分利用现有知识。
AI.result: 该方法消除了可塑性与稳定性之间的权衡，在下游任务上达到完整微调的性能，同时不损害模型原始能力；通过选择性扩展少数层，能以较低计算成本获得相同性能。
AI.conclusion: 提出的函数保持扩展方法有效解决了灾难性遗忘问题，实现了预训练知识的稳定重用，为高效模型适应提供了模块化解决方案。

title: Exploring Deep Learning and Ultra-Widefield Imaging for Diabetic Retinopathy and Macular Edema
summary: Diabetic retinopathy (DR) and diabetic macular edema (DME) are leading causes of preventable blindness among working-age adults. Traditional approaches in the literature focus on standard color fundus photography (CFP) for the detection of these conditions. Nevertheless, recent ultra-widefield imaging (UWF) offers a significantly wider field of view in comparison to CFP. Motivated by this, the present study explores state-of-the-art deep learning (DL) methods and UWF imaging on three clinically relevant tasks: i) image quality assessment for UWF, ii) identification of referable diabetic retinopathy (RDR), and iii) identification of DME. Using the publicly available UWF4DR Challenge dataset, released as part of the MICCAI 2024 conference, we benchmark DL models in the spatial (RGB) and frequency domains, including popular convolutional neural networks (CNNs) as well as recent vision transformers (ViTs) and foundation models. In addition, we explore a final feature-level fusion to increase robustness. Finally, we also analyze the decisions of the DL models using Grad-CAM, increasing the explainability. Our proposal achieves consistently strong performance across all architectures, underscoring the competitiveness of emerging ViTs and foundation models and the promise of feature-level fusion and frequency-domain representations for UWF analysis.

AI.tldr: 该研究探索了深度学习模型在超广角成像（UWF）上用于糖尿病视网膜病变（DR）和糖尿病黄斑水肿（DME）检测的性能，比较了CNN、ViT和基础模型，并研究了特征级融合和频域表示。
AI.motivation: 传统方法主要使用标准彩色眼底照相（CFP）检测糖尿病视网膜病变，但新兴的超广角成像（UWF）提供更广的视野，可能改善检测效果。研究旨在探索深度学习在UWF上的应用潜力。
AI.method: 使用公开的UWF4DR Challenge数据集，在空间域（RGB）和频域中基准测试多种深度学习模型，包括CNN、ViT和基础模型。采用特征级融合提高鲁棒性，并使用Grad-CAM分析模型决策。
AI.result: 研究在所有架构上均获得一致强性能，表明新兴的ViT和基础模型具有竞争力，特征级融合和频域表示对UWF分析有前景。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习结合UWF成像在糖尿病视网膜病变检测中表现出色，特征级融合和频域分析能进一步提升性能，为临床诊断提供了有前景的技术方案。

title: Divide and Predict: An Architecture for Input Space Partitioning and Enhanced Accuracy
summary: In this article the authors develop an intrinsic measure for quantifying heterogeneity in training data for supervised learning. This measure is the variance of a random variable which factors through the influences of pairs of training points. The variance is shown to capture data heterogeneity and can thus be used to assess if a sample is a mixture of distributions. The authors prove that the data itself contains key information that supports a partitioning into blocks. Several proof of concept studies are provided that quantify the connection between variance and heterogeneity for EMNIST image data and synthetic data. The authors establish that variance is maximal for equal mixes of distributions, and detail how variance-based data purification followed by conventional training over blocks can lead to significant increases in test accuracy.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种量化监督学习训练数据异质性的内在度量方法，该度量基于训练点对影响的随机变量方差，可用于评估样本是否为混合分布。
AI.motivation: 需要一种内在的度量方法来量化训练数据的异质性，以评估样本是否为混合分布，这对于理解数据特性和改进模型训练至关重要。
AI.method: 开发了一种基于训练点对影响的随机变量方差的内在度量方法，该方法能够捕捉数据异质性，并证明数据本身包含支持分块划分的关键信息。
AI.result: 方差能有效量化数据异质性，在等比例混合分布时达到最大；基于方差的数据净化后按块进行常规训练能显著提高测试准确率，在EMNIST图像数据和合成数据上得到验证。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方差度量是量化数据异质性的有效工具，能够识别混合分布，通过数据净化和分块训练策略可显著提升模型性能，为处理异质数据提供了新方法。

title: SiMO: Single-Modality-Operable Multimodal Collaborative Perception
comment: Accepted to ICLR 2026. This arXiv version includes an additional appendix (Appendix 15) containing further philosophical discussion not included in the official ICLR peer-reviewed version
summary: Collaborative perception integrates multi-agent perspectives to enhance the sensing range and overcome occlusion issues. While existing multimodal approaches leverage complementary sensors to improve performance, they are highly prone to failure--especially when a key sensor like LiDAR is unavailable. The root cause is that feature fusion leads to semantic mismatches between single-modality features and the downstream modules. This paper addresses this challenge for the first time in the field of collaborative perception, introducing Single-Modality-Operable Multimodal Collaborative Perception (SiMO). By adopting the proposed Length-Adaptive Multi-Modal Fusion (LAMMA), SiMO can adaptively handle remaining modal features during modal failures while maintaining consistency of the semantic space. Additionally, leveraging the innovative "Pretrain-Align-Fuse-RD" training strategy, SiMO addresses the issue of modality competition--generally overlooked by existing methods--ensuring the independence of each individual modality branch. Experiments demonstrate that SiMO effectively aligns multimodal features while simultaneously preserving modality-specific features, enabling it to maintain optimal performance across all individual modalities. The implementation details can be found in https://github.com/dempsey-wen/SiMO.

AI.tldr: SiMO提出了一种单模态可操作的多模态协同感知框架，通过自适应融合和训练策略解决模态失效和模态竞争问题，保持各模态独立性的同时实现特征对齐。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态协同感知方法在关键传感器（如LiDAR）失效时性能严重下降，原因是特征融合导致语义不匹配。需要解决模态失效和模态竞争问题。
AI.method: 提出SiMO框架：1）LAMMA（长度自适应多模态融合）处理模态失效；2）"Pretrain-Align-Fuse-RD"训练策略解决模态竞争，保持各模态分支独立性。
AI.result: 实验表明SiMO能有效对齐多模态特征同时保留模态特定特征，在所有单个模态上保持最优性能，解决了现有方法的失效问题。
AI.conclusion: SiMO首次解决了协同感知中的模态失效和模态竞争问题，通过自适应融合和训练策略实现了鲁棒的多模态协同感知。

title: Group Entropies and Mirror Duality: A Class of Flexible Mirror Descent Updates for Machine Learning
summary: We introduce a comprehensive theoretical and algorithmic framework that bridges formal group theory and group entropies with modern machine learning, paving the way for an infinite, flexible family of Mirror Descent (MD) optimization algorithms. Our approach exploits the rich structure of group entropies, which are generalized entropic functionals governed by group composition laws, encompassing and significantly extending all trace-form entropies such as the Shannon, Tsallis, and Kaniadakis families. By leveraging group-theoretical mirror maps (or link functions) in MD, expressed via multi-parametric generalized logarithms and their inverses (group exponentials), we achieve highly flexible and adaptable MD updates that can be tailored to diverse data geometries and statistical distributions. To this end, we introduce the notion of \textit{mirror duality}, which allows us to seamlessly switch or interchange group-theoretical link functions with their inverses, subject to specific learning rate constraints. By tuning or learning the hyperparameters of the group logarithms enables us to adapt the model to the statistical properties of the training distribution, while simultaneously ensuring desirable convergence characteristics via fine-tuning. This generality not only provides greater flexibility and improved convergence properties, but also opens new perspectives for applications in machine learning and deep learning by expanding the design of regularizers and natural gradient algorithms. We extensively evaluate the validity, robustness, and performance of the proposed updates on large-scale, simplex-constrained quadratic programming problems.

AI.tldr: 提出一个连接形式群论、群熵与现代机器学习的理论算法框架，构建无限灵活的Mirror Descent优化算法家族，通过群理论镜像映射实现高度自适应的优化更新。
AI.motivation: 传统Mirror Descent算法受限于特定熵函数和镜像映射，缺乏灵活性。本文旨在利用群熵的丰富数学结构，构建一个更通用、可适应不同数据几何和统计分布的优化框架。
AI.method: 基于群熵理论，使用多参数广义对数及其逆（群指数）作为MD中的镜像映射。引入"镜像对偶"概念，允许在特定学习率约束下切换群理论链接函数及其逆。通过调整或学习群对数的超参数来适应训练分布的统计特性。
AI.result: 构建了一个无限灵活的MD算法家族，显著扩展了Shannon、Tsallis、Kaniadakis等熵函数。在大规模单纯形约束二次规划问题上验证了方法的有效性、鲁棒性和性能。
AI.conclusion: 该框架不仅提供了更大的灵活性和改进的收敛特性，还为机器学习和深度学习中的正则化设计和自然梯度算法开辟了新视角，实现了对数据几何和统计分布的更好适应。

title: DynamicVGGT: Learning Dynamic Point Maps for 4D Scene Reconstruction in Autonomous Driving
summary: Dynamic scene reconstruction in autonomous driving remains a fundamental challenge due to significant temporal variations, moving objects, and complex scene dynamics. Existing feed-forward 3D models have demonstrated strong performance in static reconstruction but still struggle to capture dynamic motion. To address these limitations, we propose DynamicVGGT, a unified feed-forward framework that extends VGGT from static 3D perception to dynamic 4D reconstruction. Our goal is to model point motion within feed-forward 3D models in a dynamic and temporally coherent manner. To this end, we jointly predict the current and future point maps within a shared reference coordinate system, allowing the model to implicitly learn dynamic point representations through temporal correspondence. To efficiently capture temporal dependencies, we introduce a Motion-aware Temporal Attention (MTA) module that learns motion continuity. Furthermore, we design a Dynamic 3D Gaussian Splatting Head that explicitly models point motion by predicting Gaussian velocities using learnable motion tokens under scene flow supervision. It refines dynamic geometry through continuous 3D Gaussian optimization. Extensive experiments on autonomous driving datasets demonstrate that DynamicVGGT significantly outperforms existing methods in reconstruction accuracy, achieving robust feed-forward 4D dynamic scene reconstruction under complex driving scenarios.

AI.tldr: DynamicVGGT：将VGGT从静态3D感知扩展到动态4D重建的统一前馈框架，通过联合预测当前和未来点云、运动感知时间注意力模块和动态3D高斯泼溅头，实现自动驾驶场景下的鲁棒动态重建。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶中的动态场景重建面临重大挑战，包括显著的时间变化、移动物体和复杂的场景动态。现有的前馈3D模型在静态重建方面表现良好，但难以捕捉动态运动。
AI.method: 1. 扩展VGGT框架到动态4D重建；2. 在共享参考坐标系中联合预测当前和未来点云，通过时间对应关系隐式学习动态点表示；3. 引入运动感知时间注意力模块学习运动连续性；4. 设计动态3D高斯泼溅头，通过可学习运动令牌预测高斯速度，在场景流监督下显式建模点运动，并通过连续3D高斯优化细化动态几何。
AI.result: 在自动驾驶数据集上的广泛实验表明，DynamicVGGT在重建精度方面显著优于现有方法，在复杂驾驶场景下实现了鲁棒的前馈4D动态场景重建。
AI.conclusion: DynamicVGGT成功地将静态3D感知扩展到动态4D重建，通过隐式和显式运动建模的结合，为自动驾驶中的动态场景重建提供了有效的解决方案。

title: Context-free Self-Conditioned GAN for Trajectory Forecasting
comment: Accepted at the 2022 21st IEEE International Conference on Machine Learning and Applications (ICMLA)
summary: In this paper, we present a context-free unsupervised approach based on a self-conditioned GAN to learn different modes from 2D trajectories. Our intuition is that each mode indicates a different behavioral moving pattern in the discriminator's feature space. We apply this approach to the problem of trajectory forecasting. We present three different training settings based on self-conditioned GAN, which produce better forecasters. We test our method in two data sets: human motion and road agents. Experimental results show that our approach outperforms previous context-free methods in the least representative supervised labels while performing well in the remaining labels. In addition, our approach outperforms globally in human motion, while performing well in road agents.

AI.tldr: 提出基于自条件GAN的无监督上下文无关方法，从2D轨迹中学习不同行为模式，应用于轨迹预测任务，在人类运动和道路代理数据集上表现优异。
AI.motivation: 传统轨迹预测方法通常需要上下文信息或监督标签，本文旨在开发一种上下文无关的无监督方法，能够从2D轨迹中自动学习不同的行为移动模式，减少对监督数据的依赖。
AI.method: 基于自条件GAN的无监督框架，通过判别器的特征空间识别不同行为模式，提出了三种不同的自条件GAN训练设置来改进预测性能。
AI.result: 在两个数据集（人类运动和道路代理）上测试，在最少监督标签的情况下优于之前的上下文无关方法，在人类运动数据集上全局表现优异，在道路代理数据集上也表现良好。
AI.conclusion: 自条件GAN的无监督方法能够有效学习轨迹中的不同行为模式，在轨迹预测任务中表现出色，特别是在监督标签有限的情况下具有优势。

title: WaDi: Weight Direction-aware Distillation for One-step Image Synthesis
summary: Despite the impressive performance of diffusion models such as Stable Diffusion (SD) in image generation, their slow inference limits practical deployment. Recent works accelerate inference by distilling multi-step diffusion into one-step generators. To better understand the distillation mechanism, we analyze U-Net/DiT weight changes between one-step students and their multi-step teacher counterparts. Our analysis reveals that changes in weight direction significantly exceed those in weight norm, highlighting it as the key factor during distillation. Motivated by this insight, we propose the Low-rank Rotation of weight Direction (LoRaD), a parameter-efficient adapter tailored to one-step diffusion distillation. LoRaD is designed to model these structured directional changes using learnable low-rank rotation matrices. We further integrate LoRaD into Variational Score Distillation (VSD), resulting in Weight Direction-aware Distillation (WaDi)-a novel one-step distillation framework. WaDi achieves state-of-the-art FID scores on COCO 2014 and COCO 2017 while using only approximately 10% of the trainable parameters of the U-Net/DiT. Furthermore, the distilled one-step model demonstrates strong versatility and scalability, generalizing well to various downstream tasks such as controllable generation, relation inversion, and high-resolution synthesis.

AI.tldr: 提出LoRaD适配器和WaDi框架，通过低秩旋转矩阵建模权重方向变化，实现高效的一步扩散蒸馏，仅需约10%可训练参数达到SOTA性能
AI.motivation: 尽管扩散模型（如Stable Diffusion）在图像生成方面表现出色，但其缓慢的推理速度限制了实际部署。现有工作通过将多步扩散蒸馏为一步生成器来加速推理，但需要深入理解蒸馏机制以设计更高效的方案。
AI.method: 首先分析U-Net/DiT权重变化，发现权重方向变化远大于权重范数变化。基于此提出LoRaD（低秩旋转方向）适配器，使用可学习的低秩旋转矩阵建模结构化方向变化。进一步将LoRaD集成到VSD中，形成WaDi（权重方向感知蒸馏）框架。
AI.result: 在COCO 2014和COCO 2017上达到最先进的FID分数，仅使用U-Net/DiT约10%的可训练参数。蒸馏后的一步模型展现出强大的泛化能力，适用于可控生成、关系反演和高分辨率合成等下游任务。
AI.conclusion: 权重方向变化是扩散蒸馏的关键因素，LoRaD适配器和WaDi框架通过高效建模这些变化，实现了参数高效的一步扩散蒸馏，在保持性能的同时显著提升了推理速度。

title: Event-based Motion & Appearance Fusion for 6D Object Pose Tracking
summary: Object pose tracking is a fundamental and essential task for robotics to perform tasks in the home and industrial settings. The most commonly used sensors to do so are RGB-D cameras, which can hit limitations in highly dynamic environments due to motion blur and frame-rate constraints. Event cameras have remarkable features such as high temporal resolution and low latency, which make them a potentially ideal vision sensors for object pose tracking at high speed. Even so, there are still only few works on 6D pose tracking with event cameras. In this work, we take advantage of the high temporal resolution and propose a method that uses both a propagation step fused with a pose correction strategy. Specifically, we use 6D object velocity obtained from event-based optical flow for pose propagation, after which, a template-based local pose correction module is utilized for pose correction. Our learning-free method has comparable performance to the state-of-the-art algorithms, and in some cases out performs them for fast-moving objects. The results indicate the potential for using event cameras in highly-dynamic scenarios where the use of deep network approaches are limited by low update rates.

AI.tldr: 提出基于事件相机的6D物体姿态跟踪方法，利用事件相机的高时间分辨率特性，结合姿态传播和校正策略，在高速运动场景中表现优异。
AI.motivation: 传统RGB-D相机在高速动态环境中存在运动模糊和帧率限制的问题，而事件相机具有高时间分辨率和低延迟特性，适合高速物体姿态跟踪，但目前相关研究较少。
AI.method: 采用无学习方法，结合姿态传播和校正策略：1) 利用事件光流获取6D物体速度进行姿态传播；2) 使用基于模板的局部姿态校正模块进行姿态修正。
AI.result: 方法在性能上与最先进算法相当，在快速移动物体场景中表现更优，展示了事件相机在高度动态场景中的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 事件相机在高速动态场景中具有显著优势，该方法为在深度学习网络更新率受限的场景中提供了有效的解决方案。

title: A New Lower Bound for the Random Offerer Mechanism in Bilateral Trade using AI-Guided Evolutionary Search
summary:
The celebrated Myerson--Satterthwaite theorem shows that in bilateral trade, no mechanism can be simultaneously fully efficient, Bayesian incentive compatible (BIC), and budget balanced (BB). This naturally raises the question of how closely the gains from trade (GFT) achievable by a BIC and BB mechanism can approximate the first-best (fully efficient) benchmark. The optimal BIC and BB mechanism is typically complex and highly distribution-dependent, making it difficult to characterize directly. Consequently, much of the literature analyzes simpler mechanisms such as the Random-Offerer (RO) mechanism and establishes constant-factor guarantees relative to the first-best GFT. An important open question concerns the worst-case performance of the RO mechanism relative to first-best (FB) efficiency. While it was originally hypothesized that the approximation ratio $\frac{\text{GFT}_{\text{FB}}}{\text{GFT}_{\text{RO}}}$ is bounded by $2$, recent work provided counterexamples to this conjecture: Cai et al. proved that the ratio can be strictly larger than $2$, and Babaioff et al. exhibited an explicit example with ratio approximately $2.02$.
  In this work, we employ AlphaEvolve, an AI-guided evolutionary search framework, to explore the space of value distributions. We identify a new worst-case instance that yields an improved lower bound of $\frac{\text{GFT}_{\text{FB}}}{\text{GFT}_{\text{RO}}} \ge \textbf{2.0749}$. This establishes a new lower bound on the worst-case performance of the Random-Offerer mechanism, demonstrating a wider efficiency gap than previously known.

AI.tldr: 使用AI进化搜索发现双边贸易中Random-Offerer机制相对于最优效率的近似比下界提高到2.0749，突破了之前的2.02下界。
AI.motivation: Myerson-Satterthwaite定理表明双边贸易中无法同时实现完全效率、贝叶斯激励相容和预算平衡。因此研究BIC和BB机制能达到的最优效率近似程度很重要。Random-Offerer机制的近似比上界问题未解决，之前假设为2，但最近反例显示可超过2，需要进一步探索最坏情况性能。
AI.method: 使用AlphaEvolve框架，这是一个AI引导的进化搜索框架，用于探索价值分布空间，寻找使Random-Offerer机制相对于最优效率表现最差的分布实例。
AI.result: 发现了一个新的最坏情况实例，将Random-Offerer机制相对于最优效率的近似比下界提高到2.0749，突破了之前Cai等人和Babaioff等人建立的2.02下界。
AI.conclusion: Random-Offerer机制在最坏情况下的效率损失比之前已知的更大，近似比至少为2.0749，这为双边贸易机制设计提供了新的理论边界。

title: Prototype-Guided Concept Erasure in Diffusion Models
summary: Concept erasure is extensively utilized in image generation to prevent text-to-image models from generating undesired content. Existing methods can effectively erase narrow concepts that are specific and concrete, such as distinct intellectual properties (e.g. Pikachu) or recognizable characters (e.g. Elon Musk). However, their performance degrades on broad concepts such as ``sexual'' or ``violent'', whose wide scope and multi-faceted nature make them difficult to erase reliably. To overcome this limitation, we exploit the model's intrinsic embedding geometry to identify latent embeddings that encode a given concept. By clustering these embeddings, we derive a set of concept prototypes that summarize the model's internal representations of the concept, and employ them as negative conditioning signals during inference to achieve precise and reliable erasure. Extensive experiments across multiple benchmarks show that our approach achieves substantially more reliable removal of broad concepts while preserving overall image quality, marking a step towards safer and more controllable image generation.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于嵌入几何和聚类的方法，用于从文本到图像模型中可靠地擦除广泛概念（如"性"或"暴力"），而现有方法主要针对具体概念。
AI.motivation: 现有概念擦除方法能有效处理具体概念（如特定IP或人物），但在处理广泛概念（如"性"、"暴力"）时性能下降，因为这些概念范围广、多面性强，难以可靠擦除。
AI.method: 利用模型内在嵌入几何识别编码给定概念的潜在嵌入，通过聚类这些嵌入得到概念原型，在推理时将其作为负条件信号，实现精确可靠的概念擦除。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试上的广泛实验表明，该方法能显著更可靠地移除广泛概念，同时保持整体图像质量。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为实现更安全、更可控的图像生成迈出了一步，通过利用模型内部表示来有效处理广泛概念擦除的挑战。

title: Split Federated Learning Architectures for High-Accuracy and Low-Delay Model Training
summary: Can we find a network architecture for ML model training so as to optimize training loss (and thus, accuracy) in Split Federated Learning (SFL)? And can this architecture also reduce training delay and communication overhead? While accuracy is not influenced by how we split the model in ordinary, state-of-the-art SFL, in this work we answer the questions above in the affirmative. Recent Hierarchical SFL (HSFL) architectures adopt a three-tier training structure consisting of clients, (local) aggregators, and a central server. In this architecture, the model is partitioned at two partitioning layers into three sub-models, which are executed across the three tiers. Despite their merits, HSFL architectures overlook the impact of the partitioning layers and client-to-aggregator assignments on accuracy, delay, and overhead. This work explicitly captures the impact of the partitioning layers and client-to-aggregator assignments on accuracy, delay and overhead by formulating a joint optimization problem. We prove that the problem is NP-hard and propose the first accuracy-aware heuristic algorithm that explicitly accounts for model accuracy, while remaining delay-efficient. Simulation results on public datasets show that our approach can improve accuracy by 3%, while reducing delay by 20% and overhead by 50%, compared to state-of-the-art SFL and HSFL schemes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种分层联邦学习（HSFL）架构优化方法，通过联合优化模型分割层和客户端-聚合器分配，在保证准确性的同时降低训练延迟和通信开销。
AI.motivation: 现有分层联邦学习架构虽然采用客户端、本地聚合器和中央服务器的三层结构，但忽略了模型分割层和客户端-聚合器分配对准确性、延迟和开销的影响。需要找到既能优化训练损失（准确性）又能减少延迟和通信开销的网络架构。
AI.method: 1. 明确捕捉模型分割层和客户端-聚合器分配对准确性、延迟和开销的影响；2. 建立联合优化问题；3. 证明问题是NP-hard；4. 提出首个准确性感知的启发式算法，在保持延迟效率的同时显式考虑模型准确性。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上的仿真结果表明，相比最先进的SFL和HSFL方案，该方法能将准确性提高3%，同时减少20%的延迟和50%的通信开销。
AI.conclusion: 通过联合优化模型分割层和客户端-聚合器分配，可以显著提升分层联邦学习的性能，在准确性、延迟和开销之间取得更好的平衡。

title: OSCAR: Occupancy-based Shape Completion via Acoustic Neural Implicit Representations
summary: Accurate 3D reconstruction of vertebral anatomy from ultrasound is important for guiding minimally invasive spine interventions, but it remains challenging due to acoustic shadowing and view-dependent signal variations. We propose an occupancy-based shape completion method that reconstructs complete 3D anatomical geometry from partial ultrasound observations. Crucially for intra-operative applications, our approach extracts the anatomical surface directly from the image, avoiding the need for anatomical labels during inference. This label-free completion relies on a coupled latent space representing both the image appearance and the underlying anatomical shape. By leveraging a Neural Implicit Representation (NIR) that jointly models both spatial occupancy and acoustic interactions, the method uses acoustic parameters to become implicitly aware of the unseen regions without explicit shadowing labels through tracking acoustic signal transmission. We show that this method outperforms state-of-the-art shape completion for B-mode ultrasound by 80% in HD95 score. We validate our approach both in-silico and on phantom US images with registered mesh models from CT labels, demonstrating accurate reconstruction of occluded anatomy and robust generalization across diverse imaging conditions. Code and data will be released on publication.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于占用的形状补全方法，从部分超声观测中重建完整的3D解剖几何，无需推理时的解剖标签，通过耦合潜在空间和神经隐式表示实现无标签补全。
AI.motivation: 超声引导的微创脊柱介入需要准确的3D椎体解剖重建，但由于声影和视角依赖的信号变化，这一任务仍然具有挑战性。
AI.method: 采用基于占用的形状补全方法，通过耦合潜在空间同时表示图像外观和底层解剖形状，利用神经隐式表示联合建模空间占用和声学相互作用，通过追踪声信号传输来隐式感知未观察区域。
AI.result: 在B模式超声的形状补全任务中，HD95分数比最先进方法提高80%，在仿真和体模超声图像上验证了方法，能够准确重建被遮挡的解剖结构并在不同成像条件下具有鲁棒泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能够从部分超声观测中重建完整的3D解剖几何，无需推理时的解剖标签，为术中应用提供了有效的解决方案，代码和数据将在发表时发布。

title: Impermanent: A Live Benchmark for Temporal Generalization in Time Series Forecasting
summary: Recent advances in time-series forecasting increasingly rely on pre-trained foundation-style models. While these models often claim broad generalization, existing evaluation protocols provide limited evidence. Indeed, most current benchmarks use static train-test splits that can easily lead to contamination as foundation models can inadvertently train on test data or perform model selection using test scores, which can inflate performance. We introduce Impermanent, a live benchmark that evaluates forecasting models under open-world temporal change by scoring forecasts sequentially over time on continuously updated data streams, enabling the study of temporal robustness, distributional shift, and performance stability rather than one-off accuracy on a frozen test set. Impermanent is instantiated on GitHub open-source activity, providing a naturally live and highly non-stationary dataset shaped by releases, shifting contributor behavior, platform/tooling changes, and external events. We focus on the top 400 repositories by star count and construct time series from issues opened, pull requests opened, push events, and new stargazers, evaluated over a rolling window with daily updates, alongside standardized protocols and leaderboards for reproducible, ongoing comparison. By shifting evaluation from static accuracy to sustained performance, Impermanent takes a concrete step toward assessing when and whether foundation-level generalization in time-series forecasting can be meaningfully claimed. Code and a live dashboard are available at https://github.com/TimeCopilot/impermanent and https://impermanent.timecopilot.dev.

AI.tldr: Impermanent是一个用于时间序列预测的实时基准测试，通过连续更新的数据流进行顺序评分，评估模型在开放世界时间变化下的表现，而非传统静态测试集的一次性准确性。
AI.motivation: 当前时间序列预测的预训练基础模型声称具有广泛泛化能力，但现有评估协议证据有限。静态训练-测试分割容易导致数据污染（模型可能无意中在测试数据上训练或使用测试分数进行模型选择），从而夸大性能表现。
AI.method: 引入Impermanent实时基准测试，在持续更新的数据流上按时间顺序评分预测模型，研究时间鲁棒性、分布偏移和性能稳定性。基于GitHub开源活动构建，关注前400个仓库，从问题开启、拉取请求、推送事件和新关注者构建时间序列，采用滚动窗口和每日更新进行评估。
AI.result: 提供了标准化的协议和排行榜，用于可重复的持续比较。通过将评估从静态准确性转向持续性能，为评估时间序列预测中基础级泛化能力的真实声称提供了具体方法。
AI.conclusion: Impermanent通过实时、动态的评估框架，为时间序列预测模型的真实泛化能力评估提供了更可靠的基准，有助于判断基础模型是否真正实现了有意义的泛化。

title: Novel Semantic Prompting for Zero-Shot Action Recognition
summary: Zero-shot action recognition relies on transferring knowledge from vision-language models to unseen actions using semantic descriptions. While recent methods focus on temporal modeling or architectural adaptations to handle video data, we argue that semantic prompting alone provides a strong and underexplored signal for zero-shot action understanding. We introduce SP-CLIP, a lightweight framework that augments frozen vision-language models with structured semantic prompts describing actions at multiple levels of abstraction, such as intent, motion, and object interaction. Without modifying the visual encoder or learning additional parameters, SP-CLIP aligns video representations with enriched textual semantics through prompt aggregation and consistency scoring. Experiments across standard benchmarks show that semantic prompting substantially improves zero-shot action recognition, particularly for fine-grained and compositional actions, while preserving the efficiency and generalization of pretrained models.

AI.tldr: SP-CLIP通过结构化语义提示增强冻结的视觉语言模型，无需修改视觉编码器或学习额外参数，显著提升零样本动作识别性能
AI.motivation: 当前零样本动作识别方法主要关注时序建模或架构调整，但语义提示本身作为零样本动作理解的强信号被低估了。作者认为语义提示提供了未被充分探索的重要信息。
AI.method: 提出SP-CLIP框架，通过结构化语义提示描述动作的多个抽象层次（意图、运动、物体交互），通过提示聚合和一致性评分将视频表示与丰富的文本语义对齐，保持冻结的视觉编码器且不学习额外参数。
AI.result: 在标准基准测试中，语义提示显著提升了零样本动作识别性能，特别是在细粒度和组合动作上，同时保持了预训练模型的效率和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 语义提示是零样本动作理解中被低估的强大信号，SP-CLIP展示了通过结构化语义提示增强冻结视觉语言模型的有效性，为轻量级零样本动作识别提供了新方向。

title: Retrieval-Augmented Anatomical Guidance for Text-to-CT Generation
summary: Text-conditioned generative models for volumetric medical imaging provide semantic control but lack explicit anatomical guidance, often resulting in outputs that are spatially ambiguous or anatomically inconsistent. In contrast, structure-driven methods ensure strong anatomical consistency but typically assume access to ground-truth annotations, which are unavailable when the target image is to be synthesized. We propose a retrieval-augmented approach for Text-to-CT generation that integrates semantic and anatomical information under a realistic inference setting. Given a radiology report, our method retrieves a semantically related clinical case using a 3D vision-language encoder and leverages its associated anatomical annotation as a structural proxy. This proxy is injected into a text-conditioned latent diffusion model via a ControlNet branch, providing coarse anatomical guidance while maintaining semantic flexibility. Experiments on the CT-RATE dataset show that retrieval-augmented generation improves image fidelity and clinical consistency compared to text-only baselines, while additionally enabling explicit spatial controllability, a capability inherently absent in such approaches. Further analysis highlights the importance of retrieval quality, with semantically aligned proxies yielding consistent gains across all evaluation axes. This work introduces a principled and scalable mechanism to bridge semantic conditioning and anatomical plausibility in volumetric medical image synthesis. Code will be released.

AI.tldr: 提出检索增强的文本到CT生成方法，结合语义和结构信息，通过检索相似病例的解剖标注作为结构代理，在保持语义灵活性的同时提高解剖一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有文本条件生成模型缺乏明确的解剖指导，导致空间模糊或解剖不一致；而结构驱动方法需要真实标注，在合成目标图像时不可用。需要一种在现实推理设置下整合语义和解剖信息的方法。
AI.method: 使用检索增强方法：给定放射学报告，通过3D视觉语言编码器检索语义相关的临床病例，利用其解剖标注作为结构代理；通过ControlNet分支注入文本条件潜在扩散模型，提供粗略解剖指导。
AI.result: 在CT-RATE数据集上，检索增强生成相比纯文本基线提高了图像保真度和临床一致性，同时实现了显式的空间可控性。检索质量至关重要，语义对齐的代理在所有评估维度上都带来一致提升。
AI.conclusion: 这项工作提出了一个原则性和可扩展的机制，在体医学图像合成中桥接语义条件和解剖合理性，为医学图像生成提供了更好的解剖指导能力。

title: Concept-Guided Fine-Tuning: Steering ViTs away from Spurious Correlations to Improve Robustness
summary: Vision Transformers (ViTs) often degrade under distribution shifts because they rely on spurious correlations, such as background cues, rather than semantically meaningful features. Existing regularization methods, typically relying on simple foreground-background masks, which fail to capture the fine-grained semantic concepts that define an object (e.g., ``long beak'' and ``wings'' for a ``bird''). As a result, these methods provide limited robustness to distribution shifts. To address this limitation, we introduce a novel finetuning framework that steers model reasoning toward concept-level semantics. Our approach optimizes the model's internal relevance maps to align with spatially grounded concept masks. These masks are generated automatically, without manual annotation: class-relevant concepts are first proposed using an LLM-based, label-free method, and then segmented using a VLM. The finetuning objective aligns relevance with these concept regions while simultaneously suppressing focus on spurious background areas. Notably, this process requires only a minimal set of images and uses half of the dataset classes. Extensive experiments on five out-of-distribution benchmarks demonstrate that our method improves robustness across multiple ViT-based models. Furthermore, we show that the resulting relevance maps exhibit stronger alignment with semantic object parts, offering a scalable path toward more robust and interpretable vision models. Finally, we confirm that concept-guided masks provide more effective supervision for model robustness than conventional segmentation maps, supporting our central hypothesis.

AI.tldr: 提出概念引导的微调框架，通过自动生成细粒度语义概念掩码来对齐模型内部相关性图，提升ViT在分布偏移下的鲁棒性
AI.motivation: 现有正则化方法依赖简单的前景-背景掩码，无法捕捉定义对象的细粒度语义概念（如鸟的"长喙"和"翅膀"），导致对分布偏移的鲁棒性有限
AI.method: 1) 使用LLM自动提出类别相关概念；2) 使用VLM分割概念掩码；3) 微调目标：对齐模型内部相关性图与概念区域，同时抑制对虚假背景区域的关注；4) 仅需少量图像和一半数据集类别
AI.result: 在五个分布外基准测试中显著提升了多种ViT模型的鲁棒性，生成的相关性图与语义对象部分有更强对齐，概念引导掩码比传统分割图提供更有效的监督
AI.conclusion: 概念引导的微调框架通过自动生成细粒度语义概念掩码，有效提升ViT在分布偏移下的鲁棒性和可解释性，为构建更鲁棒和可解释的视觉模型提供了可扩展路径

title: HDR-NSFF: High Dynamic Range Neural Scene Flow Fields
summary: Radiance of real-world scenes typically spans a much wider dynamic range than what standard cameras can capture. While conventional HDR methods merge alternating-exposure frames, these approaches are inherently constrained to 2D pixel-level alignment, often leading to ghosting artifacts and temporal inconsistency in dynamic scenes. To address these limitations, we present HDR-NSFF, a paradigm shift from 2D-based merging to 4D spatio-temporal modeling. Our framework reconstructs dynamic HDR radiance fields from alternating-exposure monocular videos by representing the scene as a continuous function of space and time, and is compatible with both neural radiance field and 4D Gaussian Splatting (4DGS) based dynamic representations. This unified end-to-end pipeline explicitly models HDR radiance, 3D scene flow, geometry, and tone-mapping, ensuring physical plausibility and global coherence. We further enhance robustness by (i) extending semantic-based optical flow with DINO features to achieve exposure-invariant motion estimation, and (ii) incorporating a generative prior as a regularizer to compensate for limited observation in monocular captures and saturation-induced information loss. To evaluate HDR space-time view synthesis, we present the first real-world HDR-GoPro dataset specifically designed for dynamic HDR scenes. Experiments demonstrate that HDR-NSFF recovers fine radiance details and coherent dynamics even under challenging exposure variations, thereby achieving state-of-the-art performance in novel space-time view synthesis. Project page: https://shin-dong-yeon.github.io/HDR-NSFF/

AI.tldr: HDR-NSFF：从2D多曝光融合转向4D时空建模的动态HDR新范式，通过神经辐射场或4D高斯泼溅重建动态HDR辐射场，实现时空一致的高动态范围新视角合成。
AI.motivation: 传统HDR方法基于2D像素级对齐的多曝光帧融合，在动态场景中容易产生重影和时间不一致问题。需要从2D融合转向4D时空建模来解决这些限制。
AI.method: 提出HDR-NSFF框架，从单目交替曝光视频重建动态HDR辐射场。采用4D时空建模，统一建模HDR辐射、3D场景流、几何和色调映射。引入基于DINO特征的曝光不变运动估计，并使用生成先验作为正则化器补偿单目捕获的观测限制。
AI.result: 创建了首个真实世界HDR-GoPro数据集用于评估。实验表明HDR-NSFF在挑战性曝光变化下能恢复精细辐射细节和连贯动态，在时空新视角合成中达到最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: HDR-NSFF通过4D时空建模范式转变，成功解决了传统HDR方法在动态场景中的重影和时间不一致问题，为动态HDR场景重建提供了统一且物理合理的解决方案。

title: Human-AI Divergence in Ego-centric Action Recognition under Spatial and Spatiotemporal Manipulations
summary: Humans consistently outperform state-of-the-art AI models in action recognition, particularly in challenging real-world conditions involving low resolution, occlusion, and visual clutter. Understanding the sources of this performance gap is essential for developing more robust and human-aligned models. In this paper, we present a large-scale human-AI comparative study of egocentric action recognition using Minimal Identifiable Recognition Crops (MIRCs), defined as the smallest spatial or spatiotemporal regions sufficient for reliable human recognition. We used our previously introduced, Epic ReduAct, a systematically spatially reduced and temporally scrambled dataset derived from 36 EPIC KITCHENS videos, spanning multiple spatial reduction levels and temporal conditions. Recognition performance is evaluated using over 3,000 human participants and the Side4Video model. Our analysis combines quantitative metrics, Average Reduction Rate and Recognition Gap, with qualitative analyses of spatial (high-, mid-, and low-level visual features) and spatiotemporal factors, including a categorisation of actions into Low Temporal Actions (LTA) and High Temporal Actions (HTA). Results show that human performance exhibits sharp declines when transitioning from MIRCs to subMIRCs, reflecting a strong reliance on sparse, semantically critical cues such as hand-object interactions. In contrast, the model degrades more gradually and often relies on contextual and mid- to low-level features, sometimes even exhibiting increased confidence under spatial reduction. Temporally, humans remain robust to scrambling when key spatial cues are preserved, whereas the model often shows insensitivity to temporal disruption, revealing class-dependent temporal sensitivities.

AI.tldr: 人类在动作识别上优于AI模型，特别是在低分辨率、遮挡和视觉杂乱等挑战性条件下。研究通过最小可识别裁剪区域(MIRCs)比较人类与AI在自我中心动作识别上的表现，发现人类依赖稀疏的关键语义线索，而AI更依赖上下文和中低层特征。
AI.motivation: 人类在动作识别任务中持续超越最先进的AI模型，特别是在具有挑战性的真实世界条件下。理解这种性能差距的来源对于开发更鲁棒和与人类对齐的模型至关重要。
AI.method: 使用最小可识别识别裁剪区域(MIRCs)进行大规模人类-AI比较研究。采用Epic ReduAct数据集，包含36个EPIC KITCHENS视频的系统性空间缩减和时间打乱版本。评估了3000多名人类参与者和Side4Video模型的识别性能，结合定量指标（平均缩减率和识别差距）和定性分析（空间特征：高、中、低层视觉特征；时空因素：低时间动作LTA和高时间动作HTA分类）。
AI.result: 人类性能在从MIRCs过渡到subMIRCs时急剧下降，表明对稀疏的关键语义线索（如手-物体交互）的强烈依赖。相比之下，模型性能下降更平缓，通常依赖上下文和中低层特征，有时甚至在空间缩减下表现出更高的置信度。时间上，当关键空间线索保留时，人类对时间打乱保持鲁棒，而模型通常对时间干扰不敏感，显示出类别依赖的时间敏感性。
AI.conclusion: 人类和AI在动作识别上存在根本性差异：人类依赖稀疏的关键语义线索，而AI更依赖分布式的上下文特征。这些发现为开发更鲁棒、人类对齐的视觉模型提供了重要见解，强调了需要关注关键语义线索而非仅仅是上下文特征。

title: Beyond Attention Heatmaps: How to Get Better Explanations for Multiple Instance Learning Models in Histopathology
summary: Multiple instance learning (MIL) has enabled substantial progress in computational histopathology, where a large amount of patches from gigapixel whole slide images are aggregated into slide-level predictions. Heatmaps are widely used to validate MIL models and to discover tissue biomarkers. Yet, the validity of these heatmaps has barely been investigated. In this work, we introduce a general framework for evaluating the quality of MIL heatmaps without requiring additional labels. We conduct a large-scale benchmark experiment to assess six explanation methods across histopathology task types (classification, regression, survival), MIL model architectures (Attention-, Transformer-, Mamba-based), and patch encoder backbones (UNI2, Virchow2). Our results show that explanation quality mostly depends on MIL model architecture and task type, with perturbation ("Single"), layer-wise relevance propagation (LRP), and integrated gradients (IG) consistently outperforming attention-based and gradient-based saliency heatmaps, which often fail to reflect model decision mechanisms. We further demonstrate the advanced capabilities of the best-performing explanation methods: (i) We provide a proof-of-concept that MIL heatmaps of a bulk gene expression prediction model can be correlated with spatial transcriptomics for biological validation, and (ii) showcase the discovery of distinct model strategies for predicting human papillomavirus (HPV) infection from head and neck cancer slides. Our work highlights the importance of validating MIL heatmaps and establishes that improved explainability can enable more reliable model validation and yield biological insights, making a case for a broader adoption of explainable AI in digital pathology. Our code is provided in a public GitHub repository: https://github.com/bifold-pathomics/xMIL/tree/xmil-journal

AI.tldr: 该研究系统评估了多实例学习（MIL）在计算病理学中的热图解释方法质量，发现扰动法、LRP和集成梯度优于注意力热图，并展示了热图在生物验证和模型策略发现中的应用价值。
AI.motivation: 在计算病理学中，MIL模型广泛使用热图进行验证和生物标志物发现，但这些热图的有效性很少被系统评估。本研究旨在填补这一空白，为MIL热图提供无额外标签的质量评估框架。
AI.method: 提出了一个无需额外标签的通用MIL热图质量评估框架，进行了大规模基准实验，评估了6种解释方法（包括注意力、梯度、LRP、集成梯度等），覆盖不同病理任务类型、MIL架构和编码器骨干网络。
AI.result: 发现解释质量主要取决于MIL模型架构和任务类型，扰动法（"Single"）、LRP和集成梯度表现最佳，而基于注意力和梯度的热图往往不能反映模型决策机制。展示了最佳方法在空间转录组学验证和HPV感染预测模型策略发现中的应用。
AI.conclusion: 验证MIL热图质量至关重要，改进的可解释性能够实现更可靠的模型验证并获得生物学洞见，支持在数字病理学中更广泛地采用可解释AI。

title: Local-Global Prompt Learning via Sparse Optimal Transport
comment: 9 pages, 3 figures, 4 tables. Code available at GitHub
summary: Few-shot adaptation of vision-language models (VLMs) like CLIP typically relies on learning textual prompts matched to global image embeddings.
